sentences: D is the fourth letter of the English alphabet. D 是英文母表的第四個字母。
He received a grade of D on his history exam. 他的歷史考試得了丁等。
The word 'dog' begins with a lowercase 'd'. 'dog' 這個詞以小寫字母 'd' 開頭。
Please write the letter 'd' clearly. 請把字母 'd' 寫清楚。

meaning: 是的（俄語或羅馬尼亞語等）
sentences: He answered 'da' when I asked if he was ready. 當我問他是否準備好時，他回答 'da'（是的）。
'Da' means yes in several Slavic languages. 'Da' 在幾種斯拉夫語言中意為是的。
The merchant was paid in daalders for his goods. 商人因其貨物而獲得達爾德金幣作為報酬。
A daalder was an old silver coin used in the Netherlands. 達爾德是荷蘭過去使用的一種舊銀幣。
She used a tissue to dab the tears from her eyes. 她用面紙輕拍掉眼角的淚水。
Add a small dab of butter to the top of the warm toast. 在熱騰騰的吐司上面加一小塊（少量）奶油。
She used a tissue to dab her eyes. 她用面紙輕拍眼睛。
A dab of perfume is all you need. 你只需要一點點香水。
The dabb is a species of lizard found in arid regions. 埃及大尾蜥是發現於乾旱地區的一種蜥蜴。
Dabb lizards are known for their thick, spiny tails. 埃及大尾蜥以其厚實、多刺的尾巴而聞名。
The dabba wallas deliver lunch in metal containers. 送餐員用金屬容器（飯盒）遞送午餐。
He carried his dabba to work every morning. 他每天早上帶著他的飯盒去上班。
The artist used a dabber to apply the paint evenly. 藝術家使用塗抹工具均勻地塗抹顏料。
The bingo player used a purple dabber to mark his card. 賓果遊戲玩家使用紫色塗抹器標記他的卡片。
He likes to dabble in oil painting during his free time. 他喜歡在空閒時間涉獵油畫。
The children dabble their feet in the cool water. 孩子們在涼爽的水中嬉戲。

meaning: 淺嚐輒止者；業餘愛好者
sentences: He's not a professional, just a dabbler in photography. 他不是專業人士，只是攝影方面的業餘愛好者。
A dabbler usually knows a little about many things. 淺嚐輒止者通常對很多事情都略知一二。
Dabbling ducks feed by tipping their heads into the water. 涉水鴨通過將頭伸入水中來進食。
Her dabbling in politics began at a young age. 她在年輕時就開始涉獵政治。
He approached the subject dabblingly without much commitment. 他以淺嚐的方式接觸這個主題，沒有投入太多。
She worked dabblingly on her novel for several years. 她斷斷續續地寫她的小說寫了好幾年。
The dabblingness of his approach frustrated his teachers. 他那種淺嚐輒止的學習方式讓他的老師感到沮喪。
Her dabblingness meant she never mastered any one skill. 她的淺嚐意味著她從未掌握過任何一項技能。
The surface felt dabby and unpleasant to touch. 表面感覺濕漉漉的，摸起來不舒服。
The dabby ground made walking difficult. 濕滑的地面使行走困難。
The dabchick dove under the water to catch a fish. 小鸊鷉潛入水中捕魚。
A dabchick is a small water bird common in ponds. 小鸊鷉是池塘中常見的小型水鳥。

meaning: 大比（摩羯座的一顆恆星）
sentences: Dabih is the second brightest star in the constellation Capricornus. 大比是摩羯座中第二亮的恆星。
Astronomers studied the spectral characteristics of Dabih. 天文學家研究了大比的光譜特徵。
Dabitis is a mood in the fourth figure of categorical syllogism. Dabitis 是定言三段論第四格中的一種格。
The student explained the structure of a Dabitis argument. 學生解釋了 Dabitis 論證的結構。
She added a dablet of salt to the soup. 她在湯裡加了一點點鹽。
Only a dablet of ink was left in the pen. 鋼筆裡只剩下一點點墨水。
Daboia is a genus of venomous vipers found in Asia. 圓斑蝰屬是發現於亞洲的一類有毒蝰蛇。
The Daboia russelii is one of the most dangerous snakes in India. 圓斑蝰是印度最危險的蛇之一。
The daboya is known for its distinctive patterns. 圓斑蝰以其獨特的圖案而聞名。
Encountering a daboya in the wild can be very dangerous. 在野外遇到圓斑蝰可能非常危險。
He's a dabster at fixing old clocks. 他是修理舊鐘錶的高手。
She is a real dabster when it comes to gardening. 說到園藝，她真是個行家。
The dace is a small freshwater fish found in European rivers. 雅羅魚是發現於歐洲河流中的一種小型淡水魚。
He spent the afternoon fishing for dace in the stream. 他整個下午都在小溪裡釣雅羅魚。
The genus Dacelo includes several species of kookaburras. 笑翠鳥屬包括幾種笑翠鳥。
Dacelo birds are native to Australia and New Guinea. 笑翠鳥屬鳥類原產於澳洲和新幾內亞。
Daceloninae is a subfamily of kingfishers. 笑翠鳥亞科是翠鳥科的一個亞科。
The characteristics of Daceloninae were described by the ornithologist. 鳥類學家描述了笑翠鳥亞科的特徵。
Dacelonine kingfishers are often found far from water. 笑翠鳥亞科的翠鳥通常出現在遠離水域的地方。
The researcher studied the nesting habits of dacelonine species. 研究人員研究了笑翠鳥亞科物種的築巢習慣。

meaning: 臘腸狗 (dachshund 的變體拼法)
sentences: The old book spelled the dog breed as dachshound. 那本舊書將這個犬種拼寫為 dachshound。
A dachshound is characterized by its long body and short legs. 臘腸狗的特徵是身體長、腿短。
We saw a dachshund at the zoo last weekend. 上週末我們在動物園看到了dachshund。
The documentary introduced the habits of the dachshund. 那部紀錄片介紹了dachshund的習性。
My neighbor has a playful dachshund named Oscar. 我的鄰居有一隻頑皮的臘腸狗，名叫奧斯卡。
Dachshunds were originally bred to hunt badgers. 臘腸狗最初是為了狩獵獾而培育的。
Dacian warriors were known for their bravery in battle. 達契亞戰士以戰鬥中的勇敢而聞名。
The Roman Empire eventually conquered the Dacian kingdom. 羅馬帝國最終征服了達契亞王國。
Dacite is an igneous, volcanic rock with a high silica content. 英安岩是一種二氧化矽含量高的火成火山岩。
The lava flow consisted mostly of dacite. 岩漿流主要由英安岩組成。
The volcano produced dacitic magma during the eruption. 火山在噴發過程中產生了英安岩質岩漿。
Geologists analyzed the dacitic samples from the site. 地質學家分析了該地點的英安岩樣本。
The old man would dacker around the garden. 那個老人會在花園裡徘徊。
The weather began to dacker, making us reconsider our plans. 天氣開始變得不穩定，讓我們重新考慮我們的計劃。

meaning: 土匪；強盜（特別是印度或緬甸）
sentences: The travelers were attacked by a band of dacoits. 旅客們遭到了一群土匪的襲擊。
The police captured several dacoits after a long chase. 經過長時間追捕，警方抓獲了幾名強盜。
Dacoitage was common in the remote regions of the country. 搶劫行為在該國的偏遠地區很常見。
The government took measures to suppress dacoitage. 政府採取措施鎮壓土匪行為。
The suspects were charged with dacoity and murder. 嫌疑人被控犯有武裝搶劫和謀殺罪。
Under Indian law, dacoity involves five or more people. 根據印度法律，武裝搶劫涉及五人或五人以上。
The patient complained of dacryadenalgia in his left eye. 患者抱怨左眼淚腺痛。
Dacryadenalgia can be a symptom of inflammation. 淚腺痛可能是炎症的症狀。
Dacryadenitis involves the inflammation of the tear-producing glands. 淚腺炎涉及產淚腺體的炎症。
Chronic dacryadenitis may lead to persistent swelling. 慢性淚腺炎可能導致持續腫脹。
Onions act as a natural dacryagogue. 洋蔥是一種天然的催淚劑。
The chemical was used as a dacryagogue in the study. 該化學物質在研究中被用作催淚劑。
Dacrycystalgia can make blinking very painful. 淚囊痛會讓眨眼變得非常痛苦。
The doctor examined the area to find the cause of dacrycystalgia. 醫生檢查了該區域以找出淚囊痛的原因。
Dacrydium is a genus of coniferous trees in the family Podocarpaceae. 陸均松屬是羅漢松科中的一類針葉樹。
Some species of Dacrydium are used for their high-quality wood. 某些陸均松屬物種因其高品質的木材而被使用。
Dacryelcosis requires prompt medical attention to prevent complications. 淚器潰瘍需要及時治療以防止併發症。
The patient was treated for severe dacryelcosis. 該患者因嚴重的淚器潰瘍而接受治療。
The symptoms of dacryoadenalgia include localized pain. 淚腺痛的症狀包括局部疼痛。
Dacryoadenalgia is often associated with other eye conditions. 淚腺痛通常與其他眼部疾病有關。
Acute dacryoadenitis can be caused by viral infections. 急性淚腺炎可由病毒感染引起。
Treatment for dacryoadenitis depends on the underlying cause. 淚腺炎的治療取決於潛在原因。
Dacryoblenorrhea is characterized by the discharge of mucus from the tear sac. 淚囊粘液溢的特徵是淚囊排出粘液。
The ophthalmologist diagnosed the patient with dacryoblenorrhea. 眼科醫生診斷該患者患有淚囊粘液溢。
A congenital dacryocele was found in the newborn baby. 在新生兒身上發現了先天性淚囊腫。
The dacryocele appeared as a bluish swelling near the eye. 淚囊腫表現為眼睛附近微青色的腫脹。
The dacryocyst stores tears before they pass into the nose. 淚囊在眼淚進入鼻子之前儲存它們。
An infection of the dacryocyst is known as dacryocystitis. 淚囊感染被稱為淚囊炎。
The patient experienced sharp dacryocystalgia when touching the area. 患者在觸摸該區域時感到劇烈的淚囊痛。
Medication was prescribed to alleviate the dacryocystalgia. 醫生開了藥以緩解淚囊痛。
Dacryocystitis often results from a blockage in the tear duct. 淚囊炎通常由淚管阻塞引起。
Symptoms of dacryocystitis include redness and discharge. 淚囊炎的症狀包括發紅和分泌物。

meaning: 慢性淚囊炎；淚囊粘液溢
sentences: Dacryocystoblennorrhea involves chronic inflammation and mucus production. 慢性淚囊炎涉及慢性炎症和粘液產生。
The condition of dacryocystoblennorrhea can be quite uncomfortable. 慢性淚囊炎的情況可能非常不舒服。
The dacryocystocele was visible as a small lump. 淚囊腫肉眼可見為一個小塊。
Surgical intervention may be necessary for a large dacryocystocele. 大型淚囊腫可能需要手術干預。
Dacryocystoptosis refers to the downward displacement of the tear sac. 淚囊下垂是指淚囊向下移位。
The surgeon corrected the dacryocystoptosis during the operation. 手術中，外科醫生矯正了淚囊下垂。
Dacryocystorhinostomy is a procedure to restore the flow of tears. 淚囊鼻腔造口術是恢復淚流的程序。
She underwent dacryocystorhinostomy to treat her blocked ducts. 她接受了淚囊鼻腔造口術以治療其阻塞的淚管。
The specialist performed a dacryocystosyringotomy. 專家進行了淚囊及淚管切開術。
Dacryocystosyringotomy is a surgical procedure involving the lacrimal apparatus. 淚囊及淚管切開術是涉及淚器的一種手術程序。
A dacryocystotome is a surgical instrument used in eye surgery. 淚囊刀是用於眼科手術的醫療器械。
The doctor carefully handled the dacryocystotome. 醫生小心地操作著淚囊刀。
Dacryocystotomy was performed to drain the infected tear sac. 進行淚囊切開術以引流感染的淚囊。
Recovery from dacryocystotomy usually takes a few weeks. 淚囊切開術的恢復通常需要幾週時間。
Dacryohelcosis can lead to scarring if not treated. 如果不治療，淚器潰瘍可能導致疤痕。
The specialist explained the risks associated with dacryohelcosis. 專家解釋了與淚器潰瘍相關的風險。
Dacryohemorrhea is the rare condition of shedding bloody tears. 淚血症是流出血淚的罕見情況。
The medical team investigated the cause of the patient's dacryohemorrhea. 醫療小組調查了該患者流出血淚的原因。
A dacryolite is a small stone formed in the lacrimal apparatus. 淚石是形成於淚器中的小石頭。
The dacryolite was removed during a minor procedure. 淚石在一次小手術中被移除。
Dacryolith formation can cause obstruction of the tear ducts. 淚石形成會導致淚管阻塞。
The presence of a dacryolith was confirmed by imaging. 影像檢查證實了淚石的存在。
Dacryolithiasis is the medical term for the presence of tear stones. 淚石症是淚石存在的醫學術語。
Patients with dacryolithiasis often experience epiphora. 患有淚石症的患者通常會經歷溢淚。
A dacryoma is a tumor or swelling of the lacrimal gland. 淚腺腫是淚腺的腫瘤或腫脹。
The dacryoma was found to be benign after a biopsy. 活檢後發現該淚腺腫是良性的。
The dacryon is the point where the lacrimal, frontal, and maxillary bones meet. 淚點是淚骨、額骨和上頜骨交匯的點。
Anthropologists use the dacryon as a landmark for skull measurements. 人類學家將淚點作為頭骨測量的地標。
Dacryops refers to a cyst of a lacrimal duct. 淚囊囊腫是指淚管的囊腫。
The dacryops was causing pressure and discomfort. 淚囊囊腫造成了壓力和不適。
Dacryopyorrhea involves the discharge of pus along with tears. 淚膿溢涉及膿液隨眼淚排出。
The infection led to a severe case of dacryopyorrhea. 感染導致了嚴重的淚膿溢。
Dacryopyosis requires antibiotic treatment. 淚器化膿需要抗生素治療。
The doctor monitored the patient for signs of dacryopyosis. 醫生監測患者是否有淚器化膿的跡象。
Dacryosolenitis is an inflammation of the tear ducts. 淚管炎是淚管的炎症。
Symptoms of dacryosolenitis include pain and tearing. 淚管炎的症狀包括疼痛和流淚。
Dacryostenosis is common in infants due to undeveloped ducts. 由於淚管發育不全，淚管狹窄在嬰兒中很常見。
The dacryostenosis caused the baby's eyes to be constantly watery. 淚管狹窄導致寶寶的眼睛一直水汪汪的。
A dacryosyrinx is an abnormal passage in the lacrimal apparatus. 淚管瘻是淚器中的異常通道。
Surgery was needed to close the dacryosyrinx. 需要手術來關閉淚管瘻。

meaning: 淚尿症（罕見詞，有時指排尿時流淚）
sentences: Dacryuria is a medical curiosity mentioned in some old texts. 淚尿症是某些舊文獻中提到的醫學趣聞。
The phenomenon of dacryuria is not well-understood. 淚尿症現象尚不十分清楚。
A dactyl consists of one stressed syllable followed by two unstressed ones. 長短格由一個重讀音節後跟兩個非重讀音節組成。
The poet used the dactyl to create a rhythmic effect. 詩人使用長短格來創造節奏效果。
The anatomical term for a finger or toe is a dactyl. 手指或足趾的解剖學術語是 dactyl。
The bird has a unique arrangement of its dactyls. 這隻鳥的足趾排列很獨特。
Dactylar measurements were recorded for each specimen. 記錄了每個標本的手指/足趾測量值。
The dactylar structure varies between different species. 不同物種之間的手指/足趾結構各不相同。
The leaves have a dactylate shape, resembling fingers. 葉子呈指狀，像手指一樣。
The dactylate appendages help the creature move. 指狀的附肢幫助該生物移動。
The poem is written in dactylic hexameter. 這首詩是以長短格六步格寫成的。
Dactylic rhythm gives the verse a galloping feel. 長短格的節奏給詩句帶來一種奔馳感。
The lines of the poem are structured dactylically. 詩的每一行都是以長短格形式構成的。
He read the verses dactylically to emphasize the meter. 他以長短格的方式朗讀詩句，以強調格律。
The dactylioglyph featured an intricate design. 這件寶石雕刻圖案複雜。
He is a collector of ancient dactylioglyphs. 他是一位古代雕刻寶石的收藏家。
Dactylioglyphic art reached its peak in ancient Greece. 寶石雕刻藝術在古希臘達到了巔峰。
She studied the dactylioglyphic techniques of old masters. 她研究了古代大師的寶石雕刻技術。
The dactylioglyphist spent months working on the small gem. 寶石雕刻家花了幾個月的時間雕刻這顆小寶石。
A skilled dactylioglyphist can create incredible detail. 一位熟練的寶石雕刻家可以創造出令人難以置信的細節。
The museum exhibited various dactylioglyphtic works. 博物館展出了各種寶石雕刻作品。
Dactylioglyphtic skills require great patience and precision. 寶石雕刻技巧需要極大的耐心和精準度。
Dactylioglyphy is the art of engraving gems. 寶石雕刻術是雕刻寶石的藝術。
He has written a book about the history of dactylioglyphy. 他寫了一本關於寶石雕刻史的書。
As a dactyliographer, she identified the origins of the engraved ring. 作為一名寶石雕刻術研究者，她辨別出了這枚雕刻戒指的來源。
The dactyliographer published an article on ancient seals. 這位研究者發表了一篇關於古代印章的文章。
Dactyliographic analysis can reveal information about ancient cultures. 寶石雕刻術分析可以揭示有關古代文化的信息。
The dactyliographic collection is housed in the national library. 寶石雕刻術藏品收藏在國家圖書館。

meaning: 寶石雕刻術；指紋學（較少見用法）
sentences: Dactyliography involves the study of engraved gems. 寶石雕刻術涉及對雕刻寶石的研究。
The term dactyliography is sometimes confused with dactylography. 寶石雕刻術 (dactyliography) 一詞有時會與指紋學 (dactylography) 混淆。
Dactyliology is the study of finger language for communication. 指語法是研究用手指語言進行交流的學科。
He used dactyliology to talk with his deaf friend. 他使用指語法與他的聾啞朋友交談。
Dactyliomancy is a form of divination using rings. 指環占卜術是一種使用指環的占卜形式。
In ancient times, dactyliomancy was used to predict the future. 在古代，指環占卜術被用來預測未來。
The dactylion is the tip of the middle finger. Dactylion 是中指的尖端。
Measurements were taken from the shoulder to the dactylion. 測量是從肩膀到中指尖進行的。
The dactyliotheca contained many rare and valuable rings. 這個指環收藏盒裡裝著許多稀有且珍貴的戒指。
The collector showed us his magnificent dactyliotheca. 收藏家向我們展示了他宏偉的指環藏集。
Dactylis is a genus of grasses commonly used for pasture. 鴨茅屬是常用於牧場的一類草。
The most famous species in this genus is Dactylis glomerata. 該屬中最著名的物種是鴨茅。
The dactylist focused on creating perfect rhythmic patterns. 這位詩人專注於創造完美的節奏模式。
As a dactylist, he preferred classical poetic forms. 作為一名長短格詩人，他更喜歡古典詩歌形式。
Dactylitic swelling was apparent in the patient's toes. 患者的腳趾明顯有指炎性腫脹。
The doctor looked for dactylitic changes in the joints. 醫生在關節中尋找指炎性的變化。
Dactylitis can cause a finger or toe to resemble a sausage. 指炎會使手指或腳趾看起來像香腸。
Dactylitis is often associated with conditions like psoriatic arthritis. 指炎通常與銀屑病關節炎等疾病相關。
The detective carefully examined the dactylogram found at the scene. 偵探仔細檢查了現場發現的指紋。
A dactylogram is a complete set of fingerprints. 指紋是一組完整的指印。
The suspect's dactylograph was compared to the files in the database. 嫌疑人的指紋與數據庫中的檔案進行了比對。
He used a special pad to take a clear dactylograph. 他使用專用墊來取得清晰的指紋。
Dactylographic evidence is crucial in many criminal cases. 指紋證據在許多刑事案件中至關重要。
The lab specializes in dactylographic identification. 該實驗室專門從事指紋鑑定。
Dactylography is the study of fingerprints for identification purposes. 指紋學是為了鑑定目的而對指紋進行的研究。
The history of dactylography dates back to the late 19th century. 指紋學的歷史可以追溯到 19 世紀末。
The coral had a dactyloid growth pattern. 珊瑚具有指狀的生長模式。
Dactyloid leaves are common in some plant species. 在某些植物物種中，指狀葉很常見。
Learning dactylology allows you to communicate with the hearing-impaired. 學習指語可以讓你與聽障人士交流。
Dactylology involves different finger positions for each letter. 指語涉及每個字母的不同手指位置。
Dactylomegaly is a condition where one or more digits are abnormally large. 巨指症是指一個或多個手指/足趾異常大的情況。
The patient was born with dactylomegaly in his right hand. 該患者出生時右手患有巨指症。
Dactylonomy is an ancient method of counting using one's fingers. 手指計數法是一種古老的用手指計數的方法。
He used dactylonomy to teach the children basic arithmetic. 他使用手指計數法來教孩子們基礎算術。
The dactylopatagium is the part of a bat's wing membrane between the digits. 指間膜是蝙蝠翅膀薄膜中位於手指之間的部分。
Injury to the dactylopatagium can affect a bat's flight. 指間膜的損傷會影響蝙蝠的飛行。
Dactylopius is a genus of scale insects used to produce carmine dye. 胭脂蟲屬是一種用來生產胭脂紅染料的介殼蟲屬。
Cochnieal insects belong to the genus Dactylopius. 胭脂蟲屬於胭脂蟲屬。
The dactylopodite is the terminal segment of a crustacean's limb. 指節是甲殼類動物肢體的末端分節。
Crabs use their dactylopodites to grip surfaces. 螃蟹利用其指節來抓握表面。
A dactylopore is a pore in a hydrozoan coral through which a dactylozooid protrudes. 指孔是水螅珊瑚上的一個孔，指狀個體從中突出。
The arrangement of dactylopores is characteristic of certain coral species. 指孔的排列是某些珊瑚物種的特徵。
Dactylopteridae is a family of marine fish known as flying gurnards. 飛角魚科是一科被稱為飛角魚的海洋魚類。
Members of Dactylopteridae have large, wing-like pectoral fins. 飛角魚科的成員具有大型、像翅膀一樣的胸鰭。
Dactylopterus is the type genus of the flying gurnard family. 飛角魚屬是飛角魚科的模式屬。
The species Dactylopterus volitans is commonly found in the Atlantic. 翱翔飛角魚通常發現於大西洋。
Dactylorhiza is a genus of orchids commonly called marsh orchids. 掌裂蘭屬是一屬通常被稱為沼澤蘭的蘭花。
We spotted several species of Dactylorhiza in the wet meadow. 我們在濕潤的草地中發現了幾種掌裂蘭屬植物。
The dactyloscopic analysis confirmed the suspect's identity. 指紋鑑定分析確認了嫌疑人的身份。
Police used dactyloscopic techniques to solve the crime. 警方使用指紋鑑定技術解決了這起犯罪。
Dactyloscopy is the study of fingerprints for identification purposes. 指紋鑑定法是為了識別目的而進行的指紋研究。
Modern dactyloscopy relies heavily on digital databases. 現代指紋鑑定法在很大程度上依賴數位資料庫。
The fossil exhibited a dactylose structure. 該化石呈現出指狀突起的結構。
Dactylose formations were observed on the surface of the coral. 在珊瑚表面觀察到了指狀突起的形成物。
Dactylosternal measurements are important in certain anatomical studies. 指胸骨的測量在某些解剖學研究中非常重要。
The dactylosternal region was carefully examined. 指胸骨區域經過了仔細檢查。
Dactylosymphysis is a condition where two or more digits are fused. 併指症是一種兩個或更多手指或腳趾融合的情況。
Surgery can often correct dactylosymphysis. 手術通常可以糾正併指症。
The bird's dactylotheca protects the distal parts of its toes. 鳥類的趾套保護其腳趾的末端部分。
In some species, the dactylotheca is shed periodically. 在某些物種中，趾套會定期脫落。
The creature was described as being dactylous in ancient texts. 在古代文獻中，這種生物被描述為具有手指的。
Most terrestrial vertebrates are dactylous. 大多數陸生脊椎動物都有手指或腳趾。

meaning: 指狀個體（防禦性水螅體）
sentences: Dactylozooids are specialized polyps used for defense in a hydrozoan colony. 指狀個體是水螅群體中用於防禦的專門水螅體。
The sting of a dactylozooid can be quite painful. 指狀個體的刺痛感可能非常劇烈。
The dactylus is the fifth segment of a crustacean's walking leg. 指是甲殼類動物步行足的第五節。
Each dactylus is equipped with sensory hairs. 每個指都配備有感覺毛。
Dacus is a genus of fruit flies that includes several agricultural pests. 寡鬃實蠅屬是一屬果蠅，其中包括幾種農業害蟲。
Farmers use traps to control the population of Dacus flies. 農民使用陷阱來控制寡鬃實蠅的數量。
Dacyorrhea, or excessive tearing, can be caused by blocked tear ducts. 淚溢，即過度流淚，可能是由於淚管阻塞引起的。
The patient complained of constant dacyorrhea in the right eye. 患者抱怨右眼持續流淚。
My dad taught me how to fish when I was just a small child. 我爸爸在我還很小的時候教我如何釣魚。
I'm going to call my dad to tell him the good news. 我要打電話給爸爸告訴他這個好消息。
My dad taught me how to ride a bike. 我爸爸教我如何騎腳踏車。
I need to call my dad and wish him a happy birthday. 我需要打電話給爸爸並祝他生日快樂。

meaning: 達達主義的替代字母大小寫形式（“文化運動”）。
sentences: The term dada refers to alternative letter-case form of Dada (“cultural movement”). 達達一詞指的是達達（“文化運動”）的替代字母大小寫形式。
The lesson introduced dada as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了達達這個易於理解的有用術語。
Dada was an avant-garde art movement of the early 20th century. 達達主義是20世紀初的一個前衛藝術運動。
Many famous artists were associated with Dada in its prime. 許多著名的藝術家在其鼎盛時期都與達達主義有關。
The baby said his first word, 'dada'. 寶寶說出了他的第一個詞，「爸爸」。
Is that your dada coming home? 那是你爸爸回家了嗎？
Dadaism rejected logic and embraced cultural chaos. 達達主義拒絕邏輯，擁抱文化混亂。
The principles of Dadaism influenced many later art movements. 達達主義的原則影響了許多後來的藝術運動。
Marcel Duchamp was a prominent Dadaist. 馬塞爾·杜象是一位著名的達達主義者。
The Dadaist performance was intended to shock the audience. 達達主義者的表演旨在震驚觀眾。
The dadap tree provides shade for coffee plantations. 刺桐樹為咖啡種植園提供遮蔭。
Dadap leaves are sometimes used as animal fodder. 刺桐葉有時被用作動物飼料。
Dadayag refers to a specific ethnic group in the Philippines. 達達雅克是指菲律賓的一個特定族群。
Researchers are studying the linguistic features of Dadayag. 研究人員正在研究達達雅克語的語言特徵。
The cold wind made him dadder. 寒風讓他發抖。
He began to dadder with fear after hearing the noise. 聽到噪音後，他因恐懼而開始顫抖。
The toddler began to daddle across the room. 幼兒開始在房間裡蹣跚而行。
Old age caused him to daddle rather than walk briskly. 高齡讓他只能蹣跚而行，而不能快步走。
The forest floor was covered in daddock and fallen leaves. 森林地面覆蓋著朽木和落葉。
Termites were found eating the daddock in the garden. 在花園裡發現白蟻正在啃食朽木。
The old bridge had a daddocky appearance due to years of neglect. 由於多年疏於維護，這座舊橋呈現出朽木般的樣子。
Be careful not to step on that daddocky log. 小心不要踩到那根腐朽的木頭。
'Daddy, can you tell me a bedtime story?' the little girl asked. 「爸爸，你能給我講個睡前故事嗎？」小女孩問道。
He is a proud daddy of three beautiful young children. 他是三個漂亮小孩的自豪爸爸。
Go and give your daddy a hug. 去給你的爸爸一個擁抱。
Her daddy always tells the best bedtime stories. 她爸爸總是講最棒的睡前故事。
The term 'daddynut' appears in some regional botanical lists. 「daddynut」一詞出現在某些地區性的植物名錄中。
Identifying a daddynut can be challenging for non-experts. 對於非專家來說，識別這種堅果可能具有挑戰性。
She held the baby's hands to dade him across the floor. 她握著寶寶的手教他在地板上走路。
It is a joy to dade a child during their first steps. 教孩子邁出第一步是一種喜悅。

meaning: （威爾斯法律）恢復祖產的權利
sentences: Dadenhudd is a term from ancient Welsh law regarding land inheritance. Dadenhudd 是古代威爾斯法律中有關土地繼承的一個術語。
The claimant invoked dadenhudd to regain his family estate. 索賠人引用 Dadenhudd 權利來收回他的家族遺產。
The dining room features a decorative dado rail. 餐廳設有裝飾性的護牆板飾條。
They chose a different wallpaper for the section below the dado. 他們為牆裙下方的部分選擇了不同的壁紙。
Dadoxylon is a genus of fossil wood from the Carboniferous period. 石松木屬是石炭紀的一屬化石木。
Scientists analyzed the cell structure of the Dadoxylon specimen. 科學家分析了石松木屬標本的細胞結構。
The Dadu River is a major tributary of the Yangtze River. 大渡河是長江的主要支流。
Crossing the Dadu River was a significant event in history. 橫渡大渡河是歷史上的一個重要事件。
The daduchus led the procession during the Eleusinian Mysteries. 火炬承載者在厄琉息斯秘儀期間領導著遊行隊伍。
A daduchus held a position of high honor in the ancient priesthood. 在古代祭司階層中，火炬承載者擁有崇高的榮譽地位。
The Dadupanthi is a religious sect founded by Sant Dadu Dayal. 達杜派是由聖達杜·達亞爾創立的一個宗教教派。
Many Dadupanthi followers live in Rajasthan, India. 許多達杜派信徒居住在印度的拉賈斯坦邦。
What are ye gaun tae dae? 你打算做什麼？
I canna dae that right now. 我現在不能做那件事。
The artist showed a Daedal skill in his intricate carvings. 這位藝術家在他錯綜複雜的雕刻中展現了精巧的技藝。
Nature's Daedal designs never cease to amaze. 大自然精巧的設計從不停止令人驚嘆。
The garden was filled with daedal paths and hidden corners. 花園裡充滿了精巧的小徑和隱藏的角落。
He admired the daedal complexity of the machine. 他欽佩這台機器那如迷宮般複雜的構造。
Daedaleale is a genus of fungi known for its maze-like pores. 迷孔菌屬是以其迷宮般的孔洞而聞名的一屬真菌。
The Daedaleale quercina grows on oak wood. 橡迷孔菌生長在橡木上。
The architect designed a Daedalean structure for the new museum. 建築師為新博物館設計了一個精巧如迷宮的結構。
Getting through the Daedalean bureaucracy was a nightmare. 透過那精巧複雜的官僚機構簡直是一場噩夢。
The watchmaker used Daedalian precision to assemble the gears. 鐘錶匠以精巧的精確度組裝齒輪。
Her Daedalian intellect could solve any puzzle. 她那精巧的智慧可以解決任何難題。

meaning: 代達羅斯風格的（早期希臘雕塑）
sentences: Daedalic sculpture is characterized by its stiff, formal style. 代達羅斯風格的雕塑以其僵硬、正式的風格為特徵。
The museum acquired a rare Daedalic bronze figurine. 博物館獲得了一件罕見的代達羅斯風格青銅小像。
The term Daedalidae may be found in older entomological classifications. Daedalidae 一詞可能出現在較舊的昆蟲分類中。
Classification of Daedalidae has changed over time. Daedalidae 的分類隨著時間的推移而改變。
As a Daedalist, he could build anything from wood and stone. 作為一名熟練的工匠，他可以用木頭和石頭建造任何東西。
The king hired a Daedalist to construct his palace. 國王雇請了一位熟練的工匠來建造他的宮殿。
The internal structure of the sponge was daedaloid. 海綿的內部結構是迷宮狀的。
Daedaloid patterns decorated the ancient vase. 迷宮狀的圖案裝飾著這件古代花瓶。

meaning: 代達羅斯（希臘神話建築師）
sentences: Daedalus designed the famous labyrinth for King Minos. 代達羅斯為米諾斯國王設計了著名的迷宮。
Daedalus escaped imprisonment by building wings for himself and his son. 代達羅斯透過為自己和兒子建造翅膀逃離了囚禁。

meaning: 守護神；惡魔；（電腦）守護進程
sentences: In mythology, a daemon is a minor deity or guiding spirit. 在神話中，daemon 是小神或引導之靈。
The HTTP daemon handles requests on the web server. HTTP 守護進程處理網頁伺服器上的請求。
Daemonelix fossils were once thought to be giant roots. 惡魔螺旋化石曾被認為是巨大的根部。
Later research showed Daemonelix was actually an ancient beaver burrow. 後來的研究表明，惡魔螺旋實際上是古代海狸的巢穴。

meaning: 超自然的；像魔鬼的；充滿活力的
sentences: The pianist played with a daemonic intensity. 這位鋼琴家以一種超自然的強度演奏。
A daemonic spirit seemed to possess the haunted house. 一個魔鬼般的靈魂似乎佔據了這座鬧鬼的房子。
The daemonurgist performed a ritual to banish the evil spirits. 驅邪者舉行了一種儀式來驅除惡靈。
He was known as a powerful daemonurgist in the village. 他在村子裡被譽為一位強大的降神者。
The ancient scrolls contained secrets of daemonurgy. 古代捲軸包含降神術的秘密。
Daemonurgy was often practiced in secret during the middle ages. 在中世紀，降神術經常在秘密中進行。
The character possessed a certain daemony that set him apart. 這個角色擁有一種特殊的精靈性，使他與眾不同。
Philosophers discussed the concept of daemony in human nature. 哲學家們討論了人性中精靈性的概念。
My daer friend, it has been too long. 我親愛的朋友，時間過得太久了。
Everything is gettin' mair daer these days. 這些日子一切都在變得更加昂貴（親愛的）。
The children like to daff in the garden. 孩子們喜歡在花園裡嬉戲。
Don't daff around while there is work to be done. 有工作要做的時候不要胡鬧。
The party was full of fun and daffery. 聚會充滿了樂趣和嬉戲。
He was punished for his constant daffery in class. 他因在課堂上不斷的愚蠢行為而受到處罰。
Their loud daffing woke the neighbors. 他們大聲的嬉戲吵醒了鄰居。
She tired of his endless daffing. 她對他無止境的開玩笑感到厭煩。
He made a daffish mistake during the presentation. 他在簡報中犯了一個愚蠢的錯誤。
She felt a bit daffish when meeting new people. 見到陌生人時，她感到有點害羞。
The complicated instructions began to daffle him. 複雜的指令開始讓他感到困惑。
He seemed to daffle as he grew older. 隨著年齡的增長，他似乎變得糊塗了。
The fields were covered in bright yellow daffodils in the spring. 春天時，田野裡開滿了鮮黃色的水仙花。
Daffodils are a symbol of rebirth and new beginnings. 黃水仙是重生與新開始的象徵。
The bright yellow daffodils are a sign of spring. 鮮黃色的水仙花是春天的象徵。
She planted a hundred daffodils in the front yard. 她在前院種了一百株水仙花。

meaning: 水仙花（古語或詩歌用詞）
sentences: A single daffodilly bloomed by the river. 一朵水仙花在河邊綻放。
The poet wrote about the golden daffodilly. 詩人描寫了那金色的水仙花。
He has some daffy ideas about how to save money. 關於如何省錢，他有一些古怪的想法。
The character's daffy behavior made everyone laugh. 該角色瘋瘋癲癲的行為逗樂了所有人。
Children call the yellow flowers daffydowndilly. 孩子們稱這些黃色花朵為黃水仙。
Daffydowndilly is a charming old name for the daffodil. Daffydowndilly 是水仙花一個迷人的古稱。
The Dafla people live in the hills of Arunachal Pradesh. 達夫拉人居住在阿魯納恰爾邦的山區。
He studied the traditions and customs of the Dafla tribe. 他研究了達夫拉部落的傳統和習俗。
Don't be so daft; of course it's not true! 別那麼傻；那當然不是真的！
It was a daft thing to do in such a dangerous situation. 在如此危險的情況下做那件事真是瘋了。
Daftberry is a regional name for the poisonous belladonna. Daftberry 是有毒顛茄的地區性名稱。
Warning signs were placed near the patches of daftberry. 在發現顛茄的地方附近放置了警告標誌。
He wore a daftlike hat to the party. 他戴了一頂看起來很傻的帽子去參加聚會。
The whole plan sounded a bit daftlike to me. 整個計劃對我來說聽起來有點愚蠢。
She daftly forgot her keys inside the locked car. 她愚蠢地把鑰匙忘在了鎖好的車子裡。
He grinned daftly at the camera. 他對著鏡頭傻笑。
The sheer daftness of the idea was hard to ignore. 這個想法純粹的愚蠢程度讓人難以忽視。
He was known for his occasional moments of daftness. 他以偶爾表現出的愚蠢而聞名。
The shearer removed the dags from the sheep's wool. 剪羊毛者除去了羊毛上的髒塊。
The icy wind felt like a sharp dag against his skin. 冰冷的風感覺就像一個尖銳的尖端刺在皮膚上。
The ancient dagaba stood tall against the sunset. 古老的舍利塔在夕陽下傲然屹立。
Pilgrims visited the dagaba to offer prayers. 朝聖者參觀舍利塔以進行祈禱。
Dagame wood is valued for its strength and flexibility. 檸檬木因其強度和柔韌性而受到重視。
The dagame tree is native to Central America. 檸檬木原產於中美洲。
Dagassa is a staple grain in many parts of Africa. 穇子是非洲許多地區的主食穀物。
The farmers harvested the dagassa before the rainy season. 農民在雨季前收割了穇子。
The Dagbamba live in the northern region of Ghana. 達格巴姆巴人居住在加納北部地區。
Traditional music is an important part of Dagbamba culture. 傳統音樂是達格巴姆巴文化的重要組成部分。
Many people in northern Ghana speak Dagbane. 加納北部的許多人說達格巴尼語。
He is learning Dagbane to communicate with the locals. 他正在學習達格巴尼語以便與當地人交流。
A dagesh is a dot used in Hebrew script to modify consonant sounds. dagesh 是希伯來文字中用於修改輔音發音的一個點。
The presence of a dagesh lene indicates a specific pronunciation. dagesh lene 的存在表示特定的發音。
Dagestan is a republic of Russia located in the North Caucasus. 達吉斯坦是位於北高加索的俄羅斯共和國。
Many different ethnic groups live in Dagestan. 許多不同的民族居住在達吉斯坦。
The word 'dagga' is commonly used for cannabis in South Africa. 「dagga」一詞在南非常用來指代大麻。
He was arrested for possession of dagga. 他因持有大麻而被捕。

meaning: 在比賽接近結束時（關鍵時刻）得分，以取得或增加得分者的球隊領先優勢，這樣他們就有可能獲勝。
sentences: His last-minute 3-point dagger silenced the criticism for his so-called failure to come up big in big moments. 他最後一刻的三分匕首平息了人們對他所謂的未能在關鍵時刻發揮出色的批評。

The term dagger refers to a point scored near the end of the game (clutch time) to take or increase the scorer's team lead, so that they are likely to win. 「匕首」一詞是指在比賽接近尾聲（關鍵時刻）時得分，以取得或增加得分者的球隊領先優勢，以便他們有可能獲勝。
He carried a hidden dagger for protection. 他隨身攜帶一把隱藏的匕首以求自衛。
The knight drew his dagger during the close combat. 騎士在近戰中拔出了他的匕首。
The daggerbush has sharp, pointed leaves that can cause injury. 絲蘭具有尖銳、指向的葉子，可能會造成傷害。
Daggerbush is well-adapted to arid desert conditions. 絲蘭非常適應乾旱的沙漠環境。
The daggered assassin moved silently through the shadows. 佩有匕首的刺客在陰影中悄無聲息地移動。
The enemy was found daggered in his own tent. 敵人被發現死在自己的帳篷裡，身中匕首。
The cat has sharp, daggerlike claws. 這隻貓有鋒利如匕首般的爪子。
Daggerlike icicles hung from the edge of the roof. 匕首狀的冰柱懸掛在屋簷邊緣。
He wore a daggerproof vest under his shirt. 他在襯衫下穿了一件防刺背心。
The material was claimed to be completely daggerproof. 據稱這種材料完全可以防禦匕首刺戳。
They were looking daggers at each other across the room. 他們隔著房間憤怒地瞪著對方。
The collection included several ornate antique daggers. 該收藏品包括幾把華麗的古董匕首。
Her long dress began to daggle in the mud. 她的長裙開始在泥中拖曳弄髒。
Be careful not to daggle your sleeves in the wet grass. 小心不要讓你的袖子在濕草地上拖弄髒。
She looked like a proper daggletail after walking through the rain. 走過大雨後，她看起來就像個衣襟拖泥的人。
The poor child was a bit of a daggletail in his messy clothes. 那個可憐的孩子穿著凌亂的衣服，看起來有些邋遢。
The daggletailed hikers finally reached the cabin. 衣服拖著泥土的徒步旅行者終於到達了小屋。
A daggletailed appearance is expected after a day in the marsh. 在濕地待了一天後，衣服拖泥帶水是預料之中的。
The daggly weather made the roads very slippery. 潮濕的天氣使道路非常濕滑。
It was a daggly afternoon, perfect for staying inside. 那是一個細雨濛濛的下午，非常適合待在室內。

meaning: （羊毛）結塊髒污的；不修邊幅的（澳紐俚語）
sentences: The sheep looked very daggy before it was shorn. 羊在剪毛前看起來羊毛非常髒亂。
I felt a bit daggy in my old tracksuit. 穿著我的舊運動服，我覺得自己有點不修邊幅。
The daghesh changes the sound of the letter it is in. daghesh 會改變其所在字母的讀音。
Identifying the daghesh is crucial for correct Hebrew reading. 識別 daghesh 對於正確閱讀希伯來語至關重要。
The shearer set aside the daglocks for cleaning. 剪羊毛者把結塊髒羊毛放在一邊準備清洗。
Daglocks can attract pests if not removed quickly. 如果不儘快清除，結塊髒羊毛會招來害蟲。
Dagmar is a popular female given name in Scandinavia. 達格瑪是斯堪地那維亞地區常見的女性名字。
Queen Dagmar was beloved by the Danish people. 達格瑪王后深受丹麥人民的喜愛。
The word 'Dago' is considered an offensive racial slur. 「Dago」一詞被認為是一個具有攻擊性的種族蔑稱。
Historical texts sometimes use the term Dago in a derogatory way. 歷史文獻有時會以貶義的方式使用 Dago 這個詞。
The white dagoba of Anuradhapura is a sight to behold. 阿努拉德普勒的白色舍利塔是一道值得一看的風景。
We climbed the hill to visit the ancient dagoba. 我們爬上山丘去參觀那座古老的佛塔。
The Dagomba people live primarily in West Africa. 達貢巴人主要居住在西非。
Damba is a festival celebrated by the Dagomba. Damba 是達貢巴人慶祝的一個節日。

meaning: 結塊髒羊毛（複數）；（澳紐俚語）好笑的人
sentences: He's a real dag, always making people laugh. 他真是個有趣的人，總是讓人發笑。
The farmer spent the morning removing dags. 農民花了一個上午的時間清除結塊髒羊毛。
He opened a Daguerrean gallery in the city. 他在城市裡開設了一家銀版攝影畫廊。
Daguerrean portraits were very popular in the 1840s. 銀版攝影肖像在1840年代非常受歡迎。
The museum has a collection of 19th-century daguerreotypes. 博物館收藏了一系列19世紀的銀版照片。
Creating a daguerreotype was a complex and slow process. 製作一張銀版照片是一個複雜且緩慢的過程。
The daguerreotyper asked the subject to remain perfectly still. 銀版攝影師要求被攝者保持完全不動。
Many early photographers started their careers as a daguerreotyper. 許多早期的攝影師是以銀版攝影師開始他們的職業生涯的。
The daguerreotypic image was remarkably sharp for its time. 對於當時來說，這張銀版攝影圖像非常清晰。
He studied the history of daguerreotypic technology. 他研究了銀版攝影技術的歷史。
The daguerreotypist carefully prepared the silver-plated copper sheet. 銀版攝影師仔細地準備了鍍銀銅片。
A skilled daguerreotypist could produce beautiful portraits. 一位技術精湛的銀版攝影師可以拍攝出美麗的肖像。
Daguerreotypy was the first publicly available photographic process. 銀版攝影術是第一個公開可用的攝影工藝。
The invention of daguerreotypy revolutionized how we capture images. 銀版攝影術的發明徹底改變了我們捕捉影像的方式。
The hunter used a dah to clear a path through the jungle. 獵人使用一把大刀在叢林中開路。
A traditional dah often has a long wooden handle. 傳統的大刀通常有一個長長的木柄。
Tourists often travel along the Nile in a dahabeah. 遊客經常乘坐尼羅河客船沿河旅行。
The dahabeah moved slowly with the wind. 尼羅河客船隨風緩慢移動。
Dahlias bloom in late summer and autumn. 大麗花在夏末和秋季開花。
The Dahlia is the national flower of Mexico. 大麗花是墨西哥的國花。

meaning: 達荷美人的；達荷美（現貝南）的
sentences: He was interested in Dahoman history and culture. 他對達荷美的歷史和文化感興趣。
The Dahoman warriors were known for their bravery. 達荷美戰士以勇敢著稱。
The Dahomeyan kingdom was a powerful African state. 達荷美王國曾是一個強大的非洲國家。
Dahomeyan art is famous for its intricate designs. 達荷美藝術以其複雜的設計而聞名。
The dahoon holly grows primarily in wet, sandy areas. 大果冬青主要生長在潮濕、沙質的地區。
The bright red berries of the dahoon are a favorite of birds. 大果冬青鮮紅的漿果是鳥類的最愛。
The Daibutsu in Kamakura is a giant bronze statue. 鎌倉大佛是一尊巨大的青銅像。
Many pilgrims visit the Daibutsu temple every year. 每年都有許多朝聖者參觀大佛寺。
He spent the afternoon daidling around the village. 他在村子裡閒逛了一整個下午。
Don't daidle when you should be working. 該工作的時候不要無所事事。
She wore a clean daidly over her dress. 她在連衣裙外面穿了一件乾淨的圍裙。
The child's daidly was stained with food. 孩子的圍兜沾滿了食物污漬。
Daijo was a significant administrative body in ancient Japan. 太政官是古代日本重要的行政機構。
The Daijo oversaw many government functions. 太政官監督著許多政府職能。
We decided to daiker down to the river. 我們決定漫步走到河邊。
He likes to daiker through the park in the morning. 他喜歡在早上漫步穿過公園。
Daikon is a common ingredient in many Asian dishes. 白蘿蔔是許多亞洲菜餚中的常見食材。
He grated some daikon to serve with the fish. 他磨了一些白蘿蔔泥來配魚吃。
The Dail voted on the new tax laws yesterday. 眾議院昨天對新稅法進行了投票。
He was elected as a member of the Dail. 他當選為眾議院議員。
The Dailamites were a people from the mountainous region of northern Iran. 代拉姆人是來自伊朗北部山區的一個民族。
The Dailamite warriors were famous for their infantry skills. 代拉姆戰士以其步兵技能而聞名。
The dailiness of the tasks made him feel bored. 任務的日常性讓他感到無聊。
She appreciated the quiet dailiness of her life. 她欣賞生活中那寧靜的平凡。
Regular exercise should be part of your daily routine for health. 定期運動應成為你日常健康生活的一部分。
The newspaper provides a daily report on national and world news. 報紙每天提供關於國家與世界新聞的報導。
She reads the daily newspaper every morning. 她每天早上都讀日報。
Brushing your teeth is a part of daily hygiene. 刷牙是日常衛生的一部分。

meaning: 偶然的；罕見的（蘇格蘭方言）
sentences: It was just a daimen chance that we met. 我們相遇純屬偶然。
Finding a daimen coin in the dirt was exciting. 在泥土中發現一枚罕見的硬幣令人興奮。
The daimiate was governed with strict laws. 大名的領地由嚴格的法律管理。
He traveled across several daimiates during his journey. 他在旅途中穿越了幾個大名的領地。
A daimio was a powerful feudal lord in old Japan. 大名是舊日本時期強大的封建領主。
The daimio commanded a private army of samurai. 大名指揮著一支私人武士軍隊。
The philosopher believed everyone had a guiding daimon. 這位哲學家相信每個人都有一個引導神靈。
A daimon is often considered an intermediary between gods and men. 神靈通常被認為是神與人之間的中介。
His music had a daimonic quality that captivated the audience. 他的音樂具有一種捕捉觀眾的超自然特質。
She described the vision as something daimonic. 她將那個幻象描述為某種超自然的東西。
Socrates claimed to be guided by a daimonion. 蘇格拉底聲稱受到一種「靈知」的引導。
The daimonion warned him whenever he was about to make a mistake. 每當他即將犯錯時，靈知都會警告他。
He studied daimonistic beliefs in ancient cultures. 他研究了古代文化中的靈魂學說信仰。
The ritual had a strong daimonistic element. 該儀式具有強烈的靈魂學說元素。
Daimonology is the study of demons and spirits. 鬼神學是對惡魔和靈魂的研究。
He wrote a book on the history of daimonology. 他寫了一本關於鬼神學歷史的書。
He looked upon the offer with great dain. 他以極大的輕蔑看待這項提議。
Her dain for such behavior was evident. 她對這種行為的鄙視是顯而易見的。
Daincha is often grown as a green manure crop. 田菁通常作為綠肥作物種植。
Farmers use daincha to improve soil fertility. 農民使用田菁來提高土壤肥力。
The feast was full of various dainteths. 筵席上擺滿了各種佳餚。
She prepared a special dainteth for her guests. 她為客人準備了一道特別的美味。
She tried to daintify the room with flowers and ribbons. 她試圖用鮮花和緞帶使房間變得精緻。
Adding lace will daintify the plain dress. 加上蕾絲會使這件樸素的連衣裙變得優雅。
The princess was the embodiment of daintihood. 公主是優雅的化身。
She maintained a sense of daintihood despite the harsh conditions. 儘管條件艱苦，她仍保持著一種優雅感。
She sipped her tea daintily. 她優雅地啜飲著茶。
The child picked up the cookie daintily with two fingers. 孩子用兩根手指優雅地拿起餅乾。
The daintiness of the jewelry was impressive. 這件珠寶的精緻程度令人印象深刻。
He admired the daintiness of her movements. 他欽佩她動作的優雅。
The basket was filled with many a daintith. 籃子裡裝滿了許多佳餚。
It was a daintith fit for a king. 這是一道適合國王的佳餚。
My family likes to try dainty when traveling. 我們家旅行時喜歡嘗試dainty。
The taste of the dainty was richer than I expected. dainty的味道比我想像中更濃郁。
She wore a dainty lace collar. 她戴著精緻的蕾絲領子。
The bakery sells dainty little cupcakes. 這家麵包店出售精緻的小杯子蛋糕。
He went to the Daira to apply for a permit. 他去地方政府機關申請許可證。
The Daira is responsible for local administration. 該地方機關負責地方行政事務。
The musician played a rhythmic beat on the daira. 音樂家在單面鼓上敲奏出節奏。
A daira is often used in traditional folk music. 單面鼓常用於傳統民間音樂。
The dairi was the private residence of the Emperor. 皇宮是天皇的私人住所。
Guards stood at the entrance of the dairi. 守衛站在皇宮門口。
Milk and cheese are common types of high-quality dairy products. 牛奶與起司是常見的高品質乳製品。
She decided to stop eating dairy products for health reasons. 她出於健康原因決定停止食用乳製品。
We visited a local dairy to see how cheese is made. 我們參觀了當地的乳製品廠，看看起司是如何製作的。
The dairy cows were grazing in the meadow. 奶牛正在草地上吃草。
The farmer owns a large herd of dairy cows that produce high-quality milk. 這位農夫擁有一大群產高品質牛奶的乳牛。
Modern dairy cows are bred to produce significantly more milk than in the past. 現代乳牛的育種使其產乳量比過去顯著增加。
Dairying is an important part of the regional economy. 乳品業是區域經濟的重要組成部分。
He studied dairying at the agricultural college. 他在農業學院學習乳品業。
He hurt his dairymaid during basketball practice. 他在打籃球時弄傷了dairymaid。
The pain in my dairymaid disappeared after a short rest. 我稍微休息後，dairymaid的疼痛就消失了。
The dairymaid filled the pails with fresh milk. 擠奶女工將桶子裝滿了新鮮牛奶。
The old story features a hardworking dairymaid. 這個古老的故事以一位勤勞的擠奶女工為特色。
The dairyman delivers fresh milk and yogurt to our house every morning. 乳品商每天早上送新鮮牛奶和優格到我們家。
He has been working as a professional dairyman for over thirty years. 他擔任專業奶農已超過三十年。
The dairyman delivers milk to the village every morning. 乳品業者每天早上向村莊送牛奶。
He comes from a long line of dairymen. 他出身於一個悠久的乳品世家。
The dairywoman managed the production of butter and cream. 這位從事乳業的女性管理著奶油和鮮奶油的生產。
She is a successful dairywoman in the community. 她是該社區一位成功的乳業從業者。
The speaker stood on the dais to address the audience. 演講者站在講台上向聽眾發表講話。
A large table was set on the dais for the VIP guests. 講台上為貴賓準備了一張大桌子。
They lay down in the daisied meadow. 他們躺在佈滿雛菊的草地上。
The daisied field looked beautiful in the sunshine. 陽光下，佈滿雛菊的田野看起來非常美麗。
The child made a beautiful daisy chain while playing in the field. 孩子在田野玩耍時做了一個漂亮的雛菊花環（鏈）。
Daisies are simple and charming flowers that represent innocence. 雛菊是象徵純真的簡單且迷人的花朵。
The child picked a daisy and gave it to her mother. 孩子採了一朵雛菊送給她的母親。
Daisies are simple but lovely flowers. 雛菊是簡單但可愛的花朵。
The daisybush was covered in small white flowers. 雛菊木上開滿了白色的小花。
He planted a daisybush near the garden fence. 他在花園圍欄附近種了一株雛菊木。

meaning: 提提耶 (印度神話中的巨人或惡魔)
sentences: The Daitya were often depicted as enemies of the gods in Hindu mythology. 在印度神話中，提提耶常被描繪成眾神的敵人。
Ancient texts describe the power and size of the Daitya. 古籍描述了提提耶的力量與體型。
The concept of Daiva relates to divine power in ancient traditions. 提婆的概念與古代傳統中的神聖力量有關。
He studied the various interpretations of Daiva in the scriptures. 他研究了經典中對提婆的多種解釋。
I hope you have a wonderful dak filled with joy and happiness. 希望你度過充滿喜悅與快樂的美好一天（日子）。
The sun sets earlier during the short winter daks. 在寒冷短暫的冬日（日子）裡，太陽下山得比較早。
In the past, the dak system was essential for communication in India. 過去，驛遞系統對於印度的通訊至關重要。
Messages were carried quickly through the dak network. 信息通過驛遞網絡迅速傳遞。

meaning: 十個 (通常指皮革的一組)
sentences: A daker of hides was a standard unit of trade. 十張皮革是一個標準的貿易單位。
The merchant sold a daker of leather at the market. 商人在市場上賣了十張皮革。

meaning: 德干語 (南印度的一種語言)
sentences: Dakhini is spoken by many people in the Deccan region of India. 德干語由印度德干地區的許多人使用。
He is learning the unique grammar of Dakhini. 他正在學習德干語獨特的語法。
The term dakir refers to a group of ten items. 術語 dakir 指的是一組十個物品。
The old records mentioned a dakir of skins. 舊記錄中提到了一組十張皮。
She visited North Dakota during her summer vacation. 她在暑假期間訪問了北達科他州。
The Dakota people have a rich cultural heritage. 達科他族擁有豐富的文化遺產。
The daktylon was a small unit of measure in ancient Greece. 指長是古希臘的一個微小計量單位。
One daktylon is roughly equivalent to a finger's width. 一指長大約相當於一個手指的寬度。
Ancient architects used the daktylos for precision in design. 古代建築師在設計中使用指長來確保精確度。
The length of the statue was measured in daktylos. 雕像的長度是以指長來測量的。
Dal is a staple food in many Indian households. 豆湯是許多印度家庭的主食。
She cooked a delicious batch of dal for dinner. 她晚飯煮了一鍋美味的豆湯。
The museum displayed various types of dalar coins. 博物館展示了各種類型的達拉爾硬幣。
Dalar was once used as currency in Sweden. 達拉爾曾被用作瑞典的貨幣。
The Dalarnian landscapes are known for their beauty. 達拉納的風景以其美麗而聞名。
He enjoys listening to Dalarnian folk music. 他喜歡聽達拉納民俗音樂。
Rosewood belongs to the Dalbergia genus of trees. 玫瑰木屬於黃檀屬樹木。
The forest is home to several species of Dalbergia. 這片森林是幾種黃檀屬植物的家園。

meaning: 達爾凱西斯的 (愛爾蘭家族)
sentences: The Dalcassian clans were powerful in ancient Ireland. 達爾凱西斯家族在古代愛爾蘭非常強大。
History books often mention the Dalcassian kings. 歷史書中經常提到達爾凱西斯的國王。

meaning: 山谷，通常位於丘陵地區。
sentences: The term dale refers to a valley, often in an otherwise hilly area. 山谷一詞指的是山谷，通常位於丘陵地區。
The lesson introduced dale as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 dale 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Dale is a common name for boys in many countries. 戴爾是許多國家男孩的常用名。
The family decided to move to a place called Dale. 全家人決定搬到一個叫戴爾的地方。
The hikers walked through the lush green dale. 徒步旅行者走過鬱鬱蔥蔥的綠色山谷。
A small stream flowed through the center of the dale. 一條小溪流過山谷的中心。
Dalea is a genus of plants commonly found in the Americas. 達里豆屬是美洲常見的植物屬。
The researchers studied the growth patterns of Dalea. 研究人員研究了達里豆屬的生長模式。
Dalecarlian traditions are still celebrated today. 達拉納的傳統至今仍在慶祝。
She bought a beautiful Dalecarlian horse souvenir. 她買了一個美麗的達拉納木馬紀念品。
The daleman knew every path in the surrounding hills. 谷中居民熟悉周圍山丘的每一條小徑。
Life as a daleman was quiet and close to nature. 作為谷中居民的生活安靜且親近自然。
He found an old daler coin buried in the garden. 他在花園裡發現了一枚埋藏的舊達勒硬幣。
The daler was the currency used centuries ago. 達勒是幾個世紀前使用的貨幣。
The dalesfolk gathered for the annual harvest festival. 谷地人民聚集在一起慶祝一年一度的收穫節。
Hospitality is a well-known trait of the dalesfolk. 待客熱情是谷地人民眾所周知的特質。
The dalesman spent his days tending to the sheep. 那位谷中男子整天都在照看羊群。
As a native dalesman, he preferred the hills to the city. 作為土生土長的谷中人，他喜歡山丘勝過城市。
The dalespeople rely on the land for their livelihood. 谷地人民依靠土地維持生計。
Many dalespeople have lived in this area for generations. 許多谷地人民世代居住在這個地區。
The daleswoman was known for her expert spinning skills. 那位谷中女子以其精湛的紡紗技術而聞名。
She lived a simple life as a hardworking daleswoman. 她作為一名勤勞的谷中女子，過著簡單的生活。
Daleth is the fourth letter of the Hebrew alphabet. 達雷斯是希伯來字母表的第四個字母。
The symbol for daleth originally represented a door. 達雷斯的符號最初代表一扇門。
The dali tree is native to the forests of Guyana. 達利樹原產於蓋亞那的森林。
Locals use parts of the dali tree for traditional purposes. 當地人將達利樹的各部分用於傳統用途。
Dalibarda is a small genus in the rose family. 假露莓屬是薔薇科中的一個小屬。
The white flowers of Dalibarda are very delicate. 假露莓屬的白色花朵非常嬌嫩。
The water collected in a small dalk in the ground. 水聚集在地面的一個小凹處。
He tripped over a dalk while walking in the field. 他在田裡走時被一個凹處絆倒了。
She decided to dallack herself up for the party. 她決定為派對好好打扮一番。
Don't spend too much time dallacking in front of the mirror. 不要花太多時間在鏡子前打扮。
The garden path was made of smooth stone dalles. 花園小徑是由平滑的石板鋪成的。
He placed a large dalle near the entrance. 他在入口附近放置了一塊大石板。

meaning: 峽谷激流 (特別是哥倫比亞河)
sentences: The explorers navigated through the dangerous dalles. 探險家們在危險的峽谷激流中航行。
The dalles are a spectacular sight along the river. 峽谷激流是沿河壯麗的景象。

meaning: 調情; 閒混; 戲耍
sentences: Their brief dalliance was the talk of the town. 他們短暫的調情成了鎮上的談資。
He regretted his dalliance when work started to pile up. 當工作開始堆積時，他後悔自己的閒混。
She was known as a dallier who never took things seriously. 她被公認為一個從不認真對待事情的閒混者。
The dallier spent his afternoon in the park. 那個閒混者在公園裡度過了下午。

meaning: 將時間浪費在瑣碎的活動或無所事事上；瑣事。
sentences: People often dally when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會磨蹭。
Learning when to dally helps you communicate more clearly. 學習何時磨蹭可以幫助你更清晰地溝通。

meaning: 閒混; 戲耍; 延誤
sentences: Do not dally on your way to school. 去學校的路上不要磨蹭。
They chose to dally in the garden for a while. 他們選擇在花園裡閒逛一會兒。
His dallying attitude frustrated his colleagues. 他那種漫不經心的態度讓同事們感到沮喪。
The children enjoyed their dallying play in the yard. 孩子們喜歡在院子裡嬉戲。
He walked dallyingly through the market. 他在市場上慢悠悠地走著。
The clock ticked dallyingly as she waited. 她等待時，時鐘滴答滴答地緩慢走著。
Dalmania is a genus of extinct trilobites. 達爾曼三葉蟲屬是一類已滅絕的三葉蟲。
Paleontologists found fossils of Dalmania in the rock layers. 古生物學家在岩層中發現了達爾曼三葉蟲的化石。
Dalmanites fossils are common in Silurian deposits. 達爾曼三葉蟲化石在志留紀沉積物中很常見。
The structure of Dalmanites eyes is quite complex. 達爾曼三葉蟲眼睛的結構相當複雜。

meaning: 大麥町犬 (達爾馬提亞犬)
sentences: The Dalmatian is famous for its black and white spots. 大麥町犬以其黑白斑點而聞名。
They adopted a Dalmatian from the animal shelter. 他們從動物收容所收養了一隻大麥町犬。
He studied Dalmatic history at the university. 他在大學裡研究達爾馬提亞歷史。
The region has many Dalmatic cultural influences. 該地區受到許多達爾馬提亞文化的影響。
The deacon wore a white dalmatic during the service. 執事在禮拜期間穿著白色的長袍。
The dalmatic was embroidered with beautiful patterns. 這件長袍繡有美麗的圖案。
The Dalradian rocks are mostly found in Scotland. 達拉德階岩石主要發現於蘇格蘭。
Geologists are mapping the Dalradian sequence. 地質學家正在繪製達拉德階序列圖。
The custom of fostering a dalt was common in ancient times. 在古代，撫養養子的習俗很普遍。
He treated his dalt as if he were his own son. 他對待養子就像對待親生兒子一樣。

meaning: 小子; 淘氣鬼 (愛爾蘭英語)
sentences: That little dalteen is always getting into trouble. 那個小淘氣鬼總是惹麻煩。
The dalteen ran away before the teacher could catch him. 那小子在老師抓住他之前跑掉了。

meaning: 道爾頓 (人名或原子量單位)
sentences: John Dalton is famous for his atomic theory. 約翰·道爾頓因其原子論而聞名。
The mass of the molecule is expressed in Dalton. 分子的質量以道爾頓表示。
One dalton is approximately the mass of a hydrogen atom. 一道爾頓大約等於一個氫原子的質量。
Scientists use the dalton to measure molecular weight. 科學家使用道爾頓來測量分子量。

meaning: 道爾頓的 (原子論或色盲相關)
sentences: He is a proponent of Daltonian atomic theory. 他是道爾頓原子論的支持者。
The Daltonian research on color blindness was groundbreaking. 道爾頓對色盲的研究是開創性的。
A Daltonic person may have difficulty distinguishing colors. 色盲者可能難以區分顏色。
His Daltonic vision prevented him from becoming a pilot. 他的色盲視覺使他無法成為一名飛行員。
Daltonism is a genetic condition affecting color perception. 道爾頓症是一種影響顏色感知的遺傳性疾病。
The doctor diagnosed him with Daltonism at a young age. 醫生在他很小的時候就診斷出他患有道爾頓症。
As a Daltonist, he often asks others for help with color choices. 作為一名色盲者，他經常在選擇顏色時尋求他人的幫助。
The test confirmed that he is a Daltonist. 測試確認了他是一名色盲者。
The massive dam was built to generate hydroelectric power. 這座巨大的水壩是為了水力發電而建造的。
The beaver built a small dam across the shallow stream. 海狸在淺溪上築起了一個小水壩。
The massive dam provides electricity for the entire city. 這座巨大的水壩為整個城市提供電力。
The foal stood close to its dam in the field. 小馬在田野裡緊靠著牠的母馬。
Dama is a genus of deer native to Europe. 黇鹿屬是原產於歐洲的一種鹿。
The fallow deer belongs to the Dama genus. 黇鹿屬於黇鹿屬。
The heavy rain caused severe damage to the crops this year. 大雨對今年的農作物造成了嚴重的損害。
Be careful not to damage the fragile equipment during the move. 搬運時要小心，別弄壞了這套易碎的設備。
The storm caused significant damage to the roof. 暴風雨對屋頂造成了重大損害。
The court awarded damages to the victim. 法院判給受害者賠償金。
The damageability of the glass makes it difficult to transport. 玻璃的易損性使其難以運輸。
Engineers tested the damageability of the new material. 工程師測試了新材料的易損性。
Fragile items are highly damageable during shipping. 易碎物品在運輸過程中非常容易損壞。
The surface of the table is easily damageable. 桌子的表面很容易損壞。
We must consider the damageableness of these ancient artifacts. 我們必須考慮這些古代文物的易損性。
The package was reinforced due to the damageableness of the contents. 由於內容物易損，包裝進行了加固。
The goods were packed damageably without enough protection. 貨物包裝得很容易損壞，沒有足夠的保護。
He handled the delicate instrument damageably. 他處理這件精密儀器時很容易造成損壞。
Old texts use damagement to refer to injury or loss. 舊文本使用 damagement 來指代傷害或損失。
The damagement to the property was severe. 財產受到的損害很嚴重。
The damager of the statue was never caught. 損壞雕像的人從未被抓到。
Identify the damager before filing a report. 在提交報告之前確定損壞者。
He hurt his damages during basketball practice. 他在打籃球時弄傷了damages。
Please relax your damages before starting the exercise. 開始運動前，請先放鬆你的damages。
The company had to pay millions in damages. 公司不得不支付數百萬美元的賠償金。
She is seeking damages for breach of contract. 她因對方違反合同而尋求賠償。
Please damaging the project before noon. 請在中午前damaging專案。
The engineer damaginged the project carefully yesterday. 工程師昨天仔細地damaging了專案。
The rumors spread damagingly through the office. 謠言在辦公室裡有害地傳播開來。
His reputation was damagingly affected by the scandal. 他的名譽因醜聞而受到毀滅性的影響。
The daman is a small, furry mammal found in Africa. 蹄兔是發現於非洲的一種小型毛茸茸哺乳動物。
Damans live in rocky areas and are very social. 蹄兔生活在岩石地帶，非常具有社交性。

meaning: 達馬拉人 (納米比亞民族)
sentences: The Damara people have a unique language and culture. 達馬拉人擁有獨特的語言和文化。
He studied the traditions of the Damara in Namibia. 他研究了納米比亞達馬拉人的傳統。

meaning: 大馬士革的; 大馬士革人
sentences: He admired the intricate Damascene steel patterns. 他欽佩大馬士革鋼複雜的圖案。
A Damascene merchant sold high-quality fabrics. 一位大馬士革商人出售高品質的面料。
The artisan will damascene the sword with silver. 工匠將在劍上鑲嵌銀絲。
It takes great skill to damascene metal correctly. 正確地在金屬上鑲嵌花紋需要極高的技巧。
The museum features several damascened daggers. 博物館收藏了幾把鑲嵌了金銀絲的匕首。
She owns a beautiful damascened jewelry box. 她擁有一個美麗的鑲金銀絲首飾盒。
The damascener carefully worked on the complex design. 鑲嵌工仔細地製作著複雜的設計。
He is a master damascener known for his fine work. 他是一位以精細工藝聞名的鑲嵌大師。
Damascenine is an alkaloid found in certain seeds. 大馬士革鹼是存在於某些種子中的一種生物鹼。
Researchers analyzed the chemical properties of damascenine. 研究人員分析了大馬士革鹼的化學性質。
Damascus is one of the oldest continuously inhabited cities. 大馬士革是世界上歷史最悠久且持續有人居住的城市之一。
We visited the ancient markets of Damascus. 我們參觀了大馬士革的古代市場。
The dining table was covered with a white damask cloth. 餐桌上舖著一塊白色的錦緞布。
She wore a dress made of expensive silk damask. 她穿著一件由昂貴絲綢錦緞製成的連衣裙。
The craftsman decided to damaskeen the metal plate. 工匠決定在金屬板上鑲嵌花紋。
He learned how to damaskeen from his father. 他從父親那裡學會了如何鑲嵌金銀絲。
The curtains were made of heavy damasse fabric. 窗簾是由厚重的類錦緞織物製成的。
Damasse is often used for high-end upholstery. 類錦緞織物常用於高端室內裝飾。
The shop specialized in damassin and other fine textiles. 這家店專門經營類錦緞織物和其他精細紡織品。
She chose a damassin pattern for the cushions. 她為靠墊選擇了一種類錦緞圖案。

meaning: 達摩衍蒂 (印度神話人物)
sentences: The story of Nala and Damayanti is a classic epic. 納拉和達摩衍蒂的故事是一部經典史詩。
Damayanti was known for her exceptional beauty and loyalty. 達摩衍蒂以其非凡的美麗和忠誠而聞名。
Dambonitol is a type of dimethyl ether of inositol. 丹波尼醇是肌醇的一種二甲基醚。
The study focused on the extraction of dambonitol from plants. 研究重點在於從植物中提取丹波尼醇。
Dambose is an older name for the sugar alcohol inositol. Dambose 是糖醇肌醇的一個較舊名稱。
Inositol, or dambose, is important for cell signaling. 肌醇（或稱 dambose）對細胞信號傳導非常重要。
They set up the pieces on the dambrod for a game of draughts. 他們在棋盤上擺好棋子準備玩西洋跳棋。
The old dambrod was kept in the family for years. 那個舊棋盤在家族中保存了多年。

meaning: 通常大寫為 Dame：相當於女騎士 Sir 的頭銜。
sentences: Dame Edith Sitwell 伊迪絲·西特韋爾夫人
The term dame refers to usually capitalized as Dame: a title equivalent to Sir for a female knight. 「dame」一詞通常大寫為「Dame」：相當於女騎士的「爵士」頭銜。
She was honored as a Dame for her services to charity. 她因對慈善事業的貢獻而被授予女爵士頭銜。
The old dame lived in a cottage by the sea. 那位老夫人住在海邊的一間小屋裡。

meaning: 達梅尼化 (一種音樂唱名法)
sentences: Damenization is a historical method of solmization. 達梅尼化是一種歷史上的唱名法。
The music student learned about damenization in class. 音樂系學生在課堂上學習了達梅尼化。
Damewort is often grown for its fragrant evening flowers. 香花芥常因其傍晚散發香氣的花朵而被栽種。
The garden was filled with the scent of damewort. 花園裡充滿了香花芥的香氣。

meaning: 達姆加爾努那 (蘇美神話女神)
sentences: Damgalnunna was a mother goddess in Sumerian religion. 達姆加爾努那是蘇美宗教中的一位大地之母。
Ancient inscriptions mention offerings made to Damgalnunna. 古代銘文提到了向達姆加爾努那獻上的祭品。
Damia was a fertility goddess associated with the earth. 達米亞是一位與土地相關的豐饒女神。
Festivals were held in honor of Damia and Auxesia. 為慶祝達米亞和奧克塞西亞舉行了節日。
Damiana is used in traditional herbal medicine. 達米阿那被用於傳統草藥中。
The leaves of the damiana plant are used to make tea. 達米阿那植物的葉子被用來製茶。
The Damianist sect was active in the early church. 達米安教派在早期教會中很活躍。
Historical records detail the beliefs of a Damianist. 歷史記錄詳細記載了一位達米安教派成員的信仰。
The little damie was very helpful to her neighbors. 那位小夫人對鄰居非常有幫助。
It was a term of endearment for a respected woman. 這是對一位受人尊敬的女性的愛稱。
The luxury bag featured a classic damier pattern. 這款奢侈品包袋採用了經典的棋盤格圖案。
He wore a shirt with a blue and white damier print. 他穿著一件藍白棋盤格印花的襯衫。
The damine population in the forest has increased. 森林中的黇鹿種群數量增加了。
Damine traits are distinct from those of other deer. 黇鹿的特徵與其他鹿類截然不同。
Damkjernite is an ultramafic igneous rock. 丹克傑恩岩是一種超鎂鐵質火成岩。
Geologists studied the composition of damkjernite samples. 地質學家研究了丹克傑恩岩樣本的成分。
The beaver built a damlike structure across the stream. 河狸在溪流上建造了一個像水壩一樣的結構。
The fallen rocks formed a damlike barrier. 掉落的岩石形成了一個像水壩一樣的屏障。
Dammar is used in making varnish and incense. 達瑪樹脂被用於製作清漆和香。
The artist applied a coat of dammar varnish to the painting. 藝術家在畫作上塗了一層達瑪清漆。
Dammara is a synonym for the Agathis genus of trees. Dammara 是貝殼杉屬（Agathis）的一個同義詞。
The Dammara trees are known for their high-quality wood. 貝殼杉因其高品質的木材而聞名。
"Damme!" he cried, as he dropped the heavy box. 「該死！」他丟下重箱子時大叫一聲。
It was an exclamation used in old literature. 這是舊文學中常用的一種感嘆詞。
The local people collect resin from the dammer. 當地人從這種樹脂樹中收集樹脂。
The dammer is an important source of natural resin. 這種樹脂樹是天然樹脂的重要來源。
The air felt dammish after the light rain. 小雨過後，空氣感覺微濕。
The dammish walls needed to be repainted. 微濕的牆壁需要重新粉刷。

meaning: 咒罵; 譴責; 該死的
sentences: The critics will likely damn the film for its poor script. 評論家可能會因為劇本糟糕而譴責這部電影。
Oh damn, I forgot my keys again! 哦該死，我又忘帶鑰匙了！
The damnability of his actions was debated by the council. 他的行為是否該受譴責由委員會進行了辯論。
Theologians discussed the damnability of certain sins. 神學家討論了某些罪惡的該受譴責性。
The heat was absolutely damnable today. 今天的熱度簡直該死。
It was a damnable lie that ruined his career. 那是一個毀了他事業的可惡謊言。
He realized the damnableness of his past mistakes. 他意識到自己過去錯誤的該受譴責性。
The philosopher wrote about the damnableness of cruelty. 這位哲學家寫到了殘酷行為的該受譴責性。
The room was damnably cold during the winter. 冬天時房間冷得要命。
He acted damnably throughout the entire event. 他在整個事件中表現得很糟糕。

meaning: 表達煩惱或失望；該死;該死。
sentences: Oh damnation! The window doesn't shut! 喔該死！窗戶沒關！
The lesson introduced damnation as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了詛咒這個有用的術語，需要理解。

meaning: 詛咒; 遭天譴; 完蛋
sentences: He feared eternal damnation for his deeds. 他擔心自己的行為會遭到永恆的天譴。
It was a scene of utter damnation and despair. 那是一個徹底絕望與毀滅的場景。

meaning: 譴責的; 判定有罪的
sentences: The witness gave damnatory evidence against the defendant. 證人提供了對被告不利的判定有罪的證據。
The report ended with a damnatory conclusion. 該報告以譴責性的結論結束。

meaning: 褻瀆該死的變體，用來表達對某人或某事的蔑視、憤怒等。
sentences: Their damned lawyers can go to hell. 他們該死的律師可以下地獄。
I can't get this damned thing to work. 我無法讓這該死的東西發揮作用。
I can't get this damned window to open. 我沒法把這該死的窗戶打開。
He felt like a damned man with no hope left. 他覺得自己像個被詛咒的人，毫無希望。
The damner spoke loudly against the new law. 譴責者大聲反對新法律。
She refused to be the damner of her own friend. 她拒絕成為譴責自己朋友的人。
The legal suit was based on the damnification of the property. 這宗法律訴訟是基於財產受損。
Damnification must be proven to claim compensation. 必須證明受損才能要求賠償。
The actions of the company did not damnify the local residents. 公司的行為並未損害當地居民的利益。
The plaintiff argued that the breach would damnify his business. 原告辯稱違約將損害他的業務。
The Damnii were an ancient people living in what is now Scotland. 達姆尼人是居住在現在蘇格蘭地區的古代民族。
Roman records mention the territory of the Damnii. 羅馬記錄中提到了達姆尼人的領土。

meaning: 毀滅性的; 證據確鑿的
sentences: The leaked documents provided damning evidence of corruption. 洩露的文件提供了腐敗的確鑿證據。
It was a damning indictment of the school system. 這是對學校體系的毀滅性控訴。
The data pointed damningly toward a major error. 數據毀滅性地指向了一個重大錯誤。
He spoke damningly about his former employer. 他對前僱主進行了毀滅性的評價。
The damningness of the report shocked the public. 報告的毀滅性震驚了公眾。
They realized the damningness of the situation too late. 他們意識到情況的毀滅性已經太晚了。

meaning: 達姆諾尼人 (古代英格蘭西南部居民)
sentences: The Damnonians lived in the area now known as Devon and Cornwall. 達姆諾尼人居住在現在稱為德文郡和康沃爾郡的地區。
Archeologists studied the settlements of the Damnonians. 考古學家研究了達姆諾尼人的定居點。
The Damnonii were a British tribe in the Lowlands. 達姆諾尼族是低地地區的一個不列顛部落。
Many hill forts are attributed to the Damnonii. 許多山堡被歸因於達姆諾尼族。
A damnous act can lead to legal liability. 造成損失的行為可能導致法律責任。
The court evaluated whether the action was truly damnous. 法院評估了該行為是否真正造成了損失。
The business was damnously affected by the new regulations. 業務因新法規而蒙受了損失。
The project proceeded damnously due to poor management. 由於管理不善，該項目進展得蒙受損失。

meaning: 達摩克里斯式的 (面臨迫在眉睫的危險)
sentences: The threat of layoffs hung like a Damoclean sword over the office. 裁員的威脅像達摩克里斯之劍一樣懸在辦公室上空。
They lived in a Damoclean state of uncertainty. 他們生活在一種隨時可能發生危險的不確定狀態中。

meaning: 達摩克里斯 (希臘傳說人物)
sentences: The legend of Damocles teaches us about the perils of power. 達摩克里斯的傳說教導我們權力的危險。
He felt like Damocles, with danger always close at hand. 他覺得自己像達摩克里斯一樣，危險總是在身邊。

meaning: 達莫塔斯 (牧歌中的名字)
sentences: Damoetas is a character often found in pastoral poetry. 達莫塔斯是牧歌詩中常見的角色。
The poet used the name Damoetas for his shepherd protagonist. 詩人使用達莫塔斯這個名字作為他牧羊人主角的名字。
The young damoiseau hoped to become a knight one day. 那位貴族青年希望有一天能成為一名騎士。
A damoiseau served in the lord's court to learn manners. 一位貴族青年在領主的宮廷中服務以學習禮儀。
Damon and Pythias are symbols of true friendship. 戴蒙與皮西亞斯是真摯友誼的象徵。
My friend Damon is coming over for dinner. 我的朋友戴蒙要過來吃晚飯。
Damone is a less common spelling of the name Damon. Damone 是戴蒙這個名字較不常見的拼寫方式。
He introduced himself as Damone. 他自稱是戴蒙。

meaning: 達蒙尼可 (一種黃色顏料)
sentences: The painter used damonico to achieve a specific golden hue. 畫家使用達蒙尼可來獲得一種特定的金色調。
Damonico is a historical pigment used in fine arts. 達蒙尼可是美術中使用的歷史顏料。
Damourite is a variety of muscovite mica. Damourite 是白雲母的一種變體。
Geologists identified damourite in the rock sample. 地質學家在岩石樣本中鑑定出了這種雲母。
The grass was damp with morning dew when we went for a short walk. 我們散步時草地上沾滿了（潮濕）晨露。
She used a soft damp cloth to clean the dust from the wooden table. 她用一塊柔軟的濕布清理木桌上的灰塵。

meaning: 潮濕的; 濕氣; 抑制
sentences: The walls were damp after the heavy rain. 大雨過後牆壁很潮濕。
Wipe the surface with a damp cloth. 用濕布擦拭表面。

meaning: 潮濕的 (罕用或方言變體)
sentences: The dampang air made it difficult to dry the clothes. 潮濕的空氣使衣服難以晾乾。
The ground was still dampang from the morning dew. 地面因晨露而依然潮濕。

meaning: 減震的; 弄濕的; 抑制的
sentences: The oscillations were damped by the shock absorbers. 震盪被減震器抑制了。
He played a damped chord on his guitar. 他在吉他上彈奏了一個悶音和弦。

meaning: 減少；變得遲鈍；降低強度（指情緒和非物質事物）。
sentences: We won't let the bad news dampen our spirits. 我們不會讓壞消息打擊我們的精神。
People often dampen when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會變得沮喪。

meaning: 弄濕; 抑制; 使沮喪
sentences: The bad news did not dampen our spirits. 壞消息沒有使我們喪氣。
Dampen the cloth before cleaning the window. 擦窗戶前先將布弄濕。
The news acted as a dampener on the celebration. 這個消息對慶祝活動起到了抑制作用。
Use a string dampener to reduce unwanted noise. 使用弦減震器來減少不必要的噪音。

meaning: 阻尼器; 擋煙板; 掃興的人
sentences: He adjusted the damper in the chimney. 他調整了煙囪裡的擋煙板。
Her negative comments put a damper on the party. 她消極的言論讓派對變得掃興。
The engineers improved the damping system of the bridge. 工程師改進了橋樑的阻尼系統。
Damping is essential for maintaining mechanical stability. 阻尼對於保持機械穩定性至關重要。

meaning: 微濕的; 有點潮濕的
sentences: The grass was still dampish in the early morning. 清晨的草地依然微濕。
The laundry felt dampish and needed more time to dry. 洗好的衣服感覺微濕，需要更多時間晾乾。
The fog clung dampishly to the trees. 霧氣微濕地籠罩在樹木上。
The basement smelled dampishly after the flood. 洪水過後，地下室聞起來有股微濕的味道。
The dampishness of the air indicated an approaching storm. 空氣中的潮濕預示著暴風雨即將來臨。
He complained about the dampishness in his apartment. 他抱怨公寓裡的潮濕。
The moss grew damply on the north side of the house. 苔蘚在房屋北側潮濕地生長著。
Her hair hung damply around her face. 她的頭髮潮濕地垂在臉龐。
The dampness in the air made her hair curl. 空氣中的濕氣讓她的頭髮捲了起來。
Old houses often suffer from problems with dampness. 舊房子經常面臨潮濕的問題。
Excessive dampness can lead to mold growth. 過度潮濕會導致黴菌生長。
The dampness in the cave was chilled to the bone. 洞穴裡的濕氣冷徹骨髓。
The builder recommended using dampproof materials for the foundation. 建築商建議在基礎工程中使用防潮材料。
They installed a dampproof membrane under the floor. 他們在地板下安裝了防潮層。
The dampproofer applied a special coating to the walls. 防潮工在牆上塗了一層特殊的塗料。
This product works as an effective dampproofer for concrete. 該產品可有效作為混凝土防潮劑。
Proper dampproofing is essential for any basement. 對於任何地下室來說，適當的防潮處理都是必不可少的。
The cost of dampproofing the entire house was high. 整個房子做防潮處理的費用很高。

meaning: 潮濕的; 沮喪的 (罕用)
sentences: The weather remained dampy for the rest of the week. 本週剩餘時間天氣一直很潮濕。
He felt a bit dampy after receiving the rejection letter. 收到拒絕信後，他感到有些沮喪。
The story tells of a brave knight and a fair damsel. 故事講述了一位勇敢的騎士和一位美麗的少女。
A damsel in distress often appears in fairy tales. 遇險的少女經常出現在童話故事中。
Damselfish are colorful residents of coral reefs. 雀鯛是珊瑚礁中色彩繽紛的居民。
He saw a school of bright blue damselfish while diving. 他潛水時看到一群亮藍色的雀鯛。
She spent her damselhood in a small village. 她在一個小村莊度過了她的少女時期。
Damselhood is a period of transition in old stories. 在舊故事中，少女時期是一個過渡時期。

meaning: 西洋李 (一種紫色的小李子)
sentences: She made a jar of delicious damson jam. 她做了一罐美味的西洋李果醬。
The damson tree was heavy with fruit this year. 今年西洋李樹結滿了果實。
Dan is going to help us move next weekend. 丹下週末會來幫我們搬家。
He achieved the third dan in karate. 他獲得了空手道三段。
The master holds a high dan in judo. 這位大師在柔道中擁有很高的段位。
It takes years of practice to reach the next dan. 需要多年的練習才能達到下一個段位。
Dana decided to pursue a career in medicine. 達娜決定從事醫學事業。
I haven't seen Dana since high school graduation. 自從高中畢業後我就沒見過達娜了。
The Danaan ships sailed across the Aegean Sea. 達那安人的船隻航行在愛琴海上。
In the Iliad, the Greeks are often called Danaans. 在《伊利亞德》中，希臘人常被稱為達那安人。

meaning: 達納格拉人 (努比亞民族)
sentences: The Danagla are an ethnic group in northern Sudan. 達納格拉人是蘇丹北部的一個族群。
He is researching the history of the Danagla people. 他正在研究達納格拉人的歷史。
The Danai were legendary figures in Greek myths. 達那安人是希臘神話中的傳奇人物。
Ancient poets often sang of the brave Danai. 古代詩人常歌頌勇敢的達那安人。

meaning: 達那伊得斯 (希臘神話中達那俄斯的女兒們)
sentences: The Danaid were punished by having to fill a leaky jar. 達那伊得斯受到懲罰，必須注滿一個漏水的罐子。
Only one Danaid refused to kill her husband. 只有一位達那伊得斯拒絕殺害她的丈夫。
The danaid butterfly is known for its bright colors. 斑蝶以其鮮豔的色彩而聞名。
He captured a beautiful specimen of a danaid. 他捕獲了一個美麗的斑蝶標本。
The Danaidae family includes the famous monarch butterfly. 斑蝶科包括著名的黑脈金斑蝶。
Scientists study the migration patterns of Danaidae. 科學家研究斑蝶科的遷徙模式。

meaning: 達那伊得斯（希臘神話中達那俄斯的女兒）
sentences: The danaide was punished to fill a leaky vessel for eternity. 達那伊得斯受罰要永無止境地注滿一個漏水的容器。
Mythology tells the story of each danaide. 神話講述了每一位達那伊得斯的故事。
A Danaidean task is one that is never-ending and futile. 達那伊得斯式的任務是指永無止境且徒勞的工作。
She felt trapped in a Danaidean cycle of chores. 她覺得自己陷入了達那伊得斯式永無止境的家務循環中。
Danainae is a subfamily of brush-footed butterflies. 斑蝶亞科是蛺蝶科的一個亞科。
Monarch butterflies belong to the Danainae group. 帝王蝶屬於斑蝶亞科。
The danaine butterflies are known for their bright colors. 斑蝶類蝴蝶以其鮮豔的顏色著稱。
Scientists studied the migration of danaine species. 科學家研究了斑蝶類物種的遷徙。
Danais is a genus of butterflies commonly found in the tropics. 斑蝶屬是熱帶地區常見的一個蝴蝶屬。
He photographed a rare specimen of the Danais genus. 他拍攝到一個稀有的斑蝶屬標本。
Danaite is a cobalt-rich variety of arsenopyrite. 鈷毒砂是砷黃鐵礦中富含鈷的一種變體。
The geologist identified the mineral as danaite. 地質學家將該礦物鑑定為鈷毒砂。

meaning: 達納基爾（衣索比亞地區或民族）
sentences: The Danakil Depression is one of the hottest places on Earth. 達納基爾窪地是地球上最熱的地方之一。
The Danakil people live in the harsh desert environment. 達納基爾人生活在惡劣的沙漠環境中。
Danalite is a rare beryllium-iron silicate mineral. 鈹鐵硫石是一種稀有的鈹鐵矽酸鹽礦物。
Researchers studied the crystalline structure of danalite. 研究人員研究了鈹鐵硫石的晶體結構。
Danburite is valued for its clarity and brilliance in jewelry. 賽黃晶因其在珠寶中的清澈度和光澤而受到重視。
They found a large deposit of danburite in the mountains. 他們在山中發現了大量的賽黃晶礦藏。
Dancalite is a specific type of igneous rock found in East Africa. 丹卡拉岩是在東非發現的一種特定火成岩。
The chemical composition of dancalite was analyzed in the lab. 實驗室分析了丹卡拉岩的化學成分。
They spent the whole night dancing at the party. 他們在派對上跳了一整晚的舞。
She has been learning ballet and traditional dance since she was five. 她從五歲起就在學習芭蕾舞和傳統舞蹈。
They went to the club to dance all night. 他們去夜店跳了一整晚的舞。
She performed a beautiful traditional dance. 她表演了一段優美的傳統舞蹈。
She has been a professional ballet dancer for ten years. 她擔任職業芭蕾舞者已經十年了。
The traditional dancers performed a beautiful routine at the festival. 傳統舞者在節日期間表演了一段精彩的舞蹈。
The professional dancer rehearsed for eight hours daily. 這位專業舞者每天排練八個小時。
He wants to be a backup dancer for a pop star. 他想成為流行歌手的伴舞舞者。
The young danceress lead the troupe with grace. 年輕的女舞者優雅地帶領著舞團。
In the past, the term danceress was commonly used for female performers. 在過去，「danceress」這個詞常用於女性表演者。
The old town had a local dancery where everyone met on Saturdays. 這座古鎮有一間當地的舞廳，每個人都在週六聚在那裡。
His mastery of dancery was evident in his performance. 他在表演中展現了對舞蹈技藝的精通。
The heraldic shield featured a dancette pattern across the middle. 紋章盾牌的中間具有鋸齒形圖案。
The border was decorated with a dancette edge. 邊緣裝飾有鋸齒形的邊。
Dancing is a great way to stay fit and active. 跳舞是保持體型和活力的一種好方法。
She put on her dancing shoes for the party. 她穿上舞鞋準備去參加派對。
The leaves drifted dancingly in the autumn breeze. 樹葉在秋風中舞動著飄落。
He walked dancingly down the street, feeling happy. 他輕快地走在街上，感到很快樂。
He was known as the local dand of the village. 他被稱為村子裡的紈褲子弟。
The young dand spent all his inheritance on fine clothes. 那位年輕的紈褲子弟把所有的遺產都花在了華麗的衣服上。
The ascetic carried a wooden danda as he walked. 那位修行者走路時帶著一根木棍。
In some traditions, the danda symbolizes authority and discipline. 在某些傳統中，棍棒象徵著權威和紀律。
The children enjoyed blowing the dandelion seeds into the air. 孩子們喜歡把蒲公英種子吹向空中。
Dandelions are often considered weeds in gardens. 蒲公英在花園裡常被視為雜草。
She blew the dandelion seeds into the wind. 她將蒲公英種子吹入風中。
The garden was filled with bright yellow dandelions. 花園裡長滿了亮黃色的蒲公英。
Pet dander can trigger allergies in some people. 寵物皮屑可能會引起某些人的過敏。
The insulting comment really got his dander up. 那句侮辱性的評論真的激起了他的怒火。
His dandiacal attire was far too formal for the picnic. 他那紈褲子弟般的著裝對於郊遊來說過於正式了。
The novel describes the dandiacal lifestyle of the 19th-century elite. 這本小說描述了 19 世紀精英階層紈褲子弟式的生活方式。
He dressed dandiacally even for the simplest occasions. 即便是最簡單的場合，他也會穿得像個紈褲子弟。
The young man behaved dandiacally to impress his peers. 那個年輕人表現得像個紈褲子弟以給同儕留下深刻印象。
He strutted dandically through the ballroom. 他像個紈褲子弟般在舞廳裡昂首闊步。
She smiled at him as he bowed dandically. 當他像個紈褲子弟般鞠躬時，她對他露出了微笑。

meaning: 裝扮成紈褲子弟；使精緻化
sentences: The dandification of his wardrobe took several months. 他衣櫥的精緻化裝扮花了好幾個月的時間。
The film explores the dandification of modern urban youth. 這部電影探索了現代都市青年的紈褲化傾向。

meaning: 使成為紈褲子弟；打扮精美
sentences: He tried to dandify his younger brother for the wedding. 他試圖為婚禮將他的弟弟打扮得精美一些。
The tailor helped to dandify the wealthy merchant. 裁縫幫助那位富商打理出紈褲子弟般的裝扮。

meaning: 精緻地；極好地（古語或方言）
sentences: The room was dandilly decorated for the festival. 房間為節日進行了精緻的裝飾。
He performed his tasks dandilly and with great care. 他非常細心且極好地完成了任務。
He was dandily dressed in a silk waistcoat. 他穿著絲綢背心，裝扮得像個紈褲子弟。
The guests were dandily attired for the royal gala. 賓客們為皇家盛會打扮得像個紈褲子弟。

meaning: 無足輕重的人；小矮人；（小面額硬幣）
sentences: He was dismissed as a mere dandiprat by his colleagues. 他被同事斥為一個無足輕重的小人物。
The term dandiprat was once used to describe a small 16th-century coin. 「Dandiprat」一詞曾被用來描述 16 世紀的一種小面額硬幣。

meaning: 女裝模作樣者；追求時尚的女性
sentences: She was the most famous dandizette in the city's high society. 她是該城市上流社會中最著名的追求時尚的女性。
The satirists often mocked the vanity of the dandizette. 諷刺作家經常嘲笑女裝模作樣者的虛榮心。
The grandfather loved to dandle the baby on his knee. 祖父喜歡在膝蓋上搖晃著小寶寶。
She would dandle her grandchildren whenever they visited. 每當孫輩來訪，她總會寵溺地逗弄他們。
He is a patient dandler of his young nieces and nephews. 他是一個很有耐心且愛護年幼侄子侄女的人。
The nanny was an expert dandler, keeping the infant calm. 保姆是搖晃安撫嬰兒的專家，能讓幼兒保持平靜。
The dandling of the child helped him fall asleep. 對孩子的搖晃安撫有助於他入睡。
He gave a dandling motion to soothe the crying infant. 他做出搖晃的動作以安撫哭鬧的嬰兒。
She held the kitten dandlingly in her arms. 她寵愛地將小貓抱在懷裡搖晃。
He spoke dandlingly to the puppy as they played. 他在玩耍時寵溺地對小狗說話。
He used a special shampoo to get rid of his dandruff. 他使用一種特殊的洗髮精來清除頭皮屑。
Dandruff can be more noticeable when wearing dark clothes. 穿深色衣服時，頭皮屑會更加明顯。
The dandruffy scalp caused him constant itching. 多頭皮屑的頭皮讓他感到持續發癢。
He felt embarrassed about his dandruffy hair. 他對自己那滿是頭皮屑的頭髮感到尷尬。

meaning: 非常好；比預期好，但沒有想像中那麼好。
sentences: That's all fine and dandy, but how much does it cost? 這一切都很好，但要花多少錢呢？
Something described as dandy is very good; better than expected but not as good as could be. 形容為花花公子的東西非常好；比預期好，但沒有想像中那麼好。

meaning: 紈褲子弟；追求時尚的人
sentences: He was a bit of a dandy, always wearing the latest fashions. 他有點像個紈褲子弟，總是穿著最新的時裝。
That's a dandy little tool you've got there. 你那裡有個非常棒的小工具。
He was a prominent figure in 19th-century London dandydom. 他是 19 世紀倫敦紈褲界的一位著名人物。
The book explores the history and influence of dandydom. 這本書探索了紈褲作風的歷史和影響。
His dandyish behavior was often criticized by his peers. 他那紈褲子弟般的行為經常受到同儕的批評。
He had a dandyish sense of style that stood out in a crowd. 他有一種在人群中脫穎而出的紈褲子弟式風格感。
Dandyism is as much about attitude as it is about clothes. 紈褲主義與其說是關於衣服，不如說是關於態度。
Oscar Wilde was famous for his wit and dandyism. 奧斯卡·王爾德以其機智和紈褲作風而聞名。

meaning: 使成為紈褲子弟；使具有紈褲風格
sentences: They tried to dandyize the country boy with expensive suits. 他們試圖用昂貴的西裝把那個鄉下男孩打扮成紈褲子弟。
He decided to dandyize his appearance for the special event. 他決定為這個特別活動打理出具有紈褲風格的外表。
The young dandyling tried hard to imitate his older brothers. 那個小紈褲子弟努力模仿他的哥哥們。
He was just a harmless dandyling seeking attention. 他只是一個尋求關注、並無惡意的年輕紈褲子弟。
A Dane is a native or inhabitant of Denmark. 丹麥人是指丹麥的原住民或居民。
He is a proud Dane who loves his country's history. 他是一位為自己國家的歷史感到自豪的丹麥人。
Daneball is another name for the Guelder rose. 「Daneball」是歐洲瓊花的另一個名字。
The Daneball plant features clusters of white flowers. 歐洲瓊花以簇狀的白花為特徵。
The Daneflower blooms in early spring across Europe. 白頭翁花在初春時節遍佈歐洲開花。
The purple petals of the Daneflower are striking. 白頭翁花紫色花瓣非常引人注目。

meaning: 丹麥金（古代付給丹麥侵略者的稅金）
sentences: Danegeld was a tax raised to pay off Viking invaders. 丹麥金是為了解決維京侵略者而徵收的稅金。
The payment of Danegeld failed to prevent future raids. 支付丹麥金未能防止未來的襲擊。

meaning: 丹麥法區（古代英格蘭由丹麥人統治的地區）
sentences: The Danelaw influenced the culture of northern England. 丹麥法區影響了英格蘭北部的文化。
Historians study the unique legal systems within the Danelaw. 歷史學家研究丹麥法區內獨特的法律體系。
Daneweed is known for its unpleasant odor when crushed. 矮接骨木因其被揉碎時散發出的難聞氣味而聞名。
Folklore suggests that Daneweed grows where blood was shed. 民間傳說認為矮接骨木生長在流過血的地方。
Danewort has berries that are historically used for dyeing. 矮接骨木的漿果在歷史上被用於染色。
The medicinal properties of Danewort were noted in old herbal books. 舊草藥書中記錄了矮接骨木的藥用價值。

meaning: 該死的，微不足道的數量，最低限度的考慮。
sentences: I don't give a dang. 我不在乎。
The term dang refers to a damn, a negligible quantity, minimal consideration. 「dang」一詞指的是該死的、可忽略的數量、最低限度的考慮。
Dang! I forgot my keys again. 該死！我又忘記帶鑰匙了。
It was a dang good movie, wasn't it? 那是一部非常棒的電影，不是嗎？
It's dangerous to walk alone in the dark forest at night. 深夜獨自走在黑暗的森林裡很危險。
The sign warns of the danger of falling rocks on the road. 告示牌警告道路上有落石危險。
The signs warned of the danger of falling rocks. 標誌警告有落石危險。
The firefighters put their lives in danger to save others. 消防員冒著生命危險拯救他人。
The path ahead looked dark and dangerful. 前方的道路看起來既黑暗又危險。
Entering the abandoned building is a dangerful task. 進入這棟廢棄建築是一項危險的任務。
The car sped dangerfully close to the edge of the cliff. 汽車危險地飛速駛近懸崖邊緣。
He lived dangerfully, constantly seeking new thrills. 他生活得很危險，不斷追求新的刺激。
The experiment was designed to be completely dangerless. 該實驗旨在設計成完全無危險的。
It was a simple and dangerless procedure for the patient. 對病人來說，這是一個簡單且無危險的手術。
It's dangerous to walk alone in the dark forest at night. 深夜獨自走在黑暗的森林裡很危險。
Playing with fire is extremely dangerous for children. 玩火對孩子來說是非常危險的。
It is dangerous to walk alone in this neighborhood at night. 晚上在這一帶獨自走路很危險。
The chemicals are highly dangerous and must be handled with care. 這些化學品非常危險，必須小心處理。

meaning: 以危險的方式；以免造成危險。
sentences: If someone acts dangerously, they do so in a way that is in a dangerous manner; so as to cause danger. 如果某人的行為是危險的，那麼他們會以危險的方式這樣做；以免造成危險。
The speaker responded dangerously during the discussion. 演講者在討論過程中做出了危險的回應。
The water level rose dangerously high after the storm. 暴風雨過後，水位危險地升高了。
She was dangerously ill and had to be rushed to the hospital. 她病得很危險，必須被火速送往醫院。
The police assessed the dangerousness of the suspect. 警方評估了嫌疑人的危險性。
The dangerousness of the mission was clear to everyone involved. 任務的危險性對於參與的每個人來說都很明確。
I think it's a bit dangersome to go out in this weather. 我覺得在這種天氣出門有點危險。
The old bridge was considered too dangersome for vehicles. 那座老橋被認為對車輛來說太危險了。

meaning: 鬆散地懸掛並具有擺動能力。
sentences: His feet are dangling in the water. 他的腳在水中晃來晃去。
People often dangle when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會搖擺不定。
A gold locket dangled from her neck. 一個金墜飾掛在她的脖子上。
The keys were dangling from the ignition. 鑰匙正掛在點火開關上搖晃。
The dangleberry produces sweet, dark blue fruit. 垂實越橘結出甜美的深藍色果實。
We spotted some dangleberry bushes while hiking in the forest. 我們在森林徒步時發現了一些垂實越橘灌木。
The loose danglement of the wires caused a safety hazard. 電線的鬆動懸掛造成了安全隱患。
She adjusted the danglement of the ornaments on the tree. 她調整了樹上裝飾品的懸掛位置。

meaning: 懸掛物；追求者；（社交場上的）隨從
sentences: The fishing lure had a shiny dangler to attract fish. 魚餌上有一個閃亮的懸掛物以吸引魚群。
He was known as a constant dangler after famous actresses. 他以常年追求著名女演員而聞名。

meaning: 懸掛著（dangling 的方言拼法）
sentences: He left the rope danglin' from the barn door. 他把繩子留在穀倉門口懸掛著。
The old sign was danglin' by a single rusty nail. 那個舊招牌只靠一顆生鏽的釘子懸掛著。
Well, don't leave me dangling. Tell me what happened! 好吧，別讓我懸著。告訴我發生了什麼事！
The report describes the result as dangling. 該報告將結果描述為懸空。
Avoid using dangling participles in your writing. 在你的寫作中避免使用懸垂分詞。
The dangling lights added a festive touch to the patio. 懸掛的燈串為露台增添了節日氣氛。
The spider hung danglingly from the ceiling. 蜘蛛懸掛在天花板上。
The earrings moved danglingly as she shook her head. 當她搖頭時，耳環隨之搖晃。

meaning: 達尼人（印尼西巴布亞的一個民族）
sentences: The Dani people are known for their traditional agriculture. 達尼人以其傳統農業而聞名。
Anthropologists studied the funeral rites of the Dani tribe. 人類學家研究了達尼部落的葬禮儀式。

meaning: 丹尼期（地質年代，古新世的最早階段）
sentences: The Danian age marks the beginning of the Paleogene period. 丹尼期標誌著古近紀的開始。
Fossils from the Danian stage show a rapid recovery of life. 丹尼期的化石顯示生命正在迅速恢復。
The ancient scholar wrote about Danic customs. 那位古代學者記述了丹麥的習俗。
Some old maps refer to the territory as Danic lands. 一些舊地圖將該領土稱為丹麥領地。

meaning: 丹麥語特徵；丹麥語習慣用語
sentences: His English was occasionally marked by a danicism. 他的英語偶爾會帶有丹麥語的特徵。
The linguist analyzed various danicisms in the local dialect. 語言學家分析了當地語言中的各種丹麥語慣用語。
Daniel is a classic name of Hebrew origin. 丹尼爾是一個源自希伯來語的經典名字。
He was named Daniel after his grandfather. 他跟隨祖父的名字取名為丹尼爾。

meaning: 丹尼爾（義大利語、法語等變體）
sentences: Daniele is a common given name in Italy. 丹尼爾（Daniele）在義大利是一個常見的名字。
Daniele Rossi is a famous football player. 丹尼爾·羅西是一位著名的足球運動員。

meaning: 丹尼爾的；與但以理有關的（聖經人物）
sentences: The scholar focused on the Danielic prophecies in the Bible. 學者專注於聖經中但以理的預言。
He studied Danielic literature during his theology course. 他在神學課程中研究了關於但以理的文學。
Danielle is the feminine form of Daniel. 丹妮爾是丹尼爾的女性形式。
Danielle works as a graphic designer in London. 丹妮爾在倫敦擔任平面設計師。

meaning: 丹尼冰期（北歐冰川消退的一個階段）
sentences: The Daniglacial stage involved a temporary halt in ice retreat. 丹尼冰期階段包括冰川退縮的暫時停止。
Geologists examine moraines formed during the Daniglacial period. 地質學家檢查丹尼冰期形成的冰磧。
The zebra danio is a popular fish for beginners' aquariums. 斑馬魚是初學者水族箱中受歡迎的魚類。
Scientists use the danio as a model organism in genetic research. 科學家在遺傳研究中將斑馬魚用作模式生物。
She ordered a sweet Danish pastry for breakfast. 她早餐點了一個甜丹麥酥餅。
Danish is a North Germanic language spoken in Denmark. 丹麥語是丹麥使用的一種北日耳曼語言。
The author's style was criticized for excessive Danism. 該作者的風格因過多的丹麥式表達而受到批評。
The spread of Danism influenced neighboring Scandinavian languages. 丹麥主義的傳播影響了鄰近的斯堪地那維亞語言。

meaning: 丹派（摩門教歷史上的秘密組織成員）
sentences: Historical accounts describe the actions of the Danite group. 歷史記載描述了丹派團體的行動。
The myth of the Danite assassins persisted for decades. 關於丹派刺客的傳說持續了數十年。
The Danization of the region led to significant cultural changes. 該地區的丹麥化導致了顯著的文化變遷。
Policy makers encouraged the Danization of local institutions. 政策制定者鼓勵地方機構的丹麥化。
Efforts were made to Danize the names of the border towns. 人們努力使邊境城鎮的名字丹麥化。
He wanted to Danize his lifestyle after moving to Copenhagen. 搬到哥本哈根後，他想讓自己的生活方式丹麥化。
The prison cell was dark and dank. 牢房又黑又陰冷潮濕。
The abandoned house had a dank smell. 這座廢棄的房子有一股陰冷潮濕的味道。
The basement was dark and dank. 地下室又暗又陰冷潮濕。
The air in the cave felt cold and dank. 洞穴裡的空氣感覺寒冷且陰濕。
A Dankali guide helped the travelers cross the desert. 一位達納基爾嚮導幫助旅客穿過沙漠。
He learned a few phrases in the Dankali language. 他學會了幾個達納基爾語的短語。
The walls felt slightly dankish after the rain. 雨後牆壁感覺略微潮濕。
It was a dankish morning in the valley. 谷地裡是一個陰暗微濕的早晨。
The dankishness of the prison cell was oppressive. 牢房的陰濕感令人感到壓抑。
He complained about the constant dankishness of the basement apartment. 他抱怨這間地下室公寓持續的陰濕感。
The moss grew dankly in the shadows. 苔蘚在陰影中潮濕地生長。
The wind blew dankly through the abandoned house. 風陰冷地吹過那棟廢棄的房子。
The dankness of the forest made him shiver. 森林的陰冷潮濕讓他發抖。
We tried to dry out the room to remove the dankness. 我們試圖讓房間乾燥以消除陰濕感。

meaning: 丹利（宏都拉斯的一個城市）
sentences: Danli is known for its annual corn festival. 丹利以其一年一度的玉米節而聞名。
He spent a week visiting coffee farms near Danli. 他花了一週時間參觀丹利附近的咖啡農場。
The Dannebrog is one of the oldest national flags in the world. 丹麥國旗是世界上最古老的國旗之一。
The red and white Dannebrog was flying high in the square. 紅底白十字的丹麥國旗在廣場上高高飄揚。
Dannemorite is a manganese-rich variety of grunerite. 丹尼莫拉石是鐵閃石中富含錳的一種變體。
The mineral specimen was identified as dannemorite. 該礦物標本被鑑定為丹尼莫拉石。
He was described as a fine danner at the local festivities. 他被描述為當地慶典上的一位優秀舞者。
In old dialect, a danner was someone who loved to dance. 在古老方言中，「danner」是指熱愛跳舞的人。
Dannie is often a nickname for Daniel or Danielle. Dannie 通常是 Daniel 或 Danielle 的暱稱。
Dannie decided to study law at university. 丹尼決定在大學攻讀法律。
The worker wore a dannock to protect his hand. 工人戴著厚重的手套以保護他的手。
She served a fresh dannock of bread with the soup. 她隨湯附上了一大塊新鮮的面包。
Danny is a friendly nickname for Daniel. 丹尼是丹尼爾的一個親切暱稱。
Danny and his friends went to the cinema. 丹尼和他的朋友們去了電影院。

meaning: 丹諾蘭加（一種植物名，罕用）
sentences: The danoranja is a rare tropical plant with vibrant flowers. 丹諾蘭加是一種罕見且花朵鮮豔的熱帶植物。
Researchers studied the medicinal properties of the danoranja. 研究人員研究了丹諾蘭加的藥用特性。
The hotel hosted a thé dansant on Sunday afternoons. 這家飯店在週日下午舉行茶舞會。
She wore a dansant gown to the formal event. 她穿著一件舞會禮服參加正式活動。
The famous danseuse performed at the grand opera house. 那位著名的女芭蕾舞者在大劇院表演。
She trained for years to become a professional danseuse. 她訓練了多年才成為一名專業的女芭蕾舞者。

meaning: 丹塔木（西非的一種喬木）
sentences: Danta wood is known for its durability and reddish-brown color. 丹塔木以其耐用性和紅褐色而聞名。
The furniture was made from high-quality danta timber. 這些家具是由優質丹塔木材製成的。

meaning: 但丁的；像但丁描述的地獄般的
sentences: The scene of the fire was described as a Dantean nightmare. 火災現場被描述為但丁式地獄般的噩夢。
Scholars discussed the Dantean influences in modern literature. 學者們討論了但丁在現代文學中的影響。

meaning: 但丁風格的；莊嚴而恐怖的
sentences: The artist's illustrations had a Dantesque quality. 這位藝術家的插圖具有但丁式的風格。
He wrote a poem in a Dantesque style about his travels. 他用但丁式的風格寫了一首關於他旅行的詩。
