Danthonia is a genus of grasses found in temperate regions. 丹通草屬是遍佈溫帶地區的一個草屬。
Farmers use some Danthonia species for livestock grazing. 農民使用某些丹通草屬物種來放牧牲畜。
The leading Dantist published a new analysis of the Divine Comedy. 這位領先的但丁研究者發表了對《神曲》的新分析。
He dedicated his life to being a Dantist at the university. 他致力於在大學裡擔任一名但丁研究者。
Dantology is the study of the works and life of Dante Alighieri. 但丁學是研究但丁·阿利吉耶里的作品和生平的學科。
The international conference on Dantology was held in Florence. 國際但丁學會議在佛羅倫斯舉行。
His Dantomania was evident from his massive collection of Dante's books. 從他收藏的大量但丁書籍中可以明顯看出他的但丁狂熱。
The 19th century saw a peak in Dantomania across Europe. 19 世紀，全歐洲對但丁的狂熱達到了頂峰。
Georges Danton was a leading figure in the early French Revolution. 喬治·丹敦是法國大革命早期的領軍人物。
Historians debate the role of Danton in the Reign of Terror. 歷史學家爭論丹敦在恐怖統治時期的角色。

meaning: 丹敦風格的；有丹敦特色的
sentences: The politician's fiery speeches were described as Dantonesque. 這位政治家激烈的演講被描述為具有丹敦風格。
He possessed a Dantonesque energy that inspired the crowd. 他擁有一種激勵群眾的丹敦式活力。
The Dantonist faction eventually fell out of favor during the revolution. 丹敦派系最終在革命期間失寵。
He was arrested for being a prominent Dantonist. 他因是一位著名的丹敦派成員而被捕。
The Dantophilist spent years translating the Divine Comedy. 這位但丁愛好者花了數年時間翻譯《神曲》。
As a devoted Dantophilist, he visited Dante's tomb in Ravenna. 作為一名虔誠的但丁愛好者，他參觀了但丁在拉文納的陵墓。
His Dantophily led him to organize a local reading group. 他對但丁的愛好促使他組織了一個當地的讀書小組。
The exhibition celebrated the history of Dantophily in England. 該展覽慶祝了英國對但丁崇拜的歷史。
The Danube is the second-longest river in Europe. 多瑙河是歐洲第二長的河流。
They took a cruise along the beautiful Blue Danube. 他們沿著美麗的藍色多瑙河乘船遊覽。
The Danubian countries share a rich cultural heritage. 多瑙河沿岸國家共享豐富的文化遺產。
Archaeologists discovered ancient Danubian settlements. 考古學家發現了古代多瑙河的定居點。

meaning: 享月號（南韓月球軌道器）
sentences: Danuri successfully entered lunar orbit in 2022. 享月號在 2022 年成功進入月球軌道。
The mission of Danuri is to study the lunar surface and map resources. 享月號的任務是研究月球表面並繪製資源圖。

meaning: 但澤（波蘭城市格但斯克的舊稱）
sentences: Danzig was a major trading port in the Hanseatic League. 但澤曾是漢薩同盟的主要貿易港口。
The status of Danzig was a significant issue before World War II. 二戰前，但澤的地位是一個重要問題。
He was a proud Danziger who spoke both German and Polish. 他是一個會說德語和波蘭語、並引以為傲的但澤人。
The Danziger community maintained its traditions for centuries. 但澤人社區保持了數個世紀的傳統。

meaning: 道（哲學概念）；菲律賓人面子樹
sentences: The concept of Dao is central to Chinese philosophy. 「道」的概念是中國哲學的核心。
The dao tree is a large timber tree native to Southeast Asia. 人面子樹是原產於東南亞的一種大型木材樹。

meaning: 仙靈；（愛爾蘭語中「人民」的意思）
sentences: In Irish folklore, the Daoine Sidhe are the fairy people. 在愛爾蘭民間傳說中，「Daoine Sidhe」是指仙靈族。
The term daoine refers to people in the Irish language. 「daoine」一詞在愛爾蘭語中是指人民。
He gave her a friendly dap on the shoulder. 他友好地輕拍了她的肩膀一下。
The fisherman used the dap technique to catch trout. 漁夫使用輕蘸式釣法來捉鱒魚。

meaning: 達皮魚屬（已滅絕的魚類屬）
sentences: Dapedium was a genus of primitive bony fish from the Jurassic period. 達皮魚屬是侏羅紀時期的一個原始硬骨魚屬。
The fossil record for Dapedium is quite extensive. 達皮魚屬的化石記錄相當豐富。

meaning: 達皮魚屬（已滅絕的魚類屬）
sentences: Dapedius fossils are often found in European limestone deposits. 達皮魚屬化石經常在歐洲的石灰岩沉積物中被發現。
The body of Dapedius was covered with thick, shiny scales. 達皮魚屬的身體覆蓋著厚實而閃亮的鱗片。
Daphnaceae was historically used to classify the daphne family. 瑞香科在歷史上被用來歸類瑞香科植物。
Most species once in Daphnaceae are now in Thymelaeaceae. 曾經屬於瑞香科的大多數物種現在都歸於瑞香科（Thymelaeaceae）。

meaning: 達芙妮（希臘神話女神）；瑞香屬
sentences: Daphne was transformed into a laurel tree to escape Apollo. 達芙妮為了躲避阿波羅而變成了一棵月桂樹。
The winter daphne is prized for its fragrant blossoms. 冬季瑞香因其芬芳的花朵而受到喜愛。
The Daphnean crown was awarded to the victors. 達芙妮式的（月桂）皇冠被授予勝利者。
He admired the Daphnean beauty of the forest clearing. 他欣賞森林林間空地那如達芙妮般的美麗。

meaning: 達芙妮祭（古希臘底比斯慶典）
sentences: The Daphnephoria was a festival held in honor of Apollo. 達芙妮祭是為紀念阿波羅而舉行的節日。
A young boy called the Daphnephoros led the procession. 一位被稱為「Daphnephoros」的少年帶領遊行隊伍。
Daphnetin is a coumarin derivative found in Daphne plants. 瑞香素是瑞香屬植物中發現的一種香豆素衍生物。
Researchers studied the antioxidant effects of daphnetin. 研究人員研究了瑞香素的抗氧化作用。
Daphnia are commonly known as water fleas. 水蚤屬通常被稱為水蚤。
Biologists use Daphnia to test water toxicity. 生物學家使用水蚤屬來測試水質毒性。
Daphnin is a glucoside extracted from daphne bark. 瑞香苷是從瑞香樹皮中提取的一種糖苷。
The chemical properties of daphnin were analyzed in the study. 研究中分析了瑞香苷的化學性質。
The microscopic organism had a daphnioid shape. 這個顯微生物具有類水蚤的形狀。
Scientists observed daphnioid characteristics in the sample. 科學家在樣本中觀察到了類水蚤的特徵。

meaning: 達夫尼斯（希臘神話牧羊人）
sentences: Daphnis is credited with the invention of pastoral poetry. 達夫尼斯被歸功於田園詩的發明。
The story of Daphnis and Chloe is a famous ancient romance. 達夫尼斯和克洛伊的故事是一個著名的古代浪漫故事。
The shrub had daphnoid leaves and small flowers. 這株灌木長有類瑞香的葉子和細小的花朵。
Botanists categorized the specimen based on its daphnoid structure. 植物學家根據其類瑞香的結構對標本進行了分類。

meaning: 達皮丘橡膠（一種源自南美的橡膠）
sentences: Dapicho is a natural rubber obtained from certain South American trees. 達皮丘橡膠是從某些南美樹木中獲得的天然橡膠。
The local community harvested dapicho for various uses. 當地社區採集達皮丘橡膠用於多種用途。
Dapico is an alternative spelling for the rubber substance dapicho. 「Dapico」是橡膠物質「dapicho」的一種替代拼法。
He researched the industrial potential of dapico rubber. 他研究了達皮丘橡膠的工業潛力。
The dapifer was responsible for serving the king's meals. 御膳官負責為國王提供膳食。
In medieval courts, the dapifer was a high-ranking officer. 在中世紀宮廷中，管家（dapifer）是一位高級官員。

meaning: 衣冠楚楚的；短小精悍的
sentences: He looked very dapper in his new three-piece suit. 他穿著新的三件套西裝，看起來非常衣冠楚楚。
The elderly gentleman was known for his dapper appearance. 這位老先生以其整潔帥氣的外表而聞名。
He was a dapperling who loved fine fashion despite his small stature. 他是一個儘管身材矮小卻熱愛精緻時尚的人。
The satirical play featured a dapperling as the main character. 這部諷刺劇以一個衣冠楚楚的小矮人為主角。
He was dapperly dressed for the formal dinner party. 他為正式晚宴打扮得衣冠楚楚。
She adjusted her hat and walked dapperly toward the stage. 她調整了一下帽子，整潔體面地走向舞台。
His dapperness always impressed his business associates. 他的整潔體面總是讓他的生意夥伴印象深刻。
The dapperness of the hotel staff was exceptional. 飯店員工的整潔體面非常出色。
The sunlight began to dapple the forest floor. 陽光開始在森林地面上投下斑駁的光影。
He chose a horse with a beautiful grey dapple. 他選了一匹長有美麗灰色斑點的馬。
The deer hid in the dappled shade of the oak trees. 鹿躲在橡樹斑駁的樹影下。
They walked through a dappled landscape of light and shadow. 他們穿過一片光影斑駁的風景。

meaning: 達爾（一種罕見的計量單位或頭銜）
sentences: The term dar is used in some specialized historical contexts. 「Dar」一詞用於某些專門的歷史背景中。
He researched the origin of the dar as a unit of measure. 他研究了將「dar」作為計量單位的起源。

meaning: 達拉布卡鼓（一種杯狀手鼓）
sentences: The musician played a rhythmic solo on the darabukka. 音樂家在達拉布卡鼓上演奏了一段有節奏的獨奏。
A darabukka is common in Middle Eastern folk music. 達拉布卡鼓在中東民間音樂中很常見。

meaning: 達拉克（化學或工業術語，罕用）
sentences: Darac is sometimes used as a brand name for industrial chemicals. 「Darac」有時被用作工業化學品的品牌名稱。
The engineer specified the use of Darac additives in the cement. 工程師指定在水泥中使用 Darac 添加劑。

meaning: 達拉（倒電容單位，farad 的倒寫）
sentences: The daraf is the unit of elastance in electrical engineering. 達拉是電機工程中倒電容的單位。
One daraf is equal to the reciprocal of one farad. 一達拉等於一法拉的倒數。

meaning: 達拉普提（邏輯三段論的一種形式）
sentences: Darapti is a valid syllogistic mood in traditional logic. 達拉普提是傳統邏輯中一個有效的三段論格。
The professor explained the structure of Darapti to the class. 教授向全班解釋了達拉普提的結構。

meaning: 陸地（馬來語或印尼語，罕用於英語）
sentences: The word darat refers to land as opposed to sea. 「darat」一詞指相對於海洋的陸地。
He used the term darat in his travel journal about Southeast Asia. 他在關於東南亞的旅行日記中使用了「darat」這個詞。
Darbha grass is used in many Vedic rituals. 達磨草被用於許多吠陀儀式中。
The priest sat on a mat made of sacred darbha. 祭司坐在由神聖的達磨草製成的墊子上。

meaning: 用於平滑和平整濕混凝土表面的專用工具，由堅硬的楔子或三角形的木材或金屬組成。
sentences: The term darby refers to a specialized tool used to smooth and level the surface of wet concrete, consisting of a stiff wedge or triangle of wood or metal. 術語「darby」是指一種用於平滑和平整濕混凝土表面的專用工具，由堅硬的楔子或三角形的木材或金屬組成。
The lesson introduced darby as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 darby 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The plasterer used a darby to level the wet ceiling. 泥水匠使用長抹子來整平潮濕的天花板。
A darby consists of a long wooden or metal blade with handles. 一把長抹子由長木片或金屬片及把手組成。
Darbyism refers to the beliefs associated with John Nelson Darby. 達秘主義是指與約翰·尼爾森·達秘相關的信仰。
The theological study examined the impact of Darbyism on modern dispensationalism. 神學研究考察了達秘主義對現代時代論的影響。
The Darbyite community followed strict religious practices. 達秘主義者社群遵循嚴格的宗教實踐。
He identified himself as a Darbyite throughout his life. 他一生都自認為是一名達秘主義者。
Darci decided to travel the world before starting university. 達西決定在開始大學生活前環遊世界。
Darci is a variation of the name Darcy. 達西（Darci）是名字「Darcy」的一個變體。

meaning: 達爾德人（印巴邊境民族）
sentences: The Dard people live in the northern regions of the Indian subcontinent. 達爾德人居住在印度次大陸北部地區。
She researched the Dardic languages spoken by the Dard tribes. 她研究了達爾德部落所說的達爾德語系。

meaning: 達達尼爾的；達達尼爾人
sentences: In mythology, the Dardan people were ancestors of the Trojans. 在神話中，達達尼爾人是特洛伊人的祖先。
The Dardan fleet sailed through the ancient straits. 達達尼爾艦隊駛過了古代的海峽。
The dardanarius was punished for hoarding grain during the famine. 那名壟斷者因在饑荒期間囤積糧食而受罰。
Ancient Roman laws targeted the dardanarius to ensure fair food distribution. 古羅馬法律針對屯積者以確保食物公平分配。
The Dardani were an ancient tribe located in the Balkans. 達耳達尼人是位於巴爾幹半島的一個古代部落。
Historians study the Dardani's interactions with neighboring empires. 歷史學家研究達耳達尼人與鄰近帝國的互動。

meaning: 達耳達尼亞的物品（通常指古代裝飾品）
sentences: The museum displayed a rare dardanium from the Bronze Age. 博物館展示了一件來自青銅時代的罕見達耳達尼亞文物。
Archaeologists identified the artifact as a dardanium. 考古學家將該文物鑑定為一件達耳達尼亞器物。

meaning: 魔鬼甲蟲（愛爾蘭傳說中的昆蟲）
sentences: In Irish folklore, the dardaol is often associated with bad luck. 在愛爾蘭民俗中，魔鬼甲蟲常與厄運聯繫在一起。
He saw a dardaol crawling through the garden. 他看到一隻魔鬼甲蟲在花園裡爬行。

meaning: 達爾德語支（印歐語系的一支）
sentences: The Dardic languages are spoken in parts of Pakistan and India. 達爾德語支流行於巴基斯坦和印度的部分地區。
He is an expert in Dardic linguistics. 他是達爾德語語言學方面的專家。

meaning: 達爾迪斯坦（南亞地理區域）
sentences: Dardistan is known for its rugged mountainous terrain. 達爾迪斯坦以其崎嶇的山地地形而聞名。
Travelers often visit Dardistan to experience its unique culture. 旅者常去達爾迪斯坦體驗其獨特的文化。
I dare you to jump into the cold water of the lake! 我敢打賭你不敢跳進冰涼的湖水裡！
She didn't dare to speak her mind during the important meeting. 她在重要會議期間不敢說出自己的真實想法。
She didn't dare to speak up in the meeting. 她在會議上不敢大聲說話。
I dare you to jump across the stream. 我挑戰你跳過那條小溪。

meaning: 敢做任何事的人；冒險家
sentences: As a young dareall, he traveled the world with very little money. 作為一個敢於冒險的人，他帶著極少的錢週遊世界。
She was known as a dareall who never feared danger. 她以敢做任何事且從不畏懼危險而聞名。
The famous daredevil performed a stunt jumping over ten cars. 那位著名的冒險家表演了飛越十輛車的特技。
He is a bit of a daredevil when it comes to extreme sports. 在極限運動方面，他有點像個敢死隊。
The daredevil performed a stunt on his motorcycle. 那個冒失鬼騎著摩托車表演特技。
He made a daredevil attempt to climb the cliff without ropes. 他進行了一次不帶繩索攀登懸崖的大膽嘗試。
His daredevilism often gets him into trouble with the police. 他的冒險行為常使他陷入與警察的麻煩中。
The stunt pilot was famous for his daredevilism. 這位特技飛行員因其大膽妄為而聞名。
The crowd cheered at the acrobat's daredevilry. 群眾為雜技演員的大膽行為喝采。
It was a piece of pure daredevilry that nearly cost him his life. 那純粹是一種蠻幹行為，幾乎讓他丟了性命。
Her life was full of excitement and daredeviltry. 她的生活充滿了刺激和大膽的舉動。
The movie depicts the daredeviltry of deep-sea explorers. 電影描繪了深海探險家的冒險精神。
He made a dareful decision to start his own business. 他做出了一個大膽的決定去創業。
Her dareful actions inspired others to take risks. 她勇敢的行動激勵了他人去冒險。
Daren is my oldest brother. 達倫是我的大哥。
We are going to Daren's house for dinner tonight. 我們今晚要去達倫家吃晚餐。

meaning: 挑戰者；敢於做某事的人
sentences: He was a darer who always pushed the limits. 他是一個總是挑戰極限的人。
The darer stepped forward to accept the challenge. 挑戰者走上前去接受挑戰。
Dares was a priest of Hephaestus in the Trojan War. 達勒斯是特洛伊戰爭中赫菲斯托斯的祭司。
According to legend, Dares wrote an account of the war. 根據傳說，達勒斯寫了一份關於戰爭的記錄。
I daresay it will rain later this afternoon. 我想今天下午晚些時候會下雨。
He will be back soon, I daresay. 我敢說他很快就會回來。
The farmers completed their darg before sunset. 農民們在日落前完成了一天的工作量。
He struggled to finish his daily darg. 他努力完成每天的工作定額。
Many pilgrims visited the dargah to seek blessings. 許多朝聖者參觀這座靈廟以尋求祝福。
The dargah is a place of peace and spiritual reflection. 蘇菲派聖地是一個寧靜和靈魂反思的地方。

meaning: 計日工；按日計酬的勞工
sentences: The darger looked for work at the local market every morning. 那名計日工每天早上都在當地市場找工作。
He earned a living as a darger on various construction sites. 他在各個建築工地當計日工謀生。
Darghin is spoken primarily in Dagestan. 達爾金語主要在達吉斯坦使用。
He is learning the Darghin language to communicate with his relatives. 他正在學習達爾金語以便與親戚溝通。
Dargo is a small town in Victoria, Australia. 達戈是澳大利亞維多利亞州的一個小鎮。
They went camping in the beautiful wilderness near Dargo. 他們去達戈附近美麗的荒野露營。
The dargsman worked hard to support his family. 那名按日計酬的勞工努力工作以養家糊口。
A dargsman was hired to help with the harvest. 雇傭了一名計日工來幫忙收割。
They would argue and dargue over small matters for hours. 他們會為了小事爭論好幾個小時。
The scholars began to dargue about the interpretation of the text. 學者們開始就文本的解釋進行辯論。
Dari is one of the official languages of Afghanistan. 達利語是阿富汗的官方語言之一。
She translates documents from Dari to English. 她將文件從達利語翻譯成英語。

meaning: 稅收；貢賦（在某些伊斯蘭國家）
sentences: The local government collected the daribah from the merchants. 當地政府向商人徵收稅款。
A portion of the daribah was used to build a new school. 稅收的一部分被用來建造一所新學校。

meaning: 大流克金幣（古波斯金幣）
sentences: The archaeologist found an ancient gold daric in the ruins. 考古學家在遺跡中發現了一枚古代大流克金幣。
The daric was a standard currency in the Persian Empire. 大流克金幣是波斯帝國的標準貨幣。

meaning: 達里恩（地名，如達里恩地峽）
sentences: The Isthmus of Darien connects North and South America. 達里恩地峽連接北美洲和南美洲。
They explored the dense jungles of the Darien Gap. 他們探索了達里恩隘口茂密的叢林。

meaning: 達里（邏輯學中的三段論格式）
sentences: Darii is a mnemonic word for a valid syllogism in logic. 達里是邏輯學中有效三段論的助記詞。
The student practiced identifying arguments in Darii form. 學生練習識別達里格式的論證。
Darin is a very talented musician. 達林是一位非常有才華的音樂家。
I met Darin at the conference last week. 我上週在會議上遇到了達林。

meaning: 富有冒險精神，願意承擔或尋找風險；過於大膽。
sentences: The report describes the result as daring. 報告稱這一結果是大膽的。
Everyone noticed the daring tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的大膽語氣。
It was a daring plan, but it worked. 那是一個大膽的計劃，但奏效了。
His daring during the rescue mission was highly praised. 他在救援任務中的英勇表現受到了高度讚揚。
The mountain climber daringly ascended the icy peak. 登山者大膽地攀登冰封的山峰。
She spoke daringly against the unjust policy. 她大膽地發言反對那項不公正的政策。
The success of the mission depended on the captain's daringness. 任務的成功取決於船長的大膽。
His daringness often surprised his more cautious colleagues. 他的大膽常常讓那些較為謹慎的同事感到驚訝。

meaning: 圓筒形小模子；一種甜點
sentences: The pastry chef used a dariole to shape the cakes. 點心師傅用圓筒模子給蛋糕塑形。
She served a delicious raspberry dariole for dessert. 她端出美味的覆盆子甜點作為餐後點心。

meaning: 大流士（人名，多指波斯國王）
sentences: Darius the Great expanded the Persian Empire significantly. 大流士大帝顯著擴張了波斯帝國。
The reign of Darius is a key topic in ancient history. 大流士的統治是古代史的一個關鍵課題。
Darjeeling is famous for its high-quality black tea. 大吉嶺以其高品質的紅茶而聞名。
They spent their summer vacation in the hills of Darjeeling. 他們在大吉嶺的山丘上度過了暑假。
It gets dark very early in the winter. 冬天很早就變黑了。
She has long dark hair and beautiful brown eyes. 她留著長長的深色頭髮，有一雙漂亮的棕色眼睛。
It's too dark to see anything without a flashlight. 沒有手電筒，太黑了，什麼都看不見。
She prefers wearing dark colors like navy and black. 她喜歡穿深色的衣服，如海軍藍和黑色。
The sky began to darken as the storm approached. 隨著暴風雨臨近，天空開始變暗。
You can darken the room by drawing the curtains. 你可以透過拉上窗簾來使房間變暗。
He applied a leather darkener to his boots. 他在靴子上塗了皮革增色劑。
The chemical acts as a darkener in the dyeing process. 這種化學物質在染色過程中起著增色劑的作用。
The darkening sky signaled that it was time to go home. 變暗的天空預示著該回家了。
There was a gradual darkening of the landscape as evening fell. 傍晚時分，景色逐漸變暗。
The darkful forest felt eerie in the middle of the night. 深夜裡，這片陰暗的森林感覺很陰森。
He avoided the darkful alleyways of the city. 他避開城市裡那些陰暗的小巷。
The villain in the story was a darkhearted man. 故事中的反派是一個心腸惡毒的人。
His darkhearted nature made it difficult for him to make friends. 他那惡毒的本性使他很難交到朋友。
The tragedy was caused by the king's darkheartedness. 這場悲劇是由國王的心腸惡毒造成的。
No one expected such darkheartedness from someone so young. 沒人想到這麼年輕的人竟然如此居心不良。
The walls were painted a darkish shade of green. 牆壁被漆成了一種微暗的綠色。
It was already darkish by the time we arrived. 我們到達時，天色已經微暗了。
A sense of darkishness filled the room as the sun set. 隨著太陽落山，房間裡充滿了一種微暗的感覺。
The painting captured the darkishness of the early morning. 這幅畫捕捉到了清晨那種微暗的色調。
The landscape seemed to darkle under the gathering clouds. 在聚集的雲層下，景色似乎變暗了。
His eyes would darkle whenever he was angry. 每當他生氣時，他的眼睛就會變得陰沉。
The darkling woods were full of mysterious sounds. 黑暗中的森林充滿了神祕的聲音。
They walked darkling through the unlit halls. 他們在沒開燈的大廳裡摸黑行走。
He wandered darklings through the empty castle. 他在空蕩蕩的城堡中摸黑徘徊。
The creatures moved darklings through the night. 那些生物在夜色中悄悄移動。
He stared darkly at his rival. 他陰沉地盯著他的對手。
The future seemed darkly uncertain. 未來似乎陰暗不明。
They waited for darkmans before attempting the escape. 他們等到夜晚才嘗試逃跑。
In old slang, darkmans refers to the time after sunset. 在舊俚語中，darkmans 指的是日落後的時間。

meaning: 黑暗的狀態；缺乏光；光的絕對或相對缺乏。
sentences: The darkness of the room made it difficult to see. 房間裡很暗，讓人看不清楚東西。
The term darkness refers to The state of being dark; lack of light; the absolute or comparative absence of light. 黑暗一詞指的是黑暗的狀態；缺乏光線；光的絕對或相對缺乏。
Total darkness covered the valley. 整個山谷被完全的黑暗籠罩。
He was afraid of the darkness when he was a child. 他小時候害怕黑暗。
Photographers use a darkroom to develop film. 攝影師使用暗房來沖洗底片。
He spent hours in the darkroom working on his prints. 他在暗房裡待了好幾個小時沖洗照片。
The portrait depicts a beautiful darkskin woman. 這幅肖像畫描繪了一位美麗的深色皮膚女性。
Diversity means celebrating everyone, including every darkskin individual. 多樣性意味著讚美每一個人，包括每一位深色皮膚的人。
A darksome cave lay at the foot of the mountain. 山腳下有一個陰暗的洞穴。
The poet wrote about his darksome thoughts. 這位詩人寫下了他憂鬱的想法。
The darksomeness of the prison cell was depressing. 牢房的陰暗令人感到沮喪。
He tried to hide the darksomeness of his mood. 他試圖隱藏自己心情的憂鬱。
The term darky is considered offensive today. darky 這個詞在今天被認為是有冒犯性的。
Old literature sometimes contains the word darky. 舊文學作品中有時會包含 darky 這個詞。
Happy birthday, my darling! I hope you have a wonderful day. 生日快樂，我親愛的！希望妳過得愉快。
The little girl is such a darling; everyone loves her. 那個小女孩真是個討人喜歡的孩子；每個人都喜歡她。
Goodnight, my darling. 晚安，我親愛的。
She was the darling of the fashion world. 她曾是時尚界的寵兒。
She smiled darlingly at the camera. 她對著鏡頭可愛地微笑。
The child behaved darlingly during the party. 那個孩子在派對上表現得很討人喜歡。
Everyone was charmed by the baby's darlingness. 每個人都被這個寶寶的可愛迷住了。
There was a certain darlingness in her personality. 她的性格中有一種親切感。
Darlingtonia is a genus of carnivorous plants. 眼鏡蛇瓶子草屬是一類食蟲植物。
The Darlingtonia californica is also known as the cobra lily. 加州眼鏡蛇瓶子草也被稱為眼鏡蛇百合。
My grandmother taught me how to darn socks. 我祖母教我如何補襪子。
He put a darn in his old sweater to fix the hole. 他在舊毛衣上補了一下，修好了那個洞。

meaning: 縫補；詛咒（damned 的委婉語）
sentences: She had to darn a hole in her sock. 她不得不縫補襪子上的洞。
Darn it! I forgot my keys. 該死！我忘了帶鑰匙。

meaning: 該死；受詛咒（damnation 的委婉語）
sentences: Oh, darnation! The bus just left. 噢，真糟糕！公車剛開走。
He muttered words of darnation under his breath. 他低聲嘀咕著詛咒的話。
He was wearing a pair of darned trousers. 他穿著一條縫補過的褲子。
It's a darned shame that you can't come. 你不能來真是太可惜了。
Darnel is a type of grass that often grows as a weed in wheat fields. 毒麥是一種常作為雜草生長在麥田裡的草。
In ancient times, darnel was sometimes used as a medicine. 在古代，毒麥有時被用作藥物。
The professional darner repaired the antique tapestry. 那位專業縫補師修復了這件古董掛毯。
A green darner dragonfly flew over the pond. 一隻綠蜻蜓飛過池塘。

meaning: 粗花呢；裝飾性織物（dornick 的變體）
sentences: The curtains were made of heavy darnex. 窗簾是用厚重的粗織物做的。
She used darnex to cover the old sofa. 她用裝飾性織物遮蓋舊沙發。
She sat by the window doing some darning. 她坐在窗邊做些縫補活。
The darning on the elbow was barely visible. 手肘處的縫補痕跡幾乎看不出來。
The daroga was responsible for maintaining order in the village. 那位警官負責維持村莊的秩序。
He reported the theft to the local daroga. 他向當地的警官報告了這起盜竊案。
The daroo tree provides shade in the hot desert. 埃及無花果樹在炎熱的沙漠中提供陰涼。
Birds often nest in the thick branches of the daroo. 鳥兒常在埃及無花果樹茂密的枝條中築巢。
Life is full of joys and darrs. 生活充滿了歡樂和痛苦。
He faced many a darr in his long journey. 他在漫長的旅程中面臨了許多障礙。
The judge considered the plea of darrein continuance. 法官考慮了關於最後一次延期的抗辯。
Darrein is an archaic term used in specific legal contexts. Darrein 是用於特定法律背景的古語。
Darrell is a common name for boys. 戴瑞爾是一個常見的男生名字。
We invited Darrell to join our hiking trip. 我們邀請戴瑞爾加入我們的健行旅行。
Darren works as an engineer in London. 達倫在倫敦擔任工程師。
I haven't seen Darren since high school. 自從高中以後我就沒見過達倫了。
Darryl is playing the guitar on stage. 達瑞爾正在舞台上彈吉他。
Have you met Darryl's new girlfriend? 你見過達瑞爾的新女朋友嗎？

meaning: 見道；親近神靈（印度哲學與宗教用語）
sentences: The devotees waited for the temple's morning darshana. 信徒們等待著寺廟早晨的見道儀式。
Darshana refers to the auspicious sight of a holy person or deity. Darshana 指的是親近聖人或神靈的吉祥時刻。

meaning: 德阿松伐耳（人名，物理學家）
sentences: Jacques-Arsène d'Arsonval was a French physicist and physician. 雅克-阿塞納·德阿松伐耳是一位法國物理學家和醫生。
He invented the D'Arsonval galvanometer. 他發明了德阿松伐耳檢流計。

meaning: 德阿松伐耳療法（高頻電流療法）
sentences: Darsonvalism was used in early physiotherapy. 德阿松伐耳療法曾被用於早期的物理治療。
The clinic specialized in Darsonvalism for skin conditions. 該診所專門使用高頻電流療法治療皮膚病。
None darst approach the dragon's lair. 沒人敢接近巨龍的巢穴。
In the old tales, he darst do what others feared. 在古老的故事中，他敢做別人害怕的事。
He threw a dart and hit the bullseye. 他投出一枚飛鏢，擊中了紅心。
A rabbit darted across the road in front of the car. 一隻兔子在車前飛快地跑過馬路。
He threw a dart and hit the bullseye. 他投出一枚飛鏢，擊中了靶心。
A small bird darted across the garden. 一隻小鳥飛快地掠過花園。
D'Artagnan is the young protagonist of 'The Three Musketeers'. 達太安是《三劍客》中的年輕主角。
He aspired to become a king's musketeer. 他渴望成為一名國王的火槍手。
The child was suffering from dartars on his arms. 那個孩子的雙臂上長了皮疹。
He used an ointment to treat the dartars. 他用軟膏來治療皮疹。
They hung a new dartboard in the game room. 他們在遊戲室掛了一個新的飛鏢盤。
Practice every day to improve your aim on the dartboard. 每天練習以提高你在飛鏢盤上的準確度。
He is a champion darter in the local league. 他是當地聯賽的投鏢冠軍。
The darter dove into the river to catch a fish. 蛇鵜潛入河中捉魚。
We watched the darting movements of the fish in the pond. 我們看著池塘裡魚兒疾游的動作。
The darting of insects around the light was distracting. 昆蟲在燈光周圍飛快閃動讓人分心。
The lizard ran dartingly under the rock. 蜥蜴飛快地跑進岩石下面。
Swallows were flying dartingly through the air. 燕子在空中飛快地穿梭。
The dartingness of the squirrel made it hard to photograph. 松鼠那飛快的動作使得它很難被拍到。
He was amazed by the dartingness of the athlete. 他對運動員那種飛快的速度感到驚訝。
The sun's rays dartle through the trees. 陽光閃現於林木之間。
Small creatures dartle among the tall grass. 小生物在長草叢中頻繁閃動。
The bird made a dartlike descent to the ground. 那隻鳥像飛鏢一樣快速降落到地面。
He had a dartlike speed on the running track. 他在跑道上有著飛快的速度。
The professional dartman never misses his target. 那位專業飛鏢選手從不失手。
Every dartman dreams of winning the world championship. 每一位飛鏢選手都夢想贏得世界冠軍。
Dartmoor is a beautiful national park in Devon, England. 達特穆爾是英國德文郡一個美麗的國家公園。
The rugged landscape of Dartmoor is famous for its granite tors. 達特穆爾崎嶇的地景以其花崗岩丘而聞名。
The dartoic layer helps regulate the temperature of the scrotum. 肉膜層有助於調節陰囊的溫度。
He studied the dartoic structure in medical school. 他在醫學院學習了肉膜結構。
The tissue had a dartoid appearance under the microscope. 該組織在顯微鏡下呈肉膜狀。
Dartoid muscles respond to cold stimuli. 肉膜狀肌肉對寒冷刺激有反應。
The dartos is a thin layer of smooth muscle. 肉膜是一層薄薄的平滑肌。
Contraction of the dartos causes the skin to wrinkle. 肉膜的收縮會導致皮膚起皺。
The old book mentioned a cure for dartre. 那本古書提到了一種治療皮疹的方法。
She developed dartre after using the new soap. 她用了新肥皂後長了皮疹。
The patient had a dartrose condition on his skin. 病人的皮膚上有皮疹症狀。
The doctor examined the dartrose spots on her back. 醫生檢查了她背上的皮疹點。
Dartrous eruptions appeared on his face. 他的臉上出現了皮疹噴發。
He sought treatment for his chronic dartrous ailment. 他為其慢性皮疹病尋求治療。
We spent the evening playing darts at the pub. 我們在酒吧玩了一整晚飛鏢。
Darts is a popular sport in many countries. 飛鏢在許多國家都是一項受歡迎的運動。
The dartsman took a deep breath before throwing. 飛鏢選手在投擲前深吸了一口氣。
He is considered the best dartsman in the city. 他被認為是城市裡最好的飛鏢選手。
The Darwinian theory of evolution changed our understanding of life. 達爾文的進化論改變了我們對生命的理解。
It was a case of Darwinian survival of the fittest. 這是達爾文式適者生存的一個例子。

meaning: 達爾文的；關於達爾文學說的
sentences: He presented a Darwinical analysis of the species. 他對該物種進行了達爾文式的分析。
The Darwinical approach is central to modern biology. 達爾文式的方法是現代生物學的核心。

meaning: 達爾文式地；根據進化論地
sentences: The traits evolved Darwinically over millions of years. 這些特徵在數百萬年中根據進化論演化而來。
The theory was explained Darwinically in the textbook. 教科書中用達爾文進化論解釋了該理論。
Darwinism explains the diversity of life through natural selection. 達爾文主義通過自然選擇解釋了生命的多樣性。
He is a strong supporter of Darwinism. 他是達爾文主義的堅定支持者。
As a committed Darwinist, she studies evolutionary patterns. 作為一名堅定的達爾文主義者，她研究進化模式。
The Darwinist argued for the role of environment in adaptation. 達爾文主義者論證了環境在適應中的作用。
His Darwinistic views were controversial at the time. 他的達爾文主義觀點在當時具有爭議。
The film explored Darwinistic themes of survival. 這部電影探索了適者生存的達爾文主義主題。

meaning: 達爾文石（礦物名）；達爾文追隨者
sentences: Darwinite is a variety of domeykite found in Chile. 達爾文石是在智利發現的一種砷銅礦變體。
He identified the mineral sample as Darwinite. 他將該礦物樣本鑑定為達爾文石。
The scientist tried to Darwinize the social behaviors of insects. 科學家試圖用達爾文理論來解釋昆蟲的社會行為。
It is interesting to Darwinize various historical events. 用進化論的觀點來解釋各種歷史事件很有趣。
Daryl is known for his archery skills. 達里爾以他的射箭技術聞名。
I went to the store with Daryl. 我和達里爾一起去了商店。
The darzee made a beautiful suit for the wedding. 那位裁縫為婚禮縫製了一套漂亮的西裝。
He took his clothes to the local darzee for repair. 他把衣服拿到當地的裁縫那裡修理。
He lived a life of service as a humble das. 他作為一名卑微的僕人過著服侍的生活。
The word das means servant in several Indian languages. das 這個詞在幾種印度語言中意思是僕人。
The Daschagga people live on the slopes of Mount Kilimanjaro. 查加人居住在乞力馬扎羅山的山坡上。
We learned about the unique agricultural practices of the Daschagga. 我們了解了查加人獨特的農業實踐。
The runner made a sudden dash for the finish line. 跑者突然向終點線衝刺。
We had to make a dash for the bus because we were late. 因為遲到了，我們不得不衝去趕公車。
He made a dash for the exit. 他猛衝向出口。
Add a dash of salt to the soup. 給湯裡加少許鹽。
The warning light on the dashboard started to blink. 儀表板上的警告燈開始閃爍。
He kept his sunglasses in the compartment on the dashboard. 他把太陽眼鏡放在儀表板上的置物箱裡。
The speedometer is located on the dashboard. 時速表位於儀表板上。
Check the dashboard for any warning lights. 檢查儀表板是否有任何警示燈。

meaning: 由短線組成，每條線與下一條線之間有小間隙。
sentences: The report describes the result as dashed. 報告將結果描述為虛線。
Everyone noticed the dashed tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了訊息中虛弱的語氣。

meaning: 虛線的；沮喪的；（委婉語）該死的
sentences: The diagram uses a dashed line to indicate the boundary. 圖表使用虛線來表示邊界。
Her hopes were dashed by the bad news. 壞消息使她的希望破滅了。
It was a dashedly difficult puzzle. 那是一個該死地困難的謎題。
He was dashedly late for the meeting. 他開會遲到得厲害。
He gave a dashee to the local guide. 他給了當地導遊一些小費。
A small dashee can go a long way in showing appreciation. 一份小禮物在表達感激方面很有用。
Dasheen is a staple food in many Caribbean islands. 芋頭是許多加勒比海島嶼的主食。
She cooked a delicious soup with dasheen and coconut milk. 她用芋頭 and 椰奶煮了一道美味的湯。
The dasher of the ice cream maker was broken. 冰淇淋機的攪拌器壞了。
He was known as a fast dasher on the football team. 他在足球隊中以快速奔跑著稱。

meaning: 時髦的；華麗的；充滿活力的
sentences: He looked very dashing in his new tuxedo. 他穿著新的燕尾服看起來非常帥氣時髦。
They went on a dashing adventure through the mountains. 他們在山中進行了一場充滿活力的冒險。
She was dashingly dressed for the gala. 她為了盛會穿得非常時髦。
He performed the task dashingly and with style. 他完成任務表現得很漂亮且有風格。
The dashmaker supplied components to the major car brands. 這家儀表板製造商為主要汽車品牌供應零件。
He worked as a technician for a leading dashmaker. 他在一家領先的儀表板製造商擔任技術員。

meaning: 亞美尼亞革命聯盟成員
sentences: He was a member of the Dashnak party. 他是亞美尼亞革命聯盟（Dashnak）的成員。
The Dashnak played a significant role in Armenian history. 亞美尼亞革命聯盟在亞美尼亞歷史中扮演了重要角色。

meaning: 亞美尼亞革命聯盟的主張者
sentences: He held strong Dashnakist views. 他持有強烈的亞美尼亞革命聯盟主張。
The Dashnakist platform focused on national independence. 亞美尼亞革命聯盟的主張聚焦於民族獨立。
Dashnaktzutiun is the full name of the political party. Dashnaktzutiun 是該政黨的全稱。
Historians research the founding of Dashnaktzutiun. 歷史學家研究亞美尼亞革命聯盟的建立。
The dashplate protected the wires from heat. 擋板保護電線免受熱量影響。
He replaced the scratched dashplate on the tractor. 他更換了牽引機上刮傷的儀表板蓋板。
A dashpot is used to dampen vibrations in machinery. 緩衝器用於減震機械中的振動。
The door closer uses a hydraulic dashpot to prevent slamming. 關門器使用液壓阻尼器來防止門被猛力關上。
The old factory used a dashwheel for bleaching cloth. 舊工廠使用洗滌輪來漂白布料。
The dashwheel turned slowly in the water. 葉輪在水中緩慢轉動。
He preferred dashy clothes that attracted attention. 他偏好能吸引注意的華麗衣服。
The dashy decorations were a bit too much for the small room. 對於這個小房間來說，這些華麗的裝飾有點太過了。
The dasi attended to the needs of the queen. 那名女僕照顧女王的需求。
Many stories in Indian literature feature a loyal dasi. 印度文學中的許多故事都以忠誠的女僕為特色。
Dasiphora fruticosa is a popular garden shrub. 金露梅是一種受歡迎的花園灌木。
The yellow flowers of the Dasiphora brighten up the yard. 金露梅的黃色花朵點亮了院子。

meaning: 不敢（dares not 的方言或古語變體）
sentences: He dasnt go into the haunted house. 他不敢進去那間鬧鬼的房子。
I dasnt tell her the truth yet. 我還不敢告訴她真相。
A dassie sunned itself on the rocks. 一隻蹄兔在岩石上曬太陽。
The dassie is surprisingly related to the elephant. 蹄兔出人意料地與大象有親緣關係。
The dassy is a small, furry mammal found in Africa. 蹄兔是發現在非洲的一種小型有毛哺乳動物。
We saw a dassy scurrying between the boulders. 我們看到一隻蹄兔在巨石之間竄動。
He was a dastard who betrayed his own friends. 他是一個背叛自己朋友的卑鄙小人。
Only a dastard would attack an unarmed person. 只有卑鄙的人才會攻擊手無寸鐵的人。
Cruel treatment can dastardize even the bravest soul. 殘酷的對待甚至能使最勇敢的靈魂變得懦弱。
The tyrant sought to dastardize the population through fear. 暴君試圖通過恐懼使民眾變得卑怯。

Dave is a common nickname for David. 戴夫是戴維的一個常見暱稱。
I'm going to meet Dave at the park. 我要去公園見戴夫。
The community gathered to daven together. 社區聚集在一起祈禱。
He learned how to daven in Hebrew. 他學會了如何用希伯來語祈禱。

meaning: 一張大沙發，尤其是正式的沙發。
sentences: The term davenport refers to a large sofa, especially a formal one. 「達文波特」一詞指的是大沙發，尤其是正式的沙發。
The lesson introduced davenport as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 davenport 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
We bought a new leather davenport for the living room. 我們為客廳買了一個新的皮沙發。
She wrote letters at her antique davenport. 她在她那張古董書桌上寫信。
The blow made him daver for a moment. 那一擊讓他眩暈了一會兒。
He began to daver as he walked home. 他回家時腳步開始蹣跚。
She wore a daverdy old coat. 她穿著一件褪色的舊外套。
The curtains looked daverdy after years of sun. 窗簾曬了幾年太陽後看起來很破舊。
David is a Biblical name. 大衛是一個聖經中的名字。
King David is a famous figure in history. 大衛王是歷史上著名的的人物。
The Davidian movement gained significant attention. 大衛派運動引起了顯著關注。
He is a follower of the Davidian sect. 他是大衛派教派的信徒。
The Davidic line is central to many prophecies. 大衛王的血脈是許多預言的核心。
He studied the Davidic Psalms. 他研究了大衛王的詩篇。
The ceremony had a Davidical grandeur. 典禮具有大衛王般的宏偉。
He referred to Davidical traditions. 他提到了大衛王的傳統。
The Davidist was known for his devotion. 那位大衛教派信徒以其虔誠著稱。
She wrote a book about the Davidist community. 她寫了一本關於大衛教派社群的書。
Davidsonite is a variety of beryl. Davidsonite 是綠柱石的一種。
The museum displayed a specimen of davidsonite. 博物館展示了一件 davidsonite 標本。
Daviesia is a genus of Australian shrubs. 戴維斯豆屬是一屬澳洲灌木。
The flowers of Daviesia are often brightly colored. 戴維斯豆屬的花朵通常顏色鮮豔。
Daviesite is a mineral found in some lead deposits. Daviesite 是在某些鉛礦床中發現的一種礦物。
He collected a rare sample of daviesite. 他採集了一份罕見的 daviesite 樣本。
The lifeboats are suspended from davits. 救生艇懸掛在吊柱上。
They lowered the boat using the davit. 他們用吊柱降下了小船。
The davoch was used to measure agricultural land. davoch 被用來測量農地。
The size of the davoch was discussed by historians. 歷史學家討論了 davoch 的大小。

meaning: 宣誓書、具有法律約束力的聲明或誓言
sentences: Rather than testify in open court, each sailor posted a davy before sailing off. 每個水手都沒有在公開法庭上作證，而是在啟航前張貼了一份戴維。
The term davy refers to An affidavit, a legally binding statement or oath. 「戴維」一詞指的是宣誓書、具有法律約束力的聲明或誓言。
Davy Jones is a character in nautical folklore. 戴維·瓊斯是航海民間傳說中的一個角色。
Davy Crockett was a famous American hero. 戴維·克羅克特是一位著名的美國英雄。
He had to sign a davy for the court. 他必須為法庭簽署一份宣誓書。
I'll take my davy on that. 我可以對此發誓。
Davyne is a complex mineral. Davyne 是一種複雜的礦物。
The crystals of davyne were examined under a microscope. 在顯微鏡下檢查了 davyne 的晶體。
The daw nested in the old church tower. 寒鴉在舊教堂的塔樓裡築巢。
He watched a daw flying across the field. 他看著一隻寒鴉飛過田野。
Don't dawdle on your way to school. 去學校的路上不要磨蹭。
We spent the afternoon dawdling in the garden. 我們下午在花園裡閒逛。
The supervisor criticized the dawdler. 主管批評了那個磨蹭的人。
He is a notorious dawdler when it comes to chores. 提到家務活，他是個出名的磨蹭大王。
His constant dawdling made them late. 他不斷的磨蹭讓他們遲到了。
A dawdling pace won't get us there on time. 磨蹭的步伐無法讓我們準時到達那裡。
He walked dawdlingly down the street. 他磨蹭地走在街道上。
The task was performed dawdlingly. 這項任務執行得很緩慢。
The room looked dawdy and neglected. 房間看起來邋遢且無人照管。
She felt dawdy in her old clothes. 穿著舊衣服她感到很邋遢。
The bird had a dawish appearance. 這隻鳥具有像寒鴉般的外觀。
He described its dawish behavior. 他描述了它像寒鴉般的行為。
Don't be such a dawkin! 不要像個笨蛋一樣！
He was often called a dawkin by his peers. 他常被同齡人稱為笨蛋。
The sky turned a beautiful shade of pink at dawn. 黎明時分，天空變成了美麗的粉紅色。
We woke up at dawn to catch the first light of the sun. 我們在黎明時分醒來，以捕捉第一道陽光。
Dawn is a beautiful name for a girl. 黎明是一個美麗的女孩名字。
Dawn works at the local hospital. 黎明在當地的醫院工作。
The sun rose at dawn. 太陽在黎明時分升起。
It finally dawned on him what happened. 他終於明白發生了什麼事。
We witnessed the dawning of a new era. 我們見證了一個新時代的開端。
The dawning light filled the room. 初現的曙光充滿了房間。
The trees were beautiful in the dawnlight. 樹木在黎明之光中非常美麗。
The dawnlight woke the sleeping birds. 黎明之光喚醒了沉睡的鳥兒。
The sky had a dawnlike glow. 天空閃耀著像黎明般的光輝。
She has a dawnlike freshness. 她有一種像黎明般的清新。
A golden dawnstreak appeared on the horizon. 地平線上出現了一道金色的黎明光線。
He watched the dawnstreak grow brighter. 他看著那道黎明光線變得越來越亮。
The path led dawnward through the hills. 這條小路穿過山丘，朝向黎明延伸。
He looked dawnward for a sign of morning. 他朝向黎明尋找早晨的跡象。
The air felt cool and dawny. 空氣感覺涼爽且有清晨的氣息。
He enjoyed the dawny stillness of the park. 他享受公園裡那種破曉時分的寧靜。
Dawson City was famous during the gold rush. 道森市在淘金熱期間非常有名。
Mr. Dawson is our new neighbor. 道森先生是我們的新鄰居。
Dawsonia is known as the tallest moss. Dawsonia 被稱為最高的苔蘚。
He studied the structure of Dawsonia. 他研究了 Dawsonia 的結構。
Dawsoniaceae is a family of mosses. 金髮蘚科是一個苔蘚科。
The family Dawsoniaceae includes several large species. 金髮蘚科包括幾個大型物種。
The specimen has dawsoniaceous features. 該標本具有金髮蘚科的特徵。
He is an expert on dawsoniaceous mosses. 他是金髮蘚科苔蘚的專家。
Dawsonite is a rare carbonate mineral. 鈉鋁碳酸鹽石是一種罕見的碳酸鹽礦物。
The geologist found a vein of dawsonite. 地質學家發現了一條鈉鋁碳酸鹽石礦脈。
He was a dawtet child. 他是一個被寵愛的孩子。
The dawtet cat slept on the sofa. 被寵愛的貓睡在沙發上。
She was the most dawtit girl in school. 她是學校裡最受寵愛的女孩。
A dawtit puppy followed him home. 一隻被寵愛的小狗跟著他回家。
They enjoyed a glass of cold dawut. 他們享用了一杯冰涼的 dawut。
Dawut is a popular drink in Java. Dawut 是爪哇受歡迎的飲品。
I hope you have a wonderful day! 我希望你擁有美好的一天！
It took us three days to complete the long journey. 我們花了三天才完成這段長途跋涉。
I have a busy day ahead. 我接下來的一天很忙。
The days are getting longer in spring. 春天時白晝變得越來越長。
Dayabhaga is a Hindu law of inheritance. 達耶巴哈是印度教的一種繼承法。
He studied the principles of Dayabhaga. 他研究了達耶巴哈的原則。
The Dayakker people live in Borneo. 達雅克人居住在婆羅洲。
He visited a Dayakker village. 他訪問了一個達雅克村莊。
The dayal bird is known for its song. 長尾鵲鴝以其歌聲聞名。
A dayal sang from the tree branch. 一隻長尾鵲鴝在樹枝上歌唱。
A bright daybeam shone through the window. 一道明亮的陽光穿過窗戶照射進來。
The forest was filled with daybeams. 森林裡充滿了陽光。
They picked dayberries in the fields. 他們在田野裡採摘黑莓。
The dayberry tart was delicious. 黑莓塔非常美味。
The sky was filled with a soft dayblush. 天空充滿了柔和的黎明紅霞。
We watched the dayblush fade into morning. 我們看著黎明的紅霞消逝在早晨中。
He recorded his expenses in a daybook. 他在日清帳上記錄了他的開支。
The artist kept a daybook of ideas. 這位藝術家保留了一本創意日記簿。

meaning: 一天的開始；天亮的第一刻。
sentences: The term daybreak refers to The beginning of the day; the first moment of daylight. 「黎明」一詞是指一天的開始；天亮的第一刻。
We learned the meaning of daybreak during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了黎明的意義。
They started their journey at daybreak. 他們在黎明時分開始了旅程。
The birds began to sing at daybreak. 鳥兒在破曉時分開始歌唱。
She woke up at the first light of daydawn. 她在黎明的第一道光時醒來。
The daydawn was clear and cold. 黎明時分天氣晴朗且寒冷。
She sat at her desk and began to daydream about her holiday. 她坐在桌前，開始幻想起她的假期。
He is often caught daydreaming during the lectures. 他經常在講座期間被發現做白日夢。
He was lost in a daydream. 他沉浸在白日夢中。
I often daydream about traveling the world. 我經常幻想周遊世界。
She is a constant daydreamer. 她是個經常做白日夢的人。
The teacher encouraged the young daydreamer. 老師鼓勵了那位愛做白日夢的年輕人。
He had a daydreamy look on his face. 他臉上帶著一種幻想的神情。
The afternoon was warm and daydreamy. 下午溫暖而令人想入非非。
The poor daydrudge worked from dawn to dusk. 那個可憐的苦工從黎明工作到黃昏。
He was tired of being a mere daydrudge. 他厭倦了僅僅做一個白天的苦工。
The dayflower has beautiful blue petals. 鴨跖草有美麗的藍色花瓣。
He found a dayflower blooming in the garden. 他在花園裡發現了一朵盛開的鴨跖草。
A dayfly has a very short lifespan. 蜉蝣的壽命非常短暫。
We observed a dayfly near the pond. 我們在池塘附近觀察到一隻蜉蝣。
The daygoing light faded slowly. 白天的光線緩緩消逝。
He preferred daygoing activities over night ones. 他比起夜間活動更喜歡白天的活動。
The prisoners were kept in a dayless dungeon. 囚犯們被關押在不見天日的地牢中。
A dayless winter can be very depressing. 沒有日光的冬天可能會讓人感到非常抑鬱。

meaning: 白天周圍的自然光，主要是陽光（直接和間接，無論是晴天還是陰天）。
sentences: In those days the entire factory was lit only by daylight and was closed at night. 那時候整個工廠只有白天照明，晚上就關門了。
The term daylight refers to the natural light that is ambient in daytime, being mostly sunlight (both direct and indirect, on either sunny days or cloudy days). 日光一詞是指白天周圍的自然光，主要是陽光（直接和間接，無論是晴天還是陰天）。
The plants need plenty of daylight to grow. 植物生長需要充足的日光。
It is safer to travel during daylight. 在白晝時分旅行比較安全。
The daylit room felt warm and inviting. 日光照射的房間感覺溫暖且誘人。
The museum features many daylit galleries. 這間博物館有許多採光良好的展覽廳。
They went on a daylong hike in the mountains. 他們在山中進行了整天的遠足。
The daylong event attracted thousands of visitors. 這項為期整天的活動吸引了數千名訪客。

meaning: 按日計酬的工人，仲裁者
sentences: The dayman was hired to help with the harvest. 這名日工被雇來幫忙收成。
A dayman was appointed to settle the dispute. 一位仲裁者被指派來解決這場爭端。
The stressful situation felt like a daymare. 壓力沉重的處境感覺就像一場白日噩夢。
He woke up from a daymare during his afternoon nap. 他在午睡中從白日噩夢中驚醒。
The tower serves as a daymark for sailors. 這座塔作為水手們的晝間航標。
A clear daymark is essential for coastal navigation. 清晰的晝標對於沿岸航行至關重要。
The soldiers relaxed in the dayroom after training. 士兵們在訓練後於休息室放鬆。
The hospital's dayroom has many books and games. 醫院的休息室裡有許多書和遊戲。

meaning: 範圍模糊的特定時間或時期。
sentences: Things were more relaxed in Grandpa's days. 祖父時代的事情比較輕鬆。
His days of being the king are over. 他當國王的日子已經結束了。
Those were the best days of my life. 那是我生命中最美好的日子。
The project will take several days to complete. 這個項目需要幾天的時間來完成。
The dayshine illuminated the entire valley. 日光照亮了整個山谷。
We enjoyed the warm dayshine on the porch. 我們在門廊上享受溫暖的日光。
The daysman successfully brought the two parties to an agreement. 仲裁者成功使雙方達成協議。
They needed a daysman to resolve their long-standing conflict. 他們需要一位調解人來解決長期的衝突。
The dayspring brought hope to the weary travelers. 曙光給疲憊的旅人帶來了希望。
We waited for the dayspring at the top of the hill. 我們在山頂等待黎明。
The daystar rose early in the morning sky. 啟明星清晨在天空中升起。
The poets often referred to the sun as the daystar. 詩人常將太陽稱為日星。
The first daystreak appeared on the eastern horizon. 第一道曙光出現在東方的地平線上。
She woke up at the first daystreak to start her chores. 她在曙光乍現時醒來開始做家事。
The workers were employed on a daytale basis. 這些工人是按日計酬雇用的。
Daytale labor was common in the local agriculture. 計日勞動在當地的農業中很常見。
The village was busy during the daytide. 村莊在白天非常忙碌。
All work must be completed before the end of daytide. 所有工作必須在白天結束前完成。
daytime television 日間電視
Something described as daytime is happening during the day. 被描述為白天的事情發生在白天。
The park is full of children during the daytime. 公園在白天到處都是孩子。
Owl species are rarely seen in the daytime. 貓頭鷹物種在白天很少見。
He usually works daytimes and studies at night. 他通常在白天工作，晚上讀書。
The store is only open daytimes. 這間商店僅在白天營業。
The travelers turned their faces dayward. 旅人們將臉轉向白天（太陽）的方向。
The shadows moved slowly as the sun journeyed dayward. 隨著太陽向白晝運行，影子緩緩移動。
He found some daywork at the construction site. 他在建築工地找到了一些按日計酬的工作。
Daywork provides a flexible source of income for many. 對許多人來說，計日工作提供了一個靈活的收入來源。
The dayworker arrived early to start the project. 這名日工早早就到了，準備開始項目。
Many dayworkers gather at the plaza every morning. 每天早上許多日工會在廣場聚集。
The daywrit was served to the defendant at noon. 該令狀於中午送達被告。
A daywrit must be executed during business hours. 晝間令狀必須在營業時間內執行。
The Daza are an ethnic group living in the Sahara. 達扎人是生活在撒哈拉沙漠的一個族群。
He studied the culture and traditions of the Daza people. 他研究了達扎人的文化與傳統。
He was in a daze after the car accident. 車禍後他處於神志恍惚的狀態。
The bright lights dazed him for a moment. 強光讓他瞬間感到眩暈。
The loud noise seemed to daze him for a moment. 巨大的噪音似乎讓他發愣了一會兒。
She wandered around in a daze after the accident. 事故發生後，她神情恍惚地到處走動。
He had a dazed look on his face after the fall. 跌倒後，他臉上帶著茫然的神情。
The survivors were dazed by the sudden tragedy. 生還者因突如其來的悲劇而感到神志恍惚。
She looked around dazedly, trying to remember where she was. 她茫然地環顧四周，試圖想起自己在何處。
The player walked dazedly off the field after the collision. 碰撞發生後，球員茫然地走下球場。
A sense of dazedness overcame him after the long flight. 長途飛行後，一股茫然感襲向他。
The doctor checked the patient for signs of dazedness. 醫生檢查病人是否有茫然失神的跡象。
The sudden flash of light caused a moment of dazement. 突然的閃光造成了瞬間的眩惑。
In her dazement, she forgot to answer the question. 在恍惚中，她忘了回答問題。
The snow reflected the sun dazingly. 雪地令人眩目地反射著陽光。
The city lights were dazingly bright from the hilltop. 從山頂上看，城市燈光亮得令人目眩。
I felt a bit dazy after waking up from the nap. 午睡醒來後，我感到有點恍惚。
The dazy atmosphere of the hot afternoon made him sleepy. 炎熱下午那種昏沉的氣氛讓他想睡覺。
The bright sunlight reflected off the water and began to dazzle her eyes. 明亮的陽光從水面上反射過來，讓她感到目眩。
The young musician's brilliant performance managed to dazzle the entire audience. 那位年輕音樂家精彩的演出令全場觀眾驚嘆。
The bright sun can dazzle drivers on this road. 明亮的陽光可能會使這條路上的駕駛目眩。
The young singer managed to dazzle the audience with her performance. 年輕歌手的表演成功地讓觀眾傾倒。
The sheer dazzlement of the fireworks display was unforgettable. 煙火秀那種純粹的燦爛令人難忘。
He stared at the jewels in a state of dazzlement. 他在眩惑的狀態下注視著珠寶。
The new diamond ring is a real dazzler. 這枚新的鑽石戒指真的很耀眼。
The lead actor was a dazzler on the red carpet. 男主角在紅毯上非常耀眼。
The white sand beach was dazzlingly bright. 白沙灘亮得耀眼。
She smiled dazzlingly at the cameras. 她對著鏡頭燦爛地微笑。
The title of the book starts with 'De'. 書名以 'De' 開頭。
Many legal terms in English come from 'de' phrases. 英語中許多法律術語源自 'de' 短語。
The enzyme is used to deacetylate the compound. 該酶被用來使化合物脫乙酰基。
Scientists are researching how cells deacetylate proteins. 科學家正在研究細胞如何使蛋白質脫乙酰基。
Deacetylation is a key step in this chemical reaction. 脫乙酰作用是這個化學反應中的關鍵步驟。
The study focuses on the deacetylation of histones. 這項研究側重於組蛋白的脫乙酰作用。
Deacidification of paper helps to preserve old books. 紙張脫酸有助於保存舊書。
The process of deacidification is used in water treatment. 脫酸過程被應用於水處理中。
Librarians use chemicals to deacidify rare documents. 圖書館員使用化學物質為稀有文件脫酸。
It is important to deacidify the soil for certain crops. 為某些作物對土壤進行脫酸是很重要的。

meaning: 與部長的辦公室分開的辦公室，互不相通；相反，有一個永久執事。
sentences: The term deacon refers to a separate office from that of minister, neither leading to the other; instead there is a permanent deaconate. 執事一詞指與牧師不同的職位，兩者之間互不相連；相反，有一位永久執事。
The lesson introduced deacon as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「執事」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The deacon assisted the priest during the ceremony. 執事在儀式期間協助牧師。
He was ordained as a deacon last Sunday. 他上週日被任命為執事。
She performed her deaconal duties with great care. 她非常細心地履行她的執事職責。
The deaconal vestments were stored in the vestry. 執事的法衣存放於祭衣室。
He has served in the deaconate for over ten years. 他在執事職位上服務了超過十年。
The deaconate met to discuss the church's budget. 執事班子開會討論教會的預算。
The deaconess organized the charity event. 女執事組織了這場慈善活動。
She has been a deaconess in this congregation for many years. 她在這個會眾中擔任女執事多年。
He entered deaconhood after years of study. 經過多年的學習，他進入了執事職位。
The responsibilities of deaconhood are demanding. 執事身份的責任是很沉重的。
The bishop will deaconize three candidates tomorrow. 主教明天將任命三位候選人為執事。
It is a formal process to deaconize a member of the church. 將教會成員任命為執事是一個正式的過程。
The local deaconry supports many community projects. 當地的執事職位支持許多社區項目。
Membership in the deaconry is a high honor. 成為執事會成員是一項高榮譽。
He accepted the deaconship with humility. 他謙卑地接受了執事職位。
His deaconship lasted for several decades. 他的執事任期持續了幾十年。
Remember to deactivate the alarm before entering. 進門前記得先關閉警報器。
The account was deactivated due to inactivity. 該帳戶因長時間未活動而被停用。
The deactivation of the bomb took several hours. 解除這枚炸彈的活性花了幾個小時。
Please confirm the deactivation of your subscription. 請確認您訂閱的停用。
The old tree in the backyard has been dead for years. 後院那棵老樹已經枯死多年了。
The phone line went dead during our conversation. 我們的通話中途斷線了。
The battery is dead, so the car won't start. 電池沒電了，所以汽車發動不了。
They found a dead tree in the middle of the field. 他們在田野中央發現了一棵枯樹。

meaning: 窮困潦倒的人，賴帳的人
sentences: He was called a deadbeat for not paying his rent. 他因為不付房租而被稱為無賴。
The deadbeat dad refused to support his children. 那個失職的父親拒絕扶養他的孩子。
The calf was deadborn despite the vet's efforts. 儘管獸醫盡了努力，小牛還是死產了。
It was a tragic event when the baby was delivered deadborn. 嬰兒死產是一件悲慘的事情。
The arrow hit the target at deadcenter. 箭射中了靶心的正中央。
The piston is at deadcenter in this position. 活塞在這個位置處於死點。
The medicine helped to deaden the pain. 藥物有助於減輕疼痛。
Thick curtains can deaden the noise from the street. 厚窗簾可以減弱來自街道的噪音。
The wall was lined with a sound deadener. 牆壁上裝有隔音材料。
The spring acts as a vibration deadener in the machine. 彈簧在機器中充當振動緩衝器。
The deadening heat made everyone feel exhausted. 沉悶的熱氣讓每個人都感到精疲力竭。
He found the routine office work deadening. 他覺得規律的辦公室工作非常枯燥。
The word 'deader' is rarely used in modern English. 'deader' 這個詞在現代英語中很少見。
In old slang, a 'deader' referred to a corpse. 在舊俚語中，'deader' 指的是屍體。
He is a real deadeye with a rifle. 他是個真正的步槍神槍手。
The deadeye hit the bullseye from a long distance. 這位神槍手從遠處射中了紅心。
The hunter set a deadfall to catch small animals. 獵人設置了一個落木陷阱來捕捉小動物。
Watch out for the deadfall in the forest. 注意森林裡的落木陷阱。
The bus had to deadhead back to the station. 巴士必須空車返回車站。
The gardener spent the morning deadheading the roses. 園丁花了整個上午修剪玫瑰的殘花。
His deadheadism made him slow to react. 他的呆滯使他反應遲鈍。
The concept of deadheadism is rarely discussed. 呆滯的概念很少被討論。

meaning: 垂頭喪氣的，無精打采的
sentences: The deadhearted soldiers marched back to camp. 垂頭喪氣的士兵們步行回營地。
He felt deadhearted after receiving the bad news. 收到壞消息後，他感到無精打采。
She worked deadheartedly on the project she disliked. 她垂頭喪氣地做著自己不喜歡的項目。
The team played deadheartedly after losing their star player. 球隊在失去明星球員後打得無精打采。
A sense of deadheartedness hung over the crowd. 群眾中籠罩著一種垂頭喪氣的氛圍。
The deadheartedness of his response was surprising. 他反應的冷淡令人驚訝。
The bodies were taken to the local deadhouse. 屍體被送往當地的太平間。
The old hospital had a small deadhouse in the basement. 那家舊醫院的地下室有一個小太平間。
They added extra deading to the walls of the studio. 他們在工作室的牆上增加了額外的隔音材料。
The deading of the vibrations improved the machine's performance. 振動的減弱提高了機器的性能。
The room had a deadish atmosphere. 這個房間有一種死氣沉沉的氣氛。
The plant looked deadish but it still had green roots. 這株植物看起來快死了，但它還有綠色的根。
He spoke deadishly, with no emotion in his voice. 他說話毫無生氣，聲音裡沒有任何感情。
The party dragged on deadishly. 聚會毫無生氣地拖著。
The deadishness of the landscape was striking. 景觀的荒涼死寂令人印象深刻。
She noticed a certain deadishness in his eyes. 她注意到他的眼神中有一種死寂。
The door is equipped with a deadlatch for extra security. 門上裝有自動鎖以增加安全性。
He heard the deadlatch click as he closed the door. 他關門時聽到自動鎖喀噠一聲鎖上。
The sailors closed the deadlight during the storm. 水手們在風暴期間關上了舷窗蓋。
A deadlight prevents water from entering the ship's cabin. 舷窗蓋防止水進入船艙。
The water was deadlily calm. 水面平靜得如死水一般。
He sat deadlily still in the corner. 他在角落裡坐著，一動也不動。
We need to work hard to finish the project before the final deadline. 我們需要努力工作，以便在最終截止日期前完成專案。
The manager decided to extend the deadline for the report by a week. 經理決定將報告的最後期限延長一週。
The deadline for the project is next Friday. 該項目的截止日期是下週五。
We are working hard to meet the deadline. 我們正在努力工作以趕上截止日期。
The deadliness of the virus is a major concern. 該病毒的致命性是主要的擔憂。
Scientists are studying the deadliness of the new chemical. 科學家正在研究這種新化學物質的致命性。

meaning: 由於兩股勢均力敵的力量的對立而導致的停滯；僵局或僵局。
sentences: The negotiation ended in deadlock, with neither party willing to compromise on the price. 談判陷入僵局，雙方都不願在價格上妥協。
The term deadlock refers to A standstill resulting from the opposition of two evenly matched forces; a stalemate or impasse. 僵局一詞是指由於兩個勢均力敵的力量的對抗而導致的停滯狀態；僵局或僵局。
The negotiations reached a deadlock. 談判陷入了僵局。
The strike resulted in a complete deadlock. 罷工導致了完全的僵持局面。
The snake's venom is extremely deadly and can kill a human in just a few minutes. 這種蛇的毒液極其致命。
He was in deadly earnest when he made the promise to help the community. 當他許下幫助社區的諾言時，他是極度認真的。
This is a deadly poison. 這是致命的毒藥。
The snake has a deadly bite. 這條蛇咬一口足以致命。
The cable was attached to a deadman buried in the ground. 電纜連接到埋在地下的固定樁。
They used a deadman to secure the tent in the wind. 他們使用固定錨來在風中固定帳篷。
The steel was kept at deadmelt to remove gases. 鋼材保持在靜熔狀態以除去氣體。
Deadmelt processing ensures higher quality of the metal. 靜熔處理確保金屬的更高品質。
The deadness of the winter landscape was bleak. 冬季景觀的荒涼無生氣令人感到淒涼。
He felt a strange deadness in his emotions. 他感到情感中有一種奇怪的遲鈍。
He delivered the joke with a deadpan expression. 他面無表情地講了這個笑話。
Her deadpan humor is very popular. 她那種面無表情的幽默很受歡迎。
The investigation revealed several cases of deadpay in the company. 調查顯示公司裡有幾起領乾薪的情況。
Deadpay is a form of corruption in some organizations. 領乾薪是某些組織中的一種腐敗形式。
Deadtongue is a poisonous plant found in marshes. 毒芹是生長在沼澤中的一種有毒植物。
Livestock should be kept away from deadtongue. 家畜應遠離毒芹。
The company needs to get rid of the deadwood in the staff. 公司需要裁減員工中的冗員。
There is a lot of deadwood on the forest floor. 森林地面上有很多枯木。
Deadwort has been used in traditional medicine. 矮接骨木曾被用於傳統醫學中。
We found some deadwort growing near the old fence. 我們在舊柵欄附近發現了一些矮接骨木。
The liquid must be deaerated before processing. 液體在處理前必須先除氣。
The machine is designed to deaerate the water automatically. 這台機器被設計成能自動為水除氣。
Deaeration is necessary to prevent corrosion in the pipes. 除氣對於防止管道腐蝕是必要的。
The deaeration process takes about ten minutes. 除氣過程大約需要十分鐘。
The factory installed a new deaerator last month. 工廠上個月安裝了一台新的除氣器。
A deaerator is used to remove dissolved oxygen from water. 除氣器被用來除去水中溶解的氧。
She uses sign language to communicate because she is deaf. 她用手語溝通，因為她是聾人。
He turned a deaf ear to my warnings and continued his work. 他對我的警告充耳不聞，繼續他的工作。
He has been deaf since birth. 他自出生以來就是聾的。
She uses sign language because she is deaf. 因為她是聾人，所以她使用手語。
The sound of the explosion was so loud that it threatened to deafen everyone nearby. 爆炸聲巨大到差點讓附近的每個人耳聾。
The noise from the construction site was deafening and disrupted our meeting. 建築工地的噪音震耳欲聾，干擾了我們的會議。
The loud explosion seemed to deafen everyone nearby. 巨大的爆炸似乎讓附近的每個人都聾了。
Constant exposure to loud noise can deafen you. 長期暴露在巨大的噪音中會使你致聾。
The applause was deafening. 掌聲震耳欲聾。
There was a deafening roar as the jet took off. 噴射機起飛時發出震耳欲聾的轟鳴聲。
The music was playing deafeningly loud. 音樂聲響得震耳欲聾。
The thunder cracked deafeningly overhead. 雷聲在頭頂震耳欲聾地響起。
The government decided to deafforest the area for farming. 政府決定將該地區廢林轉作農耕。
To deafforest land is to remove its protected status as a forest. 廢除森林是指撤銷土地作為受保護森林的地位。
The deafforestation of the region led to soil erosion. 該地區的廢除森林作用導致了水土流失。
Environmentalists oppose the deafforestation of natural reserves. 環保人士反對廢除自然保護區的森林地位。
The elderly man was getting a bit deafish. 那個老人家變得有點重聽了。
She has a deafish ear, so you need to speak up. 她有一隻耳朵重聽，所以你需要大聲點說。
He gestured deafly to his companions. 他聾地（像聾人般地）對同伴打手勢。
She stared deafly at the speaker, unable to hear. 她茫然地看著演講者，一個字也聽不到。

meaning: 缺乏知識或拒絕承認某個特定問題、議題等。
sentences: their deafness to her cries 他們對她的哭聲充耳不聞
The term deafness refers to Lack of knowledge or refusal to admit a particular problem, issue, etc. 術語「耳聾」是指缺乏知識或拒絕承認特定問題、問題等。
Deafness can be caused by genetic factors. 聾可能是由基因因素引起的。
He overcame his deafness to become a great musician. 他克服了失聰，成為一位偉大的音樂家。
Potters often deair clay before using it. 陶藝家通常在使用粘土前會先排除其中的空氣。
The vacuum pump is used to deair the container. 真空泵被用來排除容器內的空氣。
They finally managed to close a deal after weeks of negotiation. 經過數週的談判，他們終於促成了一筆交易。
We have to deal with this difficult problem as soon as possible. 我們必須儘快處理這個難題。
We made a great deal on the new car. 我們買這台新車做了一筆划算的交易。
How are you going to deal with this problem? 你打算如何處理這個問題？
The issues we face are dealable with some effort. 我們面臨的問題只要努力是可以解決的。
A dealable asset is easy to sell in the market. 可交易資產在市場上很容易出售。
The dealate queen ant began to build her nest. 脫翅的蟻后開始築巢。
Certain insects become dealate after mating. 某些昆蟲在交配後會脫去翅膀。
The dealated insects were crawling on the ground. 脫了翅的昆蟲在地上爬行。
We found several dealated termites in the wood. 我們在木頭裡發現了幾隻脫了翅的白蟻。
Dealation is a common biological process in ants. 脫翅作用是螞蟻中常見的生物過程。
The study observed the dealation of insects after flight. 研究觀察了昆蟲在飛行後的脫翅現象。
The chemical was used to dealbate the fabric. 該化學物質被用來使織物變白。
To dealbate something is to whiten or bleach it. 使某物變白是指將其漂白或弄白。
The dealbation of the material took several steps. 該材料的變白過程經過了幾個步驟。
Sunlight can cause dealbation in certain pigments. 陽光會導致某些顏料褪色變白。
The lab technician needed to dealbuminize the sample. 實驗室技術員需要除去樣本中的白蛋白。
It is necessary to dealbuminize certain liquids for analysis. 為了分析，有必要除去某些液體中的白蛋白。
He has been a dealcoholist for most of his life. 他大半輩子都是個禁酒者。
The local dealcoholist group met every Monday. 當地的禁酒團體每週一開會。
Dealcoholization is used to create non-alcoholic beer. 脫醇作用被用來製作無酒精啤酒。
The factory specializes in the dealcoholization of wine. 這間工廠專門從事葡萄酒的脫醇處理。
They use a special process to dealcoholize the beverage. 他們使用特殊工法為飲料脫醇。
Is it possible to dealcoholize this drink without losing flavor? 有可能在不損失風味的情況下為這款飲料脫醇嗎？
He works as an authorized dealer for a major automobile brand. 他擔任一家主要汽車品牌的授權經銷商。
The antique dealer showed us a collection of rare artifacts. 古董商向我們展示了一系列珍稀文物。
He is a local car dealer. 他是一位當地的汽車經銷商。
The dealer gave us a good price on the antique. 那位古董商給了我們一個不錯的古董價格。
His reputation in the world of dealerdom is excellent. 他在經銷商界的聲譽非常好。
Dealerdom has seen many changes with the rise of online sales. 隨著網路銷售的興起，經銷商界經歷了許多變革。

meaning: 出售物品，尤其是汽車的地方。
sentences: I visited the car dealership today. 我今天參觀了汽車經銷店。
The term dealership refers to a place that sells items, especially cars. 經銷商一詞是指銷售物品，尤其是汽車的地方。
The new car dealership opened on Main Street. 新的汽車經銷店在主街上開業了。
He recently acquired a dealership for a European brand. 他最近獲得了一個歐洲品牌的代理權。
A dealfish has a long, slender body. 帶魚的一種，身體細長。
The fisherman caught a rare dealfish in the Atlantic. 漁民在大西洋捕捉到一隻罕見的帶魚。
Honesty is important in all business dealings. 誠實於所有商業交易中都很重要。
I have had many dealings with that company. 我與那家公司有過多次往來。
They need to dealkalize the water for the boiler. 他們需要為鍋爐用水進行脫鹼。
Special resins are used to dealkalize industrial fluids. 特殊樹脂被用來為工業流體脫鹼。
The enzyme can dealkylate various substrates. 這種酶可以使各種底物脫烷基。
Researchers are trying to dealkylate the compound efficiently. 研究人員正試圖高效地使該化合物脫烷基。
Dealkylation is an important reaction in organic chemistry. 脫烷基作用是有機化學中的重要反應。
The rate of dealkylation depends on the temperature. 脫烷基速率取決於溫度。
She dealt with the customer complaints yesterday. 她昨天處理了客戶的投訴。
The cards were dealt to all players. 卡片已發給所有玩家。
A short deambulation in the park is refreshing. 在公園裡短暫散步令人耳目一新。
His daily deambulation helped him recover from surgery. 他每日的散步幫助他從手術中康復。
The monastery has a beautiful deambulatory. 這座修道院有一個美麗的迴廊（散步處）。
She enjoys deambulatory exercises in the morning. 她喜歡在早上進行散步運動。
Deamidase is an enzyme that catalyzes deamidation. 脫酰胺酶是催化脫酰胺作用的酶。
The presence of deamidase was detected in the sample. 在樣本中檢測到了脫酰胺酶。
Heating the protein can cause it to deamidate. 加熱蛋白質會導致其脫酰胺。
Scientists studied how to deamidate gluten for better properties. 科學家研究如何使麵筋脫酰胺以獲得更好的特性。
Deamidation of asparagine residues is a common protein modification. 天冬酰胺殘基的脫酰胺作用是常見的蛋白質修飾。
The rate of deamidation increases at high pH. 脫酰胺速率在高 pH 值下會增加。
The process of deamidization can alter protein structure. 脫酰胺過程會改變蛋白質結構。
He wrote his thesis on the deamidization of proteins. 他寫了關於蛋白質脫酰胺作用的論文。
They used acids to deamidize the compound. 他們使用酸來使化合物脫酰胺。
It is possible to deamidize proteins using specific enzymes. 使用特定酶來使蛋白質脫酰胺是有可能的。
Deaminase enzymes are vital for nitrogen metabolism. 脫氨酶對於氮代謝至關重要。
The patient had a deficiency of adenosine deaminase. 該患者缺乏腺苷脫氨酶。
The liver works to deaminate amino acids. 肝臟致力於使胺基酸脫氨基。
Specific conditions are required to deaminate this molecule. 需要特定條件才能使該分子脫氨基。
Deamination results in the production of ammonia. 脫氨作用會產生氨。
The deamination of DNA bases can lead to mutations. DNA 鹼基的脫氨作用可能導致突變。
Chemical deaminization of proteins was studied in the lab. 實驗室研究了蛋白質的化學脫氨作用。
The deaminization process is crucial for amino acid breakdown. 脫氨過程對於胺基酸分解至關重要。
The enzyme will deaminize the substrate under aerobic conditions. 該酶將在有氧條件下使底物脫氨基。
It is difficult to deaminize this specific compound. 很難使這種特定化合物脫氨基。
Deammonation is a step in the nitrogen cycle. 脫氨作用是氮循環中的一個步驟。
The deammonation of the soil improved its quality. 土壤的脫氨處理改善了其品質。

meaning: 某個群體中的高級成員。
sentences: dean of the diplomatic corps - a country's most senior ambassador 外交使團團長 - 一個國家最資深的大使
dean of the House - the longest-serving member of a legislature 眾議院院長 - 立法機構中任職時間最長的議員

meaning: 院長，系主任（人名或職稱）
sentences: Dean Smith will give the opening speech. 史密斯院長將發表開幕演講。
Her name is Dean, but she is not a professor. 她的名字叫迪恩，但她不是教授。
She was appointed as the dean of the law school. 她被任命為法學院院長。
Students can speak to the dean if they have serious concerns. 學生如有嚴重疑慮可以找系主任談談。

meaning: 撤銷咒逐，解除逐出教會令
sentences: The council decided to deanathematize the former member. 理事會決定撤銷對前成員的咒逐。
To deanathematize someone is to formally remove an excommunication. 撤銷咒逐是指正式解除逐出教會的令。
He only had a deaner left in his pocket. 他口袋裡只剩下一個先令了。
In old slang, a deaner was worth twelve pence. 在舊俚語中，一個 'deaner' 價值十二便士。
The meeting was held at the local deanery. 會議在當地的院長官邸舉行。
He was promoted to the position of head of the deanery. 他被提升為教區分區負責人。
The deaness welcomed the new students to the college. 女院長歡迎新生來到學院。
She is the first deaness in the history of the university. 她是該大學歷史上第一位女院長。

meaning: 使失去動物本性，使文明化
sentences: The philosopher argued that education helps to deanimalize humans. 這位哲學家認為教育有助於使人類脫離動物本性。
To deanimalize a person is to treat them as more than just an animal. 使人非動物化是指將其視為不僅僅是動物。
His deanship was marked by many successful reforms. 他的院長任期內有許多成功的改革。
She applied for the deanship of the medical school. 她申請了醫學院院長的職位。
Modern science tends to use deanthropomorphic explanations. 現代科學傾向於使用非人格化的解釋。
The deanthropomorphic view of nature is very different from ancient myths. 非人格化的自然觀與古代神話非常不同。
The movement toward deanthropomorphism in philosophy is significant. 哲學中非人格化的趨向是很重大的。
Deanthropomorphism involves removing human characteristics from non-human things. 非人格化涉及移除對非人類事物的擬人化特徵。
The deanthropomorphization of God is a complex theological topic. 上帝的非人格化是一個複雜的神學主題。
Science requires the deanthropomorphization of natural forces. 科學需要將自然力非人格化。
We should try to deanthropomorphize our understanding of animal behavior. 我們應該試著將我們對動物行為的理解非人格化。
It is hard to deanthropomorphize the way we talk about the weather. 很難將我們談論天氣的方式非人格化。
The smell of the old food was quite deappetizing. 舊食物的味道相當倒胃口。
A messy kitchen can be very deappetizing for guests. 凌亂的廚房會讓客人感到非常沒胃口。
Deaquation of the sample was achieved by heating. 通過加熱實現了樣本的脫水。
The deaquation process is essential in food preservation. 脫水過程在食品保存中至關重要。
She wrote a letter to her dear friend who lives in London. 她寫了一封信給住在倫敦的好友。
Everything is so dear in this expensive shopping mall. 這間高級購物中心裡的一切都很昂貴。
She is a very dear friend of mine. 她是我一位非常親愛的朋友。
Everything in this shop is very dear. 這間店裡的所有東西都很貴。
The term dearborn refers to a light four-wheeled wagon. 迪爾伯恩一詞指的是輕型四輪馬車。
The lesson introduced dearborn as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 Dearborn 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The pioneer traveled west in a dearborn wagon. 開拓者乘坐德博恩四輪馬車前往西方。
The dearborn was a popular light carriage in the 19th century. 德博恩馬車是 19 世紀流行的一種輕型馬車。
Would you like some tea, dearie? 親愛的，你想喝點茶嗎？
She often called her grandchildren 'dearie'. 她常稱呼她的孫子們為「親愛的」。
the funeral of our dearly beloved sister 我們親愛的妹妹的葬禮
If someone acts dearly, they do so in a way that is in a dear or precious manner. 如果某人表現得很親愛，那麼他們就會以一種親愛的或珍貴的方式這樣做。
I love my family dearly. 我深愛著我的家人。
His mistake cost him dearly. 他的錯誤讓他付出了慘痛（昂貴）的代價。
The dearness of organic food is a concern for many families. 有機食品的高價是許多家庭擔心的問題。
He remembered his mother with great dearness and affection. 他以極大的親愛與懷念之情想起他的母親。
The chemical company plans to dearomatize the industrial solvents. 化學公司計劃對工業溶劑進行脫芳烴處理。
It is necessary to dearomatize the oil to meet environmental standards. 為了符合環保標準，必須對油進行脫芳烴處理。
The engineer explained how to dearsenicate the drinking water. 工程師解釋了如何除去飲用水中的砷。
They had to dearsenicate the waste products before disposal. 他們在處置廢棄物之前必須先除去其中的砷。
The factory installed a new dearsenicator in its filtration system. 工廠在其過濾系統中安裝了一個新的除砷器。
Maintenance of the dearsenicator is crucial for water safety. 除砷器的維護對水質安全至關重要。
Scientists are researching efficient ways to dearsenicize contaminated soil. 科學家正在研究除去受污染土壤中砷的有效方法。
The process to dearsenicize the mineral ore is quite complex. 除去礦石中砷的過程相當複雜。
There is a dearth of qualified candidates for the position. 這個職位缺乏合格的候選人。
The region is suffering from a dearth of clean water. 該地區正遭受清潔水源缺乏之苦。
The dearthfu resources made it difficult for the tribe to survive. 稀少的資源使該部落難以生存。
In dearthfu times, people had to learn to share everything. 在資源匱乏的時期，人們必須學會分享一切。
The athlete suffered a painful dearticulation of the shoulder. 這位運動員遭受了痛苦的肩部關節脫位。
The teacher noticed the student's dearticulation during the speech. 老師注意到學生在演講中發音不夠清晰。
She kept her dearworth memories in a locked diary. 她將她珍貴的回憶鎖在日記本裡。
A dearworth friendship should be cherished for a lifetime. 珍貴的友誼應該珍惜一輩子。
The ancient scroll was dearworthily preserved in the museum. 這份古老的卷軸在博物館中被珍貴地保存著。
He spoke dearworthily of his late grandfather's achievements. 他寶貴地談論著他已故祖父的成就。
The dearworthiness of the artifact was recognized by all experts. 這件文物的珍貴性得到了所有專家的認可。
We often realize the dearworthiness of time only when it has passed. 我們往往只有在時間流逝後才意識到時間的寶貴。
Come here, my deary, and let me help you with your coat. 到這兒來，我的寶貝，讓我幫你穿外套。
He called his wife 'deary' as a term of endearment. 他親暱地稱呼妻子為「親愛的」。
The coal needs to be deashed before it can be used in the furnace. 煤在放入爐子之前需要先脫灰。
This filter is designed to deash the liquid during the process. 這個過濾器旨在過程中除去液體中的灰分。
The druids walked deasil around the sacred stone circle. 德魯伊教徒順時針繞著神聖的巨石陣行走。
In some traditions, stirring the pot deasil brings good luck. 在某些傳統中，順時針攪拌鍋子會帶來好運。
The linguist explained why certain consonants deaspirate over time. 語言學家解釋了為什麼某些輔音會隨著時間而失去送氣音。
When you speak quickly, you might deaspirate some words. 當你說話很快時，你可能會讓某些單詞失去送氣音。
Deaspiration is a common phonetic change in many languages. 失去送氣是許多語言中常見的語音變化。
The student practiced the deaspiration of the letter 'p'. 學生練習了字母 'p' 的不送氣發音。
Biological deassimilation involves breaking down complex substances. 生物異化作用涉及分解複雜物質。
The deassimilation of the sound occurred to make it easier to say. 該音發生的異化作用是為了讓它更容易發音。
The sudden death of the famous actor shocked the entire world. 這位著名演員的突然去世震驚了全世界。
He is not afraid of death because he has lived a full life. 他並不害怕死亡，因為他的一生過得很充實。
The news of his sudden death shocked the entire community. 他突然去世的消息震驚了整個社區。
Many cultures have different rituals to honor the dead after death. 許多文化在死亡後都有不同的儀式來紀念逝者。
He made a final confession while on his deathbed. 他在臨終前做了最後的懺悔。
The family gathered around his deathbed to say their goodbyes. 全家人聚集在他的臨終床前向他告別。
The new law dealt a deathblow to the small local businesses. 新法律對當地的小型企業造成了致命一擊。
The bankruptcy of their main supplier was the final deathblow. 主要供應商的破產是最後的致命打擊。
The family visits the cemetery every year on his deathday. 每年在他的忌日，家人都會去墓園祭拜。
They held a memorial service to mark the anniversary of her deathday. 他們舉行了追思會來紀念她的忌日。
The soldiers faced a deathful struggle on the front lines. 士兵們在戰線上面對著致死的鬥爭。
A deathful silence hung over the ruins of the city. 城市的廢墟上籠罩著死一般的沉寂。
The patient's face was deathfully pale after the surgery. 手術後病人的臉色死一般地蒼白。
He looked deathfully tired after working for forty-eight hours straight. 連續工作四十八小時後，他看起來疲憊得要死。
The deathfulness of the wasteland was apparent to everyone. 荒地的死氣沉沉對每個人來說都很明顯。
She was struck by the sudden deathfulness of the environment. 她被環境突然展現出的死氣所震驚。
The chemical spill threatened to deathify the local river life. 化學物質外洩威脅到要致死當地河流中的生物。
Gloomy colors can deathify the atmosphere of a room. 陰沉的顏色會使房間的氣氛變得死氣沉沉。
The researcher identified a specific deathin in the plant's leaves. 研究人員在植物的葉子中發現了一種特定的死亡素。
Consumption of deathin can lead to severe physiological failure. 攝入死亡素會導致嚴重的生理功能衰竭。
The deathiness of the old house made the children feel uneasy. 那棟舊房子的死亡感讓孩子們感到不安。
He described a sense of deathiness during his near-death experience. 他描述了在他瀕死體驗中的一種死亡感。
Shakespeare's deathless works continue to inspire readers today. 莎士比亞不朽的作品今天繼續激發著讀者。
The legend speaks of a deathless warrior who protects the kingdom. 傳說中有一位守護王國的長生不死的戰士。
His name is deathlessly recorded in the history of science. 他的名字不朽地記錄在科學史上。
The hero's deeds will live deathlessly in the songs of the people. 英雄的事跡將不朽地活在人們的歌聲中。
Many myths explore the human desire for deathlessness. 許多神話都在探索人類對長生不死的渴望。
The deathlessness of his reputation was earned through great sacrifice. 他名譽的不朽是通過巨大的犧牲換來的。

meaning: 像死一樣的；死氣沉沉的
sentences: A deathlike pallor came over his face when he heard the news. 當他聽到消息時，臉上呈現出死一般的蒼白。
The streets were gripped by a deathlike silence during the lockdown. 封鎖期間，街道籠罩在死一般的寂靜中。
The deathliness of the plague was felt throughout the city. 瘟疫的致死性在整個城市中都被感受到了。
There was a strange deathliness about the abandoned hospital. 廢棄的醫院有一種奇怪的死氣沉沉。
The gods looked down upon the struggles of the poor deathlings. 眾神俯視著可憐凡人們的掙扎。
Every deathling must eventually face the end of their life. 每個凡人最終都必須面對生命的終結。

meaning: 看起來就像死了，或瀕臨死亡。
sentences: He has a deathly pallor. 他臉色蒼白。
The report describes the result as deathly. 報告稱結果是致命的。
He was deathly afraid of spiders and would scream if he saw one. 他極度害怕蜘蛛，一看到就會尖叫。
The room was deathly cold because the heater had broken down. 房間冷得要命，因為暖氣壞了。
The herbalist warned that deathroot is highly poisonous if eaten. 草藥師警告說，誤食死亡之根會劇毒無比。
Legend says that deathroot only grows in places where battles were fought. 傳說死亡之根只生長在發生過戰鬥的地方。
The sniper fired the deathshot from a hidden position. 狙擊手從隱蔽的位置射出了致命一槍。
In the movie, the hero survives a deathshot against all odds. 在電影中，英雄奇蹟般地從致命一擊中生還。
The deathsman prepared the equipment for the execution. 劊子手為執行死刑準備了設備。
Historically, the deathsman was often a feared figure in society. 在歷史上，劊子手通常是社會中受人畏懼的人物。
The inspectors declared that the old building was a deathtrap. 檢查員宣布那棟舊建築是一個死亡陷阱。
Driving that car on the highway is a total deathtrap. 在公路上開那輛車簡直是自尋死路。
The elderly patient's health seemed to be moving deathward. 這位老年病人的健康狀況似乎正趨向死亡。
As the sun set, the shadows stretched deathward across the field. 隨著太陽下山，陰影向著死亡般冷寂的方向掠過田野。
The character in the novel drifted deathwards in his final moments. 小說中的人物在最後時刻趨向死亡。
The dying embers of the fire flickered deathwards. 垂死的篝火餘燼向著熄滅（死亡）閃爍。
The family kept a deathwatch through the night for their patriarch. 全家人為他們的族長守靈守了一整夜。
They heard the clicking sound of a deathwatch beetle in the old beams. 他們在舊樑柱中聽到了報死甲蟲的咔噠聲。

meaning: 死亡雜草（指有毒或有害植物）
sentences: Farmers work hard to remove deathweed from their crops. 農民努力從農作物中除去有害的死亡雜草。
The forest floor was covered in a thick layer of deathweed. 森林地面覆蓋著一層厚厚的有害雜草。

meaning: 死亡蠕蟲（傳說中的生物）
sentences: The Mongolian Deathworm is a legendary creature of the Gobi Desert. 蒙古死亡蠕蟲是戈壁沙漠的傳說生物。
Scientists have never found any physical evidence of the deathworm. 科學家從未發現過死亡蠕蟲的任何實體證據。
A deathy smell lingered in the abandoned basement. 廢棄的地下室裡留著一股死氣沉沉的味道。
His skin had a deathy grey tint after the accident. 事故發生後，他的皮膚呈現出一種死灰色的色調。
Stop that noise! You will deave the whole neighborhood. 停止那噪音！你會吵聾整個鄰里。
Don't deave me with your constant complaints. 不要用你不斷的抱怨來煩擾我。
The music was playing deavely loud at the party. 派對上的音樂開得震耳欲聾。
He deavely insisted on his opinion throughout the meeting. 他在整個會議中煩擾地堅持自己的意見。
Deb is coming over for dinner this Friday evening. 黛博拉這週五晚上要來吃晚餐。
I haven't seen Deb since we graduated from college. 自從大學畢業後我就沒見過黛博拉了。
The young deb was excited about her first ball. 這位年輕的初進社交界少女對她的第一場舞會感到興奮。
She was presented as a deb during the grand winter gala. 她在盛大的冬季盛會上以社交新秀的身份亮相。

meaning: 通常由冰製成的天然水壩被河流沖垮，隨後湧入水流。
sentences: The term debacle refers to a breaking up of a natural dam, usually made of ice, by a river and the ensuing rush of water. 「潰壩」一詞指的是通常由冰製成的天然水壩被河流沖垮，並隨之而來的洪水。
The lesson introduced debacle as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「崩潰」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The product launch turned into a total debacle for the company. 產品發布會對公司來說變成了一場徹底的災難。
The military debacle led to a quick end of the conflict. 軍事上的慘敗導致了衝突的快速結束。
Some car enthusiasts like to debadge their vehicles for a cleaner look. 一些汽車愛好者喜歡去除車輛上的標誌，以獲得更簡潔的外觀。
He decided to debadge his new sedan to keep it low-profile. 他決定去除新轎車上的標誌，以保持低調。
It took a long time to debamboozle him from the scammer's lies. 花了很長時間才讓他從詐騙者的謊言中清醒過來。
She tried to debamboozle the public about the fake news. 她試圖讓公眾從假新聞的迷惑中清醒過來。
Poor health might debar him from competing in the marathon. 健康狀況不佳可能會阻止他參加馬拉松比賽。
The committee voted to debar him from the club for misconduct. 委員會投票決定因行為不端而將他開除出俱樂部。
The goal of the reform was the debarbarization of the legal system. 改革的目標是消除法律體系中的野蠻成分。
The historian discussed the debarbarization of society over centuries. 歷史學家討論了幾個世紀以來社會消除野蠻的過程。
They aimed to debarbarize the treatment of prisoners of war. 他們旨在消除對戰俘待遇中的野蠻行為。
Education is often seen as a way to debarbarize the population. 教育通常被看作是使人口文明化的一種方式。
The passengers were ready to debark as soon as the ship docked. 船一靠岸，乘客們就準備好下船了。
It took several hours for all the troops to debark from the planes. 所有部隊花了幾個小時才從飛機上下來。
The port was busy with the debarkation of cargo and passengers. 港口正忙於貨物和乘客的卸載與下船。
The captain announced the schedule for debarkation at the next stop. 船長宣布了下一站的下船時間表。
The debarkment of the tourists was delayed due to the heavy rain. 由於大雨，遊客的登岸被推遲了。
Safety procedures were strictly followed during the debarkment. 在下船期間嚴格遵守了安全程序。
The lawyer argued against the debarment of his client from the trial. 律師反對將他的當事人排除在審判之外。
Debarment from public contracts is a serious penalty for companies. 禁止參與公共合同對公司來說是一項嚴厲的處罰。
The debarrance of foreigners from the area was a controversial policy. 禁止外國人進入該地區是一項有爭議的政策。
He faced many forms of debarrance in his quest for justice. 他在尋求正義的過程中面臨著多種形式的障礙。
He wanted to debarrass himself of all his debts before moving. 他想在搬家前解脫掉所有的債務。
She tried to debarrass the situation of any further complications. 她試圖讓情況解脫，不再有進一步的複雜化。
The debarration of certain books from the library caused an outcry. 圖書館禁止某些書籍引起了強烈抗議。
Legal debarration prevents him from holding a public office. 法律禁止使他無法擔任公職。
The government was accused of debasing the currency. 政府被指控降低貨幣價值。
Don't debase yourself by joining in their petty arguments. 不要因為參與他們那些瑣碎的爭吵而貶低你自己。
The movie depicts the debasedness of the criminal underworld. 這部電影描繪了犯罪地下社會的墮落。
He was shocked by the debasedness of the conditions in the prison. 他被監獄裡惡劣的條件所震驚。
The debasement of cultural values is a concern for many scholars. 文化價值的貶低是許多學者擔心的問題。
The rapid debasement of the dollar led to high inflation. 美元的快速貶值導致了高通貨膨脹。
The critic was seen as a debaser of modern art. 這位評論家被視為現代藝術的貶低者。
He is a debaser of the truth, often spreading misinformation. 他是一個歪曲事實的人，經常傳播錯誤信息。
She spoke debasingly of her former colleagues. 她貶低地談論著她以前的同事。
The prisoners were treated debasingly by the guards. 囚犯們受到了警衛的卑劣對待。

meaning: 開放辯論；尚未完全證明或證實。
sentences: Those data are debatable: no one has been able to replicate them. 這些數據是有爭議的：沒有人能夠複製它們。
It's debatable whether he is the best candidate for the position. 他是否是該職位的最佳人選還有待商榷。
Whether this is the best strategy is highly debatable. 這是否是最佳策略是非常有爭議的。
It is debatable whether the new policy will actually help. 這項新政策是否真的有幫助還有待商榷。
The two candidates had a lively debate about the new policy. 兩位候選人就新政策進行了一場激烈的辯論。
There is a lot of debate over the benefits of artificial intelligence. 關於人工智慧的好處存在很多爭論。
The politicians will debate the economic issues tonight. 政治家們今晚將辯論經濟問題。
There has been a lot of debate about the future of the environment. 關於環境的未來已經有了很多爭論。
The debateful nature of the topic made the meeting very long. 該話題的爭議性使得會議變得很長。
He is a debateful person who always questions everything. 他是一個好爭論的人，總是質疑一切。
The issue was debatefully discussed in the latest journal. 該問題在最新的期刊中被有爭議地討論了。

meaning: 清除;明確無誤的，明確的，不容置疑的。

These nouns behave declensionally like verbs in some dialects. 在某些方言中，這些名詞在變格上的行為就像動詞。
The words are related declensionally. 這些單詞在變格上是相關的。

meaning: 去教會化；使不受教會控制
sentences: The new laws sought to declericalize the national education system. 新法律試圖使國民教育系統脫離教會控制。

meaning: 使不適應氣候；改變氣候環境

The offer was technically declinable, but he chose to accept it. 該提議在技術上是可以拒絕的，但他選擇接受了。
The declinal path led down to the river. 傾斜的小徑通向河流。

The plant has declinate leaves that touch the ground. 該植物具有下垂並接觸地面的葉子。
The bird has a declinate beak suitable for its diet. 這種鳥有一個下彎的喙，適合其飲食。
Magnetic declination varies depending on your location. 磁偏角隨位置不同而變化。
His declination of the invitation was polite but firm. 他對邀請的拒絕委婉但堅定。
The surveyor made a declinational adjustment to the compass. 測量員對指南針進行了磁偏角調整。
Study the declinational charts for accurate navigation. 研究磁偏角圖表以進行精確導航。

A declinatory plea was entered in court. 法庭上提出了一項拒絕管轄權的答辯。

He walked along the declined surface of the hill. 他沿著小山的下傾表面行走。

sentences: The scientist used a declinograph to monitor magnetic shifts. 科學家使用磁偏計來監測磁場變化。

The road follows a declivate course toward the valley. 道路沿著向下傾斜的路徑通向山谷。

The declive path was slippery after the rain. 雨後下傾的小路很滑。
The mountain has several declivitous slopes. 這座山有幾處陡斜的山坡。
Watch your step on this declivitous trail. 在這條陡峭的小徑上行走要小心。

Decoctum is a term often seen in traditional medicine texts. Decoctum 是傳統醫學文獻中常見的術語。

meaning: 從加密形式轉換為純文字。
sentences: The cryptographer decoded the secret message and sent the result to the officer. 密碼學家解碼了秘密訊息並將結果發送給官員。

The intelligence officer worked to decode the secret message. 情報官員致力於解讀秘密訊息。
It can be difficult to decode his complex handwriting. 要解讀他複雜的手寫字跡可能很困難。
Decodon verticillatus is commonly known as swamp loosestrife. 水柳（Decodon verticillatus）通常被稱為沼澤珍珠菜。
The genus Decodon contains only one living species. 水柳屬僅包含一個現存物種。
The particles began to decohere as temperature rose. 隨著溫度升高，粒子開始失去相干性。
Quantum states can decohere quickly due to environmental noise. 由於環境噪聲，量子態會迅速失去相干性。

The decoherer was an essential part of the Marconi wireless. 去相干器是馬可尼無線電系統的重要組成部分。
The failure was caused by the decohesion of the adhesive layer. 故障是由膠層失去內聚力引起的。

Decoic acid is also known as capric acid. 癸酸也被稱為羊蠟酸。
The chemist analyzed the decoic derivatives. 化學家分析了癸酸衍生物。
He took the car to the garage to decoke the engine. 他把車開到修理廠為發動機除碳。
Regular maintenance helps to decoke the internal systems. 定期保養有助於內部系統除碳。
The computer system can decollate the printed pages automatically. 電腦系統可以自動拆分打印頁面。
Historically, the king ordered to decollate the prisoner. 歷史上，國王下令將囚犯斬首。
The museum displays a statue of a decollated saint. 博物館展示了一尊被斬首聖徒的雕像。
The decollated reports were distributed to different departments. 拆分後的報告被分發到不同部門。
The decollation of St. John the Baptist is a famous artistic theme. 施洗者聖約翰的斬首是一個著名的藝術主題。
The decollation of the continuous forms took place in the mailroom. 連續表單的拆分在收發室進行。
The office used a mechanical decollator for the invoices. 辦公室使用機械拆分機來處理發票。
In the legend, the decollator was haunted by his deeds. 在傳說中，斬首者因其行為而感到不安。

meaning: 低胸女裝；露頸及肩的服裝
sentences: Her dress had a daring decolletage. 她的連衣裙有著大膽的低胸設計。

They used a chemical agent to decolor the fabric. 他們使用化學劑使織物褪色。
Chlorine is a powerful decolorant used in industry. 氯是工業中常用的一種強效脫色劑。
The laboratory tested the effectiveness of the decolorant. 實驗室測試了脫色劑的有效性。
Heavy chemicals might decolorate the delicate material. 強烈的化學物質可能會使精細材料褪色。
The decolorate wallpaper needed replacement. 褪色的壁紙需要更換。
The decoloration of the leaves was caused by disease. 葉子褪色是由疾病引起的。
Notice the decoloration of the paint around the window. 注意窗戶周圍油漆的脫色情況。
The chemist used a decolorimeter to measure the purity of the liquid. 化學家使用脫色計來測量液體的純度。

Active carbon can be used to decolorize solutions. 活性炭可用於使溶液脫色。
We need to decolorize the oil before it is bottled. 我們需要在裝瓶前使油脂脫色。
He added a decolorizer to the mixture. 他在混合物中加入了脫色劑。
The plant uses a natural decolorizer derived from clay. 該工廠使用一種源自粘土的天然脫色劑。
The intense heat will decolour the plastic. 高熱會使塑料脫色。
Strong acids may decolour the organic samples. 強酸可能會使有機樣本脫色。
The government decided to decommission the old nuclear power plant. 政府決定停用舊的核電站。
The warship was decommissioned after forty years of service. 這艘戰艦在服役四十年後退役。

sentences: Without treatment, the patient's heart may begin to decompensate. 如果不治療，病人的心臟可能會開始失代償。

The researcher studied decomplex structures in biology. 研究人員研究了生物學中的非複合結構。

Leaves are easily decomposable in a compost bin. 葉子在堆肥箱中很容易分解。
Mathematical equations can often be decomposable into smaller parts. 數學方程通常可以分解成較小的部分。

meaning: 將（某物）分離或分解成其組成部分。
sentences: Various fungi can decompose wood. 多種真菌可以分解木材。
Our team decomposed this task into several subtasks that could be successfully distributed. 我們的團隊將此任務分解為多個可以成功分配的子任務。

The forensic expert examined the decomposed remains. 法醫專家檢查了腐爛的遺骸。
