The scientist studied the decomposite structure of the molecule. 科學家研究了分子的再分解結構。
The decomposition of organic waste produces methane. 有機廢物的分解會產生甲烷。
We observed the decomposition of water into hydrogen and oxygen. 我們觀察了水分解成氫氣和氧氣的過程。
The decomposure of the political party led to chaos. 政黨的瓦解導致了混亂。
Chemical decomposure can be triggered by heat. 化學分解可由熱引發。
The chemist tried to decompound the substance further. 化學家試圖進一步分解該物質。
A decompound leaf has branches that are also compound. 複合成葉的枝幹本身也是複合的。
The complex molecule is decompoundable into simpler elements. 這種複雜分子可再分解為更簡單的元素。
Is this material decompoundable using standard methods? 這種材料可以使用標準方法再分解嗎？
The plant's leaves are structured decompoundly. 該植物的葉子呈多重复合結構。
The data was analyzed decompoundly to ensure accuracy. 數據經過多層分解分析以確保準確性。
Divers must decompress slowly to avoid the bends. 潛水員必須緩慢減壓以避免減壓病。
You need to decompress the ZIP file to access the contents. 你需要解壓縮 ZIP 文件才能訪問內容。
The decompressing software is very efficient. 正在運行的解壓縮軟件非常高效。
The decompressing stage is critical for safety. 減壓階段對安全至關重要。
The decompression of large data files may take a while. 大數據檔案的解壓縮可能需要一段時間。
The term decompression refers to The process of decompressing. 術語「減壓」是指減壓的過程。
The pilot initiated an emergency decompression of the cabin. 飛行員啟動了機艙的緊急減壓。
Decompression of files takes only a few seconds. 文件解壓縮僅需幾秒鐘。
The patient underwent a decompressive craniectomy. 病人接受了減壓性開顱手術。
Decompressive chambers are used by deep-sea divers. 減壓艙供深海潛水員使用。
The system will deconcatenate the strings into individual characters. 系統將切斷字符串的連鎖，將其變為單個字符。
Researchers tried to deconcatenate the related events. 研究人員試圖切斷相關事件之間的聯繫。
The plan aims to deconcentrate the population of the capital city. 該計劃旨在分散首都的人口。
The government sought to deconcentrate economic power. 政府試圖分散經濟權力。
Administrative deconcentration improved local services. 行政權力下放改善了地方服務。
The deconcentration of industries helped rural development. 工業的分散有助於農村發展。
The device acts as a deconcentrator for the fluid. 該設備充當流體的分散器。
He was a major deconcentrator of political influence. 他是政治影響力的主要分散者。
The doctor prescribed a decongestive spray for his cold. 醫生為他的感冒開了一種去充血噴霧。
Decongestive medicine can help you breathe easier. 緩解充血的藥物可以幫助你呼吸更順暢。

meaning: 廢除供奉；使失去神聖性
sentences: The church was deconsecrated before being turned into a library. 這座教堂在變成圖書館之前被廢除了供奉。

The deconsecration ceremony was attended by the local community. 當地社區參加了廢除供奉儀式。
The building's deconsecration allowed for its commercial use. 建築物神聖性的廢除使其可用於商業目的。
The committee decided to deconsider the initial proposal. 委員會決定不再考慮最初的提議。
It is unwise to deconsider the advice of experts. 輕視專家的建議是不明智的。
His deconsideration of the rules led to his dismissal. 他對規則的輕視導致了他被解雇。
There was a general deconsideration of the old methods. 舊方法普遍不被考慮。
Special teams were sent to decontaminate the area after the spill. 洩漏發生後，特殊小組被派去淨化該區域。
You must decontaminate your hands before entering the lab. 進入實驗室前你必須對雙手進行消毒。
Decontamination of the water supply is a priority. 淨化供水是當務之急。
Workers wore protective gear during the decontamination process. 工人在消毒過程中穿著防護裝備。
The government decided to decontrol the price of fuel. 政府決定解除對燃油價格的管制。
The decontrol of the market led to increased competition. 市場管制的解除導致了競爭的加劇。

meaning: 使不受傳統約束；打破常規
sentences: The artist sought to deconventionalize his painting style. 藝術家試圖打破傳統，改變他的繪畫風格。

Deerhair is often used in making brushes. 鹿毛常用於製作刷子。

meaning: 鹿心；像鹿一樣溫順的人
sentences: The tribe believed eating deerheart brought courage. 該部落相信吃鹿心能帶來勇氣。
She has a gentle deerheart and wouldn't hurt anyone. 她有一顆溫順的心，不會傷害任何人。
The deerherd migrated south for the winter. 鹿群在冬天向南遷徙。
A large deerherd can be seen near the lake at dawn. 黎明時分可以在湖邊看到一大群鹿。
The knife handle was carved from deerhorn. 刀柄是用鹿角雕刻而成的。
He found a shed deerhorn in the woods. 他在林中發現了一個脫落的鹿角。
The Scottish Deerhound is a large and powerful breed. 蘇格蘭獵鹿犬是一個體型巨大且強壯的品種。
Her deerhound is very fast and agile. 她的獵鹿犬非常快速且敏捷。
Venison is another word for deermeat. Venison 是鹿肉的另一種說法。
They served grilled deermeat at the feast. 他們在宴會上供應烤鹿肉。
The jacket is made of soft deerskin. 這件夾克是由柔軟的鹿皮製成的。
Native Americans used deerskin for clothing and shelter. 美國原住民使用鹿皮製作衣服和住所。
Sherlock Holmes is often depicted wearing a deerstalker. 夏洛克·福爾摩斯經常被描繪成戴著獵鹿帽。

He sat in the deerstand for hours waiting for a buck. 他在獵鹿看台上坐了好幾個小時，等待著一隻雄鹿。
The deerstand was built high up in an oak tree. 獵鹿看台建在一棵橡樹的高處。
The deerstealer was caught by the park rangers. 偷鹿者被公園巡警抓住了。
In old times, a deerstealer could face severe punishment. 在古代，偷鹿者可能會面臨嚴厲的處罰。
Deertongue is a plant used in some traditional medicines. 鹿舌草是用於某些傳統藥物的植物。
The leaves of the deertongue are long and narrow. 鹿舌草的葉子長而窄。
Deerweed is a common wildflower in California. 鹿草是加利福尼亞州常見的野花。
The deerweed plants are important for local pollinators. 鹿草植物對當地的授粉媒介很重要。

meaning: 鹿林；適合鹿棲息的林地
sentences: They protected the deerwood from development. 他們保護這片鹿林免受開發。
The deerwood was thick with undergrowth. 鹿林裡長滿了茂密的矮樹叢。

A deeryard provides shelter and food during harsh winters. 鹿群過冬地在嚴酷的冬天提供避難所和食物。

meaning: 迪維 (人名/指生態學家 Deevey)
sentences: The Deevey model is used in population ecology. 迪維模型被用於種群生態學。
Professor Deevey was a pioneer in his field. 迪維教授是他領域的先驅。
That little deevilick is always getting into trouble. 那個小頑童總是在惹麻煩。
He called the mischievous boy a deevilick. 他稱那個淘氣的男孩為小惡魔。
It is illegal to deface public property. 損壞公共財產是違法的。
Graffiti defaced the front of the building. 塗鴉損壞了建築物的正面。
The surface is easily defaceable if not protected. 如果不加保護，表面很容易被污損。
Use a non-defaceable material for the monument. 為紀念碑使用不易損壞的材料。
The defacement of the statue caused public outrage. 雕像的損毀引起了公眾的憤慨。
He was charged with the defacement of a library book. 他被指控污損圖書館書籍。
The police are looking for the defacer of the national monument. 警方正在尋找國家紀念碑的損毀者。

Defacing historical documents is a serious crime. 損毀歷史文件是一項嚴重的罪行。
The defacing marks were removed by experts. 專家清除了這些污損的痕跡。
The slogans were defacingly painted across the walls. 標語被以損毀的方式塗在牆上。
He acted defacingly toward the artwork. 他對這件藝術品採取了損毀性的行為。
The treasurer was found to defalcate funds from the charity. 財務主管被發現挪用慈善機構的資金。
It is a crime to defalcate money entrusted to you. 挪用委託給你的錢是犯罪行為。
The internal audit revealed a major defalcation. 內部審計揭露了一起重大的挪用公款案。
His defalcation led to the company's bankruptcy. 他的挪用公款行為導致了公司的破產。
The defalcator was sentenced to five years in prison. 挪用公款者被判處五年徒刑。

They decided to defalk part of the expenses. 他們決定扣除部分開支。
The master would defalk wages for any mistakes made. 主人會因犯下的任何錯誤而扣除工資。

meaning: 透過任何書面或口頭誹謗性交流損害他人名譽的行為；惡意損害他人名譽罪。
sentences: She sued his ex-boyfriend for defamation and is seeking $14,000. 她起訴他的前男友誹謗並要求賠償 14,000 美元。

The term defamation refers to the act of injuring another person's reputation by any slanderous communication, written or oral; the wrong of maliciously injuring the good name of another. 誹謗一詞是指透過任何書面或口頭誹謗性溝通損害他人名譽的行為；惡意損害他人名譽的行為是錯誤的。
She sued the newspaper for defamation of character. 她起訴報社誹謗她的名譽。
Defamation can have a devastating impact on a person's life. 誹謗可能對一個人的生活產生毀滅性的影響。

meaning: 損害某人的聲譽，尤其是在不真實的情況下。
sentences: sue for defamatory comments 因誹謗性評論而提起訴訟
The journalist sued for defamatory remarks. 該名記者因誹謗性言論而提起訴訟。
The article contained defamatory statements about the politician. 這篇文章包含有關該政治家的誹謗性陳述。
He was warned not to make defamatory remarks. 他被警告不要發表誹謗性言論。
The candidate tried to defame his opponent. 候選人試圖誹謗他的對手。
You cannot defame someone just because you disagree with them. 你不能僅僅因為不同意某人就誹謗他。
The defamed actor struggled to find work. 被誹謗的演員很難找到工作。
He felt defamed by the rumors. 他覺得自己被謠言誹謗了。
The court ordered the defamer to pay damages. 法院命令誹謗者支付賠償金。
She confronted her defamer in public. 她在公共場合與誹謗她的人對質。
He spoke defamingly of his former employer. 他誹謗地談論他的前僱主。
The post was written defamingly to hurt her reputation. 這篇帖子寫得很具誹謗性，旨在損害她的名譽。
The defassa waterbuck is found in sub-Saharan Africa. 迪氏水羚分布於撒哈拉以南非洲。
Defassa are known for their distinctive white patches. 迪氏水羚以其獨特的白色斑塊而聞名。
You should defat the broth before serving. 你應該在食用前除去肉湯的脂肪。
The process is used to defat various types of seeds. 該過程用於除去各種類型種子的脂肪。
The company is in danger of going into default on its loan payments. 公司面臨貸款支付違約的危險。
The software's default setting is to save all files automatically in the cloud. 該軟體的預設值是將所有文件自動保存到雲端。
The company is in default on its loan payments. 該公司未按期償還貸款。
The computer will use the default settings. 電腦將使用預設設定。
The defaultant was asked to appear in court. 違約者被要求出庭。
A list of defaultants was published in the local paper. 違約者名單刊登在當地報紙上。
The bank took legal action against the defaulter. 銀行對違約者採取了法律行動。
He was listed as a persistent defaulter. 他被列為慣性違約者。
He maintained a defaultless credit record. 他保持了無違約的信用記錄。
The performance was defaultless and perfect. 表演完美無缺。
His defaulture caused many problems for the team. 他的不履行合約給團隊帶來了許多問題。
The agreement specified penalties for defaulture. 協議規定了違約的處罰。
The clause provides for the defeasance of the contract. 該條款規定了合約的廢止。
They signed a deed of defeasance. 他們簽署了一份作廢契據。
The defeasanced debt is no longer on the balance sheet. 已廢止的債務不再出現在資產負債表上。
Once defeasanced, the conditions are void. 一旦失效，這些條件便作廢。
The company sought to defease its outstanding bonds. 公司試圖使其未償還債券失效。
Legal experts were called to defease the agreement. 法律專家被召來廢止該協議。
The defeasibility of the claim was debated in court. 該主張的可廢止性在法庭上進行了辯論。
He understood the defeasibility of his rights under the contract. 他了解自己在合約下的權利是可廢止的。
A defeasible interest can be lost if certain conditions occur. 如果發生某些情況，可廢止的權益可能會喪失。
The agreement is defeasible by either party. 任何一方均可廢止該協議。
The defeasibleness of the legal title was examined. 法律所有權的可廢止性受到了審查。
We discussed the defeasibleness of the current regulations. 我們討論了現行法規的可廢止性。

Despite their best efforts, they were forced to admit their defeat. 儘管盡了最大努力，他們還是被迫承認失敗（擊敗）。
The team suffered a crushing defeat. 該隊遭受了慘重的失敗。
We must work together to defeat the enemy. 我們必須共同努力擊敗敵人。
He congratulated his defeater after the match. 比賽結束後，他向擊敗他的人表示祝賀。
The new champion proved to be a formidable defeater. 新冠軍證明自己是一個強大的擊敗者。
We cannot give in to defeatism. 我們不能屈服於失敗主義。
His talk was filled with defeatism. 他的談話充滿了失敗主義。
Don't be such a defeatist; we can still win. 不要這麼失敗主義；我們還有機會贏。
The general criticized the defeatist attitude of some officers. 將軍批評了一些軍官的失敗主義態度。
The defeatment of their plans was a major blow. 他們計劃的挫敗是一個重大的打擊。
He accepted the defeatment with dignity. 他有尊嚴地接受了失敗。
Time will defeature even the most beautiful face. 時間甚至會毀掉最美麗的容顏。
The defeature was caused by a severe injury. 毀容是由嚴重的受傷引起的。
The doctor prescribed a defecant to help with his condition. 醫生開了一種瀉藥來幫助他的病情。
These chemicals have a defecant effect. 這些化學物質具有排便作用。
The patient was unable to defecate without assistance. 患者在沒有協助的情況下無法排便。
Animals often defecate to mark their territory. 動物經常排便以標記領地。
Normal defecation is a sign of good health. 正常的排便是身體健康的標誌。
The nurse monitored the patient's defecation frequency. 護士監測了患者的排便頻率。
The device is designed for a frequent defecator. 該設備是為排便頻繁者設計的。
Each defecator must follow the hygiene rules. 每個排便者都必須遵守衛生規則。
The technician discovered a minor defect in the machine's cooling system. 技術員在機器的冷卻系統中發現了一個微小的缺陷（瑕疵）。

The product was recalled due to a safety defect. 該產品因安全缺陷而被召回。
The soldier decided to defect to the other side. 這名士兵決定叛逃到另一方。
The defectibility of the system was a major concern. 系統容易產生缺陷是一個主要擔憂。
Engineers analyzed the defectibility of the new design. 工程師分析了新設計產生缺陷的可能性。
Everything human is inherently defectible. 凡是人為的東西本質上都是有缺點的。
The defectible parts were replaced immediately. 有缺陷的零件被立即更換。
The general’s sudden defection shocked the government. 將軍的突然叛逃震驚了政府。
The party suffered another defection to the opposition. 該黨再次倒向反對黨。
The diplomat's defection shocked the government. 外交官的叛逃震驚了政府。
There have been several defections from the ruling party. 執政黨內已經發生了幾起脫黨事件。
He was branded a defectionist by his former colleagues. 他被前同事標記為叛逃者。
The defectionist provided valuable intelligence. 叛逃者提供了有價值的情報。
The old machinery was defectious and unreliable. 舊機器有缺陷且不可靠。
She pointed out the defectious logic in his argument. 她指出了他論點中存在的缺陷邏輯。

meaning: 缺乏某些形式；例如，只有一種時態或只能用於第三人稱。
sentences: Something described as defective is lacking some forms; e.g., having only one tense or being usable only in the third person. 被描述為有缺陷的東西是缺乏某些形式；例如，只有一種時態或只能用於第三人稱。
The word defective is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 有缺陷這個詞常用來描述人、事物或情況。
The company apologized for the defective goods. 公司為有缺陷的貨物表示歉意。
Her vision is slightly defective. 她的視力稍有缺陷。
The engine was functioning defectively. 引擎運行不正常。
The document was defectively drafted. 該文件起草得有缺陷。
The defectiveness of the material led to the collapse. 材料的缺陷導致了倒塌。
He was aware of the defectiveness of his plan. 他意識到自己計劃的不完善。
The factory aims to produce defectless products. 工廠旨在生產無缺陷的產品。
Her performance was truly defectless. 她的表演確實完美無缺。

meaning: 缺陷學 (研究殘障者教育的科學)
sentences: He specialized in defectology at the university. 他在大學專攻缺陷學。
Defectology helps in developing better support for disabled children. 缺陷學有助於為殘疾兒童開發更好的支持。
The defector was granted political asylum. 叛逃者被授予政治庇護。

An ultrasonic defectoscope can find hidden cracks in metal. 超音波探傷儀可以發現金屬中隱藏的裂紋。
The defedation of the holy site was a tragedy. 聖地的污損是一場悲劇。
He complained about the defedation of the river. 他抱怨河流受到污染。
Some argued that the heavy uniform would defeminize the soldiers. 有些人認為笨重的制服會使士兵失去女性特徵。
The treatment might defeminize the patient. 該治療可能會使患者失去女性特徵。

meaning: 與軍事相關的政府政策或（基礎設施）結構。
sentences: Department of Defence 國防部
The term defence refers to government policy or (infra)structure related to the military. 國防一詞是指與軍事相關的政府政策或（基礎設施）結構。
The city's defences were strengthened. 城市的防禦得到了加強。
He spoke in defence of his friend. 他為他的朋友辯護。
The brave soldiers were trained to defend their country's border. 勇敢的士兵接受訓練以保衛（防禦）國家邊界。
You should always be prepared to defend your beliefs and values. 妳應該始終準備好為自己的信念與價值觀辯護（保衛）。
We must defend our country. 我們必須保衛我們的國家。
He hired a lawyer to defend him in court. 他聘請律師在法庭上為他辯護。
The castle was built in a defendable position. 城堡建在一個可防禦的位置。
Her actions are not easily defendable. 她的行為不容易辯解。
The defendant was found not guilty following a long and complex trial. 經過漫長而審判，被告被判無罪。
The lawyer spent months preparing the defense for the high-profile defendant. 律師花了幾個月時間為這位備受關注的被告準備辯護。
The defendant pleaded not guilty. 被告辯稱無罪。
The jury listened to the defendant's testimony. 陪審團聽取了被告的證詞。

meaning: 代表被告的律師，尤其是公設辯護人；辯護律師（美國）或辯護律師（英國）。
sentences: The term defender refers to a lawyer who represents defendants, especially a public defender; a defense attorney (US) or defence counsel (UK). 辯護人是指代表被告的律師，特別是公設辯護人；辯護律師（美國）或辯護律師（英國）。
The lesson introduced defender as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了防守者這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He is a staunch defender of human rights. 他是人權的堅定捍衛者。
The goal was saved by a quick defender. 球被一名迅速的後衛救了下來。

meaning: 女防禦者；女保衛者 (罕用)
sentences: The queen acted as the defendress of the realm. 女王擔任王國的保衛者。
She was known as a fierce defendress of her children. 她被公認為孩子的兇猛守護者。

meaning: 將人拋出窗外；把某人踢出職位
sentences: The Defenestration of Prague is a famous historical event. 布拉格拋窗事件是一個著名的歷史事件。
The political defenestration of the leader was unexpected. 該領導人被踢出職位是出乎意料的。
He took a defensative stance. 他採取了防禦姿態。
The wall served as a defensative against the tide. 這道牆起到了抵禦潮汐的作用。
The city's air defense system is being upgraded to ensure safety. 城市的防空系統正進行升級以確保安全。
The lawyer gave a strong defense for his client during the trial. 律師在審判期間為他的客戶做了強而有力的辯護（防禦）。
The system is our last line of defense. 該系統是我們的最後一道防線。
She is working on her legal defense. 她正在準備她的法律辯護。
The village was left defenseless against the attack. 村莊在攻擊面前毫無防備。
The child felt small and defenseless. 孩子感到渺小且無助。
The animals were defenselessly exposed to the cold. 動物們毫無防備地暴露在寒冷中。
He stood defenselessly as they shouted at him. 當他們對他大喊大叫時，他無力自衛地站著。
Her defenselessness made her a target. 她的無力自衛使她成為目標。
The state of defenselessness was terrifying. 毫無防備的狀態令人恐懼。
The defensibility of the fortress was unquestionable. 要塞的可防禦性是不容置疑的。
We discussed the moral defensibility of the decision. 我們討論了該決定的道德正當性。
Her decision was quite defensible given the difficult circumstances. 在困難的情況下，她的決定是相當合情合理（可以防禦）的。
The company's marketing strategy is defensible against competition. 公司的行銷策略在競爭面前是站得住腳（可以防禦）的。
The position is easily defensible. 這個位置很容易防守。
This is a perfectly defensible point of view. 這是一個完全合乎情理的觀點。
The defensibleness of the strategy was debated. 該策略的合理性受到了辯論。
They checked the defensibleness of the border. 他們檢查了邊界的可防禦性。
He argued defensibly for his actions. 他正當地為自己的行為辯解。
The territory was defensibly located. 該領土位於可防禦的地帶。
They rose in defension of their rights. 他們起來捍衛自己的權利。
The defension of the city lasted for months. 城市的保衛戰持續了數月。
He became very defensive when I asked him about his past mistakes. 當我問他過去的錯誤時，他變得非常有戒心（防禦性）。
The army took a defensive position to protect the city from attack. 軍隊採取了防禦姿態（性的）以保護城市免受攻擊。
The team played a very defensive game. 該隊打了一場非常注重防守的比賽。
He became defensive when questioned about his past. 當被問及過去時，他變得很有戒心。
She spoke defensively to protect her reputation. 她為了保護名譽，說話帶著防衛。

meaning: 延遲;推遲到以後再說吧。
sentences: requested a deferred payment 要求延期付款

meaning: 缺少一些必需的東西；通常被解釋為 in。
sentences: They were deficient in social skills. 他們缺乏社交技能。

The students performed deficiently on the test. 學生們在考試中表現欠佳。

He suffers from a significant deficit of attention and struggles at school. 他患有嚴重的注意力不足，在學校表現很吃力。
The government is trying to reduce the budget deficit. 政府正試圖減少財政赤字。

The defiledness of the water made it undrinkable. 水質的污穢使其無法飲用。

The defilement of the environment is a major concern. 環境的污損是一個主要的擔憂。
Ritual washing was required to remove any defilement. 需要進行儀式性的洗滌以去除任何玷污。
The defiler of the monument was caught on camera. 紀念碑的污損者被攝影機拍到了。
He was branded a defiler of sacred traditions. 他被烙上了神聖傳統褻瀆者的印記。

meaning: 決定性的；最後的；權威性的

meaning: 以一種不僅是決定性的，而且是決定性的和最終的方式。
sentences: If someone acts definitively, they do so in a way that is in a way that is not only decisive, but also conclusive and final. 如果某人採取明確的行動，那麼他們這樣做的方式不僅是決定性的，而且是決定性的和最終的。

meaning: 放氣；緊縮（通貨）；挫傷勇氣
sentences: He used a needle to deflate the balloon. 他用針把氣球放氣。

The GDP deflator is used to adjust for inflation. GDP 平減指數用於調整通貨膨脹。
Economists analyzed the price deflator for last year. 經濟學家分析了去年的價格平減指數。

meaning: 在射門或傳球後，通常不經意地觸球，從而使其他球員無法預測。
sentences: The defender deflected the cross into his own net. 防守隊員將傳中偏轉入自家球門。
To deflect means to touch the ball, often unwittingly, after a shot or a sharp pass, thereby making it unpredictable for the other players. 偏轉是指在射門或傳球後，通常不經意地觸球，從而使其他球員無法預測。

He noticed the deflected path of the bullet. 他注意到了子彈偏斜的路徑。

meaning: 偏轉的行為或偏轉的東西。
sentences: Russell's goalbound shot took a deflection off a defender and went out for a corner. 拉塞爾的射門繞過防守球員，射出角球。

The deflectionization of the stream was caused by debris. 溪流的偏斜是由碎屑造成的。

Special magnets are used to deflectionize the particles. 特製磁鐵被用來使粒子發生偏轉。
He tried to deflectionize the flow of the water. 他試圖改變水流的方向。
The deflective surface caused the laser to scatter. 偏斜的表面導致雷射散射。
Scientists studied the deflective properties of the new material. 科學家研究了這種新材料的偏向特性。

The archeologists had to deflesh the animal remains carefully. 考古學家必須仔細清除動物遺骸上的肉。
The machine is used to deflesh hides in the tannery. 機器在皮革廠中被用來清除皮革上的殘肉。
The weight of the snow caused the branches to deflex. 雪的重量使樹枝向下彎曲。
Botanists observed how the flower stems deflex after pollination. 植物學家觀察花莖在授粉後如何下彎。
The deflexibility of the plastic allowed it to fit the mold. 塑膠的可彎曲性使其能夠適應模具。
Engineers tested the deflexibility of the aircraft wings. 工程師測試了飛機機翼的可彎曲性。
The new alloy is both strong and deflexible. 這種新合金既強韌又可彎曲。
They needed a deflexible material for the joint. 他們的接縫處需要一種可彎曲的材料。
The deflexion of light occurs when it passes through water. 光線穿過水面時會發生偏折。
He studied the magnetic deflexion of cathode rays. 他研究了陰極射線的磁偏轉。
The rock layers showed significant deflexure from geological stress. 岩層顯示出地質壓力造成的顯著彎曲。
He pointed out the deflexure in the metal rod. 他指出了金屬棒上的彎曲處。
A deflocculant is added to the clay to make it more fluid. 將解凝劑加入粘土中使其更具流動性。
The chemist recommended a specific deflocculant for the paint. 化學家為油漆推薦了一種特定的分散劑。
The chemical will deflocculate the suspended particles. 這種化學物質會使懸浮粒子分散。
Stir the mixture to help deflocculate the clumps. 攪拌混合物以幫助分散團塊。
Deflocculation is a key process in ceramics manufacturing. 解凝作用是陶瓷製造中的關鍵過程。
The study examined the rate of deflocculation in various soils. 該研究檢查了各種土壤的解凝速率。
The industrial deflocculator was used to process the slurry. 工業解凝器被用來處理漿料。
He checked the settings on the deflocculator machine. 他檢查了解凝機上的設定。
The deflorate roses were removed from the garden. 花謝的玫瑰被從花園中移走。
He looked at the deflorate stems of the lilies. 他看著百合花凋謝的莖。
The sudden frost caused the defloration of the fruit trees. 突然的霜凍導致果樹落花。
The novel discusses the themes of innocence and defloration. 這本小說討論了純真與失身的議題。
The garden was quiet during the period of deflorescence. 花謝期間花園很安靜。
We observed the gradual deflorescence of the cherry blossoms. 我們觀察了櫻花的逐漸凋落。
The storm threatened to deflower the beautiful garden. 暴風雨威脅要摧殘那座美麗的花園。
The villain in the play attempted to deflower the heroine. 劇中的反派企圖玷污女主角。
The deflowerer of the local flora was a rare beetle. 當地植物的破壞者是一種罕見的甲蟲。
He was known as a ruthless deflowerer of youth. 他被稱為冷酷的青春摧殘者。
The defluent water from the melting glacier formed a stream. 冰河融化向下流出的水形成了一條小溪。
They followed the defluent path of the mountain spring. 他們順著山泉下流的路徑走去。
The defluous leaves covered the forest floor. 落葉鋪滿了森林地面。
A defluous stream of lava moved slowly down the volcano. 一股流下的熔岩從火山上緩緩移下。
The patient suffered from sudden defluvium due to stress. 患者因壓力而遭受突發性脫髮。
Defluvium of the coat is common in dogs during spring. 春天時狗狗換毛脫落是很常見的。
The doctor monitored the defluxion of fluid from the wound. 醫生監測傷口流出的液體量。
He wrote about the defluxion of cold air into the valley. 他描寫了冷空氣流進山谷的情形。
The defoedation of the city walls with graffiti was illegal. 用塗鴉污損城牆是非法的。
Environmental groups protested the defoedation of the coast. 環境團體抗議海岸線受到污染。
Use the car's heater to defog the windshield. 使用車內暖氣來除去擋風玻璃上的霧氣。
He tried to defog his glasses with a cloth. 他試著用布擦掉眼鏡上的霧。
The winter defoliage of the trees left the forest bare. 冬天樹木的落葉使森林變得光禿禿。
Diseases can cause premature defoliage in crops. 疾病會導致農作物過早落葉。
The chemical was used to defoliate the jungle. 這種化學藥劑被用來使叢林落葉。
Strong winds can defoliate entire orchards. 強風會使整個果園的樹葉掉光。
The defoliated trees looked ghostly in the moonlight. 掉光葉子的樹在月光下看起來像幽靈一樣。
The landscape was defoliated after the insect plague. 蟲災過後，地面上的植物葉子全落了。
Defoliation is a natural part of the seasonal cycle. 落葉作用是季節循環的自然部分。
The report studied the extent of forest defoliation. 報告研究了森林落葉的程度。
The Gypsy moth is a known defoliator of hardwood trees. 舞毒蛾是著名的闊葉樹食葉昆蟲。
The army used a powerful defoliator during the conflict. 軍隊在衝突期間使用了一種強效的落葉劑。
The landlord tried to deforce the tenant from the land. 地主試圖非法霸佔佃戶的土地。
He was accused of trying to deforce his neighbor's property. 他被指控企圖非法佔有鄰居的財產。
Legal action was taken against the deforcement. 對於這起非法佔有案，已經採取了法律行動。
The deforcement of the manor lasted for many years. 這座莊園被非法佔有了多年。
The deforceor refused to leave the premises. 非法佔有者拒絕離開該處場所。
The court ruled against the deforceor. 法院做出了不利於該非法佔有者的裁決。
He was identified as the deforcer of the family estate. 他被認定為家族遺產的非法佔有者。
The deforcer had no legal right to the house. 該非法佔有者對這棟房子沒有法律權利。
The deforciant was summoned to court. 該非法佔有土地者被傳喚到庭。
The lawsuit named him as the primary deforciant. 訴訟將他列為主要的非法佔有土地者。
Large areas were deforested to make room for farms. 大片地區被砍伐森林以騰出空間給農場。
The mining company plans to deforest the mountainside. 礦業公司計劃砍伐山坡上的森林。
Deforestation is contributing to global climate change. 森林砍伐正在加劇全球氣候變遷。
The government is trying to slow the rate of deforestation. 政府正試圖減緩森林砍伐的速度。
The deforester was fined for illegal logging. 該砍伐森林者因非法伐木而被罰款。
Environmentalists labeled him a ruthless deforester. 環保人士將他貼上冷酷的森林砍伐者的標籤。
The heat caused the plastic container to deform. 熱氣導致塑膠容器變形。
His face was deformed by a scar from the accident. 他的臉因事故留下的疤痕而變形。
Heat can deform plastic toys easily. 熱很容易使塑膠玩具變形。
Extreme pressure began to deform the metal frame. 極大的壓力開始使金屬框架變形。
The deformability of red blood cells is essential for health. 紅血球的可變形性對健康至關重要。
Engineers measured the deformability of the new polymer. 工程師測量了這種新聚合物的可變形性。
Soft clay is highly deformable. 軟粘土具有高度的可變形性。
They needed a deformable material for the protective casing. 他們需要一種可變形的材料來製作保護套。
They decided to deformalize the meeting to encourage discussion. 他們決定使會議非正式化，以鼓勵討論。
The company is trying to deformalize its office culture. 公司正試圖使其辦公室文化非正式化。

meaning: 變形的行為或變形的狀態。
sentences: plastic deformation 塑性變形
permanent deformation 永久變形
The earthquake caused severe deformation of the road. 地震造成道路嚴重變形。
The stress led to permanent deformation of the structure. 壓力導致結構發生永久性變形。
The geologist studied deformational features in the rock. 地質學家研究了岩石中的變形特徵。
Deformational forces shaped the mountain range over millions of years. 變形力在數百萬年間塑造了山脈。
The disease has a deformative effect on the joints. 這種疾病對關節有致畸影響。
He researched deformative processes in materials science. 他研究了材料科學中的變形過程。
The tree had a deformed trunk due to the strong winds. 由於強風，這棵樹的樹幹長歪了。
He was born with a deformed foot. 他出生時腳部畸形。
The plant grew deformedly in the dark room. 植物在暗室中生長畸形。
His fingers were bent deformedly by arthritis. 他的手指因關節炎而畸形彎曲。
The doctor examined the deformedness of the bone. 醫生檢查了骨頭的畸形情況。
She spoke about the social stigma of physical deformedness. 她談到了身體畸形的社會污名。
Pollution is a major deformer of natural ecosystems. 污染是自然生態系統的主要破壞者。
The tool acted as a deformer for the metal sheet. 該工具作為金屬板的變形器。
The scientist used a deformeter to track the changes. 科學家使用變形計來追蹤變化。
An electronic deformeter was attached to the dam. 大壩上安裝了一個電子變形計。
The artist was influenced by the concepts of deformism. 這位藝術家受到了變形主義概念的影響。
The exhibition explored deformism in modern sculpture. 展覽探討了現代雕塑中的變形主義。

meaning: 醜陋或畸形的特徵或特徵。
sentences: The accident left him with a slight facial deformity. 這次意外使他的臉部出現輕微畸形。
She worked with children born with limb deformities. 她與先天肢體畸形的兒童一起工作。
Surgery can often correct physical deformity. 手術通常可以糾正身體畸形。
The deformity was caused by a genetic mutation. 這種畸形是由基因突變引起的。
The treaty required the nation to defortify its border. 條約要求該國拆除邊境的防禦工事。
They began to defortify the old castle walls. 他們開始拆除古城堡牆上的防禦工事。
Do not defoul the clear water of the stream. 不要弄髒溪中清澈的水。
His reputation was defouled by the false rumors. 他的名聲被虛假的謠言玷污了。
They conspired to defraud the insurance company. 他們密謀詐騙保險公司。
He was arrested for trying to defraud elderly investors. 他因試圖詐騙老年投資者而被捕。
Defraudation of public funds is a serious crime. 騙取公款是嚴重的罪行。
The company was a victim of a massive defraudation scheme. 該公司是一個巨大詐騙計劃的受害者。
The defrauder used a fake identity to steal money. 詐騙者使用虛假身份偷錢。
Police are still looking for the notorious defrauder. 警方仍在尋找那位臭名昭著的詐騙者。
The legal documents detailed the acts of defraudment. 法律文件詳細記錄了欺詐行為。
He was charged with multiple counts of defraudment. 他被控多項欺詐罪名。
The grant will help defray the costs of the research. 這筆撥款將有助於支付研究費用。
They sold cookies to defray the expenses of their trip. 他們賣餅乾來負擔旅行的開支。
Are these travel expenses defrayable by the company? 這些差旅費公司可以報銷（支付）嗎？
The scholarship covers all defrayable educational costs. 獎學金涵蓋了所有可支付的教育費用。
The defrayal of legal fees was handled by the firm. 法律費用的支付由公司處理。
He thanked the organization for the defrayal of his medical bills. 他感謝該組織為他支付了醫療費。
The government acted as the primary defrayer of the project. 政府擔任該項目的主要出資者。
Identify the defrayer responsible for the maintenance. 確定負責維修費用的支付者。
The total defrayment for the renovation was over budget. 裝修的總支出超出了預算。
Defrayment of the loan must be made by the end of the month. 貸款的償還必須在月底前完成。
Remember to defreeze the meat before cooking. 記得在烹飪前先將肉解凍。
The system took an hour to defreeze the pipes. 系統花了一個小時來解凍管道。
The old text mentioned defrication as a remedy. 古籍中提到摩擦是一種治療方法。
He studied the effect of defrication on the skin. 他研究了摩擦對皮膚的影響。
The priest was defrocked after the scandal. 醜聞發生後，那名牧師被撤職了。
The church decided to defrock the rebellious minister. 教會決定撤銷那名叛逆牧師的聖職。
I need to defrost the refrigerator today. 我今天需要給冰箱除霜。
You can defrost the bread in the microwave. 你可以用微波爐解凍麵包。
The rear window defroster isn't working. 後窗除霜器壞了。
Turn on the defroster to clear the ice. 開啟除霜裝置以清除冰霜。
He assembled it in one fluid, deft motion. 他以一種流暢、靈巧的動作將它組裝起來。
The report describes the result as deft. 報告將結果描述為“靈巧”。
The pianist played with deft fingers. 鋼琴家指法靈巧地演奏著。
She made a deft move to avoid the puddle. 她靈巧地一閃，避開了水坑。
The defterdar managed the empire's finances. 財政大臣管理著帝國的財務。
He was appointed as the new defterdar by the Sultan. 他被蘇丹任命為新的財政大臣。
He deftly caught the falling glass. 他靈巧地接住了掉落的玻璃杯。
She deftly handled the difficult question. 她靈巧地應對了那個難題。
The surgeon's deftness was admired by all. 外科醫生的靈巧深受大家欽佩。
She painted the tiny details with great deftness. 她以極大的靈巧畫出了微小的細節。

meaning: 不再從事業務或服務，也不希望再次從事業務或服務；停業。
sentences: Something described as defunct is no longer in business or service, nor expected to be again; out of business. 被描述為已不復存在的事物不再從事業務或服務，也不希望再次出現；破產了。
The word defunct is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「已不再存在」這個詞常被用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。
That magazine is now defunct. 那本雜誌現在已經停刊了。
The defunct factory was turned into a museum. 廢棄的工廠被改建成了一座博物館。
The defunction of the project was unexpected. 項目的終止是出人意料的。
Legal issues led to the defunction of the partnership. 法律問題導致了合夥關係的終止。
Defunctionalization is a technique used in computer science. 去功能化是電腦科學中使用的一種技術。
The study looked at the defunctionalization of old industrial zones. 研究探討了舊工業區的功能退化。
The new software update will defunctionalize the older plugins. 新的軟體更新將使舊的插件失效。
The architect tried not to defunctionalize the original design. 建築師試圖不讓原始設計失去功能。
The defunctness of the law made it unenforceable. 法律的失效使其無法執行。
They lamented the defunctness of the old social club. 他們對舊社交俱樂部的不復存在感到惋惜。
to defuse a hostage situation 化解人質劫持事件
People often defuse when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會軟化。

meaning: 拆除引信；緩和（緊張局勢）
sentences: Bomb experts worked to defuse the device. 炸彈專家努力拆除該裝置的引信。
His joke helped to defuse the tension in the room. 他的笑話有助於緩和房間裡的緊張氣氛。
The successful defusion of the crisis was a relief. 危機的成功緩解令人鬆了一口氣。
Defusion techniques are used in certain types of therapy. 緩解技術被用於某些類型的治療中。
The young man decided to defy his parents' wishes and travel around the world. 這個年輕人決定違抗父母的意願去環遊世界。
The beauty of the landscape defied description and left everyone in awe. 壯麗的景色簡直無法形容（使形容變為不可能），讓每個人都感到驚嘆。
She decided to defy her parents and go to the party. 她決定違抗父母，去參加派對。
The beauty of the sunset seemed to defy description. 日落的美景似乎無法用言語形容。
He looked at the judge defyingly. 他挑戰地看著法官。
The small bird chirped defyingly at the cat. 小鳥對著貓挑戰地叫著。
The temperature rose by 5 deg Celsius. 溫度升高了 5 攝氏度。
The angle was exactly 90 deg. 角度剛好是 90 度。
The surgeon had to deganglionate the affected area. 外科醫生必須切除受影響區域的神經節。
The medical report described the need to deganglionate. 醫療報告描述了切除神經節的必要性。
They decided to degarnish the room for a minimalist look. 他們決定去掉房間的裝飾以達到極簡風格。
The general was forced to degarnish the fortress. 將軍被迫撤走堡壘的守軍。

meaning: 除去（液體或固體中的）氣體
sentences: The solution must be degassed before the experiment. 實驗前必須先將溶液除氣。
Heat can be used to degas the metal during casting. 在鑄造過程中可以使用加熱來除去金屬中的氣體。
Vacuum degasification is used in steel production. 真空除氣法被用於鋼鐵生產。
The degasification of the lake water was necessary. 湖水除氣是必要的。
The degasifier was installed to improve water quality. 安裝了除氣器以改善水質。
Check the filter on the degasifier regularly. 定期檢查除氣器上的過濾器。
Special equipment is needed to degasify the oil. 需要特殊設備來為油除氣。
Stirring will help to degasify the carbonated drink. 攪拌有助於使碳酸飲料排氣。
The vacuum degasser removed the oxygen from the water. 真空除氣器去除了水中的氧氣。
He repaired the broken degasser in the factory. 他修理了工廠裡壞掉的除氣器。
They had to degauss the computer monitors. 他們必須給電腦顯示器消磁。
Degauss the hard drive before throwing it away. 在扔掉硬碟之前先對其進行消磁。
The process will degelatinize the animal bones. 該過程將使動物骨頭脫膠。
He used a chemical solution to degelatinize the surface. 他使用化學溶液使表面脫膠。
The degelation of the ice caps is a global concern. 冰帽的融化是一個全球性的擔憂。
Spring marks the beginning of degelation in the mountains. 春天標誌著山區解凍的開始。
The moral degeneracy of the ruling class led to the revolt. 統治階級的道德淪喪導致了起義。
Physicists studied the degeneracy of energy levels. 物理學家研究了能階的簡併性。
The teacher tried to degeneralize the student's broad statement. 老師試圖使學生寬泛的陳述具體化。
The lawyer worked to degeneralize the evidence. 律師致力於使證據特殊化。

meaning: 一個墮落的人，一個從以前的地位跌落下來的人；不道德或腐敗的人。
sentences: In the cult of degenerates, acts of decency, kindness and modesty could be seen as acts of apostasy. 在墮落者的崇拜中，正派、仁慈和謙虛的行為可能被視為叛教。
The term degenerate refers to one who is degenerate, who has fallen from previous stature; an immoral or corrupt person. 「墮落」這個詞是指墮落的人，從以前的地位跌落下來的人。不道德或腐敗的人。
The protest began to degenerate into violence. 抗議開始演變成暴力行為。
The neighborhood has become degenerate over the years. 這些年來，這個社區變得墮落了。
The cells divided degenerately under the influence of the toxin. 在毒素的影響下，細胞發生了退化性的分裂。
He lived degenerately in the slums. 他在貧民窟裡過著墮落的生活。
The degenerateness of the society was evident in the streets. 社會的墮落從街頭可見一斑。
They discussed the degenerateness of the artistic standard. 他們討論了藝術標準的退化。
Macular degeneration affects many older people's vision. 黃斑部病變影響了許多老年人的視力。
There has been a degeneration of traditional values. 傳統價值觀已經發生了退化。
The degenerationist argued that civilizations naturally decay. 退化論者主張文明會自然衰敗。
He was a famous degenerationist in the 19th century. 他是 19 世紀著名的退化論者。

meaning: 以退化為特徵或導致退化。
sentences: Something described as degenerative is characterized by or causing degeneration. 被描述為退化的事物的特徵是退化或導致退化。
The word degenerative is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 退化這個字常被用來描述一個人、事物或情況。
Arthritis is a degenerative joint disease. 關節炎是一種退行性關節疾病。
The patient suffered from a degenerative condition of the brain. 患者患有腦部退化症。
The doctor noted the degenerescence of the tissue. 醫生注意到了組織的趨於退化。

meaning: 使失去貴族身份（或高尚地位）
sentences: The revolution sought to degentilize the upper class. 革命試圖剝奪上層階級的貴族地位。

Degerming improves the shelf life of flour. 脫胚可以延長麵粉的保質期。
High temperatures can degerminate seeds. 高溫可以使種子不發芽。
Chemicals were used to degerminate the barley. 化學物質被用來使大麥不發芽。
The factory installed a new degerminator for grain processing. 工廠安裝了一台新的穀物加工脫胚機。
A degerminator is essential in modern milling. 脫胚機在現代磨粉中是必不可少的。
The degged garden looked refreshed in the morning. 灑過水的花園在清晨看起來煥然一新。

The degger moved slowly across the dusty field. 灑水者在塵土飛揚的田野上緩慢移動。
Old farm records mention a local degger. 舊的農場記錄提到了一位當地的灑水者。
Deglaciation caused the sea levels to rise significantly. 冰消作用導致海平面顯著上升。
Scientists are studying the patterns of deglaciation in the Arctic. 科學家正在研究北極地區的冰消模式。
Deglaze the pan with a splash of white wine. 用一點白葡萄酒稀釋鍋底的肉汁。
After searing the steak, you should deglaze the skillet. 煎好牛排後，你應該稀釋平底鍋底的精華。
The process helps to deglutinate the material. 這個過程有助於材料去膠。
They used heat to deglutinate the bonded surfaces. 他們利用熱量使粘合的表面脫膠。
Deglutination is necessary before recycling the product. 在回收產品之前，去膠作用是必要的。
The laboratory observed the deglutination process carefully. 實驗室仔細觀察了去膠過程。
The patient had difficulty with deglutition. 病人有吞嚥困難。
Deglutition is a complex physiological process. 吞嚥是一個複雜的生理過程。
He studied the deglutitious muscles of the throat. 他研究了喉部的吞嚥肌。
Deglutitious functions can be impaired by illness. 吞嚥功能可能會受疾病損害。
The therapy aims to improve deglutitive control. 該療法旨在改善吞嚥控制。
Proper posture is important for deglutitive safety. 正確的姿勢對於吞嚥安全很重要。
The deglutitory reflex is triggered automatically. 吞嚥反射會自動觸發。
The doctor checked her deglutitory response. 醫生檢查了她的吞嚥反應。
The chemist needed to deglycerin the mixture. 化學家需要除去混合物中的甘油。
New methods to deglycerin fats are being researched. 除去脂肪中甘油的新方法正在研究中。
It is possible to deglycerine the compound through distillation. 可以通過蒸餾除去化合物中的甘油。
The factory attempted to deglycerine the soap byproduct. 工廠試圖除去肥皂副產品中的甘油。
The river would degorge into the ocean after the storm. 暴風雨過後，河水會湧入大海。
He had to degorge the swallowed object. 他不得不吐出吞下的物體。
The supermarket switched to degradable plastic bags. 超市改用可降解塑料袋。
Naturally degradable materials are better for the environment. 天然可降解材料對環境更好。

The concentration of the degradand decreased over time. 被降解物的濃度隨著時間推移而降低。

meaning: 任何器官或整個身體的發育停滯或退化。
sentences: muscle degradation 肌肉退化
The term degradation refers to arrest of development, or degeneration of any organ, or of the body as a whole. 術語退化是指任何器官或整個身體的發育停滯或退化。

Some types of plastic take hundreds of years to naturally degrade in the environment. 某些類型的塑膠在環境中需要數百年才能自然降解。

Bacteria can degrade oil spills in the ocean. 細菌可以降解海洋中的溢油。
Don't degrade yourself by arguing with them. 不要為了跟他們爭論而貶低自己。
The forest was in a degraded state after the fire. 火災後，森林處於退化狀態。
He lived in a degraded neighborhood. 他住在一個墮落的社區。
He behaved degradedly during his time on the streets. 他在街頭流浪期間表現得很落魄。
The prisoner was treated degradedly by the guards. 囚犯受到守衛的屈辱對待。
The degradedness of the ancient ruins was heartbreaking. 古代遺跡的殘破令人心碎。
She was shocked by the degradedness of the environment. 她對環境的惡化感到震驚。
The degradement of the officer caused a scandal. 該官員的降職引起了醜聞。
Environmental degradement is a global concern. 環境退化是全球關注的問題。
Some fungi are effective organic degraders. 某些真菌是有效的有機物降解者。
He was known as a degrader of traditional values. 他被稱為傳統價值的貶低者。

meaning: 導致或可能導致某人感到被貶低。
sentences: Retrieving my dropped possessions from the mud was a degrading experience. 從泥巴里找回掉在地上的東西是一次有辱人格的經驗。
The report describes the result as degrading. 報告稱這一結果是有辱人格的。
The prisoners were forced to perform degrading tasks. 囚犯被迫執行侮辱性的任務。
A degrading environment can affect mental health. 惡化的環境會影響心理健康。
He spoke degradingly of his competitors. 他侮辱性地談論他的競爭對手。
The servants were treated degradingly. 僕人們受到卑微的對待。
She complained about the degradingness of the interview. 她投訴面試具有侮辱性。
The degradingness of the situation was clear to everyone. 局勢的屈辱性對每個人來說都很明顯。
The university threatened to degraduate the cheating student. 大學威脅要剝奪作弊學生的學位。
It is rare for an institution to degraduate an alumnus. 機構很少會剝奪校友的學位。
The degraduation was a severe punishment for his fraud. 剝奪學位是對他欺詐行為的嚴厲懲罰。
Legal steps were taken to challenge the degraduation. 已採取法律步驟來質疑剝奪學位的決定。
The tanner needed to degrain the hides. 皮匠需要去除皮革的紋理。
Degraining makes the leather smoother. 去除紋理可以使皮革更光滑。
Use a solvent to degrease the engine parts. 使用溶劑除去引擎零件的油脂。
You should degrease the surface before painting. 噴漆前你應該先除掉表面的油脂。
He sprayed a powerful degreaser on the kitchen stove. 他在廚房爐灶上噴灑了強力除脂劑。
Always wear gloves when handling this industrial degreaser. 使用這種工業除脂劑時請務必戴上手套。
She received her master's degree in engineering last month. 她上個月獲得了工程學碩士學位。
The temperature dropped significantly by several degrees last night. 昨晚氣溫顯著下降了幾度。
She has a master's degree in chemistry. 她擁有化學碩士學位。
The temperature dropped by several degrees overnight. 氣溫在一夜之間下降了幾度。
A degreeless individual may find it harder to get a job. 沒有學位的人可能會發現找工作更難。
The survey showed a degreeless change in public opinion. 調查顯示公眾輿論沒有明顯程度的變化。
The angle was adjusted degreewise. 角度是逐度調整的。
The scale increases degreewise. 刻度按度數增加。
The tax system features a degression for lower incomes. 稅務系統對較低收入者設有遞減機制。
We observed a degression in the intensity of the light. 我們觀察到光強度逐漸減弱。
The company applied a degressive pricing model. 公司採用了遞減定價模型。
Degressive taxation can benefit the middle class. 遞減稅制可以惠及中產階級。
The costs decrease degressively as production increases. 隨著產量增加，成本遞減。
The signal strength fell degressively. 信號強度遞減。
The degu is a social rodent native to Chile. 智利八齒鼠是原產於智利的社交性囓齒動物。
Degus are often kept as pets due to their friendly nature. 由於天性友好，智利八齒鼠常被當作寵物飼養。
Deguelia is a genus of legumes found in the tropics. 魚藤屬是發現於熱帶地區的一種豆科植物。
The roots of some Deguelia species contain rotenone. 某些魚藤屬植物的根部含有魚藤酮。
Deguelin is a rotenoid found in several plant species. 迪桂林是存在於幾種植物中的一種魚藤酮類物質。
Researchers are investigating the anti-cancer properties of deguelin. 研究人員正在調查迪桂林的抗癌特性。
They needed to degum the silk before dyeing it. 他們在染色前需要為絲綢脫膠。
Oil processing often involves a step to degum the fats. 油脂加工通常涉及一個脫去脂肪膠質的步驟。
The technician added a degummer to the mixture. 技術員在混合物中加入了脫膠劑。
A high-quality degummer is necessary for refining vegetable oils. 精煉植物油需要高品質的脫膠劑。
The guests were invited to degust the fine wine. 賓客們被邀請品嚐美酒。
He liked to degust local delicacies while traveling. 他喜歡在旅行時品嚐當地美食。
The restaurant offers a seven-course degustation menu. 餐廳提供七道菜的品嚐菜單。
We enjoyed a chocolate degustation at the factory. 我們在工廠享用了巧克力品嚐會。
The factory uses chemicals to dehair animal skins. 工廠使用化學物質為動物皮脫毛。

meaning: 德海特人 (虛構或極其罕見稱呼)
sentences: The historian mentioned the mysterious Dehaites. 歷史學家提到了神秘的德海特人。

Special techniques are used to dehematize biological samples. 特殊技術被用於除去生物樣本中的血液。
Scientists attempted to dehepatize the experimental model. 科學家試圖移除實驗模型的肝臟。
It is difficult to dehepatize an organism without causing death. 很難在不導致死亡的情況下移除生物的肝臟。
The Dehgan people live in parts of Central Asia. 德干人生活在中亞的部分地區。

The seed pods will dehisce when they are dry. 豆莢乾燥後會裂開。

The dehiscence of the pod releases the seeds. 豆莢的裂開釋放了種子。

Critics argued that the film tended to dehistoricize the conflict. 評論家認為這部電影傾向於將衝突去歷史化。
We should not dehistoricize these cultural artifacts. 我們不應該將這些文化遺產去歷史化。
The Dehkan farmed his land diligently. 這位農民勤奮地耕種他的土地。
Historically, the Dehkans were a significant social class. 在歷史上，Dehkans 是一個重要的社會階層。
In linguistics, a dehnstufe involves vowel lengthening. 在語言學中，長級涉及元音延長。
He explained the concept of dehnstufe in Indo-European languages. 他解釋了印歐語系中長級的概念。
He sought to dehonestate his rival in public. 他試圖在公開場合侮辱他的對手。
The pamphlet was written to dehonestate the government. 這本小冊子是為了侮辱政府而寫的。
The dehonestation of the hero led to an outcry. 對這位英雄的侮辱引起了強烈抗議。
Such dehonestation is not permitted in the assembly. 議會中不允許這種侮辱行為。
Farmers often dehorn cattle for safety. 農民為了安全通常會給牛去角。
It is best to dehorn calves when they are young. 最好在牛犢幼小的時候為其去角。
The vet used an electric dehorner. 獸醫使用了電動去角器。
Keep the dehorner clean to prevent infection. 保持去角器清潔以防止感染。
The evidence was dehors the record. 證據在記錄之外。
Matters dehors the contract were not considered. 合約之外的事項未被考慮。
The priest would dehort the young men from vice. 牧師會勸阻年輕人不要墮落。
They tried to dehort him from taking the risky journey. 他們試圖勸阻他不要進行那次冒險的旅行。
The dehortation failed to change his mind. 勸阻未能改變他的主意。
Her dehortation was based on personal experience. 她的勸阻是基於個人經驗。
He used a dehortative tone in his speech. 他在演講中使用了勸阻的語氣。
The dehortative message was ignored. 勸阻的訊息被忽視了。
A dehortatory letter was sent to the members. 一封勸阻信被發給了成員。
His dehortatory advice was very persuasive. 他勸阻性的建議非常有說服力。
As a dehorter, he was always warning people about risks. 作為一名勸阻者，他總是警告人們注意風險。
She acted as a dehorter for her impulsive friends. 她充當她那些衝動朋友的勸阻者。
The factory uses a machine to dehull the seeds. 工廠使用機器為種子脫殼。
You should dehull the beans before cooking them. 你應該在烹飪前為豆子脫殼。
The dehumanization of prisoners is a human rights violation. 將囚犯非人化是侵犯人權的行為。
Propaganda often leads to the dehumanization of the enemy. 宣傳往往導致對敵人的非人化。
War can dehumanize even the most compassionate people. 戰爭甚至會使最富有同情心的人變得冷酷無情。
We must not dehumanize others based on their beliefs. 我們絕不能根據他人的信仰而將其非人化。
Dehumidification is essential in humid climates to prevent mold. 在潮濕氣候下，除濕對於防止發霉至關重要。
The system provides both cooling and dehumidification. 該系統同時提供冷卻和除濕功能。
I bought a dehumidifier for my basement. 我為我的地下室買了一台除濕機。
The dehumidifier collects several liters of water every day. 除濕機每天收集幾公升水。
We need to dehumidify the air in the storage room. 我們需要為儲藏室的空氣除濕。
The air conditioner can help dehumidify the house. 空調可以幫助房屋除濕。
The machine can dehusk rice very quickly. 這台機器可以很快地為稻米脫殼。
He learned how to dehusk coconuts. 他學會了如何給椰子去殼。
The Dehwar tribe lives in the Balochistan region. 德瓦爾部落生活在俾路支省地區。
Dehwar people have a unique cultural heritage. 德瓦爾人擁有獨特的文化遺產。
Alcohol is often used as a dehydrant in laboratories. 酒精在實驗室中常用作脫水劑。
The technician applied a dehydrant to the specimen. 技術員在標本上塗了脫水劑。
Dehydrase is an enzyme that catalyzes the removal of water. 脫水酶是一種催化水分移除的酶。
Researchers studied the activity of dehydrase in plants. 研究人員研究了植物中脫水酶的活性。
Drink plenty of water so you don't dehydrate. 多喝水以免脫水。
You can dehydrate fruit to make healthy snacks. 你可以將水果脫水製作健康的零食。

meaning: 從某物中除去水的行為或過程。
sentences: The term dehydration refers to the act or process of removing water from something. 脫水一詞是指從某物中去除水分的行為或過程。
The lesson introduced dehydration as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了脫水這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Severe dehydration can be life-threatening. 嚴重的脫水可能危及生命。
Symptoms of dehydration include thirst and dizziness. 脫水的症狀包括口渴和頭暈。
I use a food dehydrator to make dried mangoes. 我使用食品脫水機製作芒果乾。
The industrial dehydrator is used for processing chemicals. 工業脫水機用於處理化學品。
Dehydroascorbic acid is an oxidized form of vitamin C. 脫氫抗壞血酸是維生素 C 的氧化形式。
They measured the dehydroascorbic levels in the blood. 他們測量了血液中的脫氫抗壞血酸水平。
Dehydrocorydaline is an alkaloid found in certain herbs. 脫氫紫堇鹼是存在於某些草藥中的生物鹼。
The pharmacological effects of dehydrocorydaline are being studied. 脫氫紫堇鹼的藥理作用正在被研究。
Dehydrofreezing preserves the texture of vegetables. 脫水冷凍可以保持蔬菜的質地。
The food industry uses dehydrofreezing to reduce shipping costs. 食品工業使用脫水冷凍來降低運輸成本。
Lactate dehydrogenase is an enzyme found in many tissues. 乳酸脫氫酶是存在於許多組織中的一種酶。
The level of dehydrogenase can indicate tissue damage. 脫氫酶的水平可以指示組織損傷。
The catalyst helps to dehydrogenate the alcohol. 催化劑有助於使酒精脫氫。
High temperatures are needed to dehydrogenate the compound. 需要高溫才能使該化合物脫氫。
Dehydrogenation is an important process in organic chemistry. 脫氫作用是有機化學中的一個重要過程。
The dehydrogenation reaction produces hydrogen gas. 脫氫反應會產生氫氣。
The dehydrogenization of the substrate was analyzed. 分析了底物的脫氫作用。
Efficiency of dehydrogenization depends on the catalyst used. 脫氫效率取決於所使用的催化劑。
Researchers found a way to dehydrogenize the molecule more efficiently. 研究人員找到了一種更有效地使分子脫氫的方法。
The enzyme will dehydrogenize the target compound. 該酶將使目標化合物脫氫。
Dehydromucic acid is derived from certain carbohydrates. 脫氫粘液酸衍生自某些碳水化合物。
They studied the chemical properties of dehydromucic acid. 他們研究了脫氫粘液酸的化學性質。
Dehydrosparteine is a derivative of sparteine. 脫氫金雀花鹼是金雀花鹼的衍生物。
The lab synthesized a small amount of dehydrosparteine. 實驗室合成了少量的脫氫金雀花鹼。
The therapist needed to dehypnotize the patient safely. 治療師需要安全地解除病人的催眠狀態。
It can be difficult to dehypnotize someone who is in a deep trance. 要解除深層催眠狀態下的人是很困難的。
The ground crew had to deice the wings before takeoff. 地勤人員必須在起飛前為機翼除冰。
He used a scraper to deice his car's windshield. 他用刮刀為汽車擋風玻璃除冰。
The plane is equipped with an automatic deicer. 飛機配備了自動除冰器。
I sprayed some deicer on the frozen lock. 我在凍住的鎖上噴了一些除冰劑。
The myth described a deicidal act by the ancient titan. 神話描述了古代泰坦的一項弒神行為。
Deicidal themes are common in some dark fantasies. 弒神主題在某些黑暗奇幻作品中很常見。
The story revolves around a character who commits deicide. 故事圍繞著一個犯下弒神罪行的角色展開。
Deicide is a major theme in the ancient tragedy. 弒神是這部古代悲劇的一個主要主題。
Words like 'this' and 'that' are deictic expressions. 像「這」和「那」這樣的詞是指示性表達。

The enemy used delaying tactics to buy more time. 敵人使用拖延戰術以爭取更多時間。
His delaying actions caused the project to fail. 他的拖延行為導致項目失敗。
He spoke delayingly as if searching for the right words. 他說話吞吞吐吐，好像在尋找合適的詞。
She moved delayingly towards the door. 她慢吞吞地走向門口。
Delbert is a traditional English name. 德爾伯特是一個傳統的英文名字。
We met a man named Delbert at the library. 我們在圖書館遇到了一個叫德爾伯特的男人。
The editor used a dele mark to remove the redundant word. 編輯使用刪除符號去掉了多餘的詞。
Please dele the second paragraph. 請刪除第二段。
The government ordered to delead all old pipes. 政府命令去除所有舊管道中的鉛。
Workers were hired to delead the old school building. 工人們被雇傭來清除舊校舍中的鉛。
The delectability of the dessert was beyond words. 這道甜點的美味難以言表。
They praised the delectability of the fresh fruit. 他們讚美了新鮮水果的美味。
The chef prepared a delectable meal. 廚師準備了一頓美味的飯菜。
The garden was filled with delectable scents. 花園裡充滿了愉人的芬芳。
She appreciated the delectableness of the quiet evening. 她很享受這寧靜夜晚的宜人之處。
The delectableness of the cake made it a hit. 蛋糕的美味讓它大受歡迎。
The turkey was delectably roasted. 火雞烤得非常美味。
The room was delectably cool on a hot day. 在炎熱的日子裡，房間裡非常涼爽宜人。
The music was designed to delectate the audience. 音樂旨在取悅聽眾。
He sought to delectate his guests with fine wine. 他試圖用美酒讓客人感到愉悅。
The performance was for the delectation of the public. 表演是為了大眾的娛樂。
He read the old letters for his own delectation. 他為了自己的樂趣閱讀那些舊信件。
The student studied a delectus of Latin poems. 學生研究了一本拉丁詩選集。
A new delectus of short stories was published recently. 最近出版了一本新的短篇小說選集。
The manager decided which tasks were delegable. 經理決定哪些任務是可以委派的。
This responsibility is not delegable and must be handled by you. 這項職責不可委派，必須由你親自處理。
A delegacy was sent to negotiate the treaty. 一個代表團被派去協商條約。
The university's delegacy oversees the examinations. 大學的委員會監督考試。
The government moved to delegalize certain types of weapons. 政府採取行動使某些類型的武器非法化。
They are trying to delegalize the protest. 他們正試圖使這次抗議活動非法化。
The delegant outlined the terms of the agreement. 授權者概述了協議的條款。
As the delegant, she retains ultimate responsibility. 作為授權者，她保留最終責任。
Several delegates from various countries attended the international conference. 來自各個國家的幾位代表參加了這次國際會議。
A good manager knows how to delegate tasks to other team members effectively. 一位好的經理知道如何有效地將任務授權（委派）給其他團隊成員。
Each country sent a delegate to the conference. 每個國家都派了一名代表參加會議。
You should delegate more work to your assistants. 你應該把更多的工作委派給你的助手。
The delegatee performed the duties as instructed. 受委託人按照指示履行了職責。
He was chosen as the delegatee for the new project. 他被選為新項目的負責代表。
He accepted the delegateship with honor. 他光榮地接受了代表職位。
During her delegateship, she visited many countries. 在她擔任代表期間，她訪問了許多國家。
The government sent a high-level delegation to the international summit. 政府派出了高層代表團參加國際峰會。
Effective delegation of authority is essential for a large organization to function. 權力的有效授權對於大型組織的運作至關重要。
A large delegation attended the international forum. 一個龐大的代表團參加了國際論壇。
Delegation of authority is key to effective management. 權力的授權是有效管理的關鍵。
The leader has a delegative style of management. 這位領導者採用授權式的管理風格。
Delegative democracy allows citizens to transfer their voting rights. 委任民主允許公民轉讓其投票權。
A good delegator knows how to trust their team. 一個好的授權者知道如何信任他們的團隊。
The delegator must provide clear instructions. 委派者必須提供清晰的指示。
The committee exercised delegatory powers. 委員會行使了委派權。
The delegatory role was limited to observation. 代表的角色僅限於觀察。
The editor marked several sentences as delenda. 編輯將幾個句子標記為應刪除的事物。
In the final draft, all delenda were removed. 在最終草案中，所有應刪除的內容都被去掉了。
Delesseria is a genus of red algae found in marine environments. Delesseria 是一種在海洋環境中發現的紅藻屬。
The researcher studied the pigments in Delesseria. 研究人員研究了紅藻屬中的色素。
Delesseriaceae is a family of red algae. 美舌藻科是紅藻的一個科。

The specimen was identified as a delesseriaceous alga. 該標本被鑑定為一種美舌藻科的海藻。
He specialized in the study of delesseriaceous species. 他專門從事美舌藻科物種的研究。

meaning: 音樂或視訊版本的剩餘部分。
sentences: The term delete refers to a remainder of a music or video release. 術語“刪除”是指音樂或視訊版本的剩餘部分。
The lesson introduced delete as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「刪除」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Please delete the unnecessary files from the folder. 請從文件夾中刪除不必要的文件。
I accidentally deleted your email. 我不小心刪除了你的電子郵件。

meaning: 有害，通常以微妙或意想不到的方式。
sentences: deleterious to someone's health 對某人的健康有害
The report describes the result as deleterious. 報告稱這一結果是有害的。
Smoking has a deleterious effect on health. 吸煙對健康有害。
The chemical spill had deleterious consequences for the wildlife. 化學物質洩漏對野生動物產生了有害後果。
The new policy affected the small businesses deleteriously. 新政策對小型企業產生了不利影響。
Stress can deleteriously impact your immune system. 壓力會對你的免疫系統產生有害影響。
Scientists are concerned about the deleteriousness of the pollutant. 科學家們對污染物的有害性表示擔憂。
The study proved the deleteriousness of prolonged sun exposure. 研究證明了長時間日曬的有害性。

meaning: 基因或 DNA 的其他部分從染色體上移除的突變。
sentences: A genetic deletion caused the disorder. 基因缺失導致了這種疾病。
The term deletion refers to a mutation in which a gene, or other section of DNA, is removed from a chromosome. 術語「缺失」是指基因或 DNA 的其他部分從染色體上刪除的突變。
The deletion of the scene improved the film's pacing. 刪除該場景提高了電影的節奏。
The software allows for easy deletion of records. 該軟件允許輕鬆刪除記錄。
The editor took a deletive approach to the long manuscript. 編輯對這部長篇手稿採取了刪除式的處理方法。
Deletive mutations can significantly alter a gene's function. 缺失突變會顯著改變基因的功能。
He made deletory marks all over the page. 他在整頁上都做了刪除標記。
The deletory process was quick and efficient. 刪除過程既快速又高效。
The archeologists explored an ancient stone delf. 考古學家探索了一個古代採石坑。
Water collected in the deep delf. 水聚集在深溝裡。
She collects antique delft plates. 她收集古董台夫特盤子。
The fireplace was decorated with blue and white delft tiles. 壁爐裝飾著藍白相間的台夫特瓷磚。
The museum has a fine collection of Dutch delftware. 博物館收藏了一批精美的荷蘭台夫特陶器。
Delftware is famous for its distinctive blue patterns. 台夫特陶器以其獨特的藍色圖案而聞名。
Delhi is a vibrant and bustling city in India. 德里是印度一個充滿活力且繁華的城市。
We visited the historic Red Fort in Delhi. 我們參觀了德里歷史悠久的紅堡。
Delia is a popular name in Greece. 戴莉亞在希臘是一個受歡迎的名字。
Delia won the first prize in the singing contest. 戴莉亞在歌唱比賽中獲得了一等獎。
The Delian League was an association of Greek city-states. 提洛同盟是希臘城邦的一個聯盟。
Apollo is a Delian god, born on the island of Delos. 阿波羅是一位提洛神，出生在提洛島。
The country experienced a period of economic deliberalization. 該國經歷了一段經濟去自由化的時期。
Critics argued against the deliberalization of trade policies. 批評者反對貿易政策的去自由化。

Attempts to deliberalize the market were met with resistance. 使市場去自由化的嘗試遭到了抵抗。
The deliberants spent hours discussing the new proposal. 審議者們花了幾個小時討論這項新提案。

The police believe that the fire was a deliberate act of arson. 警方認為這場大火是蓄意縱火的行為。
She spoke in a deliberate tone, choosing her words very carefully. 她以沈著且緩慢的語氣說話，非常仔細地選擇用詞。

meaning: 故意的、深思熟慮的、商討
sentences: It was a deliberate attempt to mislead us. 那是一個故意的誤導我們的企圖。
The jury retired to deliberate on the verdict. 陪審團退席商議裁決。

meaning: 故意的，或經過深思熟慮的；並非偶然。
sentences: He deliberately broke that, didn't he? 他是故意破壞的，不是嗎？
If someone acts deliberately, they do so in a way that is intentionally, or after deliberation; not accidentally. 如果某人故意行事，則他們是故意或經過深思熟慮後這樣做的；並非偶然。
He deliberately arrived late to make an entrance. 他故意遲到以引起注意地進場。
She spoke slowly and deliberately. 她緩慢且深思熟慮地說著。
The deliberateness of his actions was chilling. 他行為的蓄意程度令人心驚。
She handled the fragile vase with great deliberateness. 她極其慎重地處理那隻易碎的花瓶。

meaning: 仔細討論並檢討支持和反對某項措施的理由。
sentences: the deliberations of a legislative body or council 立法機構或理事會的審議
The term deliberation refers to careful discussion and examination of the reasons for and against a measure. 「審議」一詞是指仔細討論和審查支持或反對某項措施的理由。
After much deliberation, they decided to sell the house. 經過再三考慮，他們決定賣掉房子。
The committee is currently in deliberation. 委員會目前正在商議中。
The senate is a deliberative body. 參議院是一個審議機構。
He has a slow, deliberative way of speaking. 他有一種緩慢、深思熟慮的說話方式。
The board acted deliberatively throughout the crisis. 董事會在整個危機期間都表現得深思熟慮。
He chose his words deliberatively during the interview. 他在面試過程中慎重地選擇措辭。
The deliberativeness of the process ensured a fair outcome. 過程的審慎性確保了公平的結果。
I admire her deliberativeness in making big decisions. 我欽佩她在做重大決定時的深思熟慮。
The lead deliberator summarized the group's findings. 首席審議者總結了小組的調查結果。
As a skilled deliberator, he was able to find a compromise. 作為一名老練的商討者，他能夠找到折衷方案。
The pencil marks are delible with an eraser. 鉛筆痕跡可以用橡皮擦擦掉。
His memories of the event were, unfortunately, not delible. 不幸的是，他對那次事件的記憶是無法抹去的。

meaning: 有吸引力的東西，通常是令人愉悅的食物，尤其是某種文化的精選菜餚，表明稀有和精緻。
sentences: a Chinese delicacy 一道中國美食

The term delicacy refers to something appealing, usually a pleasing food, especially a choice dish of a certain culture suggesting rarity and refinement. 「美味佳餚」一詞指的是有吸引力的東西，通常是令人愉悅的食物，尤其是某種文化的精選菜餚，暗示著稀有和精緻。
Caviar is considered a great delicacy. 魚子醬被認為是人間美味。
The situation required great delicacy and tact. 這種情況需要極大的審慎和圓滑。
Please handle that ancient ceramic vase with extreme and delicate. 請極其小心地處理那個古代（精美的）陶瓷花瓶。
The baby has very delicate skin and needs to use special organic soap. 寶寶的皮膚非常嬌嫩（精美），需要使用特殊的有機肥皂。
The glass ornaments are very delicate. 這些玻璃飾品非常脆弱。
The negotiation is at a delicate stage. 談判正處於微妙階段。

meaning: 以一種微妙的方式；精緻地。
sentences: The gingerbread was delicately, if imprecisely, captured by the brushstrokes. 薑餅被筆觸微妙地捕捉到了，儘管並不精確。
If someone acts delicately, they do so in a way that is in a delicate manner; exquisitely. 如果一個人的行為很微妙，那麼他就會以一種微妙的方式做事。精美。
The lace was delicately embroidered. 這蕾絲被精緻地刺繡著。
He handled the situation very delicately. 他非常謹慎地處理了這種情況。
She admired the delicateness of the flower petals. 她欣賞花瓣的精緻。
The delicateness of his health prevented him from traveling. 他身體虛弱，無法旅行。
He handled the matter with great delicatesse. 他非常得體地處理了這件事。
The shop is known for its French delicatesse. 這家店以其法國精美食品而聞名。
I bought some sliced ham at the delicatessen. 我在熟食店買了一些火腿片。
There's a great Italian delicatessen around the corner. 拐角處有一家很棒的意大利熟食店。
The authority decided to delicense the problematic bar. 當局決定取消那家有問題酒吧的許可證。
The doctor was delicensed after the malpractice suit. 在醫療事故訴訟後，該醫生的執照被吊銷了。
Delichon is a genus of birds in the swallow family. 毛腳燕屬是燕科中的一個鳥屬。
The common house martin belongs to the genus Delichon. 普通毛腳燕屬於毛腳燕屬。

meaning: 美味的 (通常指西班牙風格)
sentences: The tapas we had were truly delicioso! 我們吃的西班牙小吃真的很美味！

This cake is absolutely delicious. 這個蛋糕絕對美味。
The aroma of delicious food filled the kitchen. 美味食物的香氣充滿了廚房。
We had a delicious lunch by the sea. 我們在海邊吃了一頓美味的午餐。
The apples were deliciously sweet. 這些蘋果甜得美味。
The room was deliciously cool. 房間裡涼爽宜人。

She savored the deliciousness of the chocolate. 她品嚐著巧克力的美味。
The company was sued for a civil delict. 該公司因民事侵權行為被起訴。
His actions constituted a serious delict. 他的行為構成了嚴重的違法行為。
The court considered the nature of the delictum. 法院考慮了該罪行的性質。

The surgeon examined the deligated artery. 外科醫生檢查了結紮的動脈。

The children's eyes managing to light up with delight at the gifts. 孩子們的眼睛看到禮物時竟然露出了喜悅之光（喜）。
I take great delight in spending my free time reading in the park. 我非常喜愛（喜）在公園讀書度過我的空閒時間。
To our great delight, the sun came out. 令我們大為高興的是，太陽出來了。
The new toy will delight the children. 新玩具會讓孩子們很高興。
The story was truly delightable for all ages. 這個故事對所有年齡段的人來說都非常討喜。
She has a delightable personality. 她有著討人喜歡的性格。
I'm delighted to meet you. 我很高興見到你。
They were delighted with the results. 他們對結果感到非常滿意。
She smiled delightedly when she saw the gift. 當她看到禮物時，欣喜地笑了。
He delightedly accepted the invitation. 他欣然接受了邀請。
Her delightedness was infectious. 她的欣喜感染了大家。
The child's delightedness was evident in his laughter. 孩子的喜悅在他笑聲中顯露無遺。
The surprise guest was a true delighter. 驚喜嘉賓真是一個讓人高興的人。
Small features can be delighters for customers. 小功能可以成為讓客戶感到驚喜的東西。
We had a delightful evening walking along the beach at sunset. 我們在日落時分沿著海灘散步，度過了一個非常愉快的夜晚。
The small mountain village manages to have a delightful atmosphere. 那個山間小村莊竟然擁有一種迷人的（愉快的）氣氛。
We had a delightful evening at the theater. 我們在劇院度過了一個愉快的夜晚。
The weather was absolutely delightful. 天氣真是宜人。
The house was delightfully decorated. 房子裝修得很迷人。
The music was delightfully relaxing. 音樂令人愉快地放鬆。
The delightfulness of the garden was breathtaking. 花園的迷人之美令人屏息。
She added to the delightfulness of the party. 她增添了聚會的愉快氣氛。
It was a delighting experience for everyone. 這對每個人來說都是一次令人欣喜的經歷。
The delighting news spread quickly. 令人高興的消息迅速傳開。
The plan worked out delightingly well. 計劃進展得非常順利。
She sang delightingly during the concert. 她在音樂會上唱得令人心曠神怡。
He spent a delightless day in the rain. 他在雨中度過了無趣的一天。
The task was repetitive and delightless. 這項任務既重複又無趣。
The cottage had a delightsome garden. 這座小屋有一個迷人的花園。
It was a delightsome sight to behold. 那是一個令人賞心悅目的景象。
The room was delightsomely cool. 房間裡涼爽宜人。
She was delightsomely surprised by the party. 她對這次聚會感到驚喜萬分。
The delightsomeness of the spring morning was unparalleled. 春天早晨的怡人是無與倫比的。
He appreciated the delightsomeness of the melody. 他欣賞這旋律的迷人之處。
The process helps to delignate the plant fibers. 該過程有助於脫去植物纖維的木質。
Scientists used chemicals to delignate the wood pulp. 科學家使用化學品對木漿進行脫木質處理。
Delignification is a crucial step in paper making. 脫木質作用是造紙的一個關鍵步驟。
The efficiency of delignification affects the quality of the pulp. 脫木質作用的效率會影響紙漿的質量。

meaning: 大利拉 (聖經人物)、誘惑男性的女人
sentences: In the Bible, Delilah betrayed Samson. 在聖經中，大利拉背叛了參孫。
She was described as a modern-day Delilah. 她被描繪成現代的大利拉。
It is necessary to delime the coffee maker regularly. 有必要定期為咖啡機除石灰。
The technician came to delime the water heater. 技師來為熱水器除垢。
The treaty seeks to delimit the border between the two countries. 該條約旨在劃定兩國之間的邊界。
We need to clearly delimit the scope of the project. 我們需要明確界定項目的範圍。
The investigators tried to delimitate the area of the crash. 調查人員試圖劃定墜機區域。
It is difficult to delimitate the exact responsibilities. 很難界定確切的職責。
The delimitation of maritime boundaries is often complex. 海洋邊界的劃定通常很複雜。
The document provides a clear delimitation of authority. 該文件對權限進行了明確的界定。

The factory uses a special machine to delint the cotton seeds. 工廠使用特殊機器除去棉籽上的短絨。

The deliquescence of the crystals was rapid in the laboratory. 實驗室中晶體的潮解速度很快。

Use a deliquescent material to absorb moisture from the air. 使用潮解性材料吸收空氣中的水分。
The patient suffered a sudden deliquium during the exam. 病人在檢查過程中突然神志昏迷。

meaning: 神志不清的；發狂的；興奮極了的

Delphinium flowers are popular in summer gardens. 翠雀花在夏季花園中很受歡迎。
Be careful as some Delphinium species are poisonous. 請小心，因為某些翠雀屬植物是有毒的。

meaning: 德爾薩特 (表演訓練體系)

meaning: 符號Δ；數量的變化，可能來自“d”（表示“差異”）。
sentences: ΔV - "delta vee"(change in velocity, used in rocketry and orbital mechanics) ΔV - “delta vee”（速度變化，用於火箭和軌道力學）

meaning: 三角洲；希臘字母第四個字母
sentences: The Nile Delta is very fertile. 尼羅河三角洲非常肥沃。

Deltiology is a fascinating hobby for many history buffs. 明信片收藏對許多歷史愛好者來說是個迷人的愛好。
He shared his deltiology collection with the class. 他向全班分享了他的明信片收藏。
The mineral crystallizes as a deltohedron. 該礦物以偏方三八面體形式結晶。

The deltoidal area was clearly marked. 三角形區域被清楚地標記出來。
Its deltoidal form made it easy to identify. 它的三角形狀使其易於辨認。
The ancient delubrum was decorated with mosaics. 古老的聖所裝飾著馬賽克。
Pilgrims visited the delubrum to seek blessings. 朝聖者參觀神殿以尋求祝福。
He is a deludable person who trusts everyone. 他是個容易受騙的人，信任每個人。
The scam targets deludable elderly people. 這項詐騙針對的是易受騙的老年人。
Don't delude yourself into thinking this will be easy. 不要自欺欺人地認為這會很容易。
They were deluded by his false promises. 他們被他的虛假諾言所欺騙。
The smooth-talking deluder stole their money. 那個花言巧語的騙子偷走了他們的錢。
Beware of the deluder who hides behind a smile. 提防隱藏在笑容背後的欺騙者。
He tried to deludher her with sweet words. 他試圖用甜言蜜語哄騙她。
She wouldn't let him deludher her into staying. 她不讓他哄騙她留下來。
