The deluding appearance of the mirage was confusing. 海市蜃樓那迷惑人的外表讓人困惑。
He spoke deludingly about his achievements. 他欺騙性地談論自己的成就。
The advertisement was deludingly worded. 廣告的措辭具有欺騙性。

meaning: 大量的某物；任何壓倒或造成巨大破壞的事物。
sentences: The rock concert was a deluge of sound. 搖滾音樂會的聲音如洪水般洶湧澎湃。
The term deluge refers to an overwhelming amount of something; anything that overwhelms or causes great destruction. 「洪水」一詞指的是某種東西的數量驚人。任何壓倒性的或造成巨大破壞的事物。
The city was hit by a sudden deluge of rain. 這座城市遭到了突如其來的暴雨襲擊。
The office was deluged with phone calls. 辦公室接到了大量的電話。
The special glass can deluminize the room. 這種特種玻璃可以使房間變暗。
They decided to deluminize the area for the event. 他們決定為了活動而讓該區域變暗。
The delundung is a rare mammal found in Southeast Asia. 條紋靈貓是東南亞的一種罕見哺乳動物。
Observers spotted a delundung in the tropical rainforest. 觀察員在熱帶雨林中發現了一隻條紋靈貓。

meaning: 被欺騙或誤導的狀態，或欺騙某人的過程。
sentences: It is far better to grasp the universe as it really is than to persist in delusion, however satisfying and reassuring. 掌握宇宙的本來面目比堅持妄想要好得多，無論這有多令人滿意和令人安心。
The term delusion refers to the state of being deluded or misled, or process of deluding somebody. 迷惑一詞是指被迷惑或誤導的狀態，或迷惑某人的過程。
He is under the delusion that he is a famous actor. 他幻想自己是一位著名的演員。
The patient suffered from delusions of grandeur. 病人患有誇大妄想症。

meaning: 患有妄想症；有錯誤或錯誤的信念。
sentences: You're delusional if you think that plan will work. 如果你認為這個計劃會奏效，那你就是妄想。
Something described as delusional is suffering from delusions; having false or faulty beliefs. 被描述為妄想的東西就是遭受妄想的折磨；有錯誤或錯誤的信念。
The man's delusional behavior worried his family. 那個男人的妄想行為讓他的家人感到擔心。
Delusional thinking is a symptom of certain mental illnesses. 妄想性思維是某些精神疾病的症狀。
The delusionist refused to accept the reality of the situation. 妄想者拒絕接受現狀的真實性。
Critics called him a delusionist for his unrealistic plans. 批評者因他那不切實際的計劃而稱他為妄想者。
Success in the stock market can be delusive. 股票市場的成功可能是迷惑人的。
The delusive calm before the storm was eerie. 風暴前那種迷惑人的平靜令人感到怪異。
The company acted delusively toward its investors. 公司對其投資者採取了迷惑性的行動。
The data was delusively presented. 數據的呈現具有迷惑性。
The delusiveness of appearances can lead to mistakes. 表象的迷惑性可能導致錯誤。
They discussed the delusiveness of the advertisement. 他們討論了該廣告的迷惑性。
He had delusory ideas about his own importance. 他對自己的重要性有虛幻的想法。
The offer turned out to be delusory. 這個提議結果證明是欺騙性的。
The manufacturer used chemicals to deluster the synthetic fabric. 製造商使用化學品來消除合成纖維的光澤。
You can deluster the surface by sanding it lightly. 你可以通過輕微打磨來除去表面光澤。
They stayed in a deluxe suite at the luxury hotel. 他們住在那家豪華飯店的豪華套房裡。
The company released a deluxe version of its latest software. 公司發佈了其最新軟體的豪華版。
We stayed in a deluxe suite at the hotel. 我們住在酒店的一間豪華套房裡。
The deluxe edition of the book includes extra photos. 這本書的豪華版包括額外的照片。
To delve means to dig into the ground, especially with a shovel. 鑽探意味著挖掘地面，尤其是用鏟子。
People may delve in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下進行研究。
The researcher spent years delving into ancient history. 研究人員花費數年鑽研古代歷史。
We need to delve deeper into the cause of the problem. 我們需要深入鑽研問題的原因。
As a delver into truth, she questioned everything. 作為一名真理的鑽研者，她質疑一切。
The delver found a treasure in the old cave. 挖掘者在舊洞穴中發現了寶藏。
The alloy is demagnetizable under high heat. 這種合金在高熱下是可去磁的。
Check if the material is demagnetizable before the experiment. 實驗前檢查該材料是否可去磁。
Demagnetization of the tool is necessary after use. 工具使用後需要去磁。
The process of demagnetization was explained in the manual. 手冊中解釋了去磁的過程。
You should demagnetize your screwdriver before working on sensitive parts. 在處理敏感零件之前，你應該先給螺絲起子去磁。
The technician tried to demagnetize the television screen. 技術人員試圖給電視螢幕退磁。
The demagnetizer is used to remove residual magnetism. 消磁器用於除去殘留磁性。
He bought a demagnetizer for his tools. 他為他的工具買了一個消磁器。

meaning: 煽動者；民眾煽動家 (同 demagogue)
sentences: The demagog stirred up the crowd with his fiery speech. 這位煽動者用激烈的演講煽動人群。
He was accused of being a power-hungry demagog. 他被指控是一個渴望權力的煽動者。
The politician's demagogic tactics were criticized by the media. 這位政治家的煽動戰術受到了媒體的批評。
He used demagogic arguments to gain support. 他使用煽動性的論點來獲得支持。
His demagogical style appealed to the frustrated voters. 他的煽動風格吸引了沮喪的選民。
The demagogical nature of the campaign was evident. 競選活動的煽動性顯而易見。
The speaker spoke demagogically about social issues. 演講者煽動地談論社會問題。
He demagogically promised things he couldn't deliver. 他煽動性地承諾了他無法兌現的事情。
Demagogism can be a threat to a stable democracy. 煽動主義可能對穩定的民主制度構成威脅。
The historian studied the rise of demagogism in the region. 歷史學家研究了該地區煽動主義的興起。
The candidate was labeled a demagogue by his opponents. 這位候選人被他的對手貼上了煽動者的標籤。
A skilled demagogue can easily influence public opinion. 一個老練的煽動者可以輕易影響公眾輿論。
The editorial warned against the dangers of demagoguery. 社論警告要警惕煽動行為的危險。
His speech was filled with empty demagoguery. 他的演講充滿了空洞的煽動言論。
The rise of populism is often linked to demagogy. 民粹主義的興起通常與煽動政治有關。
Demagogy relies on emotional appeals rather than logic. 煽動政治依賴情感訴求而非邏輯。
The scientist prepared a demal solution for the test. 科學家為測試準備了一種分克分子濃度的溶液。
The properties of demal concentrations were analyzed. 分析了分克分子濃度的性質。
There is a growing demand for high-quality organic food nowadays. 現今對高品質有機食物的需求正日益增長。
The workers decided to demand a higher minimum hourly wage today. 工人們今天決定要求提高最低時薪。
Workers demand better pay and working conditions. 工人們要求更好的工資和工作條件。
The demand for electric cars is increasing rapidly. 對電動車的需求正在迅速增加。
The debt is now demandable by the creditor. 債權人現在可以索取這筆債務了。
The report is demandable under the new law. 根據新法律，可以要求提供該報告。
The demandant filed a lawsuit against the company. 原告向法院對該公司提起訴訟。
The judge listened to the arguments of the demandant. 法官聽取了原告的辯論。
He is a tough demander during negotiations. 他在談判中是一個強硬的要求者。
The demander waited for a response to his request. 要求者等待著對他請求的回覆。

meaning: 需要很大的耐力、力量或耐心。
sentences: This bike is built to withstand even the most demanding terrain. 這款自行車能夠承受最嚴苛的地形。
The report describes the result as demanding. 報告稱這項結果要求很高。

meaning: 苛求的；要求高的；吃力的
sentences: Nursing is a very physically demanding job. 護理工作是一項體力消耗很大的工作。
The teacher is demanding but fair to all students. 這位老師要求很嚴，但對所有學生都很公平。
He spoke demandingly to the staff. 他對員工說話很苛求。
She worked demandingly to finish the project. 她非常努力（對自己要求很高）地完成了專案。
The water treatment plant started the demanganization process. 水處理廠開始了除錳過程。
Demanganization is necessary to improve the taste of the water. 除錳對於改善水的味道是必要的。
The technician explained how to demanganize the pipes. 技術人員解釋了如何除去管道中的錳。
The factory needed a new system to demanganize the waste. 工廠需要一個新系統來除去廢料中的錳。
Demantoid is a green variety of andradite garnet. 翠榴石是鈣鐵榴石的一種綠色變種。
She wore a beautiful necklace featuring a demantoid. 她戴著一條鑲有漂亮翠榴石的項鍊。
The border was clearly demarcated by a high fence. 邊界由高高的圍欄清楚地標示出來。
We need to demarcate our roles in the project. 我們需要區分我們在專案中的角色。
The line of demarcation between the two countries is disputed. 兩國之間的劃界線存在爭議。
A clear demarcation of responsibilities is essential. 職責的明確劃分是必不可少的。
The demarcator marked the boundaries of the farm. 劃界員標示了農場的邊界。
He used a digital demarcator for accuracy. 他使用數位劃界器以求精確。
The demarch attended the local community meeting. 區長出席了當地的社區會議。
The citizens elected a new demarch last year. 市民們去年選出了一位新市長。
Demarchy is a system where representatives are chosen by lot. 抽籤政治是一種通過抽籤選擇代表的制度。
They discussed the benefits of demarchy in local governance. 他們討論了抽籤政治在地方治理中的好處。
The process was designed to demargarinate the mixture. 該過程旨在除去混合物中的人造奶油成分。
They needed to demargarinate the fats for the recipe. 他們需要為食譜除去脂肪中的人造奶油成分。
They used white paint to demark the parking spaces. 他們用白漆標出停車位。
It is hard to demark where one forest ends and the next begins. 很難標出一個森林在哪裡結束而下一個從哪裡開始。
The demarkation of the property was completed yesterday. 該物業的劃界工作昨天完成了。
The map shows the current demarkation of the states. 地圖顯示了目前各州的劃界。
The storm threatened to demast the sailing ship. 風暴威脅著要折斷帆船的桅杆。
They decided to demast the vessel for repairs. 他們決定拆除船隻的桅杆進行維修。

meaning: 非物質化；失去物質形式
sentences: Digital transformation leads to the dematerialization of documents. 數位轉型導致了文件的非物質化。
The ghost's dematerialization happened quickly. 幽靈的非物質化發生得很迅速。

meaning: 使非物質化；失去物質形式
sentences: In the sci-fi movie, the alien began to dematerialize. 在科幻電影中，外星人開始失去物質形式。
New technology aims to dematerialize physical storage. 新技術旨在使物理存儲非物質化。
Dematiaceae is a family of dark-colored fungi. 暗色真菌科是一個深色真菌家族。
He identified several species of Dematiaceae in the soil sample. 他在土壤樣本中鑑定出了幾種暗色真菌科植物。
Dematiaceous molds are often found in damp buildings. 暗色黴菌通常存在於潮濕的建築物中。
The patient had a dematiaceous fungal infection. 病人患有暗色真菌感染。

meaning: 地方行政區 (古希臘)；生態型
sentences: The ancient deme was a basic unit of Athenian society. 古代的行政區是雅典社會的基本單位。
In biology, a deme is a local population of organisms. 在生物學中，生態型是生物的局部種群。
You shouldn't demean yourself by responding to their insults. 你不應該通過回應他們的侮辱來貶低自己。
The coach would never demean his players in public. 教練絕不會在公開場合貶低他的球員。

meaning: 一個人所特有的社交、非語言行為（例如肢體語言和臉部表情）。
sentences: The man's demeanor made others suspicious of his intentions. 男人的舉止讓其他人都懷疑他的意圖。
A confident demeanor is crucial for persuading others. 自信的舉止對於說服他人至關重要。
He maintained a calm demeanor even under pressure. 即使在壓力下，他仍保持冷靜的舉止。
Her friendly demeanor made everyone feel welcome. 她友善的態度讓每個人都感到受歡迎。

meaning: 群眾演說的；煽動演說的
sentences: He delivered a demegoric speech at the rally. 他在集會上發表了煽動性的演講。
The politician's demegoric style was very effective. 這位政治家的群眾演說風格非常有效。
The witness described a state of absolute demency. 證人描述了一種絕對狂亂的狀態。
He acted with demency during the crisis. 他在危機期間表現得瘋狂。
The noise was enough to dement anyone. 這噪音足以讓任何人發狂。
The hospital cared for several dements. 醫院照顧了幾名瘋狂的人。
The fever seemed to dementate the patient. 高燒似乎使病人失去了理智。
He was in a dementate state of mind. 他處於一種發狂的心境中。
The sudden dementation of the leader shocked the nation. 領導人突然的發狂震驚了全國。
The stress led to temporary dementation. 壓力導致了暫時的發狂。
He was demented with worry after his son disappeared. 兒子失蹤後，他擔心得發狂。
The movie features a demented scientist. 電影中有一位瘋狂的科學家。
She laughed dementedly as she ran away. 她逃跑時瘋狂地大笑。
He worked dementedly to finish the task. 他瘋狂地工作以完成任務。
There was a sense of dementedness in his eyes. 他的眼神中有一種瘋狂的感覺。
The dementedness of the plan was obvious to everyone. 計劃的瘋狂對每個人來說都很明顯。
The oil was processed to dementholize it. 對該油脂進行了去薄荷醇加工。
They needed to dementholize the product for export. 他們需要為出口產品除去薄荷醇。
My grandmother is suffering from early-stage dementia. 我祖母患有早期失智症。
Dementia can affect memory, thinking, and social abilities. 失智症會影響記憶、思維和社交能力。
The goal was to demephitize the air in the tunnel. 目標是淨化隧道中惡臭的空氣。
They used chemicals to demephitize the waste area. 他們使用化學品來除去廢棄區域的惡臭。
The student received a demerit for being late to class. 這位學生因為上課遲到而被記了一個過失。
We should consider both the merits and demerits of the proposal. 我們應該同時考慮這項提議的優缺點。
The judge described his actions as demeritorious and unworthy of praise. 法官形容他的行為是有過失的，不值得稱讚。
She was criticized for her demeritorious performance during the project. 她因在專案期間表現不佳而受到批評。

meaning: 無功績地，不值得稱讚地
sentences: He behaved demeritoriously throughout the entire operation. 他在整個行動過程中表現得很差勁。
The task was demeritoriously executed, leading to failure. 這項任務執行得很糟糕，導致了失敗。
The doctor prescribed Demerol to manage the patient's severe pain. 醫生開了杜冷丁來控制病人的劇烈疼痛。
Demerol is a powerful narcotic analgesic used in hospitals. 杜冷丁是醫院使用的一種強效麻醉止痛劑。

meaning: 底棲的，生活在水底附近的
sentences: Cod and haddock are examples of demersal fish. 鱈魚和黑線鱈是底棲魚類的例子。
Demersal organisms live on or near the bottom of the sea. 底棲生物生活在海底或其附近。
The demersed plants provide a habitat for small aquatic creatures. 水下植物為小型水生生物提供了棲息地。
The demersed parts of the structure were covered in algae. 建築物淹沒在水下的部分長滿了海藻。
The demersion of the ship took only a few minutes. 船隻沉沒僅花了幾分鐘時間。
A complete demersion in the water is required for this ritual. 進行這項儀式需要完全浸入水中。
The demesman was responsible for the management of the estate. 采地領主負責管理這處莊園。
In medieval times, the demesman held power over his tenants. 在中世紀，領地領主對其租戶擁有權力。
The hypnotist took a moment to demesmerize the subject. 催眠師花了一點時間解除受試者的催眠狀態。
It is important to demesmerize a person slowly and safely. 以緩慢且安全的方式解除一個人的催眠狀態是很重要的。
The king's private demesne was off-limits to commoners. 國王的私人領地禁止平民進入。
The expansive demesne included forests and hunting grounds. 廣闊的莊園包括森林和狩獵場。
The demesnial rights were passed down through generations. 領地權利代代相傳。
They studied the demesnial system of the 14th century. 他們研究了十四世紀的莊園制度。
The process helps to demetallize the wastewater before release. 該過程有助於在廢水排放前進行去金屬化。
New technologies can demetallize heavy oils more efficiently. 新技術可以更有效地對重油進行去金屬化處理。
Enzymes work to demethylate specific regions of the DNA. 酶的作用是使 DNA 的特定區域去甲基化。
The chemist attempted to demethylate the compound in the lab. 化學家嘗試在實驗室中使該化合物去甲基化。
DNA demethylation is a key process in gene regulation. DNA 去甲基化是基因調節中的一個關鍵過程。
The rate of demethylation can affect plant growth. 去甲基化的速率會影響植物生長。
The festival featured Demetrian rites to ensure a good harvest. 節慶中包含狄蜜特祭儀以確保豐收。
The temple was adorned with Demetrian symbols of wheat and corn. 廟宇裝飾著小麥和玉米等狄蜜特的象徵。
The country decided to demetricize some of its measurements. 該國決定將其部分計量單位去公制化。
It is difficult to demetricize a system once it has been established. 一個制度建立後，要將其去公制化是很困難的。

meaning: 一瓶酒含0.375公升液體，是標準瓶體積的一半；分裂。
sentences: The term demi refers to a bottle of wine containing 0.375 liters of fluid, half the volume of a standard bottle; a split. 「demi」一詞是指一瓶含有 0.375 公升液體的葡萄酒，是標準瓶體積的一半；分裂。
The lesson introduced demi as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 demi 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
She wore a demi-mask to the masquerade ball. 她戴著半臉面具參加化裝舞會。
The word 'demigod' means a being that is half human and half god. 'demigod' 這個詞的意思是半人半神的生物。
The animal has reached a demiadult stage of growth. 這隻動物已經達到了半成年的生長階段。
Demiadult individuals often display mixed behaviors. 半成年的個體通常表現出混合的行為。
In the story, the demiangel acted as a protector of the village. 故事中，這位半天使扮演了村莊守護者的角色。
She was described as a demiangel because of her extreme kindness. 她因其極端的善良而被描述為半天使。
The demiassignation of funds caused confusion among the staff. 資金的部分分配在員工中引起了混亂。
The contract detailed the demiassignation of tasks. 合約詳細說明了任務的部分分配。
His beliefs could be categorized as a form of demiatheism. 他的信仰可以被歸類為一種半無神論。
Demiatheism explores the middle ground between faith and doubt. 半無神論探索了信仰與懷疑之間的灰色地帶。
As a demiatheist, he questioned traditional religious dogmas. 作為一名半無神論者，他質疑傳統的宗教教條。
The speaker identified as a demiatheist during the debate. 演講者在辯論中稱自己為半無神論者。
The worker carried a demibarrel of water to the site. 工人提著半桶水到工地。
A demibarrel is half the size of a standard barrel. 半桶是標準桶容量的一半。
The fort was defended by a strong demibastion on its north side. 這座要塞的北側由一座堅固的半稜堡防禦。
Architects included a demibastion in the new defensive design. 建築師在新的防禦設計中加入了一個半稜堡。
The demibastioned wall provided extra protection for the city. 這堵有半稜堡的牆為城市提供了額外的保護。
The castle features several demibastioned corners. 這座城堡有幾個設有半稜堡的角落。
A demibath can be very relaxing after a long day of work. 工作一整天後，泡個半身浴可以非常放鬆。
The doctor suggested a demibath to help lower the fever. 醫生建議洗半身浴來幫助退燒。
The mythical demibeast roamed the dark forest at night. 神話中的半獸夜晚在黑暗的森林裡遊蕩。
In many legends, a demibeast possesses both human and animal traits. 在許多傳說中，半獸同時具有人類和動物的特徵。
She wore a decorative demibelt over her long tunic. 她在長袍外面繫了一條裝飾性的半腰帶。
The demibelt was made of fine leather and silver. 這條半腰帶是由精良的皮革和銀製成的。
She decided to get a demibob for the summer. 她決定在夏天剪個短波波頭。
The stylist recommended a demibob to highlight her features. 設計師推薦剪短波波頭來凸顯她的五官。
The army used a demibombard to breach the castle walls. 軍隊使用半臼砲打破了城堡牆壁。
Historians found an ancient demibombard near the ruins. 歷史學家在遺跡附近發現了一門古代半臼砲。
The knight's demibrassart was dented during the battle. 騎士的半護臂在戰鬥中被打凹了。
A demibrassart protects the upper or lower part of the arm. 半護臂保護手臂的上部或下部。
The demibrigade was sent to the front lines as reinforcements. 半旅被派往前線作為增援部隊。
A demibrigade is a military unit smaller than a full brigade. 半旅是比完整旅小的軍事單位。
The villain was described as a demibrute without any empathy. 這個惡棍被形容為一個沒有同情心的半野獸。
His demibrute behavior shocked everyone at the party. 他那如野獸般的粗魯行為震驚了派對上的每個人。
They used demibuckram to stiffen the collars of the shirts. 他們使用半粗麻布來加固襯衫的衣領。
Demibuckram is a type of coarse cloth used in tailoring. 半粗麻布是用於裁縫的一種粗布。
The piece of music ended on a demicadence, leaving it unresolved. 這首曲子以半終止結束，給人一種未完成感。
Composers often use a demicadence to create a sense of tension. 作曲家經常使用半終止來營造緊張感。
The demicannon was a popular siege weapon in the 17th century. 半大砲是 17 世紀流行的攻城武器。
Museum visitors can see an authentic demicannon on display. 博物館參展者可以看到展出的真實半大砲。
The scholars debated the interpretation of the demicanon. 學者們爭論著對這項半教規的解讀。
A demicanon is a partial or secondary religious rule. 半教規是部分或次要的宗教規則。
Switzerland has several demicantons with limited autonomy. 瑞士有幾個擁有有限自治權的半州（半行政區）。
The demicanton held its own local elections last month. 該半行政區上個月舉行了當地的選舉。
The military engineer designed a demicaponier for the fortress. 軍事工程師為要塞設計了一個半防禦工事。
A demicaponier provides covering fire for the ditch. 半防禦工事為壕溝提供掩護火力。
The knight's horse wore a polished demichamfron for the parade. 騎士的馬在閱兵式上戴著拋光的半護頭甲。
A demichamfron protects the upper part of a horse's head. 半護頭甲保護馬頭部的上部。
The children sat in a demicircle around the teacher. 孩子們圍著老師坐成一個半圓形。
The architect designed the garden in the shape of a demicircle. 建築師將花園設計成半圓形。
The room featured a demicircular window that overlooked the sea. 房間有一個可以俯瞰大海的半圓形窗戶。
A demicircular arch was built over the main entrance. 正門上方建了一個半圓形的拱門。
The explorers encountered a demicivilized tribe in the mountains. 探險家在山中遇到了一個半文明的部落。
It is a demicivilized society that still practices ancient customs. 儘管還保留著古代習俗，但這是一個半文明的社會。
The facade of the building was decorated with elegant demicolumns. 建築物的正面裝飾著優雅的半柱。
A demicolumn is a column that is partially embedded in a wall. 半柱是部分嵌入牆內的柱子。
She wore a demicoronal headpiece for the wedding ceremony. 她在婚禮上戴了一個半王冠式的頭飾。
The statue was adorned with a demicoronal band of gold. 雕像裝飾著一條半王冠狀的金帶。
He offered a demicritic review of the new movie. 他對這部新電影給出了半帶批評的評論。
Her demicritic comments were helpful for improving the draft. 她那帶點批評的意見對改進草稿很有幫助。
The soldier's demicuirass was made of thick iron plates. 士兵的半護胸甲是由厚鐵板製成的。
A demicuirass covers only the front part of the torso. 半護胸甲只覆蓋軀幹的前部。
The ship was equipped with several demiculverins for defense. 船上配備了幾門半蛇砲用於防禦。
The demiculverin was a long-range artillery piece. 半蛇砲是一種遠程火砲。
The container was shaped like a demicylinder to save space. 容器被設計成半圓柱形以節省空間。
They cut the pipe in half to create a demicylinder. 他們將管子切成兩半以製成半圓柱。
The roof has a demicylindrical shape that helps with drainage. 屋頂呈半圓柱形，有助於排水。
Scientists used a demicylindrical lens for the experiment. 科學家在實驗中使用了一個半圓柱透鏡。

meaning: 半小錢（指矮小或微不足道的人）
sentences: He was dismissively called a demidandiprat by his rivals. 他被對手不屑地稱為矮小卑微之徒。
The word demidandiprat is an archaic term for a small person. demidandiprat 是一個形容身材矮小的人的古詞。
The ancient people tended to demideify their heroic leaders. 古代人傾向於將他們的英雄領袖半神化。
It is common for legends to demideify historical figures. 傳說中將歷史人物半神化是很常見的。
Hercules is a famous demideity from Greek mythology. 海格力斯是希臘神話中著名的半神。
The demideity possessed powers far beyond those of mortals. 這位半神擁有遠超凡人的力量。
The antagonist in the story was a cunning demidevil. 故事中的反派是一個狡猾的半魔鬼。
He was feared as a demidevil because of his cruel actions. 由於他的殘忍行為，他被視為半個魔鬼而受人畏懼。
The bird fed its young with demidigested food. 鳥用半消化的食物餵養幼鳥。
The sample contained demidigested remains of plants. 樣本中含有半消化的植物殘骸。
They stopped at the demidistance between the two cities. 他們在兩座城市之間一半距離的地方停了下來。
The demidistance was marked with a small wooden sign. 半距離處標有一個小木牌。
A demiditone is an interval often found in early music. 半二全音是早期音樂中常見的音程。
The student studied the mathematical ratio of a demiditone. 學生研究了半二全音的數學比率。

meaning: 半個醫生（指自學或非正式的醫者）
sentences: The villagers relied on the demidoctor for basic herbal remedies. 村民們依靠這位半吊子醫生提供的基本草藥療法。
He was known as a demidoctor because of his extensive medical knowledge. 儘管不是正式醫生，他因豐富的醫學知識而被稱為半個醫生。

meaning: 半犬（神話生物或混血種）
sentences: The demidog guarded the entrance to the mystical cave. 半犬守衛著神祕洞穴的入口。
Legends tell of a demidog that could speak like a human. 傳說中有一隻會像人類一樣說話的半犬。
The archaeologists discovered a demidolmen in the valley. 考古學家在山谷中發現了一座半支石墓。
A demidolmen is a prehistoric structure made of large stones. 半支石墓是由大石頭組成的史前建築。
The apse of the cathedral was covered by a beautiful demidome. 大教堂的後殿上方覆蓋著一個美麗的半圓頂。
The demidome was decorated with intricate mosaics. 半圓頂裝飾著複雜的馬賽克。
The family crest featured a golden demieagle. 家族紋章上有一隻金色的半鷹。
A demieagle is a common symbol in European heraldry. 半鷹是歐洲紋章學中常見的象徵。
The collector bought a rare demifarthing at the auction. 收藏家在拍賣會上買到了一枚稀有的半法尋硬幣。
A demifarthing was a very small unit of currency in the past. 半法尋在過去是一個非常小的貨幣單位。
The artist painted a demifigure of the famous poet. 藝術家畫了一幅這位著名詩人的半身像。
The museum displays several marble demifigures from the Roman era. 博物館展出了幾座羅馬時期的特製大理石半身像。
The dress was adorned with delicate demiflouncing. 這件連衣裙裝飾著精緻的半褶邊。
Demiflouncing adds a touch of elegance to any skirt. 半褶邊能為任何裙子增添一份優雅。
The experiment resulted in a demifusion of the two elements. 實驗導致了這兩種元素的半融合。
Demifusion is a process where substances are only partially joined. 半融合是物質僅部分結合的過程。
The armorer carefully crafted a new demigardebras for the knight. 盔甲匠為騎士精心製作了一個新的半護臂。
A demigardebras was essential for protecting the arm in combat. 半護臂在戰鬥中對於保護手臂至關重要。
She wore a demigauntlet made of soft lace. 她戴著一副由柔軟蕾絲製成的半手套。
A demigauntlet covers the hand but only part of the wrist. 半手套覆蓋手部，但僅覆蓋部分手腕。

meaning: 半紳士（指舉止尚可但非出身名門或暴發戶）
sentences: He was often mocked as a demigentleman by the local aristocracy. 他經常被當地的貴族嘲笑為冒充紳士的人。
The character in the novel is a demigentleman trying to fit in. 小說中的人物是一個努力融入上流社會的偽紳士。
The lamp was designed in the shape of a demiglobe. 燈被設計成半球形。
They mapped the southern demiglobe in great detail. 他們詳細地繪製了南半球的地圖。
Diana was sometimes portrayed as a demigoddess in local myths. 在當地神話中，黛安娜有時被描繪成一位半女神。
The demigoddess used her powers to protect the innocent. 半女神運用她的力量來保護無辜者。
She embraced her demigoddessship with pride and responsibility. 她帶著自豪和責任感接受了她的半女神身份。
The transition to demigoddessship was a difficult journey. 轉變為半女神身份是一段艱難的旅程。
The engineer measured the demigorge of the bastion. 工程師測量了稜堡的半峽。
The demigorge is a technical term used in military fortification. 半峽是軍事防禦工事中使用的技術術語。
The shield was decorated with an image of a demigriffin. 盾牌上裝飾著半獅鷲的圖案。
A demigriffin is a mythical creature with parts of a lion and an eagle. 半獅鷲是一種具有獅子和老鷹特徵的神話生物。
The ancient demigroat was found buried in the garden. 在花園裡發現了埋在地下的古代半格羅特硬幣。
A demigroat was worth two pence in medieval England. 在中世紀的英格蘭，一枚半格羅特價值兩便士。
The demihag was a primitive type of firearm. 半老太婆短槍是一種原始類型的火器。
They used a demihag for hunting small game in the woods. 他們在森林裡用短槍獵取小型獵物。
The funeral procession included a traditional demihearse. 葬禮隊伍中有一輛傳統的半靈車。
A demihearse is a smaller vehicle used to transport a coffin. 半靈車是用於運輸棺材的小型車輛。
The view from the mountain top was truly demiheavenly. 從山頂看到的景色簡直如半個天堂般迷人。
They experienced a demiheavenly moment of peace and quiet. 他們體驗到了如天堂般的寧靜時刻。
The wall was demihigh, making it easy to see over. 這堵牆只有半高，很容易看過去。
She wore demihigh heels that were comfortable for walking. 她穿著走起路來很舒適的半高跟鞋。
The merchant sold a demihogshead of wine to the tavern. 商人向酒館出售了半大桶葡萄酒。
A demihogshead holds about 30 gallons of liquid. 一個半大桶大約可裝 30 加侖液體。
The statue of the demihorse stood at the fountain's center. 半馬雕像矗立在噴泉中央。
Legends describe a demihorse as a swift and powerful creature. 傳說將半馬描述為一種迅捷而強大的生物。
The demihuman characters in the game have unique abilities. 遊戲中的半人類角色擁有獨特的能力。
Fantasy novels often feature demihuman races like elves and dwarves. 奇幻小說中經常出現像精靈和矮人這樣的半人類種族。
The warrior strapped on his demijambe before the fight. 戰士在戰鬥前繫上了他的半護腿。
A demijambe provides protection for the lower leg. 半護腿為小腿提供保護。
They kept the homemade cider in a large demijohn. 他們把自製的蘋果酒裝在一個大玻璃瓶裡。
The demijohn was covered in wicker to prevent breaking. 這瓶大酒瓶外面包著柳條以防摔碎。
The lawyer analyzed the rights of the demikindred. 律師分析了半親屬的權利。
Demikindred refers to relatives related through only one parent. 半親屬指的是僅通過父母一方而有血緣關係的親戚。

meaning: 半個國王（指權力受限或非正式的國王）
sentences: The regent was treated as a demiking until the prince came of age. 在王子成年之前，攝政王被視為半個國王。
History books describe him as a demiking who never wore a crown. 歷史書將他描述為一個從未戴過王冠的「半國王」。
The cavalryman carried a demilance for close-quarters combat. 騎兵帶著短矛用於近戰。
A demilance is shorter than a standard military lance. 短矛比標準軍用長矛短。
The demilancer charged across the field at full speed. 短矛騎兵全速衝過田野。
Demilancers were a light type of cavalry used in the past. 短矛騎兵是過去使用的一種輕型騎兵。

meaning: 半個律師（指略懂法律但非正式律師的人）
sentences: He acted as a demilawyer for his neighbors during disputes. 在鄰里糾紛中，他充當鄰居們的業餘律師。
Don't trust the advice of a demilawyer for serious legal matters. 對於嚴重的法律事務，不要信任業餘律師的建議。
The pianist played the passage with a gentle demilegato. 鋼琴家以柔和的半連奏演奏了這一段。
Demilegato is a style of playing that is between legato and staccato. 半連奏是一種介於連音和斷音之間的演奏風格。
A demilion rampant was emblazoned on the knight's shield. 騎士的盾牌上飾有一隻直立的半獅。
The crest of the family featured a fierce-looking demilion. 該家族的紋章特徵是一隻看起來很兇猛的半獅。
The treaty called for the complete demilitarization of the border. 條約要求邊界完全非軍事化。
Demilitarization is a crucial step towards long-term peace. 非軍事化是邁向長期和平的關鍵一步。
The government decided to demilitarize the newly captured zone. 政府決定使新佔領的區域非軍事化。
Efforts were made to demilitarize the region after the conflict. 衝突結束後，人們努力使該地區非軍事化。
The program aims to help demiliterate adults improve their skills. 該計劃旨在幫助半識字的成年人提高技能。
A demiliterate person can read simple words but struggles with complex texts. 半識字的人可以閱讀簡單的單詞，但難以閱讀複雜的文本。
The fortress was protected by a demilune in front of the gate. 要塞的大門前有一個半月形工事保護。
A demilune is a common feature in 18th-century fortifications. 半月形工事是 18 世紀防禦工事的常見特徵。
The fabric has a soft demiluster that looks very elegant. 這款面料具有柔和的半光澤，看起來非常優雅。
They chose a paint with a demiluster finish for the walls. 他們為牆壁選擇了一種具有半光澤效果的油漆。
The silk thread had a beautiful demilustre. 這根絲線有一種美麗的半光澤。
She preferred the demilustre of natural wool over synthetic fibers. 她更喜歡天然羊毛的半光澤，而不是合成纖維。
The centaur is a classic example of a mythical demiman. 半人馬是神話中經典的半人例子。
The poem explores the duality of the demiman's nature. 這首詩探索了半人本性的雙重性。
He found an old demimark while cleaning out the attic. 他在清理閣樓時發現了一枚舊的半馬克硬幣。
The demimark was a common coin in medieval Germany. 半馬克是中世紀德國常見的硬幣。
The armor included a demimentoniere to protect the chin. 盔甲包括一個用於保護下巴的半護顎甲。
A demimentoniere was often used by knights in the 15th century. 15 世紀的騎士經常使用半護顎甲。
The architect placed a demimetope at the corner of the frieze. 建築師在飾帶的角落放置了一個半隴間壁。
A demimetope is a half-metope used in classical architecture. 半隴間壁是古典建築中使用的一半隴間壁。

meaning: 半百萬富翁（指財產約五十萬的人）
sentences: He considered himself a demimillionaire after selling his business. 出售公司後，他認為自己成了半個百萬富翁。
The magazine listed the town's most successful demimillionaires. 該雜誌列出了該鎮最成功的半百萬富翁。

meaning: 交際花（半上流社會的女性）
sentences: She lived a glamorous life as a famous demimondaine in Paris. 她在巴黎作為一名著名的交際花過著迷人的生活。
The novel describes the rise and fall of a young demimondaine. 這部小說描述了一位年輕交際花的興衰。
He spent his nights exploring the demimonde of the city. 他整晚都在探索這座城市的半上流社會圈子。
The demimonde was known for its luxury and scandals. 這個半上流社會以其奢侈和醜聞而聞名。

meaning: 半僧侶（指非正式受戒或生活方式類似僧侶的人）
sentences: He lived as a demimonk in a small cottage in the woods. 他像個半僧侶一樣住在森林裡的小屋中。
The community was founded by a group of demimonks. 這個社區是由一群半僧侶建立的。

meaning: 半月刊（或每半月一次的）
sentences: The club publishes a demimonthly newsletter for its members. 該俱樂部為其會員出版半月刊通訊。
The staff meetings are held demimonthly on Mondays. 員工會議每半月一次在週一舉行。
His deminatured behavior was a result of his environment. 他那失去部分本性的行為是他環境造成的結果。
The deminatured substances were no longer suitable for the original purpose. 變質的物質不再適用於最初的目的。
Demineralization of teeth can lead to cavities. 牙齒的脫礦物質會導致蛀牙。
The factory uses a demineralization system for its water supply. 工廠為其供水系統使用脫礦物質（脫鹽）系統。
Acidic foods can demineralize the enamel of your teeth. 酸性食物會使你牙齒的琺瑯質脫礦物質。
They needed to demineralize the water before using it in the boiler. 他們在將水用於鍋爐之前需要對其進行脫礦物質處理。
The dancers wore deminude costumes for the performance. 舞者穿著半裸的服裝進行表演。
The deminude figures in the painting were skillfully rendered. 畫中半裸的人物描繪得很巧妙。
The play was criticized for its unnecessary deinudity. 這部劇因其不必要的半裸戲份而受到批評。
She felt comfortable with the level of deinudity required for the role. 她對這個角色所需的半裸程度感到自在。
The bay window has a demioctagonal design. 飄窗採用了半八角形的設計。
They built a demioctagonal porch at the back of the house. 他們在屋後建了一個半八角形的門廊。
The table has a unique demioctangular shape. 這張桌子有一個獨特的半八角形狀。
Demioctangular patterns were used to decorate the ceiling. 半八角形的圖案被用來裝飾天花板。
The news was released through a demiofficial channel. 這則新聞是透過半官方管道發布的。
He received a demiofficial letter from the embassy. 他收到了一封來自大使館的半官方信函。
The satellite completed its demiorbit around the planet. 衛星完成了繞行星的半圈軌道。
Calculating a demiorbit requires precise mathematical models. 計算半軌道需要精確的數學模型。
The ancient philosophers discussed the role of demiourgoi. 古代哲學家討論了造物主的角色。
Demiourgoi is the plural form of demiurge, referring to creators. Demiourgoi 是 demiurge 的複數形式，指代造物主。
A demiowl was pictured on the family's crest. 家族紋章上印有一隻半貓頭鷹。
The demiowl is a symbol of wisdom in some traditions. 在某些傳統中，半貓頭鷹是智慧的象徵。

In heraldry, a demiox represents strength and labor. 在紋章學中，半牛代表力量和勞動。

meaning: 半異教徒的（或半異教徒）
sentences: The festival had many demipagan traditions mixed with modern rites. 這個節慶有許多混合了現代儀式的半異教傳統。
He was accused of being a demipagan by the local church. 他被當地的教會指控為半個異教徒。
The army dug a demiparallel to protect the siege guns. 軍隊挖了一個半平行壕以保護攻城炮。
A demiparallel is a short trench used in offensive military operations. 半平行壕是進攻性軍事行動中使用的一種短戰壕。
The armor included a steel demipauldron on each side. 盔甲的每一側都包含一個鋼製半護肩。
A demipauldron protects only the front or back of the shoulder. 半護肩只保護肩膀的前部或後部。

The horse performed a perfect demipesade for the audience. 這匹馬為觀眾表演了一個完美的半躍進動作。

The infantry were armed with demipikes for close combat. 步兵配備了短矛用於近戰。
A demipike is a short weapon that was common in the 17th century. 短矛是 17 世紀常見的一種短兵器。
The hall was lined with decorative demipillars. 大廳兩側排列著裝飾性的半柱。
A demipillar is a column that is built against a wall. 半柱是靠牆建造的柱子。
The knight rode on a sturdy demipique saddle. 騎士騎在一個堅固的半高鞍上。
A demipique is a type of saddle with a medium-height pommel. 半高鞍是一種鞍頭高度適中的馬鞍。
The soldier's demiplacate was damaged by an arrow. 士兵的半護胸甲被箭射壞了。
A demiplacate is an additional layer of armor for the torso. 半護胸甲是軀幹盔甲的額外層。
They used demiplate armor for light infantry troops. 他們為輕步兵部隊使用半甲。
Demiplate covers only the most vital parts of the body. 半甲僅覆蓋身體最重要的部位。
The rider successfully executed a demipomada. 騎手成功執行了一個半躍步。
Demipomada is an elegant movement in high-level horsemanship. 半躍步是高階馬術中一種優雅的動作。
The argument was based on a flawed demipremise. 該論點是基於一個有缺陷的半前提。
A demipremise is a partial basis for a logical conclusion. 半前提是邏輯結論的部分基礎。
He carefully analyzed each demipremiss of the theory. 他仔細分析了該理論的每個半前提。
A demipremiss is an alternative spelling of demipremise. demipremiss 是 demipremise 的另一種拼法。

meaning: 半個牧師（指非正式受戒的教職人員）
sentences: The village relied on the demipriest for basic religious services. 村莊依靠這位非正式牧師提供基本的宗教服務。
He was known as a demipriest because of his lay status. 由於他的平信徒身份，他被稱為半個牧師。
The physical therapist showed the patient how to achieve demipronation. 物理治療師向病人展示如何達到半旋前。
Demipronation is a partial rotation of the forearm. 半旋前是前臂的部分旋轉。
The play used demipuppets to create a surreal effect. 這部劇使用半木偶來營造出一種超現實的效果。
A demipuppet is only partially controlled by a puppeteer. 半木偶僅由操縱者部分控制。
The fast passage was filled with rapid demiquavers. 這段快節奏的音樂充滿了快速的十六分音符。
A demiquaver is equal to one-sixteenth of a whole note. 十六分音符等於全音符的十六分之一。
The sudden recovery of the patient was seen as a demiracle. 病人的突然康復被視為一個半奇蹟。

The crest featured a silver demiram with golden horns. 紋章的特色是一隻長著金角的銀色半公羊。
A demiram is a common element in heraldic designs. 半公羊是紋章設計中的常見元素。
The walls were decorated with beautiful demirelief carvings. 牆壁裝飾著美麗的半浮雕雕刻。
Demirelief is a type of sculpture that projects halfway from the background. 半浮雕是一種從背景中凸出一半的雕塑。
She was treated as a demirep by the polite society of the time. 她被當時的上流社會視為名聲不好的女性。
The word demirep is an abbreviation for 'demi-reputation'. demirep 一詞是 'demi-reputation'（半聲譽）的縮寫。
The engineer recommended a demirevetment for the temporary fort. 工程師建議為這座臨時堡壘建造一個半護牆。
A demirevetment is a partial stone or brick covering for a wall. 半護牆是用石頭或磚塊部分覆蓋牆壁的設施。
The navigator adjusted the course by a demirhumb. 領航員將航向調整了半個羅盤點。
A demirhumb is a unit used in traditional navigation. 半羅盤方點是傳統航海中使用的單位。
The museum displays several fine examples of demirilievo. 博物館展示了幾件精美的半浮雕作品。
Demirilievo is an Italian term for demi-relief. Demirilievo 是半浮雕的義大利術語。
She wore a silk demirobe over her nightgown. 她在睡袍外面穿了一件絲綢短袍。
A demirobe is a lightweight, partial covering garment. 短袍是一種輕便的部分覆蓋服裝。
The lawyer checked the demisability of the property. 律師檢查了該財產的可租賃性。

They sought demisable assets for their investment portfolio. 他們在投資組合中尋找可轉讓的資產。
His actions were seen as a form of demisacrilege by the elders. 他的行為被長輩們視為一種半褻瀆。

The laws of the kingdom addressed the rights of the demisang. 王國的法律處理了半血緣者的權利。
Demisang refers to those of mixed ancestry or half-blood. 半血緣指的是混血或有半個血緣的人。
He was proud of his demisangue heritage. 他為自己的半血緣遺產感到自豪。
Demisangue is an alternative term for half-blood. Demisangue 是半血緣的另一種說法。
The explorers described the culture as demisavage. 探險家將這種文化描述為半野蠻的。

meaning: 消極意義上的某事的結束；垮台。
sentences: The lack of funding ultimately led to the project's demise. 缺乏資金最終導致該專案的失敗。
The term demise refers to the end of something, in a negative sense; downfall. 死亡一詞是指某事物的結束，具有消極的意義。倒台。
The unexpected demise of the company shocked the investors. 公司意外的倒閉震驚了投資者。
The lawyer handled the demise of the estate to the heirs. 律師處理了將遺產轉讓給繼承人的事宜。
The demiseason requires clothes that can handle both warmth and chill. 過渡季節需要既能保暖又能應對溫暖天氣的衣物。
We often experience unpredictable weather during the demiseason. 在過渡季節，我們經常遇到不可預測的天氣。
The camera shutter can capture an image in a demisecond. 相機快門可以在半秒內捕捉影像。
The race was decided by a mere demisecond at the finish line. 這場比賽在終點線以僅僅半秒之差決出勝負。
The pianist played a rapid series of demisemiquavers. 鋼琴家彈奏了一串快速的三十二分音符。

Traditional Arabic music often uses demisemitones. 傳統阿拉伯音樂經常使用四分之一音。
A demisemitone is a microtonal interval. 四分之一音是一個微音程。
The ancient dagger was kept in a demisheath. 那把古老的匕首放在一個半鞘中。
A demisheath only covers part of the blade. 半鞘只覆蓋刀片的一部分。
He wore a demishirt under his waistcoat. 他在背心下穿了一件半截內衣。
The demishirt was common in historical costumes. 半截內衣在歷史服裝中很常見。
The protectorate was considered a demisovereign state. 該受保護國被視為一個半主權國家。
Demisovereign nations have limited control over their foreign policy. 半主權國家對其外交政策的控制有限。
The northern demisphere experiences summer in June. 北半球在六月經歷夏季。
The brain is divided into two demispheres. 大腦分為兩個半球。
He spoke in a demiss tone to show his respect. 他用謙卑的語氣說話以示尊重。
The demiss posture of the servant was noted by the king. 僕人謙卑的姿態被國王注意到了。
The CEO announced his demission from the company. 執行長宣布了他從公司的辭職。
Her demission of the throne surprised the entire nation. 她放棄王位讓全國上下感到驚訝。
The demissionary minister stayed in office until a successor was found. 辭職的部長留任直到找到繼任者。
He wrote a demissionary letter to the board. 他給董事會寫了一封辭職信。
He bowed demissly before the emperor. 他在皇帝面前謙卑地鞠躬。
She accepted the criticism demissly. 她謙卑地接受了批評。
His demissness was mistaken for weakness. 他的謙卑被誤認為是軟弱。
The demissness of his lifestyle was quite remarkable. 他生活方式的簡樸（謙卑）相當引人注目。

The knight wore a demisuit for the tournament. 騎士在錦標賽中穿著半套盔甲。
A demisuit provided protection while allowing more mobility. 半套盔甲在提供保護的同時允許更大的流動性。
He decided to demit his position after twenty years. 他決定在二十年後辭去職務。
The official will demit from his office next month. 該官員將於下個月退職。
Espresso is traditionally served in a demitasse. 濃縮咖啡傳統上裝在小咖啡杯中。
She sipped her coffee from a delicate demitasse. 她從小巧精緻的咖啡杯中啜飲咖啡。
The artist used demitints to create a sense of depth. 藝術家使用中間色調來營造深度感。
The transition from light to shadow was softened by demitints. 光影之間的過渡被中間色調柔化了。
She chose a demitoilet for the evening reception. 她為晚間招待會選擇了一套半正式禮服。

The wedding dress featured a graceful demitrain. 婚紗帶有優雅的短裙襬。
A demitrain is easier to manage than a long one. 短裙襬比長裙襬更容易打理。

The portrait showed a demiturned figure looking into the distance. 肖像顯示一個半轉身的人物望向遠方。
She gave a demiturned glance before leaving the room. 她在離開房間前瞥了一個半轉身的眼神。
In Gnosticism, the demiurge is the creator of the physical world. 在諾斯底主義中，造物主是物質世界的創造者。

The demiurgical aspects of the myth were carefully analyzed. 神話中的創造性面向得到了仔細分析。

The landscape was demiurgically altered by the volcanic eruption. 景觀因火山噴發而發生了創造性的改變。

Demiurgism is a central theme in many ancient philosophies. 創造論是許多古代哲學的核心主題。
The scholar explored the origins of demiurgism in Plato's works. 學者探討了柏拉圖著作中造物主學說的起源。
The armor set included a demivambrace for the right arm. 盔甲套裝包括一個用於右臂的半前臂甲。
A demivambrace protects only the outside of the forearm. 半前臂甲僅保護前臂的外側。
The term demivirgin is archaic and rarely used today. 半處女一詞已過時，現今很少使用。
She was described as a demivirgin in the historical novel. 她在歷史小說中被描述為一個半處女。
The singer used a demivoice for the delicate passage. 歌手在細膩的段落使用了半聲。
Singing in demivoice requires great breath control. 用半聲演唱需要極佳的氣息控制。
The family crest features a demivol in silver. 家族紋章以銀色的單翅為特色。
A demivol is a single wing shown in heraldry. 紋章學中的單翅是指僅顯示一隻翅膀。
The horse performed a perfect demivolt during the dressage. 馬在盛裝舞步比賽中表演了完美的半躍。
A demivolt is a controlled half-turn on the haunches. 半躍是馬匹以後肢為軸心的受控半轉身。

The shield was decorated with a demiwivern. 盾牌上裝飾著半隻飛龍。
A demiwivern shows the upper half of a wyvern. 半飛龍顯示了飛龍的上半部分。
The creature in the myth was a demiwolf. 神話中的生物是半狼。
A demiwolf is a cross between a wolf and a dog. 半狼是狼和狗的雜交後代。
'Oh, demnition!' he cried when he missed the train. 「噢，該死！」他錯過火車時大喊。
He used the word demnition as a mild oath. 他用 demnition 一詞作為輕微的詛咒。
The soldiers were eager to demob after the war ended. 戰爭結束後，士兵們渴望復員。
They were demobbed at the end of the year. 他們在年底被遣散了。
Demobilization began immediately after the peace treaty was signed. 和約簽署後立即開始復員。
The country faced challenges during the demobilization of its massive army. 該國在龐大軍隊復員期間面臨挑戰。
The government decided to demobilize the reserve forces. 政府決定遣散預備役部隊。
It takes time to demobilize thousands of troops. 遣散數千名士兵需要時間。
Freedom of speech is a fundamental principle of democracy. 言論自由是民主的一個基本原則。
The country has a long and successful history of democracy. 該國擁有悠久且成功的民主歷史。
Democracy is based on the principle of free and fair elections. 民主是建立在自由公平選舉的原則之上的。
We must protect the values of our democracy. 我們必須保護我們民主的價值觀。
He has been an active member of the local Democrat party for many years. 他多年來一直是當地民主黨的活躍成員。
The candidate identified himself as a strong democrat and a champion of civil rights. 該候選人自稱是一位堅定的民主主義者和民權倡導者。
He has been a committed democrat all his life. 他一生都是一位堅定的民主主義者。
As a democrat, she believes in equal rights for everyone. 作為一名民主主義者，她相信每個人都有平等的權利。
The democratian ideals were shared by the group. 民主理想被該團體所共有。
He followed a democratian philosophy in his politics. 他在政治中遵循民主哲學。
Every citizen has the right to vote in a democratic election. 每一位公民都有權在民主選舉中投票。
The decision was made through a democratic voting process. 該決定是透過民主投票程序做出的。
The country held its first democratic elections last year. 該國去年舉行了首次民主選舉。
Everyone is entitled to participate in the democratic process. 每個人都有權參與民主進程。
They discussed the democratical principles of the new constitution. 他們討論了新憲法的民主原則。
A democratical form of government was established. 建立了一種民主形式的政府。
The leader was democratically elected by the people. 領導人是由人民民主選出的。
Decisions are made democratically within the organization. 組織內部的決定是民主做出的。
The scholar argued that the institution was democratifiable. 學者辯稱該機構是可以民主化的。
They searched for democratifiable elements in the traditional society. 他們在傳統社會中尋找可民主化的元素。
His political theory was rooted in pure democratism. 他的政治理論根植於純粹的民主主義。
Democratism emphasizes the sovereignty of the people. 民主主義強調人民的主權。
The democratist campaigned for wider voting rights. 民主主義者爭取更廣泛的投票權。
She is known as a leading democratist in the region. 她被公認為該地區領先的民主主義者。
The democratization of the country led to significant social changes. 該國的民主化導致了重大的社會變革。
They are working towards the democratization of technology. 他們正致力於技術的民主化。

Efforts were made to democratize the selection process. 已努力使甄選過程民主化。
The dog was suffering from demodectic mange. 這隻狗正患有蠕形蟎性疥癬。

His style of clothing is considered demoded by the younger generation. 他的著裝風格被年輕一代認為是過時的。

Demodex mites are microscopic parasites. 蠕形蟎是微小的寄生蟲。
Some species of Demodex live on human skin. 某些種類教的蠕形蟎生活在人類皮膚上。
Demodicidae is a family of specialized mites. 蠕形蟎科是一類專門的蟎蟲。

Demodocus sings of the Trojan War in the Odyssey. 德莫多克斯在《奧德賽》中歌頌特洛伊戰爭。
The character of Demodocus represents the ancient oral tradition. 德莫多克斯這個角色代表了古代的口頭傳統。
Demodulation is the process of extracting the original signal from a carrier wave. 解調是從載波中提取原始信號的過程。
The receiver is responsible for demodulation. 接收器負責解調。
A modem functions as both a modulator and a demodulator. 調製解調器的功能既是調製器又是解調器。
The demodulator converts the signal back to its original form. 解調器將信號轉換回其原始形式。
The transition from kin-based to demogenic society took centuries. 從基於親屬關係到公民社會的轉變耗時數世紀。
Demogenic organizations are fundamental to modern states. 公民組織對現代國家至關重要。
Demogorgon is mentioned in Milton's Paradise Lost. 彌爾頓的《失樂園》中提到了德謬哥岡。
The name Demogorgon often inspires fear in literature. 德謬哥岡這個名字在文學中經常激發恐懼。
The demographer analyzed the aging trends of the population. 人口統計學家分析了人口的老齡化趨勢。
A demographer studies birth rates and migration patterns. 人口統計學家研究出生率和遷移模式。

meaning: 屬於或關於人口統計學。
sentences: Something described as demographic is of or pertaining to demography. 被描述為人口統計的東西屬於人口學或與人口學有關。
The word demographic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 人口統計一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。
The marketing team is targeting a specific demographic. 行銷團隊正針對特定的人口群體。
Demographic changes can have a major impact on the economy. 人口統計數據的變化可能對經濟產生重大影響。
They collected demographical data for the census. 他們為人口普查收集了人口統計數據。
Demographical studies provide insights into social trends. 人口統計研究提供了對社會趨勢的見解。
The region is demographically diverse. 該地區在人口統計上具有多樣性。
We need to analyze the results demographically. 我們需要從人口統計學角度分析結果。
The demographist presented a report on urban growth. 人口統計學者提交了一份關於城市增長的報告。
As a demographist, he focuses on mortality rates. 作為一名人口統計學者，他專注於死亡率。
Demography is essential for government planning. 人口統計學對於政府規劃至關重要。
He decided to specialize in demography at university. 他決定在大學專攻人口統計學。
The politician used demoid language to connect with the voters. 政治家使用平民化的語言與選民聯繫。
The demoid nature of the movement was its greatest strength. 該運動的平民性質是其最大的優勢。
A demoiselle crane walked gracefully by the lake. 一隻蓑羽鶴在湖邊優雅地行走。
The demoiselle fluttered its wings near the water. 豆娘在水邊扇動著翅膀。

meaning: 摧毀（建築物等），尤指有計劃或故意的方式。
sentences: They demolished the old mill and put up four townhouses. 他們拆除了舊磨坊，蓋了四棟連棟別墅。
To demolish means to destroy (buildings, etc.), especially in a planned or intentional fashion. 拆除意味著摧毀（建築物等），尤其是以有計劃或故意的方式。
They plan to demolish the old building next week. 他們計劃下週拆除這座舊建築。
The champion managed to demolish his opponent in the first round. 冠軍在第一輪就成功擊敗了對手。
The demolisher used a wrecking ball to bring down the wall. 拆除者使用落錘破碎機推倒了牆。
He is known as a demolisher of outdated theories. 他被公認為過時理論的破除者。
The demolishment of the slums was a controversial project. 貧民窟的拆除是一個有爭議的項目。
After the demolishment, the site was cleared for new development. 拆除後，該場地被清理出來用於新開發。

meaning: 拆除或破壞建築物或其他結構的過程。
sentences: The term demolition refers to the process of demolishing or destroying buildings or other structures. 拆除一詞是指拆除或破壞建築物或其他結構的過程。
The lesson introduced demolition as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了拆除作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The demolition of the bridge took only a few hours. 橋樑的拆除僅用了幾個小時。
He works for a demolition company in the city. 他在城裡的一家拆除公司工作。
The demolitionary team prepared the explosives. 拆除小組準備了炸藥。
They carried out a demolitionary operation on the old factory. 他們對舊工廠進行了拆除作業。
The demolitionist carefully placed the charges. 爆破專家仔細地放置了炸藥。
As a professional demolitionist, safety is his top priority. 作為一名專業的拆除專家，安全是他的首要任務。
They used demological methods to study the migration. 他們使用人口學方法來研究遷移。
Demological research is important for social policy. 人口學研究對社會政策非常重要。
Demology covers various aspects of human population dynamics. 人口學涵蓋了人類人口動態的各個方面。
She wrote a thesis on the demology of rural areas. 她寫了一篇關於農村人口學的論文。

meaning: 大邪惡或邪惡的根源（尤其是擬人化的）；破壞性的感覺或性格缺陷。
sentences: The demon of stupidity haunts me whenever I open my mouth. 每當我張開嘴時，愚蠢的惡魔就會困擾著我。
The term demon refers to a source (especially personified) of great evil or wickedness; a destructive feeling or character flaw. 惡魔一詞指的是大邪惡或邪惡的根源（尤其是擬人化的）；破壞性的感覺或性格缺陷。
In many stories, a Demon is a powerful and malevolent being. 在許多故事中，惡魔是一個強大且惡毒的生命。
The ancient text describes how to summon a Demon. 古代文獻描述了如何召喚惡魔。
He is a demon for work, often staying late at the office. 他是個工作狂，經常在辦公室待到很晚。
She fought her inner demons for many years. 她與內心的惡魔鬥爭了多年。
The period of demonastery led to the loss of many historical records. 廢除修道院時期導致了許多歷史記錄的丟失。
The king's policy of demonastery was met with resistance. 國王廢除修道院的政策遭到了抵抗。
The demoness was said to haunt the forest at night. 據說女妖在夜間出沒於森林。
Mythology is full of stories about powerful demonesses. 神話中充滿了關於強大女妖的故事。
The sudden demonetization caused chaos in the local economy. 突然的貨幣廢止在當地經濟中引起了混亂。
Demonetization is often used to fight corruption and black money. 貨幣廢止通常被用來打擊腐敗 and 黑錢。
The government decided to demonetize the high-value banknotes. 政府決定停止使用高面額紙幣。
When a currency is demonetized, it loses its legal tender status. 當一種貨幣被廢止時，它就失去了法定貨幣地位。
The villagers believed the man was a demoniac. 村民們相信那個人是被惡魔附身了。
He gave a demoniac laugh that chilled everyone. 他發出了一聲令人毛骨悚然的魔鬼般的笑聲。
The storm raged with demoniacal intensity. 風暴以魔鬼般的強度肆虐。
He had a demoniacal gleam in his eyes. 他的眼神中閃爍著魔鬼般的光芒。
The wind howled demoniacally through the trees. 風像惡魔般在樹林間嚎叫。
He was demoniacally obsessed with his project. 他對自己的項目簡直到了瘋狂著迷的地步。
The priest was an expert in diagnosing demoniacism. 祭司是診斷惡魔附身狀態的專家。
Demoniacism was a common theme in medieval theology. 惡魔附身是中世紀神學中的一個常見主題。
They investigated the demonial origins of the legend. 他們調查了這個傳說的惡魔起源。
The demonial influence was believed to be everywhere. 惡魔的影響被認為無處不在。
He possessed a demonian spirit that could not be tamed. 他擁有一種無法馴服的惡魔般的精神。
The demonian power was palpable in the room. 惡魔般的力量在房間裡清晰可辨。
The book explores the history of demonianism in folklore. 這本書探討了民間傳說中惡魔性質的歷史。
Demonianism is often associated with dark magic. 惡魔性質通常與黑魔法聯繫在一起。
He was accused of being a demoniast by the inquisition. 他被宗教裁判所指控為一名惡魔崇拜者。
The secret society of demoniasts met in the cave. 惡魔崇拜者的秘密社團在洞穴中會面。

meaning: 與惡魔或邪靈有關；惡魔般的。
sentences: Convinced that his uncle was a warlock, he rifled through his attic, looking for demonic artifacts. 他確信他的叔叔是術士，於是在他的閣樓裡搜尋，尋找惡魔文物。
Once he had grasped the controls, he unleashed a demonic laugh that made his hostages shudder. 一旦他掌握了控制裝置，他就發出了惡魔般的笑聲，讓他的人質不寒而慄。
She had a demonic energy that allowed her to work for days without sleep. 她有一種魔鬼般的精力，讓她可以幾天不睡覺地工作。
The movie features a demonic possession. 這部電影以惡魔附身為特色。
They spoke of demonical forces at work in the shadows. 他們談論著陰影中運作的惡魔力量。
The demonical appearance of the creature terrified the children. 那個生物惡魔般的外貌嚇壞了孩子們。
Garlic was used as a demonifuge in many cultures. 大蒜在許多文化中被用作避邪物。
The amulet served as a powerful demonifuge. 這枚護身符是一個強大的驅魔物。
He had a demonish grin on his face. 他臉上帶著惡魔般的笑容。
The demonish character of the villain was well-acted. 反派惡魔般的性格演得很好。
Demonism was practiced in secret during the middle ages. 惡魔崇拜在中世紀是秘密進行的。
The anthropologist studied various forms of demonism. 人類學家研究了各種形式的惡魔信仰。
As a demonist, he spent his life researching ancient myths. 作為一名惡魔學者，他一生都在研究古代神話。
The demonist claimed to communicate with spirits. 這位惡魔崇拜者聲稱能與靈魂交流。
It is easy to demonize the opposition during an election. 在選舉期間，很容易將反對派妖魔化。
The media tends to demonize certain groups of people. 媒體傾向於妖魔化某些人群。
The war between humankind and demonkind lasted for a thousand years. 人類與惡魔類之間的戰爭持續了一千年。
Demonkind is often depicted as the enemy in fantasy novels. 在奇幻小說中，惡魔類通常被描繪成敵人。
The travelers entered the dark territory known as demonland. 旅行者進入了被稱為惡魔之地的黑暗領地。
Demonland is a place where no light ever shines. 惡魔之地是一個永無光亮的地方。
The fire cast demonlike shadows on the cave walls. 火光在洞穴牆壁上投射出像惡魔般的影子。
He displayed a demonlike speed during the sprint. 他在短跑中展現了魔鬼般的速度。
The fallen kingdom was replaced by a brutal demonocracy. 陷落的王國被殘酷的惡魔統治所取代。
The novel describes a world governed by a demonocracy. 小說描述了一個由惡魔政權統治的世界。
The ancient demonograph contained sketches of various spirits. 古代的惡魔圖說包含各種靈魂的草圖。
He found a rare demonograph in the library basement. 他在圖書館地下室發現了一本罕見的惡魔論著。
The demonographer cataloged hundreds of different demons. 惡魔學者編錄了數百種不同的惡魔。
She is a renowned demonographer of the 17th century. 她是 17 世紀著名的惡魔學者。
Demonography was a popular subject for some medieval writers. 惡魔描述是某些中世紀作家受歡迎的主題。
The book is a detailed demonography of the underworld. 這本書是對冥界惡魔的詳細描述。
The demonolater performed rituals in the dark forest. 惡魔崇拜者在黑暗的森林中進行儀式。
History records many instances of demonolaters being persecuted. 歷史記錄了許多惡魔崇拜者遭受迫害的實例。
They were accused of practicing demonolatrous rites. 他們被指控進行崇拜惡魔的儀式。
The demonolatrous beliefs of the cult were revealed. 該邪教崇拜惡魔的信仰被揭露了。
They knelt demonolatrously before the altar. 他們在祭壇前崇拜惡魔般地跪下。
He acted demonolatrously to gain supernatural powers. 他表現出崇拜惡魔的行為以獲得超自然力量。
Demonolatry is the worship of demons or evil spirits. 惡魔崇拜是指對惡魔或惡靈的崇拜。
The old house was said to be a site for demonolatry. 據說這所老房子是進行惡魔崇拜的地方。
The demonologer was called to examine the haunted house. 惡魔學者被請來檢查這座鬧鬼的房子。
He spent years as a demonologer in the service of the king. 他作為一名為國王服務的惡魔學者工作了多年。
The professor gave a demonologic interpretation of the poem. 教授對這首詩進行了惡魔學的解讀。
They studied the demonologic symbols found in the ruins. 他們研究了在廢墟中發現的惡魔學符號。
The library has a large collection of demonological texts. 該圖書館收藏了大量的惡魔學文獻。
Demonological research requires a deep knowledge of history. 惡魔學研究需要深厚的歷史知識。
The event can be explained demonologically according to local beliefs. 根據當地信仰，這件事可以從惡魔學的角度來解釋。
He analyzed the text demonologically. 他從惡魔學角度分析了這段文字。
A demonologist studies myths and legends about demons. 惡魔學者研究關於惡魔的神話和傳說。
The famous demonologist wrote several books on possession. 這位著名的惡魔學者寫了幾本關於附身的書。
Demonology is the systematic study of demons. 惡魔學是對惡魔的系統研究。
He is an expert in the field of demonology. 他是惡魔學領域的專家。
Demonomancy involves seeking knowledge from demons. 惡魔占卜涉及向惡魔尋求知識。
The practice of demonomancy was strictly forbidden. 惡魔占卜的修行是被嚴格禁止的。
His demonophobia made him afraid of being alone in the dark. 他的惡魔恐懼症讓他害怕獨自待在黑暗中。
Demonophobia can be a debilitating condition. 惡魔恐懼症可能是一種令人虛弱的病症。
The entire army of demonry gathered at the gates. 全部的惡魔軍隊聚集在大門口。
Tales of demonry have fascinated people for generations. 關於惡魔的故事世世代代都吸引著人們。
He attained demonship after making a deal with the dark lord. 在與黑暗領主達成交易後，他獲得了惡魔的身分。
The requirements for demonship are unknown to mortals. 獲得惡魔身分的條件對凡人來說是未知的。
The demonstrability of the theory is still being tested. 該理論的可證明性仍在測試中。
Scientific progress relies on the demonstrability of facts. 科學進步依賴於事實的可證明性。
There is a demonstrable link between smoking and lung cancer. 吸菸與肺癌之間存在明顯的聯繫。
The benefits of the new policy are easily demonstrable. 新政策的好處很容易證明。
The demonstrableness of his claims was questioned by the jury. 他的主張的可證明性受到了陪審團的質疑。
We need to ensure the demonstrableness of our results. 我們需要確保我們結果的可證明性。

meaning: 以能夠被證明、展示或證明的方式（毫無疑問）。
sentences: The country has become demonstrably less safe under his leadership. 在他的領導下，這個國家明顯變得不那麼安全了。
The team responded demonstrably to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了明顯的反應。
The situation has demonstrably improved over the last year. 情況在過去一年中顯而易見地得到了改善。
His statements were demonstrably false. 他的陳述顯然是錯誤的。
The demonstrant held up a sign protesting the new law. 示威者舉起牌子抗議新法律。
A demonstrant for the new technology explained its features. 新技術的演示者解釋了其特色。
The error was demonstratable through a simple experiment. 該錯誤可以通過一個簡單的實驗來證明。
We need demonstratable proof before we can proceed. 在繼續之前，我們需要可證明的證據。
The teacher used a simple experiment to demonstrate the theory. 老師用一個簡單的實驗來證明（示範）這個理論。
The protesters gathered in the square to demonstrate against policy. 抗議者聚集在廣場舉行示威（證明）反對該政策。
He will demonstrate how to use the new software. 他將演示如何使用新軟件。
Thousands of people gathered to demonstrate against the war. 數千人聚集在一起示威反對戰爭。
He is demonstratedly the best candidate for the job. 經證明，他是該職位的最佳人選。
The plan has demonstratedly failed to achieve its goals. 該計劃顯然未能實現其目標。
The demonstrater showed us the proper way to lift weights. 示範者向我們展示了舉重的正確方法。
Each demonstrater was given a chance to speak. 每一位示威者都有機會發言。
The company provided a free demonstration of its new software. 公司提供了這款新軟體的免費示範。
The peaceful demonstration managed to attract thousands of citizens. 這場和平示威（示範）竟然吸引了數以千計的公民。
The teacher gave a clear demonstration of the chemical reaction. 老師對化學反應進行了清晰的演示。
The peaceful demonstration turned violent in the afternoon. 和平示威在下午變成了暴力衝突。
The video is purely for demonstrational purposes. 該影片純粹用於演示目的。
They organized a demonstrational flight for the new aircraft. 他們為新飛機組織了一次示範飛行。
The demonstrationist was interviewed by the local news. 示威者接受了當地新聞的採訪。
As a demonstrationist, she travels around the country. 作為一名演示者，她周遊全國。
That is a demonstrative way to handle the design. 那是處理設計時很demonstrative的方法。
We need a more demonstrative plan before launch day. 在上線前，我們需要一個更demonstrative的計畫。
'This' and 'that' are demonstrative pronouns. 「這」和「那」是指示代詞。
Some people are more demonstrative than others in their affection. 有些人在表達情感時比其他人更外露。
She demonstratively showed her disappointment. 她明顯地表現出了她的失望。
He demonstratively hugged his children in front of the cameras. 他在鏡頭前熱情地擁抱了他的孩子們。
His lack of demonstrativeness was often misunderstood. 他不善於表達情感常被誤解。
The cultural difference in demonstrativeness can lead to confusion. 情感表達方式的文化差異可能會導致困惑。
The demonstrator explained the benefits of the product. 演示者解釋了產品的好處。
Police arrested several demonstrators during the protest. 警察在抗議期間逮捕了幾名示威者。
He held a demonstratorship in the biology department. 他在生物系擔任演示員（或助教）的職位。
Applying for a demonstratorship requires strong academic records. 申請演示員職位需要強大的學術記錄。
The chart was purely demonstratory. 該圖表純粹是說明性的。
He used a demonstratory style to convey his message. 他使用說明性的風格來傳達他的訊息。
As a demophil, he dedicated his life to social justice. 作為一個愛好人民者，他致力於社會正義。
The candidate presented himself as a demophil. 候選人將自己塑造成民眾之友。
His demophilism was evident in his philanthropic work. 他的愛好人民的精神在他慈善工作中顯而易見。
Demophilism is a key element of his political philosophy. 愛好人民是他政治哲學的一個關鍵元素。
The reclusive ruler was a known demophobe. 那位隱居的統治者是個著名的恐懼民眾者。
A demophobe avoids large crowds and public gatherings. 恐懼民眾者會避開大量人群和公共集會。
Demophon was the son of Theseus and Phaedra. 德莫豐是忒修斯和淮德拉的兒子。
The story of Demophon is part of Athenian mythology. 德莫豐的故事是雅典神話的一部分。
Demophoon was nursed by the goddess Demeter. 德莫豐由女神得墨忒耳哺育。
In some myths, Demophoon was almost made immortal. 在某些神話中， Demophoon 差點獲得永生。
The defeat led to the total demoralization of the troops. 失敗導致了軍隊士氣的徹底消沉。
The rapid social change caused a sense of demoralization. 快速的社會變革引起了一種道德敗壞的感覺。
Constant criticism can demoralize even the most hardworking staff. 不斷的批評甚至會使最勤奮的員工士氣低落。
The scandal threatened to demoralize the entire community. 醜聞威脅要敗壞整個社區的風氣。
He was seen as a demoralizer within the team. 他被視為團隊中令人氣餒的人。
Poverty can act as a demoralizer for many families. 貧困可能會使許多家庭感到氣餒。
Demorphinization is a critical process for recovering addicts. 嗎啡戒斷治療對康復中的成癮者是一個關鍵過程。
The clinic specializes in rapid demorphinization. 該診所專門從事快速嗎啡戒斷治療。
The scholar discussed the concept of demorphism in social structures. 學者討論了社會結構中民眾形態的概念。
Demorphism reflects the varied nature of the population. 民眾形態反映了人口的多樣性。

He appealed to the demos for support. 他向民眾尋求支持。
Demospongiae is the largest class in the phylum Porifera. 普通海綿綱是多孔動物門中最大的一綱。
Most sponges found in the ocean belong to Demospongiae. 海洋中發現的大多數海綿都屬於普通海綿綱。

meaning: 狄摩西尼風格的；雄辯的
sentences: His Demosthenean eloquence moved the entire audience. 他那狄摩西尼式的雄辯打動了全場觀眾。
The politician's speech was characterized by a Demosthenean intensity. 這位政治家的演說具有狄摩西尼般的強烈感染力。

meaning: 狄摩西尼的；雄辯家風格的
sentences: She delivered a Demosthenic oration against the proposed law. 她發表了一篇狄摩西尼風格的演說，反對這項法案。
The essay was praised for its Demosthenic clarity and power. 這篇文章因其狄摩西尼式的清晰與力量而受到讚賞。
He was demoted for his poor performance at work. 他因工作表現不佳而被降職。
The teacher had to demote the student to a lower level class. 老師不得不將該學生降到較低級別的班級。
The poet used demotic language to reach a wider audience. 這位詩人使用通俗的語言以吸引更廣泛的讀者。
Demotic script was used for everyday writing in ancient Egypt. 通俗體文字在古埃及用於日常書寫。
The poet used demotic language to reach a wider audience. 詩人使用通俗語言以便接觸更廣泛的讀者。
Demotic Greek is the form of the language used in everyday life. 通俗希臘語是日常生活中使用的語言形式。
The study of demotics helps us understand how common people communicated. 通俗語言學的研究有助於我們了解普通人是如何溝通的。
He specialized in ancient demotics and social structures. 他專攻古代通俗語言研究與社會結構。
The sudden demotion came as a shock to the manager. 突然的降職對這位經理來說是一個震驚。
He accepted the demotion rather than resigning from the firm. 他接受了降職，而不是從公司辭職。
As a demotist, she spent years deciphering commoner scripts. 作為一名通俗語言學者，她花了多年時間破譯平民的手稿。
The demotist argued that everyday speech reflects true culture. 這位通俗語言學者認為日常語言反映了真正的文化。
You need to demount the tire before you can fix the puncture. 你需要在修補刺破處之前拆下輪胎。
The exhibition panels are designed to be easily demounted. 展覽面板設計為易於拆卸。
The demountability of the modular house makes it portable. 模組化房屋的可拆卸性使其具有便攜性。
Engineers improved the demountability of the complex machinery. 工程師提高了複雜機械的可拆卸性。
The school used demountable classrooms to accommodate extra students. 學校使用可拆卸教室來容納額外的學生。
A demountable rim allows for easier tire changes. 可拆卸的輪輞使更換輪胎更容易。
In ancient Isle of Man law, the dempster was a key legal figure. 在曼島古代法律中，dempster 是一位關鍵的法律人物。
The dempster read out the sentence to the prisoner. 執行官向囚犯宣讀了判決。
The soft music helped to demulce his anger. 柔和的音樂有助於緩和他的憤怒。
Kind words can demulce a grieving heart. 親切的話語可以安撫悲傷的心靈。
Honey acts as a natural demulcent for a sore throat. 蜂蜜是對抗喉嚨痛的天然緩和劑。
The lotion has demulcent properties that soothe irritated skin. 這款乳液具有舒緩受刺激皮膚的潤膚特性。
The oil must have high demulsibility to separate from water quickly. 油必須具有高抗乳化性才能與水迅速分離。
Engineers tested the demulsibility of the new lubricant. 工程師測試了新型潤滑劑的抗乳化性。
Special chemicals are used to demulsify the crude oil mixture. 特殊化學品被用來使原油混合物脫乳化。
It is difficult to demulsify stable oil-in-water emulsions. 要使穩定的油包水乳化液脫乳化是很困難的。
Demulsion is a critical process in petroleum refining. 脫乳化是石油精煉中的一個關鍵過程。
The researchers studied the speed of demulsion under different temperatures. 研究人員研究了不同溫度下脫乳化的速度。
She sat in the corner, looking demure and modest. 她坐在角落裡，看起來端莊而謙虛。
Her demure smile hid a sharp wit. 她端莊的微笑背後隱藏著敏銳的智慧。
The young woman demurely lowered her eyes. 那位年輕女子端莊地垂下雙眼。
She answered the interviewer's questions demurely. 她端莊地回答了面試官的問題。
Her natural demureness was often mistaken for shyness. 她天生的端莊常被誤認為害羞。
There was a charming demureness in her behavior. 她的行為舉止中有一種迷人的嫻靜。
The actress played the role with great demurity. 這位女演員以極其端莊的態度演繹了這個角色。
He maintained his demurity despite the chaotic surroundings. 儘管環境混亂，他仍保持著他的嚴肅端莊。
The lawyer argued that the evidence was demurrable in court. 律師辯稱該證據在法庭上是可抗辯的。
Is the plaintiff's claim demurrable under current law? 根據現行法律，原告的索賠是否可被反對？
The shipping company charged demurrage for the delayed cargo. 航運公司對延遲的貨物收取滯期費。
Demurrage costs can escalate quickly if port clearance is slow. 如果港口結關緩慢，滯期費成本會迅速增加。
She accepted the proposal without any demurral. 她毫無反對地接受了提議。
There was a slight demurral from the board members. 董事會成員表示了一點反對。
The lone demurrant stood up to voice his concerns. 唯一的異議者站起來表達了他的擔憂。
He remained demurrant throughout the entire negotiation. 在整個談判過程中，他始終保持反對態度。
The defendant filed a demurrer against the complaint. 被告對申訴提出了抗辯。
A demurrer challenges the legal sufficiency of the facts. 抗辯挑戰了事實的法律充分性。
He gave a demurring look when the plan was announced. 計劃公佈時，他露出了反對的神色。
Despite some demurring voices, the vote passed. 儘管有一些反對的聲音，投票還是通過了。
She shook her head demurringly at the high price. 面對高昂的價格，她反對地搖了搖頭。
He spoke demurringly about the new company policy. 他對公司的新政策提出了猶豫的反對意見。
Demutization therapy helps deaf children learn to speak. 去啞化治療幫助失聰兒童學習說話。
The process of demutization requires patience and specialized training. 去啞化的過程需要耐心和專業訓練。
The book was printed on demy quarto paper. 這本書印在 demy 四開紙上。
Demy is a standard size for traditional English printing. Demy 是傳統英國印刷的標準尺寸。

meaning: 牛津大學莫德林學院的獎學金
sentences: He was awarded a demyship at Magdalen College, Oxford. 他獲得了牛津大學莫德林學院的獎學金。
Winning a demyship is a prestigious academic achievement. 獲得 demyship 是一項享有盛譽的學術成就。
The bears spent the winter sleeping in their den. 熊在洞穴裡度過冬天。
He turned the basement into a cozy den for watching movies. 他把地下室變成了一個看電影的舒適活動室。
The bear retreated to its den for the winter. 熊退回到它的巢穴過冬。
He converted the spare room into a comfortable den. 他把空房改造成了一個舒適的私室。
The hospital specializes in the denarcotization of drug addicts. 這家醫院專門從事吸毒者的戒毒治療。
Successful denarcotization requires long-term medical support. 成功的去麻醉治療需要長期的醫療支持。
The goal is to denarcotize the patient safely. 目標是安全地使病人戒除麻藥。
New methods are being used to denarcotize individuals with addictions. 新方法正被用於使成癮者戒毒。
The denarius was a standard silver coin in ancient Rome. denarius 是古羅馬的標準銀幣。
Archeologists found a stash of ancient denarius coins. 考古學家發現了一窖古代羅馬銀幣。

meaning: 金錢（義大利語）；古代硬幣
sentences: He saved every denaro he earned. 他存下了他賺到的每一分錢。
Denaro is an old Italian term for money. Denaro 是義大利語中對錢的舊稱。
The denary system is also known as the decimal system. 十進制系統也稱為十進位制。
Convert the binary number into its denary equivalent. 將二進位數轉換為其對應的十進位數。
Denat. alcohol is often used as a cleaning solvent. 變性酒精常用作清潔溶劑。
Be careful not to consume denat. substances. 注意不要食用變性物質。
The government announced the denationalization of the airline. 政府宣布了這家航空公司的去國有化。
Denationalization can lead to increased competition in the market. 民營化可以導致市場競爭的增加。

meaning: 使去國有化；使失去國籍
sentences: The plan is to denationalize the telecommunications sector. 該計劃是使電信部門民營化。
The regime attempted to denationalize certain ethnic groups. 該政權企圖剝奪某些族群的國籍。
He faced denaturalization after his fraudulent application was discovered. 在發現他的欺詐申請後，他面臨著被取消國籍的處境。
The denaturalization of proteins can occur at high temperatures. 蛋白質的變性可能在高溫下發生。

meaning: 取消國籍；使變性；使不自然
sentences: The government can denaturalize citizens who obtained status through fraud. 政府可以取消通過欺詐獲得身分的公民的國籍。
Heat can denaturalize the enzymes in the sample. 熱量會使樣本中的酶變性。
Methanol is a common denaturant added to ethanol. 甲醇是加入乙醇中的常見變性劑。
The denaturant makes the alcohol unfit for human consumption. 變性劑使酒精不適合人類飲用。
Specific chemicals are used to denaturate the proteins. 使用特定的化學物質來使蛋白質變性。
Don't denaturate the natural flavor of the food with too much salt. 不要用太多的鹽使食物的天然風味變得不自然。
Denaturation is the process where proteins lose their structure. 變性是蛋白質失去其結構的過程。
Cooking an egg involves the denaturation of egg whites. 煮雞蛋涉及蛋白的變性。
Alcohol is denatured to make it undrinkable for industrial use. 酒精被變性以使其不能飲用，供工業使用。
High acidity can denature certain biological molecules. 高酸度會使某些生物分子變性。
The denaturization of the chemical compound was successful. 該化合物的變性處理取得了成功。
Denaturization of industrial spirits is required by law. 法律要求對工業酒精進行變性處理。
They denaturize the fuel to prevent illegal usage. 他們使燃料變性以防止非法使用。

This chemical acts as a potent denaturizer in the process. 這種化學物質在過程中充當強大的變性劑。
Efforts were made to denazify Germany after World War II. 二戰後曾努力使德國去納粹化。
The committee worked to denazify the local administration. 委員會致力於使地方行政機構去納粹化。

The forest is home to various dendral species. 這片森林是各種棲樹物種的家園。
He studied the dendral habits of the local birds. 他研究了當地鳥類的棲樹習性。
The black mamba belongs to the genus Dendraspis. 黑曼巴蛇屬於曼巴蛇屬。
Dendraspis species are known for being highly venomous. 曼巴蛇屬物種以劇毒著稱。
The dendraxon plays a role in neural signal transmission. 樹突軸突在神經訊號傳導中發揮作用。

The crystal growth showed a dendric pattern. 晶體生長呈現出樹狀圖案。
Dendric structures are common in various natural systems. 樹狀結構在各種自然系統中都很常見。
He observed the dendrical growth of the moss. 他觀察了苔蘚的樹狀生長。
The fossil exhibited clear dendrical markings. 化石顯示出清晰的樹狀痕跡。
The neural pathways are often dendriform in appearance. 神經通路的外觀通常呈樹狀。
The river delta forms a beautiful dendriform network. 河口三角洲形成了一個美麗的樹狀網絡。

meaning: 樹突。神經元用來接收其他細胞訊號的分枝狀構造。
sentences: A dendrite receives signals from neighboring neurons. 樹突會接收來自鄰近神經元的訊號。
The shape of a dendrite affects how information is processed in the brain. 樹突的形狀會影響大腦處理資訊的方式。
Dendrites receive signals from other neurons. 樹突接收來自其他神經元的訊號。
Snowflakes are a common example of an ice dendrite. 雪花是冰樹枝狀晶體的常見例子。
Many dendrites branch out from the cell body. 許多樹突從細胞體分支出來。
The complexity of Dendrites affects information processing. 樹突的複雜性影響信息處理。
The cell has a complex dendritic structure. 該細胞具有複雜的樹突結構。
Dendritic drainage patterns resemble the branches of a tree. 樹枝狀排水模式類似於樹木的分支。
The minerals had deposited dendritically on the rock surface. 礦物質在岩石表面呈樹枝狀沉積。
The network expanded dendritically across the region. 網絡在該地區呈樹枝狀擴展。
The lightning left a dendritiform scar on the tree. 閃電在樹上留下了樹枝狀的疤痕。
Scientists analyzed the dendritiform structure of the alloy. 科學家分析了合金的樹枝狀結構。
The term Dendrium is sometimes used in specialized botanical contexts. Dendrium 一詞有時用於專門的植物學語境中。
He wandered through the ancient Dendrium. 他在古老的樹林中漫步。
