The researcher studied the habitat of Dendrobates tinctorius. 研究人員研究了染色箭毒蛙的棲息地。
The Dendrobatinae subfamily includes many brightly colored frogs. 箭毒蛙亞科包括許多顏色鮮豔的青蛙。
Toxins produced by Dendrobatinae are used by indigenous people for darts. 箭毒蛙亞科產生的毒素被原住民用於飛鏢。

meaning: 棲樹生物；石斛屬植物（簡稱）
sentences: The dendrobe was perfectly camouflaged against the bark. 這種棲樹生物在樹皮的映襯下完美地偽裝起來。
She added a new dendrobe to her orchid collection. 她在她的蘭花收藏中增加了一種新的石斛。
Dendrobium is a large genus of tropical orchids. 石斛屬是一個巨大的熱帶蘭花屬。
Many Dendrobium species are valued in traditional medicine. 許多石斛屬物種在傳統醫學中具有價值。
Dendrocalamus giganteus is one of the tallest bamboo species. 巨龍竹是最高的竹種之一。
The shoots of some Dendrocalamus species are edible. 某些牡竹屬物種的嫩芽是可食用的。
Dendroceratina is an order of marine sponges. 樹角海綿目是海綿的一個目。
Sponges in the Dendroceratina order lack a mineral skeleton. 樹角海綿目的海綿缺乏礦物質骨骼。
They identified a new dendroceratine species in the reef. 他們在礁石中發現了一種新的樹角海綿物種。
The dendroceratine structure is flexible and fibrous. 樹角海綿結構具有柔韌性和纖維性。
Dendrochirota is an order of sea cucumbers. 指手目是海參的一個目。
Members of Dendrochirota have highly branched tentacles. 指手目的成員具有高度分支的觸手。
The team conducted a dendrochronological analysis of the cabin logs. 團隊對小木屋的木材進行了樹木年代學分析。
Dendrochronological data can reveal past climate patterns. 樹木年代學數據可以揭示過去的氣候模式。
The dendrochronologist dated the ancient ship to the 15th century. 樹木年代學家將這艘古船的年代定在 15 世紀。
She is a leading dendrochronologist specializing in redwood trees. 她是一位專門研究紅杉的領先樹木年代學家。
Dendrochronology uses tree rings to determine the age of wood. 樹木年代學利用樹木年輪來確定木材的年齡。
The science of dendrochronology is vital for environmental history. 樹木年代學這門科學對環境歷史至關重要。
The rock sample contained dendroclastic features. 岩石樣本包含樹枝狀碎屑特徵。
Dendroclastic formations can be found in certain volcanic regions. 在某些火山地區可以發現樹枝狀碎屑形成。
Dendrocoela is an order of free-living flatworms. 樹腸目是一類自由生活的扁形蟲。
The anatomy of Dendrocoela includes a branched intestine. 樹腸目的解剖結構包括分支的腸道。
The dendrocoelan worm moved slowly across the pond bottom. 樹腸目蠕蟲在池塘底部緩慢移動。
They studied the regenerative abilities of dendrocoelan species. 他們研究了樹腸目物種的再生能力。
This particular dendrocoele is found in freshwater habitats. 這種特殊的樹腸目動物發現於淡水棲息地。
He cataloged different types of dendrocoele in the lake. 他對湖中不同類型的樹腸目動物進行了分類。
Many planarians are dendrocoelous, having branched guts. 許多渦蟲是具樹狀腸的，擁有分支的腸道。
The dendrocoelous nature of the organism was evident. 該生物的樹狀腸特性是顯而易見的。
Dendrocolaptidae is a family of birds known as woodcreepers. 鴷雀科是一科被稱為木䴕的鳥類。
Most birds in the Dendrocolaptidae family live in Neotropical forests. 鴷雀科的大多數鳥類生活在新熱帶森林中。
The dendrocolaptine birds have specialized bills for probing bark. 鴷雀科鳥類具有專門用於探測樹皮的喙。
He observed the dendrocolaptine behavior in the Amazon rainforest. 他在亞馬遜雨林觀察了鴷雀科鳥類的行為。
Dendroctonus beetles can cause significant damage to pine forests. 大小蠹屬甲蟲會對松林造成重大損害。
The mountain pine beetle belongs to the genus Dendroctonus. 山松甲蟲屬於大小蠹屬。
Dendrocygna species are often called whistling ducks. 樹鴨屬物種常被稱為嘯鴨。
The Fulvous Whistling-Duck is a member of the genus Dendrocygna. 茶色嘯鴨是樹鴨屬的一員。
Some extinct fish species possessed dendrodont teeth. 一些已滅絕的魚類擁有樹狀牙齒。
The fossil record shows several dendrodont organisms. 化石記錄顯示了幾種具樹狀牙齒的生物。
Dendrodus is an extinct genus of prehistoric fish. 樹牙魚屬是史前魚類的一個滅絕屬。
Scientists found Dendrodus fossils in Devonian rock layers. 科學家在泥盆紀地層中發現了樹牙魚屬化石。
Dendroeca was a formerly recognized genus of New World warblers. 林鶯屬以前是被認可的新世界鶯屬。
Many species once in Dendroeca are now placed in Setophaga. 許多曾屬於林鶯屬的物種現在被歸入 Setophaga 屬。
Dendrogaea refers to a zoogeographical region dominated by forests. Dendrogaea 指的是以森林為主的動物地理區域。
The biodiversity of Dendrogaea is exceptionally high. Dendrogaea 的生物多樣性特別高。
They cataloged many Dendrogaean species during the expedition. 他們在探險期間記錄了許多森林區的物種。
Dendrogaean fauna adapted to life in dense canopy layers. 森林區動物群適應了茂密林冠層的生活。
The dendrograph measured the daily changes in tree diameter. 樹木生長記錄儀測量了樹木直徑的每日變化。
Researchers used a dendrograph to study the tree's water usage. 研究人員使用樹木生長記錄儀來研究樹木的用水情況。
Dendrography involves the detailed description of trees. 樹木描寫學涉及對樹木的詳細描述。
He wrote a comprehensive book on the dendrography of the region. 他寫了一本關於該地區樹木描寫學的綜合著作。
Dendrohyrax species are arboreal mammals found in Africa. 樹蹄兔屬是發現於非洲的樹棲哺乳動物。
The tree hyrax belongs to the genus Dendrohyrax. 樹蹄兔屬於樹蹄兔屬。
Dendroica was once the largest genus of warblers. 林鶯屬曾是最大的鶯屬。
Yellow warblers were formerly classified under Dendroica. 黃林鶯以前被歸類在林鶯屬下。
The coral growth had a distinct dendroid appearance. 珊瑚生長具有明顯的樹狀外觀。
Scientists described the dendroid structure of the fungus. 科學家描述了該真菌的樹狀結構。
The dendroidal branching of the nerves was complex. 神經的樹狀分支非常複雜。
Mineral deposits formed dendroidal patterns in the stone. 礦物沉積在石頭中形成了樹狀圖案。
Dendroidea is an order of extinct marine organisms called graptolites. 樹筆石目是一類被稱為筆石的已滅絕海洋生物。
Dendroidea fossils are often used as index fossils. 樹筆石目化石常被用作標準化石。
Dendrolagus species are kangaroos that have adapted to life in trees. 樹袋鼠屬是適應了樹上生活的袋鼠。
The Matschie's tree-kangaroo is a member of the genus Dendrolagus. 麥氏樹袋鼠是樹袋鼠屬的一員。
Dendrolatry was practiced in many ancient cultures. 許多古代文化中都有樹木崇拜。
The anthropologist studied the history of dendrolatry in Europe. 人類學家研究了歐洲樹木崇拜的歷史。

meaning: 一種用於防治害蟲的黏性物質
sentences: Dendrolene is applied to tree trunks to trap climbing insects. Dendrolene 被塗在樹幹上以捕捉攀爬的昆蟲。
The gardener used Dendrolene to protect the fruit trees. 園丁使用 Dendrolene 來保護果樹。
The museum displayed a massive dendrolite from the Triassic period. 博物館展出了一塊來自三疊紀的巨大木化石。
Dendrolite preserves the internal structure of ancient trees. 木化石保存了古代樹木的內部結構。
He conducted dendrologic research in the national park. 他在國家公園進行了樹木學研究。
The dendrologic features of the species were carefully noted. 該物種的樹木學特徵被仔細記錄下來。
The university offers a dendrological survey of local flora. 該大學提供當地植物的樹木學調查。
She has a deep interest in dendrological studies. 她對樹木學研究有深厚的興趣。
The dendrologist identified the rare tree species. 樹木學家鑑定出了這種稀有樹種。
As a dendrologist, he spends most of his time in the forest. 作為一名樹木學家，他大部分時間都在森林裡度過。
He published a dendrologous guide for hikers. 他出版了一本為徒步旅行者準備的樹木學指南。
The library contains many dendrologous texts from the 19th century. 圖書館藏有許多 19 世紀的樹木學文獻。
Dendrology is the branch of botany that deals with trees. 樹木學是研究樹木的植物學分支。
Students in the forestry program must take a course in dendrology. 林業專業的學生必須修讀樹木學課程。
Dendromecon rigida is a shrubby poppy native to California. 硬葉樹罌粟是原產於加利福尼亞的一種灌木狀罌粟。
The yellow flowers of Dendromecon are very striking. 樹罌粟屬的黃色花朵非常引人注目。
The forester used a dendrometer to estimate the volume of timber. 林務員使用測樹器來估算木材體積。
A dendrometer can measure the height and diameter of a tree. 測樹器可以測量樹木的高度和直徑。
In biology, a dendron is another word for a dendrite. 在生物學中，dendron 是樹突的另一個稱呼。
The Greek word 'dendron' means tree. 希臘語詞彙 'dendron' 的意思是樹。
The dendrophil insect lives exclusively on oak trees. 這種嗜樹昆蟲專門生活在橡樹上。
As a true dendrophil, he spent his weekends planting trees. 作為一個真正的愛樹者，他週末都在種樹。
The dendrophile joined a local conservation group. 這位愛樹的人加入了一個當地的保護小組。
She is a dendrophile who can identify hundreds of tree species. 她是一個愛樹的人，能辨認出數百種樹木。
Dendrophilous organisms play a key role in forest ecosystems. 嗜樹生物在森林生態系統中發揮關鍵作用。
Some birds are dendrophilous and rarely touch the ground. 某些鳥類是嗜樹的，很少接觸地面。
Dendropogon species are often found hanging from tree branches. 樹鬚屬物種常被發現懸掛在樹枝上。
The botanist collected a sample of Dendropogon from the rainforest. 植物學家從雨林中採集了樹鬚屬標本。
The Dene people have lived in the northern regions for centuries. 德內人在北部地區生活了幾個世紀。
He studied the culture and language of the Dene. 他研究了德內人的文化和語言。
The path led through a quiet, wooded dene. 小路穿過一個安靜、長滿樹木的峽谷。
Coastal denes are often protected environmental areas. 沿海沙丘通常是受保護的環境區域。

meaning: 天津四（天鵝座中最亮的星）
sentences: Deneb is one of the stars in the Summer Triangle. 天津四是夏季大三角中的一顆恆星。
Astronomers studied the brightness and distance of Deneb. 天文學家研究了天津四的亮度和距離。

meaning: 五帝座一（獅子座中的恆星）
sentences: Denebola marks the tail of the constellation Leo. 五帝座一標誌著獅子座的尾巴。
On a clear night, Denebola is easily visible to the naked eye. 在晴朗的夜晚，肉眼很容易看到五帝座一。
The suspect continued to denegate all charges. 嫌疑人繼續否認所有指控。
We must not denegate the rights of others. 我們絕不能拒絕他人的權利。
Her denegation of the facts was unexpected. 她對事實的否認出乎意料。
The official issued a formal denegation of the rumors. 官員對謠言發表了正式否認。
Deneholes are ancient excavations found in parts of England. Deneholes 是在英國部分地區發現的古代挖掘坑。
Historians debate the original purpose of the denehole. 歷史學家爭論 denehole 的最初用途。
Surgeons may denervate a muscle to treat specific conditions. 外科醫生可能會切斷肌肉的神經以治療特定疾病。
The researchers attempted to denervate the experimental area. 研究人員試圖切斷實驗區域的神經。
Denervation of the limb led to muscle atrophy. 肢體的神經切斷導致了肌肉萎縮。
Chronic denervation can have long-term physiological effects. 慢性失神經作用可能具有長期的生理影響。
The deneutralization of the country's foreign policy caused debate. 該國外交政策的去中立化引起了爭論。
Military alliances often lead to the deneutralization of small states. 軍事同盟往往導致小國的去中立化。
Dengue fever is transmitted by mosquitoes in tropical areas. 登革熱是由熱帶地區的蚊子傳播的。
The health department warned about a rise in dengue cases. 衛生部門警告登革熱病例有所增加。
The spy ensured that his involvement was plausible and deniable. 間諜確保他的參與是合理且可否認的。
The company issued a statement with deniable assertions. 公司發表了一份含有可否認斷言的聲明。
The government issued an official denial of the rumors regarding the tax increase. 政府對有關增稅的傳聞發布了正式否認。
His state of denial prevented him from seeking the medical help he needed. 他的逃避（否定）心理使他無法尋求所需的醫療幫助。
The politician issued a flat denial of the allegations. 這位政治家對指控表示斷然否認。
Denial is often the first stage of the grieving process. 否認通常是悲傷過程的第一階段。
The manufacturer claims to denicotinize the tobacco leaves. 製造商聲稱除去煙葉中的尼古丁。
New technology is used to denicotinize cigarettes. 新技術被用於除去香煙中的尼古丁。

meaning: 一枚價值十二分之一甦的古老法國硬幣。
sentences: The term denier refers to An old French coin worth one-twelfth of a sou. 「丹尼爾」一詞指的是價值十二分之一甦的古老法國硬幣。
We learned the meaning of denier during today's lesson. 我們在今天的課程中學習了丹尼爾的意義。

meaning: 否認者；丹尼爾（纖維細度單位）
sentences: Climate change deniers often ignore scientific evidence. 氣候變遷否認者常忽視科學證據。
The stockings are 15 denier, making them very sheer. 這些長筒襪是 15 丹尼爾的，非常薄。
The denierage of the silk determines its texture. 絲綢的丹尼爾度決定了它的質地。
Experts measured the denierage of the experimental fiber. 專家測量了實驗纖維的丹尼爾度。
The denierer refused to acknowledge the truth. 否認者拒絕承認事實。
He was known as a consistent denierer of progress. 他被公認為一個始終如一的進步否認者。
It is wrong to denigrate the achievements of others. 貶低他人的成就背是不對的。
The rival candidate tried to denigrate her character. 競爭對手試圖誹謗她的人格。
The actress faced constant denigration in the tabloids. 這位女演員在小報上面臨著不斷的誹謗。
Public denigration of the court's decision is discouraged. 不鼓勵公開貶低法院的判決。
The artist ignored his denigrators and kept working. 藝術家忽視了那些貶低他的人，繼續工作。
She confronted her denigrator in a public forum. 她在公共論壇上與誹謗她的人對質。

meaning: 一種通常由棉製成的紡織品，具有明顯的對角線圖案。
sentences: The term denim refers to a textile often made of cotton with a distinct diagonal pattern. 牛仔布一詞是指通常由棉製成的具有明顯對角線圖案的紡織品。
The lesson introduced denim as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了牛仔布作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
He wore a jacket made of blue denim. 他穿著一件藍色丹寧布做的夾克。
Denim is a durable cotton fabric used for jeans. 丹寧布是用於牛仔褲的耐用棉織物。
Denis is a popular given name in many countries. 丹尼斯在許多國家是一個受歡迎的名字。
Saint Denis is the patron saint of France. 聖丹尼斯是法國的守護神。
The system is designed to denitrate the wastewater. 該系統旨在除去廢水中的硝酸鹽。
Chemical processes are used to denitrate the soil. 化學過程被用於除去土壤中的硝酸鹽。
Denitration is an important step in environmental protection. 脫硝是環境保護中的重要步驟。
The factory installed new equipment for denitration of exhaust gases. 工廠安裝了用於廢氣脫硝的新設備。
The denitrator helps reduce pollution from the power plant. 脫硝裝置有助於減少發電廠的污染。
Regular maintenance of the denitrator is necessary. 脫硝裝置的定期維護是必要的。
Denitrificant bacteria play a role in the nitrogen cycle. 反硝化細菌在氮循環中發揮作用。
They added a denitrificant agent to the treatment tank. 他們向處理池中加入了反硝化劑。
Denitrification converts nitrates into nitrogen gas. 反硝化作用將硝酸鹽轉化為氮氣。
Excessive irrigation can increase denitrification in the soil. 過度灌溉會增加土壤中的反硝化作用。
The bio-denitrificator cleaned the aquarium water. 生物反硝化器清潔了水族箱的水。
Engineers optimized the performance of the industrial denitrificator. 工程師優化了工業反硝化器的性能。
A denitrifier is used in some advanced water treatment systems. 一些先進的水處理系統中使用脫氮裝置。
The soil contains natural denitrifier organisms. 土壤中含有天然的反硝化生物。
Bacteria in the wetland help to denitrify the runoff. 濕地中的細菌有助於使徑流發生反硝化作用。
It is important to denitrify the system to maintain water quality. 為了保持水質，對系統進行脫氮處理非常重要。
The researchers aimed to denitrize the industrial effluent. 研究人員旨在對工業廢水進行脫氮處理。
New catalysts can denitrize combustion products more efficiently. 新型催化劑可以更有效地對燃燒產物進行脫氮。
Denization granted certain rights to foreigners in the past. 過去，賦予居住權授予了外國人某些權利。
The process of denization was simpler than full naturalization. 賦予居住權的過程比完全入籍要簡單。
The polar bear is a denizen of the Arctic. 北極熊是北極的居民。
Nightclubs are often filled with the denizens of the city. 夜總會通常擠滿了城市的居民。
Denizenation was a legal tool used by the monarch. 給予居住權是君主使用的一種法律工具。
He sought denizenation to start a business in the new land. 他尋求獲得居住權以便在新土地上創業。
The king decided to denizenize several useful foreigners. 國王決定賦予幾位有用的外國人居住權。
To denizenize a person meant they could own land. 賦予一個人居住權意味著他們可以擁有土地。
He was granted denizenship after years of service. 在服役多年後，他被授予了居住權。
Denizenship provided a middle status between alien and citizen. 居住權提供了外僑和公民之間的中間地位。
Denmark is a Scandinavian country in Europe. 丹麥是歐洲的一個斯堪地那維亞國家。
Copenhagen is the capital and largest city of Denmark. 哥本哈根是丹麥的首都和最大城市。
The gentleman drove his dennet through the park. 這位紳士趕著他的雙輪輕便馬車穿過公園。
Dennets were popular vehicles in the 19th century. Dennets 是 19 世紀受歡迎的交通工具。
Dennis is a name of Greek origin. 丹尼斯是一個起源於希臘的名字。
Uncle Dennis brought us gifts for the holidays. 丹尼斯叔叔在假期給我們帶來了禮物。
Dennstaedtia is a genus of ferns in the family Dennstaedtiaceae. 碗蕨屬是碗蕨科下的一個蕨類植物屬。
Many species of Dennstaedtia are found in tropical regions. 許多碗蕨屬的物種生長在熱帶地區。
The various shades of blue are not always easily denominable. 各種不同深淺的藍色並不總是容易命名的。
Every distinct object in the collection is denominable. 收藏品中每一個獨特的物品都是可以命名的。
They chose to denominate the new species after the scientist. 他們選擇以該科學家的名字來命名這個新物種。
The value is denominated in local currency. 該價值是以當地貨幣計價的。

meaning: 同名的階級或個人社會；宗教的一個分支。
sentences: She follows the Ahmadiyya denomination of Islam. 她信仰伊斯蘭教艾哈邁迪亞教派。
The term denomination refers to a class, or society of individuals, called by the same name; a subdivision of a religion. 「宗派」一詞指的是一個階級，或是由同名的個體組成的社會。宗教的一個分支。
The bill comes in several denominations. 這張鈔票有幾種不同的面額。
She belongs to a small religious denomination. 她屬於一個小型的宗教派別。
The school provides a denominational education. 這所學校提供教派背景的教育。
They discussed denominational differences during the meeting. 他們在會議中討論了各教派之間的差異。
Denominationalism can sometimes lead to division within a community. 教派主義有時會導致社區內的分裂。
The rise of denominationalism was a key feature of the era. 教派主義的興起是那個時代的一個關鍵特徵。
He is a staunch denominationalist who supports his church's views. 他是一位堅定的教派主義者，支持他教會的觀點。
The denominationalists argued for their specific traditions. 教派主義者為他們特定的傳統進行辯論。

meaning: 使受教派影響；使教派化
sentences: There were efforts to denominationalize the educational system. 有人努力想讓教育體系受教派影響。
The movement sought to denominationalize local charities. 該運動試圖使當地的慈善機構教派化。
The students are denominationally diverse. 這些學生在教派背景上非常多元。
They are denominationally linked to the central church. 他們在教派上與中央教會有聯繫。
A denominative verb is one derived from a noun or adjective. 派生動詞是由名詞或形容詞演變而來的動詞。
The denominative suffix changed the word's meaning. 命名的後綴改變了該詞的意義。
The items are listed denominatively in the catalog. 這些品項在目錄中按名稱列出。
They refer to the group denominatively. 他們以名稱來指代該群體。

meaning: 寫在分數線下方的數字或表達式（例如 1/2 中的 2）。
sentences: common denominator 共同點
lowest common denominator 最小公分母
To add fractions, you must find a common denominator. 要進行分數加法，你必須找到公分母。
Shared values are the lowest common denominator in the group. 共同的價值觀是該群體中最小的共通點。
The difference between the two concepts is clearly denotable. 這兩個概念之間的區別是可以清楚指出的。
Every feature on the map is denotable by a symbol. 地圖上的每個特徵都可以用符號表示。
The denotation of the word 'home' is just a place where one lives. 'home' 這個詞的字面意思是一個人居住的地方。
The dictionary provides the precise denotation for each entry. 字典為每個詞條提供了精確的字面意思。
Science often uses denotative language to avoid ambiguity. 科學經常使用字面意義的語言以避免歧義。
The denotative meaning is the primary definition found in a dictionary. 字面意義是字典中找到的首要定義。

meaning: 按字面意思地；指示性地
sentences: The word was used denotatively in the technical report. 該詞在技術報告中是按字面意思使用的。
He interpreted the message denotatively, ignoring any hidden meanings. 他按字面意思解釋了這條訊息，忽略了任何隱含的意義。
The denotativeness of the term ensures there is no confusion. 該術語的字面意義性確保了不會產生混淆。
The speaker emphasized the denotativeness of his statements. 說話者強調了他陳述的字面意義性。
In linguistics, a denotatum is the object or concept a word refers to. 在語言學中，被指示物是指單詞所指的對象或概念。
The relationship between a sign and its denotatum is complex. 符號與其指示對象之間的關係很複雜。

meaning: 依字面意思指涉；傳達客觀意義。
sentences: The prefix pre- denotes "before", as in preview. 前綴 pre- 表示“之前”，如預覽所示。
To denote means to refer to literally; to convey as objective meaning. 表示指字面意思；傳達客觀意義。
Red circles on the map denote dangerous areas. 地圖上的紅圈表示危險區域。
The symptoms may denote a more serious underlying condition. 這些症狀可能意味著更嚴重的潛在疾病。
The denotement of status was important in their society. 地位的標誌在他們的社會中非常重要。
Clear denotement of exits is required by law. 法律要求對出口進行清晰的標示。
The colors used are denotive of different levels of urgency. 使用的顏色指示不同級別的緊急程度。
She used denotive gestures to guide the audience. 她使用指示性的手勢來引導觀眾。
The film's denouement was both unexpected and moving. 這部電影的結局既出人意料又感人至深。
We are still waiting for the final denouement of the political scandal. 我們仍在等待這場政治醜聞的最終結局。
The international community denounced the terrorist attack. 國際社會譴責了這起恐怖襲擊。
He decided to denounce his former associates to the police. 他決定向警方告發他以前的夥伴。
The government was quick to denounce the terrorist attack. 政府迅速譴責了這次恐怖襲擊。
He was denounced as a traitor by his former colleagues. 他被以前的同事舉發為叛徒。
The public denouncement of the policy led to mass protests. 對該政策的公開譴責導致了大規模抗議。
An anonymous denouncement led to the arrest. 一次匿名舉報導致了逮捕。
The denouncer faced criticism for his controversial statements. 譴責者因其有爭議的言論而面臨批評。
She was identified as the denouncer who revealed the corruption. 她被確認為揭發腐敗的告發者。
The explorers struggled to move through the dark and dense jungle. 探險家們努力在黑暗且稠密的叢林中前行。
The morning fog managed to be so dense that we couldn't see anything. 早晨的霧竟然（能）如此濃密（稠密），以至於我們什麼也看不見。
The forest was so dense that light couldn't penetrate the canopy. 森林如此茂密，光線無法穿透樹冠。
He can be a bit dense sometimes and misses the obvious joke. 他有時有點反應遲鈍，聽不出明顯的笑話。
The forest was densely populated with trees. 森林裡樹木茂密。
If someone acts densely, they do so in a way that is in a dense manner. 如果某人行動密集，他們就會以密集的方式這樣做。
The area is densely populated with apartment buildings. 該地區公寓林立，人口稠密。
The mountain was densely covered in fog. 山上被濃霧籠罩。
The clouds began to densen as the storm approached. 隨著風暴臨近，雲層開始變厚。
Cold air can densen the material slightly. 冷空氣會使這種材料稍微變密。
The denseness of the fog made driving extremely dangerous. 濃霧的厚度使駕駛變得極其危險。
They measured the denseness of the forest growth. 他們測量了森林植被的密度。

meaning: （古英語/方言）焚燒草皮以改良土壤
sentences: Denshare was an old agricultural practice to improve soil. 焚燒草皮是以前改良土壤的一種舊農業做法。
Farmers would denshare their fields before planting. 農民在播種前會焚燒田間的草皮。
The densher worked hard to prepare the land. 焚燒草皮的工人在努力準備土地。
Historically, a densher was specialized in this soil treatment. 歷史上，焚燒草皮的工人專門從事這種土壤處理。
The term denshire refers to the same process as denshare. denshire 這個詞指的是與 denshare 相同的過程。
They used to denshire the moorland for cultivation. 他們過去常焚燒荒地的草皮以利耕作。
Urban densification is a strategy to prevent urban sprawl. 城市緻密化是防止城市擴張的一種策略。
The densification of the material improved its strength. 材料的緻密化提高了它的強度。
A liquid densifier was applied to the concrete floor. 混凝土路面使用了一種液體密封固化劑。
The addition of a densifier made the mixture more stable. 加入增稠劑使混合物更加穩定。
Compaction helps to densify the soil before construction. 壓實有助於在施工前使土壤緻密。
The city plans to densify its downtown area. 該市計劃提高其市中心區域的人口密度。
The scientist used a densimeter to measure the liquid's density. 科學家使用密度計來測量液體的密度。
A precise densimeter is essential for this laboratory experiment. 精確的密度計對於這個實驗室實驗至關重要。
Densimetric analysis was used to separate the particles. 密度分析法被用來分離微粒。
They performed a densimetric survey of the site. 他們對該場地進行了密度測量調查。
The samples were analyzed densimetrically. 這些樣本是透過密度測量法分析的。
The results were confirmed densimetrically in the lab. 結果在實驗室中透過密度測量得到了證實。
Densimetry is a common technique in chemical engineering. 密度測量法是化學工程中的一種常見技術。
The study focuses on the application of densimetry in food science. 該研究專注於密度測量法在食品科學中的應用。

meaning: 顯像密度計；透射密度計
sentences: Photographers use a densitometer to check the exposure of film. 攝影師使用顯像密度計來檢查底片的曝光量。
The bone densitometer measures bone mineral density. 骨密度儀測量骨礦物質密度。
The population density in the city center is much higher than in the suburbs. 市中心的人口密度遠高於郊區。
The material has a very high density and feels much heavier than it looks. 這種材料的密度很高，感覺比看起來要重得多。
Lead has a high density, making it very heavy for its size. 鉛的密度很高，使其相對於其體積而言非常重。
The population density in the city is very high. 城市的人口密度非常高。
There was a small dent in the car door after the minor accident. 輕微事故後，車門上有一個小凹痕。
He accidentally dented the metal tray when he dropped it. 他不小心把金屬盤子摔出了個凹痕。
There was a small dent in the car door. 車門上有一個小凹痕。
The criticism didn't seem to dent his confidence. 批評似乎並沒有削弱他的信心。
The patient suffered from severe dentagra. 病人遭受嚴重的牙痛折磨。
Dentagra is an old term for a dental instrument. Dentagra 是拔牙工具的一個舊稱。
It is important to maintain a good dental hygiene by brushing your teeth regularly. 通過定期刷牙來保持良好的牙齒（口腔）衛生非常重要。
She decided to go to the dental clinic to get her wisdom teeth removed. 她決定去牙科診所拔掉智齒。
I have a dental appointment tomorrow morning. 我明天早上預約了看牙醫。
Good dental hygiene is important for overall health. 良好的口腔衛生對整體健康很重要。
You should use dental floss every day to clean between your teeth. 你應該每天使用牙線來清潔牙縫。
The dentist gave her a small package of dental floss. 醫生給了她一小包牙線。

meaning: 齒骨（尤其指爬行動物或兩棲動物）
sentences: The dentale is a key bone in the lower jaw of some animals. 齒骨是某些動物下顎的一塊關鍵骨骼。
Paleontologists studied the fossilized dentale of the creature. 古生物學家研究了該生物的齒骨化石。
Dentalgia can be caused by various factors, including decay. 牙痛可能由多種因素引起，包括蛀牙。
He took some painkillers to relieve his dentalgia. 他吃了一些止痛藥來緩解牙痛。
Dentaliidae is a family of mollusks commonly known as tusk shells. 象牙貝科是一類俗稱為象牙貝的軟體動物。
The museum has a collection of shells from the Dentaliidae family. 博物館收藏了象牙貝科的貝殼。
Dentalism refers to the articulation of speech sounds using the teeth. 齒音發音法是指利用牙齒來發音的方式。
The linguist analyzed the dentalism in the local dialect. 語言學家分析了當地語言中的齒音發音。
The dentality of the consonant was noted by the researcher. 研究人員注意到了該輔音的齒音性質。
Different languages vary in the level of dentality. 不同語言的齒音化程度各不相同。
Dentalium shells were historically used as currency by some tribes. 象牙貝屬的貝殼歷史上曾被一些部落用作貨幣。
The Dentalium genus consists of scaphopod mollusks. 象牙貝屬由掘足綱軟體動物組成。
Dentalization occurs when the tongue touches the teeth during speech. 齒音化發生在說話時舌頭接觸牙齒的情況下。
The study examined the dentalization of certain phonemes. 該研究探討了某些音素的齒音化現象。
Some speakers tend to dentalize their alveolar consonants. 一些說話者傾向於使他們的齒齦音齒音化。
The accent causes him to dentalize many words. 這種口音使他把許多詞發成齒音。
The sound is produced dentally. 這個音是齒音發出的。
He was treated dentally for his injuries. 他的傷勢得到了牙科方面的治療。

meaning: 助聽器的一種（透過牙齒傳導聲音）
sentences: The dentaphone was an early device used to aid hearing. Dentaphone 是一種早期用於輔助聽力的設備。
It works by transmitting sound vibrations through the teeth. 它透過牙齒傳遞聲音震動來工作。
Dentaria is a genus of flowering plants in the mustard family. 齒薯屬是十字花科下的一個開花植物屬。
Some species of Dentaria have edible rhizomes. 某些齒薯屬物種具有可食用的根莖。
The dentary bone is the main bone of the lower jaw in mammals. 齒骨是哺乳動物下顎的主要骨骼。
Scientists found a dentary fossil in the desert. 科學家在沙漠中發現了一塊齒骨化石。
The term dentata is used in biology to describe organisms with teeth-like structures. dentata 一詞在生物學中用來描述具有齒狀結構的生物。
The specimen belonged to the group of dentata. 該標本屬於具齒類群。
The plant has dentate leaves that are easy to identify. 這種植物具有易於辨認的有齒緣葉片。
Dentate margins are common in many species of trees. 齒狀邊緣在許多樹種中都很常見。
The metal plate had a dentated edge. 金屬板邊緣帶齒。
He examined the dentated surface of the tool. 他檢查了該工具的有齒表面。
The leaves are dentately lobed. 葉片呈齒狀分裂。
The edge was carved dentately to increase grip. 邊緣刻成齒狀以增加抓地力。
The dentation of the blade helps in cutting tough materials. 刀片的齒狀結構有助於切割堅韌的材料。
He noted the irregular dentation on the fossil's jaw. 他注意到了化石頜部不規則的具齒情況。
The leaf margin is described as dentatoangulate. 葉緣被描述為具角齒的。
Botanists use the term dentatoangulate to be more specific about leaf shapes. 植物學家使用「具角齒的」一詞來更精確地描述葉子形狀。
The plant has dentatocillitate petals. 該植物具有帶緣毛齒的花瓣。
He carefully observed the dentatocillitate structure under the microscope. 他在顯微鏡下仔細觀察了具緣毛齒的結構。
The shell is characterized by a dentatocostate surface. 該貝殼的特點是具有肋齒狀的表面。
Dentatocostate patterns are common in certain marine fossils. 肋齒狀圖案在某些海洋化石中很常見。
The leaves exhibit a dentatocrenate margin. 這些葉子顯示出圓齒狀的邊緣。
This species can be identified by its dentatocrenate foliage. 這個物種可以透過其圓齒狀的葉子來辨認。
The edge of the leaf is dentatoserrate. 葉子的邊緣呈鋸齒狀。
Most of the plants in this area have dentatoserrate leaves. 該地區的大多數植物都有鋸齒狀的葉子。
The insect has dentatosetaceous antennae. 這種昆蟲有具刺毛齒的觸角。
A dentatosetaceous structure can provide sensory input. 具刺毛齒的結構可以提供感官輸入。
The leaf has a dentatosinuate margin that flows like a wave. 這片葉子有一個波狀齒的邊緣，像波浪一樣起伏。
The sample shows a clearly dentatosinuate pattern. 樣本顯示出清晰的波狀齒圖案。
The architecture featured a row of dentels along the roof. 該建築屋頂沿線有一排齒飾。
Each dentel was carefully carved by hand. 每個小齒都是精心手工雕刻的。
The edge of the cloth was dentelated for decoration. 布料的邊緣為了裝飾而被剪成齒狀。
She noticed the dentelated pattern on the antique mirror. 她注意到古董鏡子上的小齒狀圖案。
The book's cover was adorned with beautiful gold dentelle. 書的封面裝飾著美麗的金邊花紋。
She preferred dresses with intricate dentelle details. 她喜歡帶有精緻蕾絲邊細節的連衣裙。
Collectors check the quality of the dentelure on rare stamps. 收藏家會檢查稀有郵票上齒孔的品質。
The dentelure helps in separating individual stamps from a sheet. 齒孔有助於將單個郵票從整張中分離出來。
The worker used a denter to mark the metal sheets. 工人使用壓痕機在金屬板上做標記。
This machine acts as a denter for various leather goods. 這台機器可用作各種皮革製品的打孔器。
Dentex is a popular choice for seafood in Mediterranean cuisine. 牙鯛是地中海料理中受歡迎的海鮮選擇。
He caught a large dentex during his fishing trip. 他在釣魚旅行中抓到了一條大牙鯛。
The fossil had a dentical projection. 該化石有一個齒狀突起。
The tool's surface was covered in dentical bumps. 該工具的表面覆蓋著齒狀的小凸起。
The leaves of the plant are naturally denticate. 這種植物的葉子天生就有齒。
They sought to denticate the edge for better grip. 他們試圖使邊緣具齒以獲得更好的抓地力。
Denticeti is a suborder of whales that includes dolphins and porpoises. 齒鯨類是鯨魚的一個亞目，包括海豚和鼠海豚。
Members of Denticeti have teeth instead of baleen plates. 齒鯨類的成員有牙齒而不是鯨鬚板。
Sharks have dermal denticles that cover their skin. 鯊魚的皮膚上覆蓋著皮齒。
A small denticle was found on the edge of the tool. 工具邊緣發現了一個小齒。
The machine part has a denticular surface. 機器零件有一個小齒狀的表面。
He noticed the denticular patterns on the ancient artifact. 他注意到古代文物上的小齒狀圖案。
The margin of the rose leaf is denticulate. 玫瑰葉的邊緣具有細齒。
A denticulate edge can be very sharp. 具細齒的邊緣可能非常鋒利。
The border of the image was denticulately trimmed. 圖像的邊緣被修剪成細齒狀。
The surface was denticulately carved. 表面被刻成了細齒狀。
The denticulation of the fossil was very clear. 該化石的細齒結構非常清晰。
They studied the denticulation on the edge of the shell. 他們研究了貝殼邊緣的細齒。
Each denticule on the wing was examined. 翅膀上的每個小齒都經過了檢查。
The presence of a denticule is a distinguishing feature. 小齒的存在是一個顯著特徵。
Most mammals are dentiferous animals. 大多數哺乳動物是具牙齒的動物。
The fossil belongs to a dentiferous reptile. 該化石屬於一種有牙齒的爬行動物。
The process of dentification starts before birth. 牙齒形成的過程在出生前就開始了。
Researchers are studying the factors that affect dentification. 研究人員正在研究影響牙齒形成的因素。
The rock formation had a unique dentiform shape. 該岩層具有獨特的齒狀形狀。
She used a dentiform tool for the carving. 她使用齒狀工具進行雕刻。
Dentifrice is another name for toothpaste or tooth powder. Dentifrice 是牙膏或牙粉的另一種稱呼。
Choose a dentifrice that contains fluoride to prevent cavities. 選擇含有氟化物的潔牙劑以預防蛀牙。
They used a special dentifrice to whiten their teeth. 他們使用一種特殊的牙膏來美白牙齒。
Ancient people used various materials as dentifrice. 古代人使用各種材料作為牙粉。
A dentigerous cyst is a common type of dental cyst. 含牙囊腫是一種常見的牙源性囊腫。
The surgery was performed to remove a dentigerous growth. 手術是為了切除一個生齒性的腫塊。
The cornice was decorated with a row of dentils. 簷口裝飾著一排齒飾。
Dentils are common in classical architecture. 齒飾在古典建築中很常見。
A dentilabial sound is made with the teeth and lips. 齒唇音是由牙齒和嘴唇發出的。
The study focuses on the production of dentilabial consonants. 該研究專注於齒唇輔音的產生。
The ancient column was dentilated around the top. 這根古代柱子頂部周圍有齒狀裝飾。
He admired the dentilated edges of the structure. 他欣賞該建築具齒的邊緣。
The dentilation on the facade gave it a classic look. 正面外牆上的齒飾賦予了它經典的外觀。
They discussed the complexity of the building's dentilation. 他們討論了該建築齒狀裝飾的複雜性。
A tiny dentile was visible on the surface. 表面可以看到一個微小的齒狀物。
The presence of a dentile can affect how the tool works. 小齒的存在會影響工具的工作方式。
Dentilingual sounds are common in many languages. 齒舌音在許多語言中都很常見。
The linguist categorized the consonant as dentilingual. 語言學家將該輔音歸類為齒舌音。
The dentiloquist entertained the audience by speaking without moving his teeth. 這位閉齒說話者透過不動牙齒說話來娛樂觀眾。
He is a skilled dentiloquist who can perform for hours. 他是一位熟練的閉齒說話者，可以表演好幾個小時。
Dentiloquy is a rare form of vocal performance. 閉齒說話法是一種罕見的發聲表演形式。
She practiced dentiloquy until she could speak clearly with her teeth closed. 她練習閉齒說話法，直到能在牙齒緊閉的情況下清晰說話。
The dentist used a dentimeter to measure the patient's tooth. 牙醫使用量牙計來測量病人的牙齒。
A dentimeter is a useful tool in orthodontic treatment. 量牙計在牙齒矯正治療中是一個有用的工具。
Dentin is the layer beneath the tooth enamel. 牙本質是牙釉質下方的層。
Sensitivity can occur when the dentin is exposed. 當牙本質暴露時，可能會產生敏感。
Dentinal tubules are microscopic channels in the dentin. 牙本質小管是牙本質中的微小通道。
The researchers studied dentinal repair processes. 研究人員研究了牙本質修復過程。
Exposure of the tooth's inner layers can cause dentinalgia. 牙齒內層的暴露會引起牙本質痛。
The patient complained of dentinalgia when drinking cold water. 病人在喝冷水時抱怨牙本質痛。
The consonant has a dentinasal quality in some dialects. 在某些方言中，該輔音具有齒鼻音的特性。
He analyzed the dentinasal sounds of the indigenous language. 他分析了該原住民語言中的齒鼻音。
Dentine makes up the bulk of a tooth's structure. 牙本質構成了牙齒結構的大部分。
Damage to the dentine can lead to more serious dental issues. 牙本質的損傷會導致更嚴重的牙齒問題。
Dentinitis can be a painful condition if not treated. 如果不治療，牙本質炎可能是一個痛苦的病症。
The dentist diagnosed him with mild dentinitis. 牙醫診斷他患有輕微的牙本質炎。
The dentinoblast is responsible for forming the dentin. 成牙本質細胞負責形成牙本質。
Biological studies focus on the function of the dentinoblast. 生物學研究專注於成牙本質細胞的功能。
The dentinocemental junction is where the dentin and cementum meet. 牙本質牙骨質界是牙本質和牙骨質相遇的地方。
He examined the dentinocemental structure in the root of the tooth. 他檢查了牙根中的牙本質牙骨質結構。
The material has a dentinoid appearance. 這種材料具有類牙本質的外觀。
Scientists discovered a dentinoid substance in the fossil. 科學家在化石中發現了一種類牙本質物質。
A dentinoma is a rare odontogenic tumor. 牙本質瘤是一種罕見的牙源性腫瘤。
The patient underwent surgery to remove the dentinoma. 病人接受了手術以切除牙本質瘤。
The dentiparous process is crucial for mammal development. 生齒過程對於哺乳動物的發育至關重要。
She researched dentiparous abnormalities in infants. 她研究了嬰兒的生齒異常。
A dentiphone can help people with certain types of hearing loss. 助聽器可以幫助患有某些類型聽力損失的人。
The dentiphone uses bone conduction through the teeth. 該助聽器利用牙齒進行骨傳導。
The dentiroster has a beak with a tooth-like notch. 這種鳥有一個帶有齒狀缺口的喙。
Many species of dentirosters can be found in this forest. 在這片森林中可以找到許多種具齒形喙的鳥。
The bird is characterized by its dentirostral features. 這隻鳥的特點是其齒形喙的特徵。
Dentirostral birds often feed on insects. 具齒形喙的鳥通常以昆蟲為食。
A dentirostrate beak is useful for catching prey. 齒形喙對於捕捉獵物非常有用。
The species is known to be dentirostrate. 該物種被已知具有齒形喙。
Dentirostres is a group of birds that have notches in their beaks. 齒喙鳥類是喙上有缺口的一類鳥。
Ornithologists study the classification of Dentirostres. 鳥類學家研究齒喙鳥類的分類。
A dentiscalp is used by dentists to clean teeth. 刮牙器是牙醫用來清潔牙齒的。
The ancient dentiscalp was made of metal. 古代的刮牙器是由金屬製成的。
I have a dentist's appointment at 3:00 p.m. this afternoon. 我今天下午三點預約了牙醫。
You should visit the dentist regularly to keep your teeth healthy. 你應該定期看牙醫以保持牙齒健康。
I need to go to the dentist for a check-up. 我需要去看牙醫做檢查。
The dentist filled a cavity in my back tooth. 牙醫幫我補了後牙的一個蛀洞。
The museum displayed various dentistic instruments from the past. 博物館展示了過去各種牙科儀器。
He chose a dentistic career after university. 他大學畢業後選擇了牙醫職涯。
She had a dentistical operation last week. 她上週做了一個牙科手術。
The clinic provides comprehensive dentistical services. 該診所提供全面的牙科服務。
She is studying dentistry at university to become a dentist. 她正在大學攻讀牙科學，想成為一名牙醫。
Modern dentistry has made dental treatments much more comfortable. 現代牙科學使牙科治療變得舒適得多。
Dentistry has made great progress in recent years. 近年來牙醫學取得了巨大進步。
He is studying dentistry at the local university. 他正在當地的大學學習牙醫學。
The child's dentition is progressing normally. 這個孩子的牙齒發育進展正常。
Animals have different types of dentition based on their diet. 動物根據飲食習慣有不同類型的齒列。
The bone has a dentoid process. 該骨骼具有一個齒狀突起。
The archaeologists found a dentoid artifact in the cave. 考古學家在洞穴中發現了一個齒狀的人造物品。
Dentolabial articulation involves the upper teeth and the lower lip. 齒唇發音涉及上齒和下唇。
The study examined the dentolabial sounds in the dialect. 該研究探討了方言中的齒唇音。
The student practiced dentolingual sounds in his speech class. 這位學生在口語課上練習了齒舌音。
Many consonants can be described as dentolingual. 許多輔音可以被描述為齒舌音。
He studied the production of dentonasal consonants. 他研究了齒鼻輔音的產生。
The linguist noted the dentonasal quality of the phoneme. 語言學家注意到了該音素的齒鼻音性質。
A dentosurgical procedure was necessary to remove the wisdom teeth. 有必要進行牙科手術以拔除智齒。
The hospital has a specialized dentosurgical department. 該醫院設有專業的牙科手術部門。
He needed some dentural adjustments for better comfort. 他需要進行一些假牙調整以獲得更好的舒適度。
The clinic specializes in dentural care for seniors. 該診所專門為老年人提供牙列護理。
The elderly man wore a full denture. 這位老人戴著全口假牙。
Modern dentures look very similar to natural teeth. 現代假牙看起來與真牙非常相似。

meaning: 多牙的；（方言）整潔漂亮的
sentences: The child showed off his denty smile. 孩子炫耀他那長滿牙齒的笑容。
It was a denty little house on the corner. 那是街角一座整潔漂亮的小房子。
Scientists used a microscope to denucleate the cell. 科學家使用顯微鏡對細胞進行去核處理。
The process to denucleate an egg cell is very delicate. 對卵細胞進行去核的過程非常精細。
The river acts as a denudant to the surrounding landscape. 河流對周圍的景觀起到了剝蝕作用。
Harsh weather is a primary denudant of the soil. 惡劣的天氣是土壤剝落的主要原因。
Fire can denudate the forest of its vegetation. 火災會使森林的植被蕩然無存。
The denudate peaks were visible from miles away. 幾英里外就能看到光禿禿的山峰。
Denudation of the soil leads to increased erosion. 土壤的剝蝕會導致侵蝕加劇。
Geologists studied the effects of long-term denudation on the mountains. 地質學家研究了長期剝蝕作用對山的影響。
The denudative forces of nature shaped the valley. 大自然的剝蝕力量塑造了這個山谷。
Wind is a common denudative agent in the desert. 風是沙漠中常見的剝蝕媒介。
The drought has denuded the fields of all crops. 乾旱使田野裡所有的莊稼都枯死了。
He felt denuded of his power after the scandal. 醜聞過後，他感到自己的權力被剝奪了。
A denuder is used in some chemical processes to remove gases. 在某些化學過程中，解吸器被用來移除氣體。
The storm acted as a denuder of the coastal dunes. 風暴是海岸沙丘的剝蝕者。
In mathematics, the set of integers is denumerable. 在數學中，整數集是可數的。
A denumerable set can be put into one-to-one correspondence with natural numbers. 可數集可以與自然數建立一一對應的關係。
The elements can be denumerably listed. 這些元素可以被可數地列出。
They showed that the set is denumerably infinite. 他們證明了該集合是可數無限的。
The researchers used a denumeral approach to analyze the data. 研究人員使用計數方法來分析數據。
Each item was assigned a denumeral value. 每個項目都被分配了一個數值。
A denumerant is a concept used in combinatorics. 分割數是組合數學中使用的一個概念。
He calculated the denumerant for the given equation. 他計算了給定方程的分割數。
The denumerantive properties were explored in the paper. 論文中探討了分割數的性質。
He applied denumerantive logic to solve the problem. 他應用分割數邏輯來解決問題。
Denumeration of the population is conducted every ten years. 人口普查每十年進行一次。
The process involves a careful denumeration of all items. 該過程涉及對所有項目的仔細計數。
The denumerative study provided detailed statistics. 計數性研究提供了詳細的統計數據。
He used a denumerative method to check the inventory. 他使用枚舉法來檢查庫存。
His actions were deemed denunciable by the committee. 他的行為被委員會認為是應受譴責的。
Such behavior is clearly denunciable in a civil society. 這種行為在文明社會中顯然是可舉發的。
The denunciant provided evidence to the police. 告發者向警方提供了證據。
She acted as a denunciant against the corrupt officials. 她作為告發者，指控那些腐敗官員。
They chose to denunciate the injustice publicly. 他們選擇公開譴責這種不公。
He was quick to denunciate the lies told about him. 他迅速揭發了關於他的謊言。
The speech was a fierce denunciation of the current leadership. 這篇演講是對現任領導層的激烈譴責。
His denunciation led to the investigation of the company. 他的告發導致了對該公司的調查。
She wrote a denunciative article in the newspaper. 她在報紙上寫了一篇譴責性的文章。
The tone of the letter was highly denunciative. 這封信的語氣極具譴責性。
The protesters spoke denunciatively about the new law. 抗議者譴責地談論著新法律。
He looked at them denunciatively. 他帶著譴責的神情看著他們。
The denunciator remained anonymous to protect his safety. 為了保護安全，告發者保持匿名。
He was known as a fierce denunciator of social inequality. 他以激烈譴責社會不平等而聞名。
The organization released a denunciatory statement. 該組織發布了一份譴責聲明。
Her denunciatory tone surprised everyone in the room. 她那譴責的語氣讓房間裡的每個人都感到驚訝。
The famine caused widespread denutrition among the population. 饑荒導致人口中普遍出現營養不良。
The doctor focused on treating the symptoms of denutrition. 醫生專注於治療營養不良的症狀。
He denied all the accusations made against him in court. 他否認了所有對他在法庭上的指控。
There is no denying that technology has changed our lives. 毫無疑問，科技改變了我們的生活。
He denied the allegations against him. 他否認了對他的指控。
The suspect denied having any connection to the crime. 嫌疑人否認與該罪行有任何關係。
She shook her head denyingly when asked about the secret. 當被問及秘密時，她否定地搖了搖頭。
He spoke denyingly about the rumors surrounding his resignation. 他否定地談論了有關他辭職的傳聞。
The plumber worked to deobstruct the clogged pipes. 水管工努力排除堵塞管道的障礙。
New policies were implemented to deobstruct the flow of international trade. 實施了新政策以排除國際貿易流動的障礙。
The doctor prescribed a deobstruent medicine to clear the blockage. 醫生開了一種通導藥物來清除阻塞。
Certain herbs are known for their deobstruent properties in traditional medicine. 在傳統醫學中，某些草藥以其通導特性而聞名。
The movement sought to deoccidentalize the local culture and restore traditions. 該運動試圖使當地文化去西方化並恢復傳統。
The curriculum was redesigned to deoccidentalize history lessons. 課程經過重新設計，使歷史課去西方化。
In the gruesome legend, the villain was said to deoculate his victims. 在那個可怕的傳說中，據說惡棍會挖出受害者的眼睛。
The ancient ritual involved a symbolic act to deoculate the statue. 古老的儀式涉及一個使雕像失去眼睛的象徵性行為。
Under old English law, a deodand was a personal chattel that caused a person's death. 根據舊英國法律，獻給上帝之物是指造成人員死亡的個人動產。
The concept of deodand was abolished in the mid-19th century. 獻給上帝之物的概念在19世紀中葉被廢除。
The deodara is a majestic evergreen tree native to the Himalayas. 喜馬拉雅雪松是原產於喜馬拉雅山脈的宏偉常綠樹。
Several deodara trees were planted in the botanical garden. 植物園裡種植了幾棵喜馬拉雅雪松。

meaning: 塗抹在腋下以消除汗臭的氣味控制物質。
sentences: The term deodorant refers to an odor-controlling substance applied to the underarm to counteract odor from perspiration. 除臭劑一詞是指塗在腋下以消除汗臭的氣味控制物質。
The lesson introduced deodorant as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了除臭劑這個易於理解的有用術語。
He applied deodorant before going to the gym. 他在去健身房之前塗了除臭劑。
Many people prefer using natural deodorant without aluminum. 許多人喜歡使用不含鋁的天然除臭劑。
The deodorization process in the factory helped reduce complaints from neighbors. 工廠的除臭過程有助於減少鄰居的投訴。
Activated carbon is often used for the deodorization of water. 活性炭常用於水的除臭。
You can use baking soda to deodorize your refrigerator. 你可以用小蘇打給冰箱除臭。
The new spray is designed to quickly deodorize pet areas. 這款新噴霧旨在快速為寵物區域除臭。
The air purifier includes a powerful deodorizer filter. 空氣清淨機包含一個強大的除臭過濾器。
She placed a small deodorizer in her gym locker. 她在健身房置物櫃裡放了一個小除臭裝置。
The philosopher argued from a deontological perspective on ethics. 哲學家從倫理學的義務論角度進行論證。
Deontological ethics focuses on the rightness or wrongness of actions themselves. 義務論倫理學專注於行為本身的正當性或錯誤性。
As a deontologist, he believes that some rules must be followed regardless of the consequences. 作為一名義務論者，他認為有些規則無論後果如何都必須遵守。
The debate featured a utilitarian and a deontologist. 這場辯論由一名功利主義者 and a deontologist 參加。
Deontology is a branch of normative ethics. 義務論是規範倫理學的一個分支。
In deontology, the moral value of an action is based on adherence to rules. 在義務論中，行為的道德價值基於對規則的遵守。
The botanist identified the specimen as a deoperculate moss capsule. 植物學家將標本鑑定為去蓋的苔蘚孢蒴。
Deoperculate seeds have lost their protective coverings. 去蓋的種子已經失去了保護層。
Ancient medical texts describe this herb as a potent deoppilant. 古代醫學文獻將這種草藥描述為一種強效的通導劑。
The deoppilant properties of the tea help with digestion. 這種茶的通導特性有助於消化。
The treatment was intended to deoppilate the patient's liver. 該治療旨在使病人的肝臟通導。
Medications were given to deoppilate the obstructed passages. 給予藥物以使阻塞的通道通導。
Deoppilation of the ducts was necessary for full recovery. 管道的除去阻塞對於完全康復是必要的。
The doctor explained the process of deoppilation in simple terms. 醫生用簡單的術語解釋了除去阻塞的過程。
The tonic has a deoppilative effect on the digestive system. 這種補藥對消化系統有通導作用。
Deoppilative treatments were common in early modern medicine. 有通導作用的治療在早期現代醫學中很常見。
The sudden change in leadership led to a period of deordination within the company. 領導層的突然變動導致公司內部一段時間的無序。
Critics argued that the new policy would result in social deordination. 批評者認為新政策會導致社會無序。
The earthquake caused a massive deorganization of the city's infrastructure. 地震造成了城市基礎設施的大規模組織破壞。
Internal conflicts led to the slow deorganization of the political party. 內部衝突導致該政黨緩慢的組織破壞。
Frequent interruptions can deorganize even the best-planned projects. 頻繁的中斷甚至會破壞規劃得最好的項目組織。
The virus was designed to deorganize the computer's central operating system. 該病毒旨在破壞電腦中央操作系統的組織。
The historian aimed to deorientalize the portrayal of Asian cultures in Western literature. 歷史學家旨在使西方文學中對亞洲文化的描述去東方化。
The museum's new exhibit seeks to deorientalize its collection of artifacts. 博物館的新展覽尋求將其文物收藏去東方化。
In ophthalmology, deorsumvergence refers to the downward movement of both eyes. 在眼科學中，向下散開是指雙眼同時向下的移動。
The patient exhibited symptoms of abnormal deorsumvergence. 病人表現出異常向下散開的症狀。
Deorsumversion is a clinical term for the downward turning of the eyes. 向下轉動是雙眼向下旋轉的臨床術語。
The doctor measured the range of the patient's deorsumversion. 醫生測量了患者雙眼向下轉動的範圍。
Deorusumduction specifically describes the downward rotation of a single eye. 向下轉動專指單眼的向下旋轉。
The test was used to assess the strength of the muscles involved in deorusumduction. 該測試用於評估與向下轉動相關的肌肉強度。
Deossification can be a serious side effect of certain metabolic disorders. 脫鈣可能是某些代謝紊亂的嚴重副作用。
The study monitored the rate of deossification in elderly patients. 該研究監測了老年患者的脫鈣率。
Certain conditions can cause the body to deossify existing bone tissue. 某些情況會導致身體使現有的骨組織脫鈣。
Laboratory tests showed that the chemical could deossify the sample. 實驗室測試顯示該化學物質可以使樣本脫鈣。
In local folklore, the deota is believed to protect the mountain village. 在當地民俗中，神靈被認為保護著這個山村。
Shrines dedicated to the deota can be found throughout the region. 供奉神靈的神龕遍布該地區。
The manufacturer added a deoxidant to the metal alloy to prevent corrosion. 製造商在金屬合金中添加了脫氧劑以防止腐蝕。
Aluminum is often used as a deoxidant in the steel-making process. 鋁常在煉鋼過程中被用作脫氧劑。
The chemist used a specific procedure to deoxidate the sample. 化學家使用特定程序使樣本脫氧。
High temperatures are often required to deoxidate certain metallic compounds. 使某些金屬化合物脫氧通常需要高溫。
Deoxidation is a critical step in producing high-quality steel. 脫氧作用是生產高質量鋼鐵的關鍵步驟。
The efficiency of deoxidation affects the final properties of the metal. 脫氧作用的效率影響金屬的最終特性。
The deoxidative properties of the substance were carefully analyzed. 該物質的脫氧特性經過了仔細分析。
Scientists are developing new deoxidative techniques for industrial use. 科學家正在開發用於工業的新型脫氧技術。
The technician replaced the filter in the industrial deoxidator. 技術人員更換了工業脫氧器中的過濾器。
A deoxidator is used to remove oxygen from the sealed container. 脫氧器用於從密封容器中移除氧氣。
Deoxidization is essential to prevent unwanted reactions during synthesis. 脫氧對於防止合成過程中不必要的反應至關重要。
The report detailed the cost of deoxidization in the manufacturing process. 報告詳細說明了製造過程中脫氧的成本。
The molten iron needs to be deoxidized before it is cast. 鐵水在鑄造前需要進行脫氧。
Special reagents are used to deoxidize the chemical solution. 使用特殊試劑使化學溶液脫氧。
Silicon is a common deoxidizer used in foundries. 矽是鑄造廠常用的脫氧劑。
The effectiveness of the deoxidizer was tested under extreme conditions. 在極端條件下測試了脫氧劑的有效性。
The scientist demonstrated how to deoxygenate the water sample for the experiment. 科學家演示了如何為實驗除去水樣中的氧。
Bacteria in the soil can quickly deoxygenate small pools of water. 土壤中的細菌可以快速除去小水池中的氧。
The deoxygenation of the lake led to a significant fish kill. 湖泊的脫氧作用導致了大量魚類死亡。
Researchers are studying the causes of deoxygenation in deep oceans. 研究人員正在研究深海脫氧作用的原因。
Deoxygenization of the blood occurs as it flows through the body's tissues. 當血液流經身體組織時，會發生脫氧。
The equipment was designed for efficient deoxygenization of liquids. 該設備旨在實現液體的高效脫氧。
Deozonization is necessary before air can be safely released into the environment. 在空氣可以安全排放到環境中之前，必須進行除去臭氧。
The factory installed a new system for deozonization. 工廠安裝了一套新的除去臭氧系統。
The device is capable of deozonizing the atmosphere in the chamber. 該設備能夠除去腔室大氣中的臭氧。
Technicians work to deozonize the treated air. 技術人員努力除去處理後空氣中的臭氧。
The laboratory uses a high-capacity deozonizer for its experiments. 實驗室在實驗中使用大容量的臭氧去除器。
Ensure the deozonizer is functioning correctly before starting the process. 在開始過程之前，確保臭氧去除器運作正常。
A depa is an ancient unit of length roughly equal to six feet. 一 depa 是古代長度單位，大約等於六英尺。
Historical records mentioned the depth of the well in depas. 歷史記錄中以 depas 為單位提到了井的深度。
The church sought to depaganize the local festivals and integrate them into Christian tradition. 教會試圖使當地的節日去異教化，並將其納入基督教傳統。
Reformers worked to depaganize many aspects of society during the Middle Ages. 改革者在中世紀努力使社會的許多方面去異教化。
The artist used vibrant colors to depaint the sunset over the mountains. 藝術家使用鮮豔的色彩來描繪山上的日落。
The poet attempted to depaint the sorrow of the grieving widow. 詩人試圖描繪悲傷遺孀的哀愁。
The patient required full depancreatization due to a severe tumor. 由於嚴重的腫瘤，患者需要進行全胰腺切除術。
Medical advances have improved the survival rates after depancreatization. 醫學進步提高了解胰腺切除術後的生存率。
Surgeons had to depancreatize the laboratory animal for the research study. 外科醫生不得不為研究切除實驗動物的胰腺。
It is a complex procedure to depancreatize a patient safely. 安全地為患者切除胰腺是一個複雜的程序。
The city council voted to depark a section of the forest for residential development. 市議會投票決定取消森林一部分的公園地位，用於住宅開發。
Environmentalists protested the decision to depark the historic site. 環保人士抗議取消該歷史遺跡公園地位的決定。
The dictator attempted to deparliament the nation and consolidate absolute power. 獨裁者企圖取消國家的議會並鞏固絕對權力。
Opposition leaders fought against the move to deparliament the government. 反對黨領袖反對取消政府議會的舉動。
The train to Taipei is scheduled to depart from platform five soon. 前往台北的火車預計很快就會從五號月台出發（離開）。
We decided to depart for our summer vacation early this morning. 我們決定今天一早出發去度暑假。
The train is scheduled to depart at 10 AM. 火車預定於上午十點離開。
She saw him depart for his long journey overseas. 她看著他離開去開始漫長的海外旅行。
The priest spoke kind words about our departed friend. 牧師對我們已故的朋友說了一些溫暖的話。
The museum exhibit honors the departed leaders of the community. 博物館的展覽向社區已故的領導人致敬。
The crowd gathered at the airport to wave goodbye to the departer. 群眾聚集在機場向出發者揮手告別。
As a frequent departer, she was very familiar with airport security procedures. 作為一名經常的出發者，她對機場安檢程序非常熟悉。
The new committee aims to departisanize the redistricting process. 新委員會旨在使選區重劃過程去黨派化。
It is difficult to departisanize political debates in such a polarized climate. 在如此兩極分化的氣氛中，很難使政治辯論去黨派化。
They decided to departition the office to create a more open workspace. 他們決定拆除辦公室的隔牆以創建一個更開放的工作空間。

The long drought has begun to deplete the water levels in the local reservoir. 長期的乾旱已經開始使當地水庫的水位枯竭（耗盡）。
Spending too much money on luxury items will quickly deplete your savings. 在奢侈品上花費太多錢會迅速耗盡你的積蓄。
Extended physical activity can deplete the body's energy reserves. 持續的體力活動會耗盡身體的能量儲備。
We must be careful not to deplete our natural resources. 我們必須小心不要耗盡我們的自然資源。
The treatment had a deplethoric effect on the patient's condition. 該治療對病人的狀況有消除多血症的作用。
Early medicine often sought deplethoric remedies for various ailments. 早期醫學經常為各種疾病尋找消除多血症的療法。

meaning: 耗盡的行為，或耗盡的狀態；精疲力盡。
sentences: The term depletion refers to the act of depleting, or the state of being depleted; exhaustion. 「耗盡」一詞是指耗盡的行為或被耗盡的狀態；精疲力盡。
The lesson introduced depletion as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了損耗這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The depletion of the ozone layer is a major environmental concern. 臭氧層的耗損是一個重大的環境問題。
The company is facing a depletion of its financial reserves. 公司正面臨財務儲備的耗損。
Some mining practices are very depletive to the local environment. 一些採礦做法對當地環境具有很強的耗損性。
The long war had a depletive effect on the nation's economy. 長期的戰爭對國家的經濟產生了耗損性影響。
Overuse of the land proved to be depletory to the soil's nutrients. 過度使用土地被證明會引起土壤養分的耗損。
The depletory nature of the industry was criticized by activists. 該行業引起耗損的本質受到了活動人士的批評。
The deploitation of the region's resources brought economic growth. 該地區資源的開發利用帶來了經濟增長。
Strict regulations ensure the sustainable deploitation of the forest. 嚴格的法規確保了森林的可持續開發利用。
The deplorability of the living conditions in the camp was shocking. 營地生活條件的悲慘性令人震驚。
Critics highlighted the deplorability of the government's response to the crisis. 批評者強調了政府應對危機的悲慘性。

meaning: 令人痛惜。為此感到悲傷；值得同情；可悲的。
sentences: We were all saddened by the deplorable death of his son. 我們都對他兒子的不幸去世感到悲痛。
Poor children suffer permanent damage due to deplorable living conditions and deplorable treatment by law enforcement. 貧困兒童由於惡劣的生活條件和執法部門的惡劣待遇而遭受永久性傷害。
The refugees were living in deplorable conditions. 難民們生活在可悲的條件下。
It is deplorable that so many people are still living in poverty. 如此多的人仍生活在貧困中是可悲的。
The deplorableness of the situation was evident to everyone. 情況的可悲程度對每個人來說都是顯而易見的。
He spoke about the deplorableness of the social injustice. 他談到了社會不公的可悲程度。
The team performed deplorably in the championship game. 該團隊在冠軍賽中表現得非常可悲。
The building has been deplorably neglected for years. 這座建築多年來一直被可悲地忽視。
The poem is a deep deploration of the loss of innocence. 這首詩是對失去純真的深切哀嘆。
A collective deploration followed the announcement of the factory closure. 工廠關閉的消息公佈後，引起了集體的哀嘆。
We deplore the use of violence to resolve conflicts. 我們對使用暴力解決衝突深表遺憾。
Many world leaders deplore the current humanitarian crisis. 許多世界領導人對當前的人道主義危機深表遺憾。
The action was widely deplored by the international community. 該行動受到了國際社會的廣泛譴責。
He felt deplored by his colleagues after the mistake. 犯錯後，他感到受到了同事們的譴責。
The situation was handled deploredly by the authorities. 當局處理該情況的方式令人遺憾。
He spoke deploredly of the missed opportunities. 他遺憾地談到了那些錯失的機會。
The deploredness of the living conditions was evident. 居住環境的惡劣程度顯而易見。
We discussed the deploredness of the recent events. 我們討論了最近事件中令人遺憾的情況。
He is a constant deplorer of modern industrialization. 他一直是一個對現代工業化持悲觀看法的人。
As a deplorer of violence, she advocated for peace. 作為一名暴力的譴責者，她提倡和平。
She looked deploringly at the mess in the kitchen. 她悲嘆地看著廚房裡的凌亂。
He shook his head deploringly at the news. 他聽完消息後遺憾地搖了搖頭。
The government decided to deploy more troops to the border to ensure security. 政府決定向邊境部署更多部隊以確保安全。
The company is planning to deploy its new software across all its branches. 公司計畫在所有分部部署（調度）其新軟體。
The general decided to deploy the troops along the border. 將軍決定沿邊境部署軍隊。
The company plans to deploy new software next month. 公司計劃下個月部署新軟體。
The term deployment refers to an arrangement or classification of things. 術語「部署」是指事物的排列或分類。
The lesson introduced deployment as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了部署作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The deployment of forces was completed yesterday. 部隊的部署已於昨天完成。
Effective deployment of resources is key to success. 有效部署資源是成功的關鍵。
The bird appeared deplumate after the infection. 感染後這隻鳥看起來羽毛脫落。
He was tasked to deplumate the carcasses. 他的任務是拔掉屍體上的羽毛。
The deplumated areas of the skin were sensitive. 皮膚脫毛的區域非常敏感。
He examined the deplumated bird closely. 他仔細檢查了那隻掉毛的鳥。
Stress can cause sudden deplumation in parrots. 壓力會導致鸚鵡突然掉毛。
The vet treated the chicken for deplumation. 獸醫為這隻雞治療掉毛症。
The hunter began to deplume the pheasant. 獵人開始拔去雉雞的羽毛。
The scandal threatened to deplume him of his honors. 這場醜聞威脅要剝奪他的榮譽。
This ointment will help to deplump the swollen area. 這種軟膏將有助於使腫脹部位消腫。
The doctor advised ice to deplump the injury. 醫生建議冰敷以減輕傷處腫脹。
Modern technology tends to depoetize everyday life. 現代科技傾向於使日常生活失去詩意。
His harsh words depoetize the beautiful sunset. 他刻薄的話語讓美麗的落日失去了詩意。
The bus returns to the depoh every evening. 公車每天晚上都會回到調度站。
The goods are stored in a secure depoh. 貨物存放在一個安全的倉庫中。
The depolarization of cell membranes is vital for nerve signals. 細胞膜的去極化對神經信號至關重要。
Scientists studied the rate of depolarization in the lab. 科學家在實驗室研究了去極化的速率。
The electrical pulse will depolarize the neuron. 電脈衝會使神經元去極化。
Special lenses are used to depolarize light. 特殊鏡片被用來使光線去極化。
A depolarizer is added to the battery to prevent gas buildup. 電池中加入去極化劑以防止氣體積聚。
Manganese dioxide acts as a common depolarizer. 二氧化錳是一種常見的去極化劑。
You can depolish the surface to give it a matte finish. 你可以磨掉表面的光澤，使其呈現啞光效果。
The sand will depolish the glass over time. 隨著時間推移，沙子會磨掉玻璃的光澤。
The depolishing process gives the metal a unique look. 磨砂處理賦予金屬獨特的外觀。
Chemical depolishing is used in some manufacturing steps. 在某些製造步驟中使用化學磨砂處理。
Thermal depolymerization can convert waste into fuel. 熱解聚可以將廢物轉化為燃料。
The depolymerization of plastic is a complex chemical process. 塑料的解聚是一個複雜的化學過程。
Enzymes are used to depolymerize cellulose. 酶被用來使纖維素解聚。
Heat can depolymerize certain types of rubber. 熱量可以使某些類型的橡膠解聚。
The witness was called to depone in court. 證人被傳喚到庭宣誓作證。
He will depone that he saw the accident occur. 他將宣誓作證他看到了事故發生。
The deponent signed the affidavit under oath. 宣誓證人在誓詞下簽署了宣誓書。
In Latin grammar, a deponent verb has a passive form but an active meaning. 在拉丁語法中，異態動詞具有被動形式但具主動意義。
The scandal served to depopularize the politician. 這場醜聞使這位政治家失去了大眾的支持。
The high prices might depopularize the brand. 高昂的價格可能會使該品牌失去大眾青睞。
The famine threatened to depopulate the entire region. 饑荒威脅要使整個地區的人口銳減。
Wars can depopulate countries very quickly. 戰爭可以很快地使國家的人口減少。
Rural depopulation is a major issue in many countries. 農村人口減少是許多國家的重大問題。
The plague led to the depopulation of many cities. 瘟疫導致許多城市人口銳減。
The government's policies had a depopulative effect on the village. 政府的政策對該村莊產生了人口減少的影響。
Depopulative trends are being monitored by sociologists. 社會學家正在監測人口減少的趨勢。

meaning: 導致人口減少的人或物
sentences: The disease acted as a ruthless depopulator. 這種疾病成了一個無情的人口削減者。
He was blamed as a depopulator of the countryside. 他被指責為農村人口流失的始作俑者。

meaning: 驅逐，特別是從一個國家驅逐。
sentences: Ask her to deport all illegals living in this town without a green card or the appropriate documents that prove their naturalized citizenship. 要求她驅逐居住在該鎮的所有沒有綠卡或證明其入籍公民身份的適當文件的非法移民。
To deport means to evict, especially from a country. 驅逐意味著驅逐，尤其是從一個國家驅逐。
The illegal immigrant was ordered to be deported. 該非法移民被勒令驅逐出境。
She always deports herself with great dignity. 她舉止總是非常端莊優雅。
He committed a deportable offense according to the law. 根據法律，他犯下了可被驅逐出境的罪行。
The status of the deportable residents remains uncertain. 可被驅逐居民的地位仍然不確定。

meaning: 驅逐出境或流放的行為，或被驅逐出境的狀態；流放;交通。
sentences: The term deportation refers to the act of deporting or exiling, or the state of being deported; banishment; transportation. 驅逐出境一詞是指驅逐或流放的行為，或被驅逐出境的狀態；流放;運輸。
The lesson introduced deportation as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了驅逐出境這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Thousands are facing deportation after the visa crackdown. 在簽證搜捕行動後，數千人面臨被驅逐出境。
The deportation process can take several months. 驅逐出境的程序可能需要幾個月的時間。
The deportee was sent back to his home country. 被驅逐者被送回了他的母國。
He shared his story as a deportee fleeing war. 他分享了他作為一名逃離戰爭的被驅逐者的故事。
The agency acted as the primary deporter for the state. 該機構是該州主要的驅逐執行單位。
He criticized the role of the deporter in the crisis. 他批評了驅逐者在危機中的角色。
The finishing school focused on the girls' deportment. 這所精修學校注重女孩們的儀態。
His military deportment made him stand out. 他的軍人儀態讓他脫穎而出。
The king was considered deposable by the rebellious nobles. 叛亂的貴族們認為國王是可以被廢黜的。
This type of waste is easily deposable. 這種類型的廢物很容易處理（存放）。
The deposal of the dictator was celebrated in the streets. 獨裁者的廢黜在街頭引起了慶祝。
She signed the decree for the official's deposal. 她簽署了罷免該官員的法令。
A military coup was staged to depose the president. 一場軍事政變被發動以罷免總統。
The witness was asked to depose the facts of the case. 證人被要求宣誓陳述案件的事實。
The deposer of the king was eventually executed. 廢黜國王的人最終被處決了。
The truth of the deposer's statement was questioned. 宣誓證人陳述的真實性受到了質疑。
I need to pay a security deposit before moving into the flat. 搬進公寓前我需要支付一筆保證金。
Please remember to deposit the check at the bank tomorrow. 請記得明天去銀行存這張支票。
You need to pay a deposit for the rental car. 你需要為租車支付押金。
The river will deposit silt along its banks. 河流會沿岸沉積淤泥。
The bank acts as a depositary for the company's funds. 銀行充當該公司資金的保管機構。
The treaty named a specific country as the official depositary. 該條約指定了一個特定國家作為官方保存國。
The depositation of layers occurs over millions of years. 地層的沉積發生在數百萬年間。
Precise depositation of materials is required in 3D printing. 3D 列印中需要材料的精確放置。
The depositee is responsible for the safety of the items. 被寄託者有責任確保物品的安全。
He acted as the depositee for the family jewels. 他擔任家族珠寶的保管人。

meaning: 沉積材料的行為，尤其是透過自然過程；由此產生的存款。
sentences: The term deposition refers to the act of depositing material, especially by a natural process; the resultant deposit. 沉積一詞是指沉積材料的行為，尤其是透過自然過程；由此產生的存款。
The lesson introduced deposition as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了沉積作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
She gave a formal deposition to the lawyers. 她向律師提供了一份正式的宣誓證詞。
The deposition of the king led to a civil war. 國王的廢黜導致了一場內戰。
Geologists studied the depositional environment of the fossils. 地質學家研究了這些化石的沉積環境。
Depositional landforms include deltas and beaches. 沉積地貌包括三角洲和海灘。
The depositive nature of the agreement was clear. 該協議的存放（或確定）性質是明確的。
This clause has a depositive effect on the outcome. 這一條款對結果具有確定性的影響。
The bank protects the interests of every depositor. 銀行保護每一位存款人的利益。
A new depositor opened an account this morning. 今天早上有一位新存款人開了戶。
The library is a depository for rare manuscripts. 這座圖書館是珍貴手稿的藏書館。
The safe serves as a secure depository for cash. 保險箱是存放現金的安全庫。
The depositum was held in trust until the owner returned. 寄託物被託管直到原主回來。
Legal rules govern the handling of a depositum. 法律規定了寄託物的處理方式。
The depositure of the official caused a scandal. 該官員的罷免引發了一場醜聞。
Depositure of sediment can change the river's path. 沉積物的堆積會改變河流的路徑。

meaning: 保留在體內某些特定部位（通常是皮內）的一劑藥物，從中逐漸吸收。
sentences: depot injection 儲庫注射

The term depot refers to a bolus of medication that remains sequestered in some particular site within the body, often intradermally, from which it is gradually absorbed. 術語「儲存庫」是指保留在體內某些特定部位（通常是皮內）的藥丸劑，從中逐漸吸收藥物。
The military depot stores ammunition and fuel. 軍事倉庫存放彈藥和燃料。
Meet me at the bus depot at noon. 中午在公車總站見我。
We need to depotentiate the threat before acting. 我們在採取行動前需要先消除（減弱）威脅。
The medication might depotentiate the effects of the toxin. 這種藥物可能會削弱毒素的效力。
Depotentiation of neurons is a topic in neuroscience. 神經元效力減弱是神經科學中的一個課題。
The depotentiation of the signal was unexpected. 信號的減弱出乎意料。
The depravation of morals was a concern for the elders. 道德敗壞是長輩們擔心的問題。
He witnessed the slow depravation of the neighborhood. 他見證了這個社區逐漸走向墮落。
Evil influences can deprave even the best of men. 邪惡的影響甚至會使最優秀的人墮落。
He was accused of trying to deprave the youth. 他被指控企圖腐蝕青少年。
He was a depraved criminal with no remorse. 他是一個墮落且毫無悔意的罪犯。
The novel depicts a depraved society in ruins. 這本小說描繪了一個廢墟中墮落的社會。
The tyrant ruled depravedly for decades. 暴君墮落地統治了幾十年。
He acted depravedly towards those under his care. 他對受其照顧的人表現得很墮落。
The depravedness of his actions shocked the public. 他行為的墮落程度震驚了公眾。
She wrote about the depravedness of the underworld. 她撰寫了關於黑社會墮落情況的文章。
He was known as a depraver of innocence. 他被稱為純真的腐蝕者。
The tempter acted as a clever depraver. 誘惑者扮演了一個聰明的引誘墮落者。
The wealth was depravingly misused. 財富被以一種令人墮落的方式誤用。
He smiled depravingly as he shared the secret. 當他分享祕密時，露出了墮落的微笑。
The levels of depravity in the city were alarming. 城市中的墮落程度令人震驚。
He lived a life of sin and depravity. 他過著充滿罪惡和墮落的生活。

meaning: 應反對的；可祈求免除的
sentences: The violent behavior was considered deprecable. 這種暴力行為被認為是應當反對的。
Such risks are deprecable if possible. 如果可能的話，這類風險應當盡力避免。
He tended to deprecate his own achievements. 他傾向於貶低自己的成就。
Many experts deprecate the use of this chemical. 許多專家反對使用這種化學物質。
She smiled deprecatingly when praised. 當受到表揚時，她謙虛地笑了笑。
He spoke deprecatingly of the new law. 他對這項新法案持反對且貶低的態度。
The plan met with a great deal of deprecation. 這個計劃遭到了大量的反對。
Self-deprecation can be a form of humor. 自嘲（自我貶低）可以是一種幽默形式。
He gave a deprecative shrug to the idea. 他對這個主意不以為然地聳了聳肩。
His deprecative tone hurt her feelings. 他那種輕視的語氣傷了她的感情。
As a deprecator of war, he joined the peace march. 作為一名戰爭的反對者，他參加了和平遊行。
The deprecator voiced his concerns at the meeting. 反對者在會議上表達了他的擔憂。
He looked deprecatorily at the old equipment. 他輕視地看著那些舊設備。
She waved her hand deprecatorily at the compliment. 她對那句讚美謙辭地擺了擺手。
The deprecatoriness of the review surprised the author. 評論的反對立場讓作者感到驚訝。
We noted the deprecatoriness in his attitude. 我們注意到了他態度中的反對傾向。
He made a deprecatory remark about the project. 他對該專案發表了反對意見。
She gave him a deprecatory look as if to apologize. 她給了他一個帶有歉意的眼神。
The machinery is a depreciable asset of the company. 機器設備是公司的可折舊資產。
Land is generally not a depreciable asset. 土地通常不是可折舊資產。
Market instability is a major depreciant for the currency. 市場不穩定是貨幣貶值的主要因素。
Poor maintenance is a depreciant of property value. 維護不良是房產價值的貶損因素。
The value of the car will depreciate over time. 車輛的價值會隨著時間折舊。
Do not depreciate the efforts of others. 不要輕視他人的努力。
He spoke depreciatingly of his rival's work. 他對競爭對手的作品評價不高（輕視）。
The assets were valued depreciatingly by the auditor. 審計員對資產進行了折舊評估。
asset depreciation 資產折舊
currency depreciation 貨幣貶值
Annual depreciation is calculated for tax purposes. 年度折舊是為了稅務目的而計算的。
The depreciation of the dollar affected international trade. 美元貶值影響了國際貿易。
His depreciative comments were unnecessary. 他那些輕視的言論是不必要的。
The company faced depreciative pressure on its shares. 公司面臨股價貶值的壓力。
He looked depreciatively at his own reflection. 他貶低地看著鏡中的自己。
She talked depreciatively about her former boss. 她帶有貶意地談論她的前老闆。
He is a persistent depreciator of modern art. 他是一個堅持貶低現代藝術的人。
The accountant acted as the main depreciator for the assets. 會計師擔任資產折舊的主要計算者。
We discussed the depreciatoriness of the current market. 我們討論了當前市場的貶值性質。
The depreciatoriness of his tone was obvious. 他語氣中的貶低意味很明顯。

meaning: 減少到較低的程度或形式。
sentences: The cubic function x + cx + d = 0, where one of the terms has a coefficient of zero, is a depressed cubic. 三次函數 x + cx + d = 0（其中一項的係數為零）是凹陷三次函數。

meaning: 受憂鬱症影響，情緒低落；頹廢;憂鬱的。
sentences: Something described as depressive is affected by depression, depressed; dispirited; melancholic. 形容憂鬱的東西是受憂鬱症影響的，鬱悶的；頹廢;憂鬱的。

meaning: 壓舌板；抑制肌；抑制因素
sentences: The doctor used a tongue depressor to look at her throat. 醫生用壓舌板檢查她的喉嚨。

Please give a brief description of the project. 請簡要說明一下這個項目。
The job description is available on our website. 職位說明可以在我們的網站上找到。
The descriptionist focused on facts rather than interpretations. 描寫主義者專注於事實而非解釋。
Descriptionists often value detail above all else. 描寫主義者通常認為細節高於一切。
The photo was descriptionless and left many questions. 這張照片沒有描述，留下了許多問題。
He submitted a descriptionless report, which was rejected. 他提交了一份沒有描述的報告，結果被拒絕了。
The book contains many descriptive passages about the beautiful landscape. 這本書包含了許多關於美景的描寫性段落。
He gave a very descriptive account of his trip through Southeast Asia. 他對自己的東南亞之旅做了非常生動的描述（描述性的敘述）。
The writer uses very descriptive language. 這位作家使用了非常生動的描寫性語言。
The title of the book is quite descriptive of its content. 書名很好地描寫了書的內容。
She wrote descriptively about her travels. 她對她的旅行進行了詳盡的描寫。
The scene was descriptively portrayed in the movie. 電影中生動地描繪了那個場景。
The descriptiveness of the text helps readers visualize the scene. 文本的描寫性有助於讀者想像場景。
The quality of the essay was enhanced by its descriptiveness. 文章的質量因其描寫性而得到提升。
Descriptory notes were added to the margins of the manuscript. 稿件的邊緣添加了描寫性的註釋。
His descriptory skills were evident in the presentation. 他的描寫技巧在演示中顯而易見。
The old poet sought to descrive the beauty of the woods. 這位老詩人試圖描寫森林的美麗。
The term 'descrive' is now considered archaic. 'descrive' 一詞現在被認為是古語。
We could just descry a small boat in the distance. 我們剛好能看見遠處的一艘小船。
The lookout was the first to descry the approaching ships. 瞭望員是第一個看見逼近船隻的人。
The economist tried to deseasonalize the sales data to see the underlying trend. 經濟學家試圖消除銷售數據的季節性因素，以觀察潛在趨勢。
We need to deseasonalize these figures before making any predictions. 在進行任何預測之前，我們需要消除這些數字的季節性影響。
It is a crime to desecrate a cemetery. 褻瀆公墓是一種犯罪行為。
Vandals desecrate the ancient temple with graffiti. 破壞者用塗鴉褻瀆了這座古老的神廟。
The desecrater of the shrine was eventually caught by the police. 神龕的褻瀆者最終被警方抓獲。
The community was outraged by the actions of the desecrater. 社區對褻瀆者的行為感到憤慨。
The desecration of the flag caused widespread protest. 褻瀆國旗的行為引起了廣泛的抗議。
They viewed the construction on the sacred site as a desecration. 他們將在聖地上的建築視為一種褻瀆。

meaning: 廢除派系化；取消部門化
sentences: The new management team wants to desectionalize the company structure. 新的管理團隊想要廢除公司的派系化結構。
They hope to desectionalize the organization to improve cooperation. 他們希望取消組織的部門限制以改善合作。
You should deseed the peppers before adding them to the sauce. 在將辣椒加入醬汁之前，你應該先去籽。
It is easier to deseed the grapes if they are cold. 如果葡萄是冰的，去籽會更容易。
The desegmentation of the market led to more uniform pricing. 市場的去分割化導致了更統一的定價。
The project focuses on the desegmentation of urban areas. 該項目專注於城市區域的整合。
The desegmented data revealed a different pattern. 整合後的數據揭示了一種不同的模式。
The desegmented organization operated more efficiently. 整合後的組織運作得更有效率。
The therapist used desensitization to help him overcome his fear of spiders. 治療師使用脫敏療法幫助他克服對蜘蛛的恐懼。
Prolonged exposure to violence can lead to emotional desensitization. 長期接觸暴力可能導致情感上的麻木。
The ointment will desensitize the area before the injection. 藥膏會在注射前使該區域脫敏。
Society has become desensitize to the plight of the homeless. 社會對無家可歸者的困境已變得麻木。
The dentist applied a desensitizer to the patient's teeth. 牙醫在病人的牙齒上塗抹了脫敏劑。
He used a desensitizer to reduce the skin irritation. 他使用脫敏劑來減輕皮膚過敏。
The author tried to desentimentalize the portrayal of war. 作者試圖除去對戰爭描寫中的感傷色彩。
We need to desentimentalize our view of the past. 我們需要以不帶感傷的眼光來看待過去。

meaning: 蜜蜂 (摩門教用語)；猶他州的舊稱
sentences: The word Deseret is found in the Book of Mormon. Deseret 這個詞出現在摩門經中。
The State of Deseret was a provisional state of the United States. Deseret 州曾是美國的一個臨時州。
The Sahara is the largest hot desert in the world. 撒哈拉沙漠是世界上最大的熱沙漠。
The soldiers had to cross the vast desert under the scorching sun. 士兵們必須在烈日下橫跨廣闊的沙漠。
The Sahara is the largest hot desert in the world. 撒哈拉沙漠是世界上最大的熱帶沙漠。
The camel is well-adapted to life in the desert. 駱駝非常適應沙漠中的生活。
The village was completely deserted after the factory closed. 工廠關閉後，村莊完全荒廢了。
We walked along the deserted beach in the evening. 我們傍晚在空無一人的海灘上散步。
They walked through the deserted streets at midnight. 他們在午夜穿過荒涼的街道。
The deserted village was hauntingly beautiful. 這個荒廢的村莊有一種淒涼的美感。
The house stood desertedly on the edge of the cliff. 那房子荒涼地矗立在懸崖邊緣。
He looked around desertedly after his friends left. 朋友們離開後，他孤寂地環顧四周。
The desertedness of the landscape was overwhelming. 景色的荒涼感令人震撼。
She felt the desertedness of the old house. 她感受到了這座舊房子的荒涼。
The army is searching for the deserter. 軍方正在搜尋那名逃兵。
He was branded a deserter for leaving his post. 他因擅離職守而被烙上了逃兵的印記。
His actions were deemed desertful of high praise. 他的行為被認為值得高度讚揚。
She has a desertful character that everyone admires. 她擁有每個人都欽佩的有價值的性格。
He was desertfully rewarded for his bravery. 他因其勇氣而得到了應有的獎勵。
She accepted the award desertfully. 她應得地接受了這個獎項。
The region has a desertic climate with very little rain. 該地區屬於沙漠氣候，降雨量極少。
Desertic plants have unique adaptations to save water. 沙漠植物具有獨特的適應性以節約用水。
Scientists are studying deserticolous insects. 科學家們正在研究棲息於沙漠中的昆蟲。
Many deserticolous species are nocturnal. 許多棲息於沙漠中的物種是夜行性的。
Desertion from the army is a serious offense. 擅離職守在軍中是嚴重的罪行。
The desertion of her husband left her in financial difficulty. 丈夫的遺棄使她陷入了財務困境。
Desertism is a growing concern in arid regions. 沙漠化在乾旱地區是一個日益嚴重的問題。
The spread of desertism can displace entire communities. 沙漠化的擴散會使整個社區流離失所。
His desertless behavior cost him the respect of his peers. 他那不值錢的行為讓他失去了同儕的尊重。
She felt the criticism was desertless and unfair. 她覺得那些批評是不值得且不公平的。
He was desertlessly blamed for the mistake. 他不值得地因為那個錯誤而受到指責。
She was desertlessly overlooked for the promotion. 她不應得地被忽視了晉升機會。
The abandoned construction site looked desertlike. 被遺棄的建築工地看起來像沙漠一樣。
The soil was dry and desertlike after the long drought. 長期乾旱後，土壤乾燥得像沙漠一樣。
The desertness of the interior was daunting. 內陸的荒涼令人望而生畏。
He was struck by the desertness of the moon's surface. 月球表面的荒涼令他震驚。
The novel features a desertress who leaves her family. 這部小說描寫了一位離開家庭的女性拋棄者。
A desertress in historical context often faced severe social stigma. 在歷史背景下，女逃兵通常面臨嚴重的社會污名。
Desertrice is an archaic term for a female who deserts. Desertrice 是一個指代拋棄者的女性的古語。
The old legal text mentioned the rights of the abandoned against the desertrice. 古老的法律文本提到了被遺棄者對女性拋棄者的權利。
The caravan headed desertward as the sun began to set. 當太陽開始下山時，商隊朝著沙漠方向前進。
They looked desertward, wondering what lay beyond the dunes. 他們望向沙漠，想知道沙丘之外是什麼。
You worked very hard, and you truly deserve your recent promotion. 妳工作非常努力，確實應得（值得）最近的升職。
Every child deserves to have a happy and healthy childhood today. 每個孩子現今都應得（值得）擁有一個快樂健康的童年。
You deserve a break after working so hard. 辛苦工作後，你值得休息一下。
They deserve to win the game. 他們應得贏得這場比賽。
She received a well-deserved promotion. 她獲得了應得的晉升。
The team celebrated their deserved victory. 團隊慶祝了他們應得的勝利。
He is deservedly famous for his contributions to science. 他因對科學的貢獻而理所當然地享有盛名。
The movie was deservedly popular among audiences. 這部電影理所當然地受到觀眾的歡迎。
There was no question about his deservedness for the award. 對於他獲得該獎項的應得性沒有疑問。
She analyzed the deservedness of the participants. 她分析了參與者的應得性。
He felt his life had become deserveless after the tragedy. 悲劇發生後，他覺得自己的生活變得毫無價值。
The king rewarded even the deserveless courtiers. 國王甚至獎勵了那些不值得的臣子。

The community honors its deservers every year. 社區每年都會表彰其有功者。
The charity provides help to deserving families. 該慈善機構向有需要的家庭提供幫助。
She is a very deserving candidate for the position. 她是該職位非常合適的候選人。
He was deservingly praised for his honesty. 他因誠實而受到了應有的讚揚。
She deservingly won the first prize. 她應得地獲得了頭獎。
The committee discussed the deservingness of each applicant. 委員會討論了每位申請人的應得程度。
Her deservingness was evident in her hard work. 她的應得性在她的努力工作中顯而易見。
The vet recommended that we desex our pet. 獸醫建議我們給寵物做絕育手術。
The desexing of the animals helped control the population. 動物的絕育有助於控制數量。
The desexualization of the workplace is a topic of discussion. 職場的去性化是一個討論話題。
Some artists explore the desexualization of the human body. 一些藝術家探索人體的去性化。
The uniforms were designed to desexualize the employees. 制服的設計旨在消除員工的性特徵。
He tried to desexualize the conversation to keep it professional. 他試圖使對話去性化以保持專業。

The artist painted her in a charming deshabille. 藝術家畫下了她穿著隨便但迷人的樣子。

meaning: 一種特殊的栽培鷹嘴豆品種。
sentences: The term desi refers to a particular variety of cultivated chickpea. 術語“desi”指的是一種特殊的栽培鷹嘴豆品種。
The lesson introduced desi as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 desi，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 南亞裔的；當地的 (指印度、巴基斯坦等)
sentences: They love eating authentic desi food. 他們喜歡吃正宗的南亞美食。
Desi culture is very vibrant in this city. 這個城市的南亞文化非常活躍。
Silica gel is a common desiccant found in shoeboxes. 矽膠是鞋盒中常見的乾燥劑。
The desiccant helps to keep the electronics dry. 乾燥劑有助於保持電子設備乾燥。
The hot sun will desiccate the soil quickly. 酷熱的太陽會很快使土壤乾涸。
Some foods are desiccated to preserve them for longer. 某些食物被脫水處理以延長保存期限。
The desiccation of the wetlands is a serious environmental issue. 濕地的乾涸是一個嚴重的環境問題。
Desiccation is used as a preservation technique in some cultures. 在某些文化中，脫水被用作一種保存技術。
The substance has a desiccative effect on the skin. 這種物質對皮膚有乾燥作用。
They used a desiccative powder to treat the wound. 他們使用乾燥粉末來處理傷口。
The samples were placed in a desiccator to keep them dry. 樣品被放在乾燥器中以保持乾燥。
A desiccator is an essential piece of equipment in a lab. 乾燥器是實驗室中必不可少的設備。
The wind had a desiccatory quality that chapped our lips. 風具有乾燥的特性，使我們的嘴唇乾裂。
Desiccatory processes are vital in industrial production. 乾燥過程在工業生產中至關重要。
He cast a desiderant look at his old home. 他向舊居投去懷念的目光。
The desiderant spirit of the poem touched many readers. 詩中渴望的精神感動了許多讀者。

meaning: 想要的東西；清單 (desideratum的複數)
sentences: Peace and security are among the major desiderata of the people. 和平與安全是人民的主要願望。
He listed his desiderata for the new office. 他列出了他對新辦公室的要求清單。
Many people desiderate a better life for their children. 許多人渴望為孩子提供更好的生活。
The philosopher desiderate a world without war. 這位哲學家渴望一個沒有戰爭的世界。
The desideration for wealth can be a powerful motivator. 對財富的渴望可以成為一個強大的動力。
His lifelong desideration was to travel around the world. 他一生的願望就是環遊世界。
In linguistics, a desiderative verb expresses a wish. 在語言學中，意願動詞表示願望。
The tone of her voice was desiderative. 她的語氣充滿了渴望。

meaning: 想要的東西；迫切需要之物
sentences: A stable economy is a common desideratum for all nations. 穩定的經濟是所有國家共同的願望。
Accuracy is the primary desideratum in scientific research. 準確性是科學研究中的首要要求。

meaning: 難看的東西；不雅觀之物
sentences: The pile of trash was a real desight in the neighborhood. 那堆垃圾在社區裡真的很難看。
They removed the old sign, calling it a desight. 他們拆除了舊招牌，稱其為礙眼的東西。
The desightment of the building was criticized by architects. 這座建築的難看遭到了建築師的批評。
They were concerned about the desightment of the natural landscape. 他們擔心自然景觀會變得醜陋。
She is learning how to design user-friendly mobile applications. 她正在學習如何設計用戶友好的行動應用程式。
The modern furniture design combines style with functionality. 現代家具設計將風格與功能性結合在一起。
She is studying graphic design at university. 她在大學學習平面設計。
The design of the new bridge is very modern. 這座新橋的設計非常現代化。
The layout of the house is highly designable. 房子的佈局是高度可設計的。
They explored different designable options for the product. 他們為產品探索了不同的可設計方案。

meaning: 標出並公佈；指出；表明；展示；透過標記或描述來區分。
sentences: to designate the boundaries of a country 指定一個國家的邊界
to designate the rioters who are to be arrested 指定要逮捕的暴徒
The government will designate the area as a national park. 政府將指定該地區為國家公園。
She was designated as the leader of the project. 她被指定為該項目的負責人。

meaning: 出於某種目的或職位的選擇和任命。
sentences: His designation as chief justice was controversial. 他被任命為首席大法官引起了爭議。
The term designation refers to selection and appointment for a purpose or office. 指定一詞是指為某種目的或職位而進行的選擇和任命。
The area was given a special designation for conservation. 該地區被賦予了特殊的保護指定。
What is your official job designation? 你的正式職稱是什麼？
The designative markers helped people find their way. 指定的標記幫助人們找到路。
He used designative language to clarify his points. 他使用具有指示性的語言來澄清他的觀點。
The numerical designator identifies each part in the machine. 數字標示物識別機器中的每個零件。

The sign had designatory symbols for tourists. 標誌上有供遊客使用的標示符號。
Designatory terms are used in legal documents. 法律文件中使用了指定術語。
The word 'apple' refers to the fruit as its designatum. “蘋果”這個詞指代作為其指稱對象的水果。
Philosophers study the relationship between a sign and its designatum. 哲學家研究符號與其指稱對象之間的關係。
The course is designed for beginners. 該課程是為初學者設計的。
Was the error accidental or designed? 這個錯誤是意外還是故意的？
He designedly avoided the subject. 他故意避開了那個話題。
The trap was designedly placed in their path. 陷阱被故意放置在他們的路徑上。
The designedness of the plan was evident to everyone. 計劃的周密性對每個人來說都是顯而易見的。
The detective looked for signs of designedness in the crime. 偵探在犯罪中尋找計畫性的跡象。
The designee will represent the director at the meeting. 被指定者將代表董事出席會議。
Please provide the contact information for your designee. 請提供您的指定人員的聯繫方式。
She works as a successful fashion designer in New York. 她在紐約擔任成功的服裝設計師。
The graphic designer created a stunning logo for the company. 平面設計師為公司設計了一個絕美的標誌。
He works as a web designer for a tech company. 他在一間科技公司擔任網頁設計師。
The fashion designer showcased her new collection. 時裝設計師展示了她的新系列。
His designful actions were meant to secure his position. 他那有計畫的行動是為了鞏固他的地位。
She had a designful expression on her face. 她臉上帶著一種頗有心機的表情。
The rumor was designfully spread to damage his reputation. 謠言被存心散播以損害他的名譽。
He acted designfully to achieve his goals. 他為了實現目標而有計畫地行動。
Her designfulness helped her navigate the complex politics of the office. 她的心計幫助她應對辦公室複雜的政治。
The designfulness of the strategy was impressive. 該策略的周密性令人印象深刻。
Be careful of that designing woman. 小心那個有心計的女人。
He had a designing nature that made others distrust him. 他天生多謀，這讓別人不信任他。
She smiled designingly at the wealthy bachelor. 她對著那位富有的單身漢有心地微笑。
He looked around designingly before speaking. 他在說話前有心地環顧四周。
Their meeting was designless and unexpected. 他們的會面是無意且出乎意料的。
A designless life can be confusing for some people. 對某些人來說，沒有計畫的生活可能會讓人困惑。
The seeds were designlessly scattered by the wind. 種子被風無意地吹散了。
He designlessly mentioned the secret in conversation. 他在對話中無意地提到了那個秘密。
The designlessness of the event made it feel natural. 活動的無計畫性讓它感覺很自然。
He appreciated the designlessness of the artistic style. 他欣賞這種藝術風格的隨意性。
Chemicals were used to desilicate the water before industrial use. 在工業使用之前，使用化學物質除去水中的矽酸鹽。
Engineers needed to desilicate the boiler system. 工程師需要除去鍋爐系統中的矽。
Desilicification is a common process in soil formation. 脫矽作用是土壤形成過程中的常見過程。
The study focuses on the desilicification of certain minerals. 該研究側重於某些礦物的脫矽作用。
Heat can desilicify certain types of rock. 熱量可以使某些類型的岩石脫矽。
Natural processes slowly desilicify the upper layers of the earth. 自然過程緩慢地使地表上層脫矽。

The cost of desiliconization has decreased with new technology. 隨著新技術的出現，脫矽的成本已經降低。

meaning: 能夠被偵測到、引人注目。

meaning: 使情況變得更糟；降低品質或價值；損害。
sentences: to deteriorate the mind 使精神惡化

meaning: 數字序列中的位置，表示位置數字系統中的位值。
sentences: The base-10 number 123.4 has four digits: the hundreds digit is 1, the tens digit is 2, the units digit is 3, and the tenths digit is 4. 以 10 為基數的數字 123.4 有四位：百位為 1，十位為 2，個位為 3，十分位為 4。

The chemist explained the reaction of dihalo alkanes. 化學家解釋了二鹵烷烴的反應。
Dihalogen molecules consist of two halogen atoms bonded together. 二鹵素分子由兩個鍵合在一起的鹵素原子組成。

The dihedral angle between the two planes was measured. 測量了兩個平面之間的二面角。

A dihedron is a figure formed by two intersecting planes. 二面體是由兩個相交平面形成的圖形。

The crystal has a dihexagonal pyramidal structure. 該晶體具有複六方錐體結構。

The dihexahedral form of the gemstone is very rare. 這種寶石的複六面體形態非常罕見。
They analyzed the dihexahedral facets of the crystal. 他們分析了晶體的複六面體面。
A dihexahedron is a solid figure with twelve faces. 複六面體是一個具有十二個面的立體圖形。
The mathematician described the properties of the dihexahedron. 數學家描述了複六面體的性質。
A dihybrid cross involves two different traits. 雙基因雜交涉及兩個不同的性狀。
The scientist observed the inheritance patterns of the dihybrid offspring. 科學家觀察了雙基因雜交後代的遺傳模式。

The experiment demonstrated the principles of dihybridism. 實驗演示了二性雜交的原理。
Calcium sulfate dihydrate is commonly known as gypsum. 二水合硫酸鈣通常被稱為石膏。

meaning: 二羥基的；含兩個氫原子的
sentences: Ethylene glycol is a dihydric alcohol. 乙二醇是一種二元醇。
The dihydric nature of the compound affects its solubility. 該化合物的二羥基性質影響其溶解度。

Dihydrite is a secondary mineral found in copper deposits. 二水磷銅礦是在銅礦床中發現的次生礦物。
The collector added a specimen of dihydrite to his collection. 收藏家在他的收藏中增加了一個二水磷銅礦標本。

meaning: 二氫銅卡品（一種生物鹼）
sentences: Dihydrocupreine is a derivative of quinine. 二氫銅卡品是奎寧的衍生物。

The chemist researched the synthesis of dihydrocuprin. 化學家研究了二氫銅卡品的合成。
