Dihydronaphthalene is used in organic synthesis and as a solvent. 二氫萘用於有機合成和作為溶劑。

Dihydrotachysterol is a synthetic analogue of vitamin D. 二氫速甾醇是維生素 D 的合成類似物。
The patient was prescribed dihydrotachysterol to treat hypocalcemia. 病人被開了二氫速甾醇來治療低血鈣症。

The chemist identified the unknown substance as a dihydroxy phenol. 化學家將未知物質鑑定為二羥基苯酚。

The medical case report discussed the implications of dihysteria. 醫療病例報告討論了雙子宮的影響。
A diiamb is a metrical foot consisting of two iambs. 二短長格是由兩個短長格組成的音步。
The poet used diiambs to create a specific rhythm in his verses. 詩人在他的詩句中使用二短長格來創造特定的節奏。
Diiambus is another term for a double iambic foot. Diiambus 是雙短長格音步的另一個術語。

Mercury diiodide is a bright red solid at room temperature. 二碘化汞在室溫下是亮紅色的固體。

meaning: 地波利亞節（古希臘節日）
sentences: Diipolia was an ancient Athenian festival in honor of Zeus Polieus. 地波利亞節是古代雅典紀念宙斯波利亞斯的節日。

Dika seeds are used to make a type of bread in West Africa. 迪卡種子在西非被用來製作一種麵包。

meaning: 迪卡馬里膠（一種藥用樹脂）
sentences: Dikamali is a resin obtained from Gardenia lucida used in Indian medicine. 迪卡馬里膠是從亮葉梔子中獲得的樹脂，用於印度醫藥。

A dikaryon is a fungal cell which has two genetically distinct nuclei. 雙核體是一個具有兩個遺傳不同細胞核的真菌細胞。
The formation of a dikaryon is a key step in the life cycle of many fungi. 雙核體的形成是許多真菌生命週期中的關鍵步驟。

The duration of the dikaryophase varies among different species. 雙核期的持續時間在不同物種之間各不相同。

meaning: 雙核體植物；雙核體真菌

The wildflowers growing on the dikeside were beautiful. 生長在堤邊的野花很漂亮。
Diketo compounds contain two ketone groups. 二酮化合物含有兩個酮基。
The chemist studied the reactivity of diketo derivatives. 化學家研究了二酮衍生物的反應性。
Acetylacetone is a well-known 1,3-diketone. 乙醯丙酮是一種著名的 1,3-二酮。

The dikkop is a nocturnal bird known for its large eyes. 石鴴是一種以大眼睛聞名的夜行性鳥類。

meaning: 用於性插入或其他性活動的裝置。
sentences: Anything's a dildo if you're brave enough. 只要你夠勇敢，任何東西都是假陽具。

meaning: 靜止；緩解；平靜；撫慰，如痛苦中的人。
sentences: To dill means to still; to assuage; to calm; to soothe, as one in pain. 蒔蘿意味著靜止；緩解；平靜；安慰，就像一個痛苦的人一樣。

To dilute means to become attenuated, thin, or weak. 稀釋意味著變得減弱、稀薄或弱化。

The lesson introduced dilution as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了稀釋這個易於理解的有用術語。
The light in the hallway was very dim and hard to see by. 走廊的燈光非常昏暗，很難看清路。

meaning: 表達渺小、年輕、不重要或可愛的字詞形式。
sentences: Booklet, the diminutive of book, means ‘small book’. Booklet是書的縮寫，意思是「小書」。

People often ding when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會叮叮噹噹。
We discussed the term dinghy in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 dinghy 這個詞。
Mia wrote down dinghy with the note "四小艇,小船板". Mia把 dinghy 記下來，並註記「四小艇,小船板」。
We had to dining quickly to meet the deadline. 為了趕上期限，我們必須迅速dining。
Our team dinings this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會dining這個步驟。
"dining car" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「dining car」非常好用。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "dining car" for next week. 老師要我們把「dining car」背起來，下週要用。
I heard "dining hall" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「dining hall」，就把它記進筆記本。
You can use "dining hall" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「dining hall」。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "dining room" for next week. 老師要我們把「dining room」背起來，下週要用。
You can use "dining room" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「dining room」。
What are we having for dinner tonight? 我們今晚晚餐吃什麼？
My family usually has dinner together at 7:00 p.m. 我們家通常在晚上七點一起吃晚餐。
You can use "dinner time" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「dinner time」。
After practice, I could use "dinner time" more confidently. 練習後，我更有自信地使用「dinner time」。
Dinosaurs ruled the Earth for millions of years before dying out. 恐龍在滅絕前統治了地球數百萬年。
The museum has an impressive collection of dinosaur fossils. 博物館收藏了大量的恐龍化石。

meaning: 後羅馬帝國的一個行政區劃，由希律四國建立。
sentences: The term diocese refers to an administrative division of the later Roman Empire, established by the Herodian tetrarchy. 教區一詞指的是後來的羅馬帝國的一個行政區劃，由希律四國建立。
The lesson introduced diocese as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了教區作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 每個分子中含有兩個氧原子的任何氧化物。
sentences: The term dioxide refers to any oxide containing two oxygen atoms in each molecule. 術語“二氧化物”是指每個分子中含有兩個氧原子的任何氧化物。
The lesson introduced dioxide as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了二氧化碳這個易於理解的有用術語。
I like to dip my strawberries in fresh whipped cream. 我喜歡把草莓蘸上新鮮的鮮奶油吃。
The sun started to dip below the horizon at the end of the day. 太陽在一天結束時開始落入地平線以下。
The article mentioned diphtheria in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 diphtheria。
We discussed the term diphtheria in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 diphtheria 這個詞。
She received her high school diploma during the ceremony today. 她在今天的典禮上拿到了高中畢業文憑。
A university diploma is essential for many professional careers. 對許多職業生涯來說，大學文憑是必備的。
The two countries decided to resolve the conflict through peaceful diplomacy. 兩國決定通過和平外交（手段）解決衝突。
He showed great diplomacy and patience while handling the difficult situation. 他在處理困難局面時表現出了出色的外交手腕和耐心。
The experienced diplomat managed to negotiate a peaceful treaty. 經驗豐富的外交官設法商定了一項和平條約。
He decided to study international relations to become a diplomat. 他決定攻讀國際關係以成為一名外交官。
The two countries decided to restore diplomatic relations after several years. 兩國決定在幾年後恢復外交關係。
He handled the difficult situation with great diplomatic skill and patience. 他以出色的外交手腕（技巧）和耐心處理了那個困難的局面。
We used "diplomatic bag" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「diplomatic bag」。
"diplomatic bag" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「diplomatic bag」非常好用。

meaning: 表示不良後果：可怕的；慘淡的。
sentences: dire consequences; to be in dire straits 可怕的後果；陷入困境
Something described as dire is expressing bad consequences: dreadful; dismal. 形容為可怕的事物表示不良後果：可怕的；可怕的；可怕的。慘淡。
Please provide a direct answer to my question. 請直接回答我的問題。
The hotel offers a direct shuttle service to the airport. 飯店提供直達機場的接駁車服務。
We used "direct deposit" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「direct deposit」。
"direct deposit" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「direct deposit」非常好用。
After practice, I could use "direct flight" more confidently. 練習後，我更有自信地使用「direct flight」。
I heard "direct flight" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「direct flight」，就把它記進筆記本。
After practice, I could use "direct object" more confidently. 練習後，我更有自信地使用「direct object」。
We used "direct object" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「direct object」。
Which direction should we go to find the train station? 我們該往哪個方向走才能找到火車站？
The manager gave clear directions on how to complete the task. 經理就如何完成任務給出了明確的指示。

meaning: 屬於或關於指導或幫助。
sentences: Something described as directional is of or relating to guidance or help. 被描述為方向性的事物屬於或與指導或幫助有關。
The word directional is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 方向性一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。
The manager issued a new directive regarding the company's security policies. 經理發布了關於公司安全政策的新指令。
All employees must follow the directives provided by the safety committee. 所有員工都必須遵循安全委員會提供的指示（指令）。
We reviewed the plan directly to avoid mistakes. 我們很directly地檢查計畫，以避免出錯。
Please read the instructions directly before you start. 開始前請先directly地閱讀說明。
The famous director is making a new movie about history. 那位著名導演正在拍一部關於歷史的新電影。
He was recently promoted to the position of marketing director. 他最近被提升為行銷總監。
We practiced using directorate in two different sentences. 我們練習把 directorate 放進兩個不同句子裡。
We discussed the term directorate in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 directorate 這個詞。
Without directorship, the team could not finish on time. 沒有directorship，團隊就無法準時完成。
We need more directorship to solve this issue effectively. 我們需要更多directorship才能有效解決這個問題。
You can find the contact information for all local businesses in the directory. 您可以在指南（目錄）中找到所有當地企業的聯繫資訊。
The computer directory contains all the files related to the new project. 電腦目錄包含了所有與新專案相關的文件。
"directory toll" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「directory toll」非常好用。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "directory toll" for next week. 老師要我們把「directory toll」背起來，下週要用。

meaning: 一個不被社會接受的人；一個奇怪的人。
sentences: The term dirk refers to a socially unacceptable person; an oddball. 「德克」一詞指的是不被社會接受的人；一個奇怪的人。
The lesson introduced dirk as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了德克這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Please wipe the dirt off your shoes before you enter. 進入前請擦掉鞋上的污垢。
The children were happily playing in the dirt in the garden. 孩子們正開心地在花園的泥土裡玩耍。
The dirtiness of the river is a major environmental concern. 河流的髒亂是一個主要的環境問題。
She was shocked by the dirtiness of the old kitchen. 她被那間舊廚房的髒亂嚇到了。
Don't sit on the ground; your clothes will get dirty. 別坐在地上，你的衣服會弄髒的。
The dirty dishes were piled up in the kitchen sink. 髒盤子在廚房水槽裡堆積如山。
The building has been modified to provide access for disability. 該建築已進行改裝以提供殘障人士進入的設施。
The organization provides support and guidance to people with disabilities. 該組織為身心障礙者（殘障）提供支持與指導。
The injury he sustained in the car accident might permanently disable him. 他在車禍中受的傷可能會使他永久殘廢。
Please make sure you disable the alarm system before entering the building. 進入大樓前請確保關閉（使無效）警報系統。
He is a disabled veteran who served his country. 他是一位曾為國效力的殘疾退伍軍人。
The feature is currently disabled in the software settings. 該功能目前在軟體設定中是禁用的。
One major disadvantage of living in the city is high house prices. 住在城市的一個主要劣勢是高房價。
We are at a significant disadvantage because we lack information. 我們處於明顯的劣勢，因為我們缺乏資訊。
I totally disagree with your opinion on this matter. 我完全不同意你在這件事上的看法。
They managed to reach an agreement despite their initial disagreements. 儘管最初意見不合，他們還是設法達成了協議。

meaning: 不同意或不同意的條件。
sentences: The theory shows considerable disagreement with the data. 該理論與數據顯示出相當大的分歧。
The two sides were in disagreement. 雙方意見不一。
The sun disappeared behind a thick dark cloud. 太陽消失在一朵厚厚的黑雲後面。
His fears disappeared as soon as he saw his mother's smile. 他一見到母親的笑容，恐懼就消失了。
Wireless phone technology led to the disappearance of once-common coiled cords for telephone handsets. 無線電話技術導致曾經常見的電話聽筒捲線消失。
The term disappearance refers to The action of disappearing or vanishing. 消失一詞是指消失或消失的動作。
I'm sorry to disappoint you, but I can't come to the party. 很抱歉讓你失望，但我不能來參加派對。
The movie's ending really disappointed the fans. 這部電影的結局真的讓影迷們很失望。
The sudden news of his resignation was a big disappointment to us. 他突然辭職的消息對我們來說是一個巨大的失望（心）。
I'm sorry if I managed to disappoint you with my performance. 如果我的表現竟然（能）讓妳失望，我很抱歉。
He was disappointed with the test results. 他對考試結果感到失望。
She looked disappointed when she heard the news. 聽到這個消息時，她看起來很失望。
The team's performance was very disappointing this season. 該隊這賽季的表現非常令人失望。
It was a disappointing end to a great holiday. 那是個美好假期的令人失望的終結。
To our great disappointment, the concert was canceled. 令我們大失所望的是，音樂會取消了。
He tried to hide his disappointment when he didn't get the job. 他沒得到那份工作時，試圖掩飾自己的失望。
Everyone glared in disapproval at the man talking loudly on the phone. 所有人都用不以為然的眼神看著那個在電話裡大聲說話的男人。
The term disapproval refers to the act of disapproving; condemnation. 不贊成一詞是指不贊成的行為；譴責。
Her parents strongly disapprove of her decision to quit her stable job. 她的父母強烈不贊成她辭掉穩定工作的決定。
The committee voted to disapprove the proposal for the new city park. 委員會投票否決（不認可）了關於新城市公園的提案。

meaning: 剝奪造成傷害的手段或意願；使之無害或無害。
sentences: to disarm a man's wrath 消除男人的憤怒
People often disarm when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會解除武裝。

meaning: 減少或廢除一個國家的軍事力量和軍備及其發動戰爭的能力。
sentences: The term disarmament refers to the reduction or the abolition of the military forces and armaments of a nation, and of its capability to wage war. 裁軍一詞是指減少或廢除一個國家的軍事力量和軍備及其發動戰爭的能力。
The lesson introduced disarmament as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了裁軍這個易於理解的有用術語。
The heavy rain resulted in a natural disaster for the region. 大雨導致了該地區的一場自然災難。
The project was a complete disaster due to the lack of planning. 由於缺乏規劃，這個專案簡直是一場災難。
The sudden economic crisis had a disastrous impact on the local community. 突然的經濟危機對當地社區產生了災難性的影響。
The company's new project turned out to be a disastrous failure and lost millions. 公司的新專案結果成了一次慘重的失敗，損失了數百萬。

meaning: 分裂或（導致）不復存在；驅散。
sentences: The president wanted to disband the scandal-plagued agency. 總統想解散這個醜聞纏身的機構。
I used to be in a punk band, but we disbanded in the early 1980s. 我曾經加入過一支龐克樂隊，但我們在 20 世紀 80 年代初解散了。
She stared at the winning lottery ticket in a state of total disbelief. 她盯著中獎的彩票，處於完全不敢置信（懷疑）的狀態。
His story was met with disbelief from his colleagues and friends. 他的故事遭到了同事和朋友的懷疑（不信）。
Please insert the installation disc into the computer. 請將安裝光碟插入電腦。
He is suffering from a slipped disc in his lower back. 他正受腰部椎間盤突出的困擾。
Please do not discard any plastic or glass bottles; they should be recycled. 請不要丟棄任何塑料或玻璃瓶；它們應該被回收。
He decided to discard his old clothes and buy some new ones for the trip. 他決定扔掉（拋棄）舊衣服，買些新的去旅行。

meaning: 將某事物與其他事物區分開來；區別或歧視。
sentences: He was too young to discern right from wrong. 他還太小，無法辨別是非。
To discern means to distinguish something as being different from something else; to differentiate or discriminate. 辨別的意思是區分某事物與其他事物的不同之處；來區別或歧視。

meaning: 可以辨別；可以透過使用感官或智力來檢測或推導。
sentences: There is a discernible performance difference between a Porsche and a Civic. 保時捷和思域之間存在明顯的性能差異。
The report describes the result as discernible. 報告稱結果是顯而易見的。

meaning: 具有敏銳的洞察力或選擇性的判斷力；敏銳的。
sentences: The discerning customer will appreciate our new range of quality clothing. 挑剔的顧客一定會欣賞我們新推出的優質服裝系列。
The report describes the result as discerning. 報告稱這項結果具有洞察力。
The factory was accused of discharging toxic chemicals into the local river. 工廠被指控向當地河流排放有毒化學物質。
The patient was officially discharged from the hospital earlier this morning. 病人今天清晨正式從醫院獲准出院（釋放）。
The famous philosopher had many dedicated disciples who followed his teachings. 這位著名的哲學家有許多致力於遵循其教導的弟子（門徒）。
He considered himself a lifelong disciple of the traditional martial arts. 他認為自己是傳統武術的終身信徒。
The principal was known as a strict disciplinarian. 校長以嚴格執行紀律著稱。
My father was a disciplinarian who expected us to follow the rules. 我的父親是個嚴守紀律的人，他要求我們遵守規則。
The employee faced disciplinary action following the violation of the rules. 該員工因違反規定面臨紀律處分（懲戒行動）。
The school has a strict disciplinary policy to maintain order and respect. 學校有著嚴格的紀律政策以維持秩序和尊重。
Strict discipline is essential for maintaining order in the army. 嚴格的紀律對於維持軍隊秩序至關重要。
She is currently studying the discipline of modern architecture. 她目前正攻讀現代建築這門學科（紀律）。

meaning: 對所有權、索賠權、利息、遺產或信託的否認、否認或放棄；放棄或放棄利益或財產。
sentences: The term disclaimer refers to a denial, disavowal, or renunciation, as of a title, claim, interest, estate, or trust; relinquishment or waiver of an interest or estate. 免責聲明一詞是指對所有權、索賠、利益、遺產或信託的否認、否認或放棄；放棄或放棄利益或財產。
The lesson introduced disclaimer as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了免責聲明作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The company is required by law to disclose its annual financial results. 法律要求公司必須公開其年度財務業績。
The journalist refused to disclose the names of her secret sources. 記者拒絕透露她的秘密消息來源的姓名。
The recent disclosure of the financial scandal shocked the entire country. 最近揭露的金融醜聞震驚了整個國家。
The company made a full disclosure of its annual financial results today. 公司今天全面公開（揭露）了其年度財務業績。

meaning: 音樂劇發行的完整合集。
sentences: The term discography refers to complete collection of the releases of a musical act. 唱片目錄一詞是指音樂作品發行的完整集合。
The lesson introduced discography as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了唱片編目作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The patient experienced some discomfort in his stomach after taking the medicine. 病人在服藥後感到胃部有些不適。
We apologize for any discomfort caused by the ongoing renovation work. 對於目前裝修工作帶來的任何不便（不適），我們深表歉意。

meaning: 容易引起不適、不安或驚慌。
sentences: Even with a safety harness, losing one's grip that high up is disconcerting. 即使有安全帶，在那麼高的地方失去控制也會令人不安。
The report describes the result as disconcerting. 報告稱這項結果令人不安。
Please make sure you disconnect the power supply before repairing the machine. 修理機器前請確保切斷電源。
There is a significant disconnect between the government's policies and public opinion. 政府政策與民意之間存在著明顯的脫節。
There's no use trying to make a call on the disconnected phone. 嘗試用已斷開的電話撥打電話是沒有用的。
The report describes the result as disconnected. 報告將結果描述為斷開連接。
The term discontent refers to a discontented person; a malcontent. 「不滿」一詞是指不滿的人；不滿者。
The lesson introduced discontent as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了不滿作為一個有用的術語來理解。
The manufacturer decided to discontinue the product due to low sales. 由於銷量低，製造商決定停產該產品。
We will discontinue the service at the end of the month. 我們將在月底停止這項服務。

meaning: 缺乏和諧、一致、和諧；不和諧。
sentences: The term discord refers to lack of concord, agreement, harmony; disaccord. 不和諧一詞是指缺乏和諧、一致、和諧；不和諧。
The lesson introduced discord as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「不和諧」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The store is offering a twenty percent discount on all items. 該店所有商品均提供八折（百分之二十）優惠。
Students are eligible for a discount at the local cinema. 學生在當地電影院享有折扣優惠。
Don't let one failure discourage you from trying again. 不要讓一次失敗讓你灰心喪氣，不敢再試。
The government is trying to discourage smoking by raising taxes. 政府正試圖透過提高稅收來勸阻吸菸。
Don't let the initial failure manage to discourage you from trying. 不要讓最初的失敗竟然（能）讓你打消嘗試的念頭（勸阻）。
His parents tried to discourage him from quitting his stable job. 他的父母試圖勸阻他不要辭掉穩定的工作。
The professor gave a fascinating discourse on the history of modern art. 教授就現代藝術史發表了一場引人入勝的演說（論述）。
It is important to maintain a civil and respectful discourse during the debate. 在辯論期間保持文明且尊重的談話非常重要。
Scientists have discovered a new species of exotic plants. 科學家發現了一種新的外來植物物種。
I discovered a cozy little café while exploring the neighborhood. 我在探索這一帶時發現了一家溫馨的小咖啡館。
The discovery of penicillin was a major breakthrough in medicine. 青黴素的發現是醫學上的一大突破。
The space mission led to many exciting scientific discoveries. 太空任務帶來了許多令人興奮的科學發現。
The scandal served to discredit the politician's entire career. 這場醜聞使這位政治家的整個職業生涯蒙羞。
New evidence has brought his theory into discredit. 新證據使他的理論遭到了質疑。
She made a discreet inquiry about the job vacancy to her colleague. 她向同事謹慎地打聽了一下職位空缺的情況。
The hotel provides a discreet and professional service to all its guests. 飯店為所有客人提供專業且低調（不引人注目）的服務。

meaning: 事實或情緒之間的不一致。
sentences: They found a discrepancy between the first set of test results and the second, and they're still trying to figure out why. 他們發現第一組測試結果和第二組測試結果之間存在差異，並且仍在試圖找出原因。
The term discrepancy refers to an inconsistency between facts or sentiments. 術語差異是指事實或情緒之間的不一致。

meaning: 析取的；包含析取或離散子句。
sentences: "I resign my life, but not my honour" is a discrete proposition. 「我放棄我的生命，但不放棄我的榮譽」是一個離散的命題。
Something described as discrete is disjunctive; containing a disjunctive or discretive clause. 被描述為離散的事物是析取的；包含析取或離散子句。
Bob showed great discretion despite his knowledge of the affair. 儘管鮑伯對這件事瞭如指掌，但他還是表現出了極大的謹慎。
The term discretion refers to the quality of being discreet. 謹慎一詞指的是謹慎的品質。
The law prohibits employers from discriminating against anyone based on their age. 法律禁止雇主因年齡而歧視任何人（給予區別待遇）。
It is important to learn how to discriminate between facts and opinions. 學會如何辨別事實與觀點非常重要。

meaning: 能夠察覺相似事物之間的細微差別；敏銳的
sentences: The report describes the result as discriminating. 報告稱這項結果具有歧視性。
Everyone noticed the discriminating tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的歧視語氣。
The organization works to fight against all forms of racial and gender discrimination. 該組織致力於打擊一切形式的種族和性別歧視。
The judge showed great discrimination in evaluating the complex evidence. 法官在評估複雜證據時展現了出色的辨別力。
We need to discuss the project details with the manager. 我們需要與經理討論專案細節。
Let's discuss the pros and cons of the new proposal. 讓我們討論一下新提案的優缺點。
The meeting was held for an open discussion about the issue. 召開會議是為了就該問題進行公開討論。
We had a long discussion about where to go for vacation. 我們就去哪裡度假討論了很久。
The cat viewed the cheap supermarket catfood with disdain and stalked away. 那隻貓不屑地看著超市裡的廉價貓糧，揚長而去。
The term disdain refers to a feeling of contempt or scorn. 蔑視一詞指的是輕蔑或蔑視的感覺。
Smoking is known to increase the risk of heart disease. 眾所周知，吸菸會增加患心臟病的風險。
Scientists are working hard to find a cure for the disease. 科學家正努力尋找這種疾病的治癒方法。
The economic crisis has disemployed thousands of workers. 經濟危機已導致數千名工人失業。
The company had to disemploy several staff members to reduce costs. 公司不得不解雇幾名員工以降低成本。

meaning: 化學物質的釋放或分離。
sentences: The term disengagement refers to The release or separation of a chemical. 術語脫離是指化學品的釋放或分離。
We learned the meaning of disengagement during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中，我們學習了脫離接觸的意義。
The corruption scandal was a major disgrace for the entire government. 腐敗醜聞是整個政府的重大恥辱（丟臉之事）。
He resigned in disgrace following the publication of the news story. 在新聞報導發表後，他因蒙羞（失寵）而辭職。

meaning: 帶來或導致恥辱；可恥的。
sentences: Something described as disgraceful is bringing or warranting disgrace; shameful. 被描述為可恥的事情是指帶來或應得的恥辱；可恥。
The word disgraceful is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 可恥這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。
The secret agent managed to disguise himself as a local worker. 秘密特務竟然（設法）將自己偽裝成當地工人。
Sometimes a difficult challenge manages to be a blessing in disguise. 有時困難的挑戰竟然是塞翁失馬（偽裝的祝福）。

meaning: 充當偽裝；為了隱藏身分而改變。
sentences: under a disguised name 以偽裝的名義
The report describes the result as disguised. 報告稱這一結果是偽裝的。
Everyone expressed their deep disgust at the news of the crime. 每個人都對這起罪行的消息表達了深深的厭惡。
The smell of the rotten food managed to fill everyone with disgust. 腐爛食物的味道竟然讓每個人都感到噁心（厭惡）。
The smell coming from the kitchen was absolutely disgusting. 廚房傳來的味道簡集太噁心了。
I find his behavior towards his colleagues disgusting. 我覺得他對待同事的行為令人反感。
My favorite Italian dish is spaghetti carbonara. 我最喜歡的義大利菜是培根蛋麵。
Please put the dirty dishes in the dishwasher. 請把髒盤子放進洗碗機裡。

meaning: 剝奪繼承權、剝奪繼承權的行為。
sentences: The term disherison refers to The act of disheriting, disinheritance. 「disherison」一詞指的是「disheriting」、「剝奪繼承權」的行為。
We learned the meaning of disherison today. 今天我們了解了disherison的意思。
People often disherit when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會拒絕。
Learning when to disherit is important. 學習何時放棄很重要。
The term disheritment refers to 剝奪繼承權. 「disheritment」一詞指的是逐步繼承權。
We learned the meaning of disheritment today. 今天我們了解了繼承的含義。
The wind disheveled the papers on the desk. 風吹亂了桌上的文件。
People often dishevel when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會衣衫不整。
The term disheveled refers to 蓬亂的. 蓬亂這個字指的是蓬亂的。
We learned the meaning of disheveled today. 今天我們學習了凌亂的意思。

meaning: 衣冠不整的狀態或品質。
sentences: The term dishevelment refers to The state or quality of being dishevelled. 術語「凌亂」是指凌亂的狀態或品質。
We learned the meaning of dishevelment today. 今天我們了解了凌亂的意思。
The term dishexecontahedroid refers to 碟形六面體. 術語“dishexecontahedroid”指的是碟形六面體。
We learned the meaning of dishexecontahedroid today. 今天我們學習了dishexecontahedroid的意思。
The term dishful refers to As much as a dish will hold. 「一盤菜」一詞是指一盤菜所能容納的量。
We learned the meaning of dishful today. 今天我們學習了dishful的意思。
The term dishley refers to 迪什利. 迪什利一詞指的是迪什利。
We learned the meaning of dishley today. 今天我們了解了dishley的意思。

meaning: 類似菜餚或菜餚的特徵。
sentences: The report describes the result as dishlike. 該報告將結果描述為“菜式”。
Everyone noticed the dishlike tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的平淡語氣。
The term dishling refers to 盤菜. 術語“Dishling”指的是“盤菜”。
We learned the meaning of dishling today. 今天我們了解了dishling的意思。
The term dishmaker refers to A manufacturer of dishes. 餐具製造商一詞是指餐具製造商。
We learned the meaning of dishmaker today. 今天我們了解了洗碗機的意思。
The term dishmaking refers to The manufacture of dishes. 術語“菜餚製作”是指菜餚的製作。
We learned the meaning of dishmaking today. 今天我們學習了餐具製作的意義。
The term dishmonger refers to 菜販子. 「Dishmonger」一詞指的是「菜販子」。
We learned the meaning of dishmonger today. 今天我們了解了dishmonger的意思。

meaning: 剝奪家園；使人無家可歸。
sentences: People often dishome when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會感到不舒服。
Learning when to dishome is important. 學習何時離開家很重要。
It's important to be honest; nobody trusts a dishonest person. 誠實很重要；沒人會信任不誠實的人。
The politician was accused of making dishonest statements. 該政治家被指控發表不誠實的言論。
The team responded dishonestly to the change. 該團隊對這一變化做出了不誠實的回應。
She handled the problem dishonestly during the meeting. 她在會議期間不誠實地處理了這個問題。
The term dishonor refers to American standard spelling of dishonour. 術語“恥辱”是指“恥辱”的美國標準拼寫。
We learned the meaning of dishonor today. 今天我們了解了恥辱的含義。
The report describes the result as dishonorable. 報告稱這一結果是不光彩的。
Everyone noticed the dishonorable tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這條訊息的不光彩的語氣。
The term dishonorableness refers to The property of being dishonorable. 不名譽一詞是指不名譽的性質。
We learned the meaning of dishonorableness today. 今天我們了解了不名譽的意思。
The team responded dishonorably to the change. 該團隊對這一變化做出了不光彩的反應。
She handled the problem dishonorably during the meeting. 她在會議中不光彩地處理了這個問題。

meaning: 造成名譽受損；傾向羞辱。
sentences: The report describes the result as dishonorary. 報告稱這一結果是不名譽的。
Everyone noticed the dishonorary tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的不敬語氣。
The term dishonorer refers to 不榮譽者. 恥辱者一詞是指不榮譽者。
We learned the meaning of dishonorer today. 今天我們了解了dishonorer的含義。
to dishorn cattle 使牛脫毛
People often dishorn when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會感到羞辱。
The term dishorner refers to One who dishorns an animal. 除毛者一詞指的是給動物脫毛的人。
We learned the meaning of dishorner today. 今天我們了解了dishorner的意思。
People often dishorse when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會失控。
Learning when to dishorse is important. 學習何時拋錨很重要。

meaning: 剝奪房屋或住宅；或者，驅逐。
sentences: People often dishouse when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會表達不滿。
Learning when to dishouse is important. 學習何時吐露很重要。

meaning: 平底的大盆或平底鍋，用來清洗餐具。
sentences: The term dishpan refers to A large basin or pan with a flat bottom in which dishes are washed. 洗碗盤一詞是指用來清洗餐具的平底大盆或平底鍋。
We learned the meaning of dishpan today. 今天我們學習了洗碗盤的意思。

meaning: 一個洗碗盤能裝多少東西。
sentences: The term dishpanful refers to As much as a dishpan will hold. 術語「洗碗盤」指的是洗碗盤所能容納的量。
We learned the meaning of dishpanful today. 今天我們學習了dispanful的意思。
You're not going out like that! You look like a dishrag! 你不許就這樣出去！你看起來就像一塊抹布！
The term dishrag refers to An unclean person; used in similes. 洗碗布一詞指的是不潔的人；用於比喻。
The term dishumanize refers to 非人性化. 非人化一詞指的是非人性化。
We learned the meaning of dishumanize today. 今天我們了解了非人化的意義。
Please load the dishes into the dishwasher. 請把碗盤放進洗碗機裡。
The new dishwasher is very quiet and energy-efficient. 這台新的洗碗機非常安靜且節能。
The term dishwashing refers to The act of cleaning the dishware. 洗碗一詞是指清潔餐具的行為。
We learned the meaning of dishwashing today. 今天我們了解了洗碗的意義。
The term dishwashings refers to 洗碗. 洗碗這個字指的是洗碗。
We learned the meaning of dishwashings today. 今天我們學習了洗碗的意義。

meaning: 清洗過餐具和炊具的水。
sentences: The dishwater drained away slowly. 洗碗水慢慢地流掉了。
The term dishwater refers to Water that dishes and cooking utensils have been washed in. 洗碗水一詞是指用來清洗餐具和炊具的水。
The report describes the result as dishwatery. 報告稱這項結果非常糟糕。
Everyone noticed the dishwatery tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的語氣。
The term dishwiper refers to A dish towel. 術語洗碗布是指洗碗巾。
We learned the meaning of dishwiper today. 今天我們了解了洗碗布的意思。
The term dishwiping refers to 擦碗. 洗碗這個字指的是擦碗。
We learned the meaning of dishwiping today. 今天我們了解了擦碗的意義。

meaning: 不認同某事；拒絕個人或團體身分等
sentences: People often disidentify when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會不認同。
Learning when to disidentify is important. 學習何時取消認同很重要。

meaning: 矽的氣態氫化物 SiH3-SiH3，乙烷的矽類似物
sentences: The term disilane refers to The gaseous hydride of silicon SiH3-SiH3, the silicon analog of ethane. 乙矽烷一詞是指矽的氣態氫化物SiH3-SiH3，乙烷的矽類似物。
We learned the meaning of disilane today. 今天我們了解了乙矽烷的意思。
The term disilicane refers to 二矽烷. 術語二矽烷是指二矽烷。
We learned the meaning of disilicane today. 今天我們了解了二矽的意思。

meaning: 任何含有兩個矽酸鹽陰離子的化合物。
sentences: The term disilicate refers to Any compound containing two silicate anions. 二矽酸鹽一詞是指含有兩個矽酸鹽陰離子的任何化合物。
We learned the meaning of disilicate today. 今天我們了解了二矽酸鹽的意思。
The term disilicic refers to 二矽酸. 術語二矽酸是指二矽酸。
We learned the meaning of disilicic today. 今天我們了解了二矽酸的意思。
The term disilicid refers to 二矽化物. 二矽化物一詞指的是二矽化物。
We learned the meaning of disilicid today. 今天我們了解了 disilicid 的意思。

meaning: 任何含有兩個矽原子的矽化物
sentences: The term disilicide refers to Any silicide containing two atoms of silicon. 術語二矽化物是指含有兩個矽原子的任何矽化物。
We learned the meaning of disilicide today. 今天我們了解了二矽化物的意思。
People often disillude when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會幻滅。
Learning when to disillude is important. 學會何時消除幻想很重要。
People often disilluminate when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會灰心喪志。
Learning when to disilluminate is important. 學習何時消除情緒很重要。

meaning: 祛除或擺脫錯誤信念或幻想的行為或過程。
sentences: The term disillusion refers to The act or process of disenchanting or freeing from a false belief or illusion. 幻滅一詞是指從錯誤信念或幻覺中幻滅或擺脫的行為或過程。
We learned the meaning of disillusion today. 今天我們了解了幻滅的涵義。
The term disillusionist refers to A person who has feelings of disillusionment. 幻滅主義者一詞指的是那些有幻滅感的人。
We learned the meaning of disillusionist today. 今天我們了解了幻滅主義者的意思。
People often disillusionize when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會幻滅。
Learning when to disillusionize is important. 學會何時幻滅很重要。
The term disillusionizer refers to One who disillusionizes. 幻滅者一詞指的是幻滅者。
We learned the meaning of disillusionizer today. 今天我們了解了幻滅者的意義。

meaning: 擺脫幻覺的行為；從中解脫出來的狀態。
sentences: The term disillusionment refers to The act of freeing from an illusion; the state of being freed therefrom. 幻滅一詞是指從幻覺中解脫出來的行為；從中解脫出來的狀態。
We learned the meaning of disillusionment today. 今天我們了解了幻滅的涵義。
The report describes the result as disillusive. 報告稱這項結果令人失望。
Everyone noticed the disillusive tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的失望語氣。
People often disimagine when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會放棄想像。
Learning when to disimagine is important. 學習何時進行想像很重要。
People often disimbitter when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會解除痛苦。
Learning when to disimbitter is important. 了解何時解除痛苦很重要。
The term disimitate refers to 異化. 術語“異化”指的是“異化”。
We learned the meaning of disimitate today. 今天我們學習了disimitit的意思。
The term disimitation refers to 異化. 術語異化指的是異化。
We learned the meaning of disimitation today. 今天我們了解了異化的涵義。
The term disimmure refers to 不安全. “disimmure”一詞指的是“不安全”。
We learned the meaning of disimmure today. 今天我們了解了disimmum的意思。

meaning: 擺脫公園，改變公園或公園用地的土地用途。
sentences: People often disimpark when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會下車。
Learning when to disimpark is important. 了解何時下車很重要。
The report describes the result as disimpassioned. 報告稱結果是冷漠的。
Everyone noticed the disimpassioned tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的冷靜語氣。

meaning: 從監禁狀態釋放或釋放。
sentences: People often disimprison when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會受到限制。
Learning when to disimprison is important. 了解何時禁止入獄很重要。
The term disimprisonment refers to release from prison. 解除監禁一詞是指從監獄釋放。
We learned the meaning of disimprisonment today. 今天我們了解了解除監禁的含義。
People often disimprove when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會表現不佳。
Learning when to disimprove is important. 學習何時停止改進很重要。

meaning: 從較好的狀態減少到較差的狀態。
sentences: The term disimprovement refers to Reduction from a better to a worse state. 術語「改善」是指從更好的狀態減少到較差的狀態。
We learned the meaning of disimprovement today. 今天我們了解了進步的涵義。
People often disincarcerate when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會出獄。
Learning when to disincarcerate is important. 了解何時出獄很重要。
The term disincarceration refers to A release from prison. 出獄一詞是指從監獄釋放。
We learned the meaning of disincarceration today. 今天我們了解了出獄的意思。

meaning: 剝離身體；使之變得非物質化。
sentences: People often disincarnate when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會轉世。
Learning when to disincarnate is important. 學習何時轉世很重要。
The term disincarnation refers to The process of ceasing to have a physical body. 轉世一詞是指不再擁有肉體的過程。
We learned the meaning of disincarnation today. 今天我們了解了轉世的意義。

meaning: 不願意的狀態；缺乏傾向、慾望或感情；輕微厭惡或不喜歡
sentences: disinclination to act 不願意採取行動
He showed a marked disinclination to speak. 他明顯不願意說話。

meaning: 使不情願；來減小傾斜度。
sentences: People often disincline when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們往往會拒絕。
Learning when to disincline is important. 學會何時拒絕很重要。

meaning: 撤銷建制城鎮或城市的憲章。
sentences: Four towns in the Quabbin Valley were disincorporated, and their residents relocated, to create a reservoir. 魁賓山谷的四個城鎮被解散，居民也被搬遷，以建造水庫。
People often disincorporate when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會分裂。

meaning: 剝奪公司的權利和特權。
sentences: The term disincorporation refers to Deprivation of the rights and privileges of a corporation. 解散一詞是指剝奪公司的權利和特權。
We learned the meaning of disincorporation today. 今天我們了解了解體的含義。
The term disincrust refers to 去殼. 「去殼」一詞指的是「去殼」。
We learned the meaning of disincrust today. 今天我們了解了disincrust的意思。
The term disincrustant refers to 去垢劑. 術語除垢劑是指去垢劑。
We learned the meaning of disincrustant today. 今天我們了解了disincrustant的意思。
The term disincrustion refers to 去束縛. 「去束縛」一詞指的是「去束縛」。
We learned the meaning of disincrustion today. 今天我們了解了非侵入性的意義。
People often disindividualize when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會去個體化。
Learning when to disindividualize is important. 學習何時去個人化很重要。
You should disinfect the wound to prevent infection. 你應該對傷口進行消毒以防感染。
The hospital uses strong chemicals to disinfect the rooms. 醫院使用強效化學品對房間進行奧毒。
She used a liquid disinfectant to clean the bathroom floor. 她用液體消毒劑清潔浴室地板。
Make sure you wear gloves when handling strong disinfectants. 使用強效消毒劑時請確保戴上手套。
The term disinfecter refers to 消毒器. 消毒機一詞指的是消毒器。
We learned the meaning of disinfecter today. 今天我們了解了消毒機的意思。

meaning: 用消毒材料處理以消滅有害微生物。
