There was a tiny red dot on the map showing our location. 地圖上有一個小紅點顯示我們的所在位置。
He is in his dotage and forgets things easily. 他年事已高，老糊塗了，很容易忘事。
In her dotage, she spoke only of her childhood. 在她晚年糊塗時，她只談論她的童年。
The dotal property was managed by her father. 嫁妝財產由她的父親管理。
They signed a dotal agreement before the wedding. 他們在婚禮前簽署了嫁妝協議。
The king was described as a rambling dotard by his enemies. 國王被他的敵人描述為一個語無倫次的老糊塗。
Don't listen to that old dotard! 別聽那個老糊塗的話！
The symptoms of dotardism include memory loss and confusion. 年老糊塗的症狀包括記憶喪失和困惑。
He wrote a paper on the social impact of dotardism. 他寫了一篇關於年老糊塗對社會影響的論文。
He behaved in a dotardly manner during the meeting. 他在會議期間表現得像個老糊塗。
That was a dotardly decision that cost them a lot. 那是一個代價高昂的愚蠢決定。
The onset of dotardy was gradual but noticeable. 年老糊塗的開始是緩慢但顯而易見的。
She cared for her husband through his years of dotardy. 在丈夫年老糊塗的歲月裡，她一直照顧著他。
The father decided to dotate his daughter with a large sum of money. 父親決定給女兒一大筆錢作為嫁妝。
Nature has dotated her with a beautiful voice. 上天賦予了她一副美麗的歌喉。
The hospital received a generous dotation from a local businessman. 醫院收到了當地一位商人的慷慨捐款。
The dotation of the school was completed last month. 學校的捐資已於上個月完成。
The herbalist used a dotchin to weigh the expensive medicine. 藥劑師用戥子來稱量昂貴的藥材。
A dotchin is a small Chinese steelyard used for precision weighing. 戥子是一種用於精確稱量的小型中國桿秤。
They dote on their only grandchild. 他們溺愛唯一的孫子。
He began to dote as he reached his nineties. 當他九十多歲時，他開始變得老糊塗了。
The doted child was very spoiled. 那個被溺愛的孩子非常任性。
The old man was becoming doted and confused. 那位老人變得老糊塗且困惑。
She is a real doter who buys everything for her son. 她是個真正的溺愛者，為兒子買所有東西。
He was once a brilliant scholar, but now he is just a doter. 他曾經是一位才華橫溢的學者，但現在只是一個老糊塗。
Dothideacea is a family of fungi in the order Dothideales. 座囊菌科是座囊菌目中的一個真菌科。
Scientists studied the life cycle of Dothideacea species. 科學家研究了座囊菌科物種的生命週期。
The researcher identified the sample as a dothideaceous fungus. 研究人員將樣本鑑定為座囊菌科真菌。
They studied the dothideaceous characteristics of the organism. 他們研究了該生物的座囊菌科特徵。
Dothideales is the largest order within the class Dothideomycetes. 座囊菌目是座囊菌綱中最大的一個目。
The classification of Dothideales was revised recently. 座囊菌目的分類最近被修訂了。
Dothidella is a genus of fungi that can cause plant diseases. Dothidella 是一個可能引起植物病害的真菌屬。
The fruit was infected by a species of Dothidella. 果實被一種座囊菌屬真菌感染了。
Dothienenteritis is an old term for typhoid fever. Dothienenteritis 是腸傷寒（傷寒）的一個舊稱。
The patient suffered from severe dothienenteritis. 病人患有嚴重的腸傷寒。
Dothiorella is a genus of fungi often associated with stem-end rot. 座囊殼屬是一個常與蒂腐病相關的真菌屬。
The orchard was affected by a Dothiorella outbreak. 果園受到座囊殼屬真菌爆發的影響。
His dotiness became more apparent each year. 他的老糊塗每年都變得更加明顯。
The scientist noted the dotiness of the pattern on the wings. 科學家注意到翅膀上圖案的點狀分佈。
He has a doting wife who takes care of everything. 他有一位溺愛他的妻子，打理著一切。
She gave him a doting look. 她給了他一個溺愛的眼神。
She spoke dotingly of her children. 她溺愛地談論著她的孩子們。
The parents looked dotingly at their newborn baby. 父母溺愛地看著他們剛出生的嬰兒。
Her dotingness was clear for everyone to see. 她的溺愛是每個人都看得到的。
He appreciated the dotingness of his grandparents. 他很感激祖父母對他的溺愛。
The old man gave a dotish answer to the question. 那位老人對那個問題做出了老糊塗的回答。
His behavior was considered dotish and irresponsible. 他的行為被認為是愚蠢且不負責任的。
The dotishness of the decision was evident. 這個決定的愚蠢之處是顯而易見的。
He showed signs of dotishness in his late eighties. 他在八十多歲時表現出了老糊塗的跡象。
I don't care a dotkin about what he says. 我一點也不在乎他說什麼。
He didn't have a dotkin left in his pocket. 他口袋裡連一分錢都沒剩。
The 'i' in Turkish can be dotless. 土耳其語中的 'i' 可以是無點的。
He designed a dotless font for the project. 他為該項目設計了一種無點字體。
The insect has dotlike markings on its back. 這隻昆蟲背部有點狀標記。
The stars appeared as dotlike lights in the sky. 星星在天空中呈現為點狀光芒。
Doto is a genus of small sea slugs. 多托是一個小海蛞蝓屬。
In Greek mythology, Doto was one of the Nereids. 在希臘神話中，多托是涅瑞伊得斯（海仙女）之一。
Dotonidae is a family of nudibranchs. 多托海牛科是裸鰓類動物的一個科。
The researcher studied the anatomy of Dotonidae. 研究人員研究了多托海牛科的解剖結構。
Dotriacontane is an alkane with the formula C32H66. 三十二烷是化學式為 C32H66 的烷烴。
The melting point of dotriacontane was measured in the lab. 實驗室測量了三十二烷的熔點。
Please print your name and address clearly on the dotted line. 請在虛線上清楚寫出您的姓名和地址。
The report describes the result as dotted. 報告將結果描述為虛線。
The dotter used a special tool to create the pattern. 點畫者使用一種特殊的工具來創造圖案。
He is a skilled dotter who works on delicate electronics. 他是一位熟練的點點工，在精密的電子設備上工作。
The dotterel is a small migratory bird. 小嘴鴴是一種小型候鳥。
Don't be such a dotterel; think before you act! 別當個笨蛋；三思而後行！
She laughed dottily at the joke. 她聽了那個笑話瘋癲地笑了起來。
He behaved dottily after the long flight. 長途飛行後他表現得有些古怪。
The old lady's dottiness was quite charming. 那位老太太的古怪行為相當迷人。
He was known for his dottiness and strange hobbies. 他以其瘋癲和奇怪的愛好而聞名。
The artist used a dotting technique to create the image. 藝術家使用了點畫技術來創作圖像。
He spent hours dotting the details of the map. 他花了幾個小時在點畫地圖的細節。
He knocked the dottle out of his pipe. 他把菸斗裡的菸草殘渣敲了出來。
The dottle remained at the bottom of the bowl. 菸草殘渣留在菸碗底部。
He used a fine dottler to apply the paint. 他使用一個細點畫工具來塗抹油漆。
The dottler is essential for creating small dots. 點畫工具對於創造小點是非常重要的。

meaning: 醫生 (義大利語/喜劇角色)
sentences: Il Dottore is a classic character in Commedia dell'arte. Il Dottore 是義大利即興喜劇中的一個經典角色。
The children addressed him as Dottore. 孩子們稱呼他為醫生。
She has a dotty old aunt who lives in the country. 她有一位住在鄉下的瘋癲老阿姨。
He wore a dotty tie to the party. 他戴著一條點狀圖案的領帶去參加派對。
The old log was doty and filled with insects. 舊原木已經朽爛了，裡面裝滿了昆蟲。
He decided not to use the doty wood for building. 他決定不使用朽爛的木材進行建築。
The travelers stopped at a small douar in the desert. 旅行者在沙漠中的一個小帳篷村停了下來。
Life in a douar is simple and traditional. 帳篷村的生活簡單而傳統。
The price of bread has doubled over the last few years. 麵包的價格在過去幾年翻了一倍。
We'd like to book a double room with a queen-size bed. 我們想定一間配有一張雙人床的雙人房。
The profits have doubled since last year. 利潤自去年以來已經翻倍了。
He worked with doubled effort to finish the project. 他加倍努力工作以完成該項目。
He would doubledamn the luck that led him there. 他會加倍咒罵引導他到那裡的運氣。
Stop trying to doubledamn everyone you disagree with. 別再試圖加倍咒罵每個你不同意的人了。

meaning: 分身；面貌極其相似的人
sentences: He saw his doubleganger in the mirror, but it wasn't him. 他在鏡子裡看到了他的分身，但那不是他。
She met someone who was a perfect doubleganger of her sister. 她遇到了一個長得跟她姐姐一模一樣的人。
The machine is equipped with a doublegear system. 該機器配備了複式齒輪系統。
The engineer explained the advantages of using a doublegear. 工程師解釋了使用複式齒輪的優點。
He made a doublehanded catch of the ball. 他雙手抓住了球。
She is a doublehanded player who can use either hand equally well. 她是一位兩手並用的球員，兩隻手都用得很好。
He lifted the heavy box doublehandedly. 他雙手抬起了沉重的盒子。
She played the piano doublehandedly with great skill. 她極其熟練地雙手彈奏鋼琴。
The job requires a high degree of doublehandedness. 這項工作需要高度的雙手操作能力。
His doublehandedness was an asset on the basketball court. 他的兩手並用能力在籃球場上是一項資產。
The artist used doublehatching to create shadow and texture. 藝術家使用交叉排線來創造陰影和紋理。
He learned the technique of doublehatching in his drawing class. 他在繪畫課上學習了交叉排線的技巧。
A doublehearted person cannot be trusted. 心懷二意的人不可信。
He gave a doublehearted promise that he never intended to keep. 他做了一個心懷二意的承諾，從未打算遵守。
His doubleheartedness eventually led to his downfall. 他的心懷二意最終導致了他的垮台。
The group was plagued by internal doubleheartedness and betrayal. 該組織飽受內部不誠實和背叛的困擾。
The animal is a doublehorned rhinoceros. 這隻動物是一頭雙角犀牛。
Ancient myths often feature doublehorned creatures. 古代神話中經常出現雙角生物。
The doubleleaf plant is a common sight in the forest. 雙葉植物在森林中隨處可見。
He identified the plant as a type of doubleleaf. 他將該植物鑑定為雙葉植物的一種。
Mammals are typically doublelunged animals. 哺乳動物通常是雙肺動物。
The researchers studied the respiratory efficiency of doublelunged organisms. 研究人員研究了雙肺生物的呼吸效率。
The doubleness of his character was intriguing. 他性格的雙重性引人入勝。
The philosopher explored the doubleness of human existence. 哲學家探索了人類存在的雙重性。
The electronic circuit includes a voltage doubler. 電子電路包括一個電壓倍增器。
He is a doubler who always tries to win twice as much. 他是一個總想贏得兩倍以上的加倍者。
In the Renaissance, men often wore a silk doublet. 在文藝復興時期，男性經常穿著絲綢緊身短上衣。
'Guard' and 'ward' are an example of a linguistic doublet. 'Guard' 和 'ward' 是語言學中雙重字的一個例子。
The doubleted knight stood guard at the gate. 穿著緊身短上衣的騎士在門口守衛。
The portrait depicts a doubleted nobleman. 這幅肖像畫描繪了一位穿著緊身短上衣的貴族。
He had a doubleton in spades. 他在黑桃中只有兩張牌。
The expert player knew how to handle a doubleton. 專業玩家知道如何處理雙張牌。
The brochure was printed in a doubletone process. 該手冊是採用雙色調工藝印刷的。
He preferred the doubletone look for his photographs. 他在他的照片中更喜歡雙色調的外觀。
The doubletree connects the two horses to the plow. 雙頭橫桿將兩匹馬連接到犁上。
The farmer repaired the broken doubletree. 農民修理了損壞的雙頭橫桿。
He rolled doublets twice in a row. 他連續兩次擲出雙六。
The collection included several doublets of the same stamp. 該收藏品包含幾張相同郵票的雙重件。
The doubling of the population caused housing problems. 人口翻倍造成了住房問題。
He noticed a doubling of the fabric at the seam. 他注意到接縫處織物有摺疊。
The pirates found a chest full of gold doubloons. 海盜發現了一個裝滿金幣的箱子。
A doubloon was a valuable coin in the 17th century. 杜布隆是 17 世紀的一種貴重硬幣。

meaning: 以雙重方式；嚴重程度或程度加倍。
sentences: My mother was always doubly careful when winding the grandfather clock. 我母親在給落地鐘上發條時總是加倍小心。
If someone acts doubly, they do so in a way that is in a double manner; with twice the severity or degree. 如果某人做雙重的事，他就是以雙重的方式做事。嚴重程度或程度的兩倍。
I have no doubt that you will achieve your goals. 我毫不懷疑你會實現你的目標。
There is some doubt about the success of the new project. 對新專案的成功存在一些疑慮。
The validity of his claim is highly doubtable. 他主張的有效性非常可疑。
They were faced with a doubtable situation. 他們面臨著一個可疑的局面。
He spoke doubtably about the success of the project. 他對計畫的成功表示懷疑。
The witness looked doubtably at the suspect. 證人懷疑地看著嫌疑犯。
He viewed the proposal doubtedly. 他對該提案持懷疑態度。
She nodded doubtedly, not quite convinced. 她懷疑地點點頭，不太相信。
There were many doubters who didn't believe the plan would work. 有許多懷疑者不相信這個計畫會奏效。
He is a natural doubter who questions everything. 他是一個天生的懷疑者，對一切都提出質疑。
It's doubtful whether the project will be finished on time. 是否能準時完成專案令人懷疑（疑慮）。
The manager gave a doubtful look when he heard the proposal. 經理聽到提案時露出了懷疑的表情。
He looked doubtfully at the cloudy sky. 他懷疑地看著陰雲密佈的天空。
She answered doubtfully, not sure of the facts. 她懷疑地回答，不確定事實。
The doubtfulness of the outcome made everyone nervous. 結果的不確定性讓每個人都感到緊張。
He expressed his doubtfulness about the new policy. 他對新政策表示懷疑。
He has a doubting mind. 他有一顆懷疑的心。
The Doubting Thomas needed to see it to believe it. 懷疑的多馬（典故）需要眼見為實。
She asked the question doubtingly. 她懷疑地問了這個問題。
He smiled doubtingly at their explanation. 他對他們的解釋露出了懷疑的微笑。
His doubtingness prevented him from taking action. 他的懷疑使他無法採取行動。
There was a sense of doubtingness in the air. 空氣中瀰漫著一種懷疑的感覺。
He will doubtless be successful in his new job. 他在新工作中無疑會成功的。
Doubtless, there is more to the story than we know. 無疑，故事中還有更多我們不知道的事。
Doubtlessly, she is the best candidate for the position. 無疑地，她是該職位的最佳人選。
He will doubtlessly arrive soon. 他無疑很快就會到達。
The doubtlessness of his conviction impressed everyone. 他信念的堅定給每個人留下了深刻印象。
They acted with total doubtlessness. 他們行動時充滿了絕對的確定性。
The politician was accused of being a doubtmonger. 這位政治家被指責為散佈懷疑的人。
Don't listen to the doubtmongers; keep moving forward. 別聽那些散佈懷疑的人的話；繼續前進。
The path ahead was dark and doubtous. 前方的路又黑又可疑。
They had doubtous thoughts about the journey. 他們對這次旅行有著懷疑的想法。
The weather looked doubtsome in the morning. 早晨的天氣看起來令人懷疑。
He gave a doubtsome account of his actions. 他對自己的行為做出了令人懷疑的說明。
The douc is a species of fish found in certain regions. 杜父魚是在某些地區發現的一種魚。
Researchers studied the habitat of the douc. 研究人員研究了杜父魚的棲息地。

meaning: 溫和的；文靜的 (蘇格蘭語)
sentences: She is a douce and sensible girl. 她是一個文靜且通情達理的女孩。
He led a douce life in the countryside. 他在鄉下過著溫和的生活。
She spoke doucely to the children. 她文靜地對孩子們說話。
They behaved doucely during the visit. 他們在訪問期間表現得很溫和。
Her douceness was appreciated by everyone who met her. 遇見她的每個人都欣賞她的文靜。
There was a sense of douceness in the small village. 小村莊裡有一種溫和的感覺。
He enjoyed a sweet doucet after the meal. 他飯後享用了一份甜點。
The term doucet was used in old hunting records. doucet 一詞被用於舊的狩獵記錄中。
To douche means to administer a douche to; to shower; to douse. To douche 的意思是對以下物件進行沖洗；淋浴；澆熄。
People may douche in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下進行沖洗。
Doucin is a variety of apple tree used for grafting. Doucin 是一種用於嫁接的蘋果樹品種。
The orchard planted several doucin trees. 果園種植了幾棵矮化蘋果樹。
The doucine adds a decorative touch to the molding. 波狀飾為裝飾線條增添了裝飾感。
He studied the different types of doucine in classical architecture. 他研究了古典建築中不同類型的反曲線飾。
She liked to doudle the baby to sleep. 她喜歡輕拍寶寶入睡。
They doudle their pets with lots of treats. 他們用很多零食寵愛他們的寵物。
Doug is a nickname for Douglas. 道格是道格拉斯的暱稱。
Doug went to the cinema with his friends. 道格和朋友們去了電影院。
My mother spent the afternoon kneading the dough for the fresh bread. 我媽媽花了一個下午揉新鮮麵包的麵團。
The children enjoyed helping their father make pizza dough in the kitchen. 孩子們喜歡幫助父親在廚房做披薩麵團。
The doughbird is a type of shorebird. 中杓鷸是一種岸鳥。
We spotted a doughbird near the estuary. 我們在河口附近發現了一隻中杓鷸。
His grandfather was a doughboy during World War I. 他的祖父是第一次世界大戰期間的一名美軍士兵。
They ate hot doughboys at the fair. 他們在集市上吃了熱炸麵團。

meaning: 懦弱的人；無主見的政治家
sentences: He was called a doughface for changing his mind so easily. 他因如此容易改變主意而被稱為懦夫。
The term doughface was used in 19th-century American politics. doughface 一詞曾用於 19 世紀的美國政治。

meaning: 懦弱行為；無主見的政治立場
sentences: Critics attacked his doughfaceism during the debate. 批評者在辯論中抨擊他的懦弱行為。
Doughfaceism was a controversial topic at the time. 懦弱行為在當時是一個有爭議的話題。
He served as a doughfoot in the infantry. 他在步兵中服役，是一名步兵。
The life of a doughfoot was hard and dangerous. 步兵的生活艱苦且危險。
Don't be a doughhead; use your brain! 別當個笨蛋；動動腦子！
He felt like a doughhead after making the mistake. 犯了那個錯誤後，他覺得自己像個笨蛋。
The doughiness of the bread indicated it wasn't fully baked. 麵包的麵團狀特徵顯示它沒有完全烤熟。
He didn't like the doughiness of the cake. 他不喜歡蛋糕那種半生不熟的感覺。
The clay had a doughlike consistency. 黏土具有像麵團一樣的稠度。
He shaped the doughlike material into a bowl. 他將那種像麵團一樣的材料塑造成一個碗。
The doughmaker prepared the bread for the bakery. 製麵團的人為麵包店準備麵包。
He worked as a professional doughmaker. 他是一位專業的製麵團工。
Doughmaking is the first step in baking bread. 製麵團是烤麵包的第一步。
He learned the secrets of doughmaking from his grandmother. 他從祖母那裡學到了製麵團的秘訣。
The doughman started his shift early in the morning. 製麵團工在清晨很早就開始輪班了。
He is a skilled doughman who can make perfect pizza dough. 他是一位熟練的製麵團工，能做出完美的披薩麵團。
I'd like a plain chocolate doughnut and a cup of coffee, please. 我想要一個原味巧克力甜甜圈和一杯咖啡。
The bakery is famous for its delicious and fresh doughnuts. 這家麵包店以其美味新鮮的甜甜圈聞名。
He dought do what was required of him. 他有能力做要求他做的事。
She dought help him in his time of need. 她能夠在他需要的時候幫助他。
The knights fought doughtily against the enemy. 騎士們與敵人勇敢地戰鬥。
He defended his position doughtily. 他勇敢地捍衛了自己的立場。
His doughtiness was celebrated throughout the kingdom. 他的勇氣在整個王國都受到慶頌。
The soldiers were honored for their doughtiness in battle. 士兵們因在戰鬥中的英勇而受到表彰。
The doughty warrior refused to surrender. 勇敢的戰士拒絕投降。
She is a doughty defender of human rights. 她是人權的堅定捍衛者。

meaning: 麵團狀的；半熟的；蒼白的
sentences: The cookies were still a bit doughy in the middle. 餅乾中間還有點麵團狀（沒熟）。
He has a doughy complexion. 他的臉色蒼白。

meaning: 道格拉斯 (男子名/姓)；道格拉斯松
sentences: Douglas fir is a common tree in the Pacific Northwest. 道格拉斯冷杉是太平洋西北地區常見的樹木。
Douglas is a very common Scottish surname. 道格拉斯是一個非常常見的蘇格蘭姓氏。
Doulocracy is a government run by slaves or former slaves. 奴隸統治是由奴隸或前奴隸管理的政府。
The historian studied the rare instances of doulocracy in history. 歷史學家研究了歷史上罕見的奴隸統治實例。
The doum palm is native to the Nile Valley. 杜姆掌原產於尼羅河谷。
The fruit of the doum palm is edible. 杜姆掌的果實是可以食用的。
Doundake bark is used in traditional medicine. 敦達克樹皮被用於傳統醫學中。
The researchers studied the properties of doundake. 研究人員研究了敦達克的特性。

meaning: 底部；末端 (蘇格蘭語)；綜絲環 (織布)
sentences: He sat on the doup of a tree. 他坐在一棵樹的底部。
The doup is a part of the loom used in weaving. 綜絲環是織布機中用於織造的一部分。
Douping is a technique used in leno weaving. 綜絲環編織法是絞織中使用的一種技術。
The worker practiced the art of douping. 工人練習了綜絲環編織藝術。
He has a dour expression on his face. 他臉上有一種陰沉的表情。
The dour landscape was covered in mist. 陰鬱的景色籠罩在薄霧中。
Dourine is a parasitic disease that affects horses. 馬媾疫是一種影響馬類的寄生蟲疾病。
The veterinarian diagnosed the horse with dourine. 獸醫診斷這匹馬患有馬媾疫。
He stared dourly at the intruder. 他陰沉地盯著入侵者。
She spoke dourly about the future. 她陰沉地談論著未來。
His dourness made it difficult to talk to him. 他的陰沉讓人很難與他交談。
The dourness of the weather matched his mood. 陰冷的天氣與他的心情相符。
He doused the fire with water. 他用水澆熄了火。
She doused her hair in the bucket. 她把頭髮浸入桶裡弄濕。
He is the official douser of the camp's lanterns. 他是營地燈籠的正式熄燈人。
The douser was used to put out the candles. 滅火器被用來熄滅蠟燭。
Please dout the candle before you leave. 請在離開前熄滅蠟燭。
He decided to dout the lights and go to sleep. 他決定關燈睡覺。
He used a brass douter to extinguish the lamp. 他用一個黃銅熄燈器熄滅了燈。
The douter was kept near the fireplace. 熄燈器被放在壁爐附近。
The situation was becoming increasingly doutous. 情況變得越來越可疑。
He had a doutous feeling about the stranger. 他對那個陌生人有一種懷疑的感覺。
The douzepers were the legendary peers of Charlemagne. 十二勇士是查理曼大帝傳說中的同伴。
Stories of the douzepers were popular in the Middle Ages. 關於十二勇士的故事在中世紀很流行。
A douzieme is a fraction representing one-twelfth. douzieme 是一個代表十二分之一的分數。
The term douzieme is used in some legal contexts. douzieme 一詞用於某些法律背景。
The white dove is a universal symbol of peace and love. 白鴿是和平與愛的通用象徵。
We saw a beautiful dove perched on the branch of a tree. 我們看到一隻漂亮的鴿子棲息在樹枝上。
The farm has an old stone dovecot. 農場有一個舊石鴿舍。
Pigeons were nesting in the dovecot. 鴿子在鴿舍裡築巢。
The doveflower is known for its unique shape. 鴿子花以其獨特的形狀而聞名。
They planted doveflowers in the garden. 他們在花園裡種了鴿子花。
Dovefoot is a common weed with pink flowers. 鴿足草是一種開粉紅色花的常見雜草。
He identified the plant as dovefoot geranium. 他將該植物鑑定為鴿足兒草。
A dovehouse was built on the roof. 屋頂上建了一個鴿舍。
He kept several varieties of pigeons in his dovehouse. 他在鴿舍裡養了幾種鴿子。
The dovekey is a small seabird found in the Arctic. 小海雀是發現於北極的一種小型海鳥。
We saw a flock of dovekeys near the iceberg. 我們在冰山附近看到了一群小海雀。
The dovekie is a small seabird that breeds in high Arctic regions. 小海雀是一種在高北極地區繁殖的小型海鳥。
We spotted several dovekies swimming near the ice floes. 我們發現幾隻小海雀在冰浮附近游泳。
The mother bird fed her tiny dovelet in the nest. 母鳥在巢中餵養她的小雛鴿。
A dovelet is a young pigeon or dove. dovelet 是指幼小的鴿子。
She has a dovelike voice that is very soothing. 她有一副像鴿子般溫和的嗓音，非常悅耳。
The child's dovelike nature made him very popular. 這孩子溫順的性格使他非常受歡迎。
The doveling fluttered its wings for the first time. 小雛鴿第一次拍打翅膀。
He carefully held the fragile doveling in his hands. 他小心翼翼地把脆弱的小雛鴿捧在手裡。
The white cliffs of Dover are a famous landmark in England. 多佛的白崖是英格蘭著名的地標。
He sailed across the channel in a Dover. 他乘坐多佛式帆船橫渡海峽。
The furniture was joined using a classic dovetail technique. 這件家具是用經典的鳩尾榫技術連接的。
Their plans dovetail perfectly with ours. 他們的計畫與我們的完美吻合。

meaning: 用鳩尾榫接合的；吻合的
sentences: The dovetailed corners of the box showed great craftsmanship. 盒子用鳩尾榫連接的角落展現了精湛的工藝。
The results were dovetailed with the previous findings. 結果與之前的發現相吻合。

meaning: 鳩尾榫接合機；鳩尾榫工
sentences: The woodworker used a dovetailer to speed up the process. 木工使用鳩尾榫接合機來加快進度。
He is a master dovetailer who creates beautiful joints. 他是一位能創造出漂亮接頭的鳩尾榫大師。
The pieces were arranged dovetailwise for maximum strength. 這些部件以鳩尾榫方式排列，以獲得最大強度。
He connected the boards dovetailwise. 他以鳩尾榫方式連接木板。
Doveweed is a common nuisance in Southern lawns. 鳩草是南方草坪上常見的一種麻煩雜草。
The farmer used herbicide to control the growth of doveweed. 農民使用除草劑來控制鳩草的生長。
Dovewood is a light-colored wood used in cabinetry. 鴿木是一種用於櫥櫃製作的淺色木材。
The interior of the box was lined with dovewood. 盒子的內部襯有鴿木。
The central bank adopted a dovish stance on interest rates. 中央銀行對利率採取了溫和的（鴿派）立場。
His dovish views on foreign policy were well known. 他在外交政策上的溫和觀點是眾所周知的。
Dovyalis caffra, also known as the Kei apple, produces edible fruit. 錫蘭莓（開普大醋栗）結出可食用的果實。
The botanist studied the various species of Dovyalis. 植物學家研究了錫蘭莓屬的各種物種。

meaning: 賦予；有能力 (古語)；道瓊工業平均指數
sentences: The king was pleased to dow the loyal subject with lands. 國王很高興能賜予忠誠的臣民土地。
The Dow rose significantly after the announcement. 道瓊指數在聲明發表後大幅上漲。

meaning: 可賦予嫁妝的；可繼承遺產的
sentences: The property is considered dowable under current law. 根據現行法律，該財產被認為是可繼承遺產的。
He wanted to ensure his daughter was dowable. 他想確保他的女兒能獲得嫁妝。

meaning: 持有已故丈夫的財產或所有權的寡婦。
sentences: A reclusive dowager owned the pastures across the river, and her farmhands ran beef cattle on them. 一位隱居的太后擁有河對岸的牧場，她的農場工人在這些牧場上飼養肉牛。
The term dowager refers to A widow holding property or title derived from her late husband. 「寡婦」一詞是指持有已故丈夫的財產或頭銜的寡婦。

meaning: 孀居貴婦的地位或作風
sentences: She carried herself with an air of refined dowagerism. 她舉止間帶著一種優雅的孀居貴婦作風。
The club was a bastion of traditional dowagerism. 該俱樂部是傳統孀居貴婦作風的堡壘。
They served a variety of dowcets at the banquet. 他們在宴會上供應了各種甜點。
The recipe for the dowcet was centuries old. 這道甜點的食譜已有數百年歷史。
Don't be such a dowd; put on some nice clothes. 別這麼邋遢；換上一些漂亮的衣服。
He was known as a bit of a dowd in his younger years. 他年輕時是有名的有點邋遢。
She was dressed dowdily for the formal event. 她參加正式活動時穿得很邋遢。
The room was decorated dowdily. 房間裝修得不時髦。
The dowdiness of her outfit was surprising. 她穿著的土氣令人驚訝。
He tried to hide the dowdiness of the old furniture. 他試圖掩蓋舊家具的陳舊感。
She wore a dowdy dress to the party. 她穿著一件土氣的連衣裙去參加派對。
The hotel looked a bit dowdy and needed renovation. 飯店看起來有點陳舊，需要翻新。

meaning: 有點邋遢的；有點土氣的
sentences: He has a dowdyish style that is quite outdated. 他的風格有點土氣，相當過時。
The curtains had a dowdyish pattern. 窗簾有一種土氣的圖案。
His dowdyism was a subject of much discussion among his peers. 他的不修邊幅是同齡人之間熱烈討論的話題。
She rebelled against the dowdyism of her upbringing. 她反抗成長過程中那種土氣的環境。
She was dowed with many natural gifts. 她天生被賦予了許多才華。
A dowed person is one who has the capacity to act. 一個有能力的人是指有行動能力的人。
The joints are reinforced with wooden dowels. 接合處用木栓加固。
He used a dowel to connect the two pieces of wood. 他用一個暗榫連接兩塊木板。
The bride's dower was quite substantial. 新娘的嫁妝相當豐厚。
She was entitled to a dower from her late husband's estate. 她有權從亡夫的遺產中繼承一份遺產。
They discussed the doweral rights of the widow. 他們討論了寡婦的遺產繼承權。
The doweral agreement was signed before the wedding. 嫁妝協議在婚禮前簽署。
The doweress continued to live in the family mansion. 享有遺產的寡婦繼續住在家族大宅裡。
She was a wealthy doweress who supported many local charities. 她是一位富有的享有遺產的寡婦，資助了許多當地慈善機構。
The dowerless girl found it difficult to marry into a wealthy family. 無嫁妝的女孩發現很難嫁入富裕家庭。
In many stories, dowerless heroines win the hearts of princes. 在許多故事中，沒有嫁妝的女主角贏得了王子的心。
She saved money for years to provide a dowery for her daughter. 她存了多年的錢為了給女兒提供嫁妝。
The custom of providing a dowery is still practiced in some cultures. 提供嫁妝的習俗在某些文化中仍然存在。

meaning: 沉悶的；愚笨的 (蘇格蘭語)
sentences: He was a dowf and silent man. 他是一個沉悶且安靜的人。
The atmosphere in the room was dowf and depressing. 房間裡的氣氛沉悶且令人壓抑。

meaning: 悲傷的；憂鬱的 (蘇格蘭語)
sentences: The old song had a dowie melody. 這首老歌有一種憂鬱的旋律。
He felt dowie after the loss of his friend. 失去朋友後，他感到很悲傷。
Dowieism was a religious movement founded by John Alexander Dowie. 道威教是由約翰·亞歷山大·道威創立的宗教運動。
The history of Dowieism is quite unique. 道威教的歷史相當獨特。
He was a firm Dowieite who followed the teachings strictly. 他是一位堅定的道威教信徒，嚴格遵守教義。
The Dowieites established a community in Zion, Illinois. 道威教信徒在伊利諾州錫安建立了一個社區。
She spoke dowily of her childhood. 她憂鬱地談論著她的童年。
He looked dowily out the window at the rain. 他憂鬱地望著窗外的雨。
There was a sense of dowiness in the old house. 舊房子裡有一種憂鬱的感覺。
His persistent dowiness concerned his family. 他持續的憂鬱讓他的家人感到擔心。
The dowitch is a type of shorebird known for its long bill. 長嘴半蹼鷸是一種以長喙聞名的岸鳥。
We observed a dowitch foraging in the mud. 我們觀察到一隻長嘴半蹼鷸在泥中覓食。
Short-billed dowitchers migrate long distances every year. 短嘴半蹼鷸每年都要長途遷徙。
The dowitcher is a common sight in wetlands during the spring. 遷徙期間，在濕地經常可以看到長嘴半蹼鷸。
The nest was lined with soft dowl. 鳥巢裡襯有柔軟的絨毛。
The dowl from the dandelion floated in the air. 蒲公英的絨毛在空中飄浮。
The shirts were made of cheap dowlas. 這些襯衫是由廉價的粗亞麻布製成的。
Dowlas was commonly used for durable clothing in the past. 粗亞麻布在過去常用於製作耐穿的衣服。

meaning: 無能力的；無用的 (蘇格蘭語)
sentences: He was a dowless lad who couldn't keep a job. 他是個沒用的小伙子，保不住工作。
Her dowless attempts at cooking were a disaster. 她在烹飪方面的無用嘗試簡直是一場災難。
She sat down on the bench and took a deep breath. 她在長椅上坐下，深吸了一口氣。
The temperature will go down significantly tonight. 氣溫今晚會顯著下降。
The heavy weight began to downbear the supports. 重壓開始壓低支撐物。
She managed to downbear all obstacles in her path. 她成功地克服了道路上的所有障礙。
The old man had a long, flowing downbeard. 那位老人留著長而飄逸的鬍鬚。
He stroked his downbeard while thinking. 他思考時撫摸著他的鬍鬚。
The conductor signaled the downbeat to start the music. 指揮發出第一拍的信號，音樂開始。
He gave a downbeat assessment of the economic situation. 他對經濟情勢做出了悲觀的評估。
They live downby the river. 他們住在河邊那下面。
He went downby to see what was happening. 他到下面去看看發生了什麼事。
She looked downcast after hearing the bad news. 聽到這個壞消息後，她看起來垂頭喪氣。
With downcast eyes, he apologized for his mistake. 他垂下眼睛，為自己的錯誤道歉。
He walked away downcastly after being rejected. 被拒絕後，他垂頭喪氣地走開了。
She spoke downcastly about her failed project. 她垂頭喪氣地談論著她失敗的計畫。
Her downcastness was apparent to everyone in the room. 每個人都能看出她的垂頭喪氣。
He tried to overcome his sense of downcastness. 他試圖克服自己的沮喪感。
The sudden downcome of the company surprised many investors. 該公司的突然倒閉讓許多投資者感到驚訝。
He experienced a great downcome in his political career. 他的政治生涯經歷了巨大的衰落。
The downcomer carries liquid from the top of the column to the bottom. 下降管將液體從塔頂輸送到塔底。
The engineer inspected the downcomer for any blockages. 工程師檢查了下降管是否有堵塞。
The downcoming of the rain brought relief to the parched fields. 雨水的降臨讓乾旱的田野得到了緩解。
They watched the downcoming sun. 他們看著下落的太陽。
Critics were quick to downcry the new artistic style. 批評者很快就大聲疾呼反對這種新的藝術風格。
They tried to downcry his achievements. 他們試圖貶低他的成就。
The bird has a downcurved bill. 這隻鳥有一個向下彎曲的喙。
He noticed the downcurved branches of the willow tree. 他注意到柳樹向下彎曲的樹枝。
The river began to downcut through the rocky terrain. 河流開始在岩石地帶進行下切作用。
The rapid downcut formed a deep canyon over millions of years. 快速的下切作用在數百萬年間形成了一個深邃的峽谷。
They hiked through the lush downdale. 他們徒步穿越了茂密的下行谷地。
The path led them deep into the downdale. 小徑帶領他們深入山谷。
The plane experienced a sudden downdraft during the storm. 飛機在風暴中經歷了突然的下降氣流。
A downdraft in the fireplace caused smoke to enter the room. 壁爐裡的下向氣流導致煙霧進入房間。
Normally those pills give me a boost, but last night they gave me a downer. 通常這些藥會讓我興奮，但昨晚它們讓我鎮靜下來。
The term downer refers to A negative drug trip. 術語“鎮靜劑”指的是消極的藥物之旅。
She wouldn't let him downface her in front of her friends. 她不會讓他當著朋友的面羞辱她。
He tried to downface the witness during the cross-examination. 他試圖在交叉詢問中藐視證人。

meaning: 財運急劇下滑；死亡或快速惡化，如地位或財富。
sentences: Many economic and political reasons led to the downfall of the Roman Empire. 許多經濟和政治原因導致了羅馬帝國的衰落。
The term downfall refers to a precipitous decline in fortune; death or rapid deterioration, as in status or wealth. 「衰退」一詞是指財富急劇下降。死亡或迅速惡化，如地位或財富。
The downfallen empire left behind many ruins. 沒落的帝國留下了許多廢墟。
He felt like a downfallen man after losing his job. 失去工作後，他覺得自己像個墮落的人。
The downfalling leaves covered the ground. 下落的樹葉覆蓋了地面。
They witnessed the downfalling of the regime. 他們見證了該政權的垮台。
The machine uses a downfeed mechanism to process the material. 該機器使用下向給料機制來處理材料。
You need to downfeed the drill carefully. 你需要向下緩慢進給鑽頭。
The downflow of water was controlled by a valve. 水的下流由一個閥門控制。
They observed the downflow of lava from the volcano. 他們觀察到火山岩漿的下流。
The geologist identified a downfold in the rock layers. 地質學家在岩層中鑑定出一個向褶。
The pressure caused the earth's crust to downfold. 壓力導致地殼向下褶皺。
The downfolded strata contained various fossils. 向褶地層包含各種化石。
They studied the downfolded structure of the mountain range. 他們研究了山脈的向褶結構。
He took the downgate to the village. 他走下坡路去村莊。
The downgate was slippery after the rain. 下坡路在雨後很滑。

meaning: 通常有利的事物的不利方面。
sentences: The downside of obtaining a higher rank is that far more work is expected. 獲得更高等級的缺點是需要做更多的工作。

meaning: 結婚時新娘家人向新郎或其家人支付的款項，例如財產或金錢。

She learned the art of natural dyeing from her grandmother. 她向祖母學習了天然染色的藝術。

meaning: 染色葉子 (用於染色的植物)
sentences: Certain dyeleaves can produce vibrant colors. 某些染色葉子可以產生鮮艷的顏色。

The dyemaker supplied colors to all the local tailors. 染料製造商向所有當地裁縫供應顏料。
He is a skilled dyemaker who knows all the formulas. 他是一位精通所有配方的熟練染料製造者。
The town has a long history of dyemaking. 這個小鎮有著悠久的染料製造歷史。
New technologies have changed the process of dyemaking. 新技術改變了染料製造的過程。

meaning: 從事染色工作的人，尤指以染布等為職業的人。
sentences: The term dyer refers to one who dyes, especially one who dyes cloth etc. as an occupation. 染工這個字指的是染色的人，尤其是以染色布等為職業的人。

His hands were stained with blue from his work as a dyester. 因為擔任染色工人，他的雙手被染成了藍色。
Synthetic dyestuffs are widely used in the clothing industry. 合成染料廣泛用於服裝工業。
The laboratory tested the safety of the new dyestuff. 實驗室測試了新染料的安全性。
The shop sells a variety of dyeware for artists. 這家商店為藝術家出售各種染色用品。
We need to restock our supply of dyeware. 我們需要補充染色用品的庫存。
Dyeweed is a common plant used for making yellow dye. 染料草是用於製造黃色染料的常見植物。
The field was covered in blooming dyeweed. 田野裡開滿了盛開的染料草。
Logwood is a type of dyewood used for purple colors. 蘇木是用於紫色的染料木。
The merchant imported high-quality dyewood from abroad. 商人從國外進口高品質的染料木。
The navigator used a dygogram to correct the compass readings. 導航員使用偏差曲線圖來修正指南針讀數。
Understanding a dygogram is essential for maritime navigation. 理解偏差曲線圖對於海上導航至關重要。
Our team dyings this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會dying這個步驟。
We had to dying quickly to meet the deadline. 為了趕上期限，我們必須迅速dying。
He looked dyingly at his family for one last time. 他最後一次垂死地看著他的家人。
The sun was dyingly beautiful as it set behind the mountains. 太陽在山後落下的樣子美極了。
The dyingness of the ancient tree was evident. 這棵古樹的垂死狀態顯而易見。
He captured the sense of dyingness in his poetry. 他在詩歌中捕捉到了那種垂死的感覺。

meaning: 充滿侵入岩的岩層中的裂縫；一個錯誤。
sentences: The term dyke refers to a fissure in a rock stratum filled with intrusive rock; a fault. 堤壩一詞是指充滿侵入岩的岩層中的裂縫；一個錯誤。
The lesson introduced dyke as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「堤壩」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The dykehopper is a small bird often seen near the coast. 堤間跳躍者是常見於海岸附近的小鳥。
We watched the dykehopper jump from stone to stone. 我們看著堤間跳躍者在石頭間跳躍。
The dyker worked to strengthen the river banks. 築堤工致力於加固河岸。
He followed in his father's footsteps as a dyker. 他跟隨父親的腳步成為一名築堤工。
The dykereeve was responsible for the maintenance of the seawall. 堤防管理員負責海堤的維護。
He submitted a report to the dykereeve about the erosion. 他就侵蝕問題向堤防管理員提交了報告。
Dylan Thomas was a famous Welsh poet. 狄倫·湯瑪斯是著名的威爾斯詩人。
Bob Dylan is a legendary American musician. 鮑勃·狄倫是傳奇的美國音樂家。
A dynagraph car is used to measure the pull of a locomotive. 測力車用於測量機車的牽引力。
The engineers analyzed the data from the dynagraph. 工程師分析了來自測力計的數據。
The astronomer used a dynameter to check the magnification. 天文學家使用放大率計來檢查放大倍率。
A precise dynameter is necessary for telescope calibration. 精確的放大率計對於望遠鏡校準是必要的。
They performed a dynametric analysis of the engine. 他們對引擎進行了測力分析。
The dynametric measurements were recorded automatically. 測力測量值被自動記錄。
The study used dynametrical techniques to evaluate performance. 該研究使用測力技術來評估性能。
Dynametrical data showed a significant increase in power. 測力數據顯示功率顯著增加。
Taipei is a very dynamic city with a lot of energy and vitality. 台北是一座充滿活力（動態的）與生命力的城市。
The company is looking for young and dynamic leaders to join now. 公司目前正尋找年輕且具活力的領導者加入。
She has a dynamical personality that inspires others. 她有著充滿活力的個性，能啟發他人。
They studied the dynamical systems of the planet. 他們研究了該行星的動力系統。

meaning: 以動態的方式：可變地，變化地。
sentences: If someone acts dynamically, they do so in a way that is in a dynamic way: variably, changingly. 如果某人的行為是動態的，那麼他們就是以一種動態的方式這樣做的：可變的、變化的。
The speaker responded dynamically during the discussion. 演講者在討論過程中積極回應。

meaning: 刺激成長、改變或發展的力量。
sentences: The changing dynamics in international politics led to such an outcome. 國際政治動態的變化導致了這樣的結果。
The term dynamics refers to Forces that stimulate growth, change, or development. 動態一詞是指刺激成長、變化或發展的力量。
The concept of dynamis is central to Aristotle's philosophy. 潛力的概念是亞里斯多德哲學的核心。
He believed in the inherent dynamis of every individual. 他相信每個人都有固有的潛力。

meaning: 動態 現實；活性能量；連續 更改 、 活動 。
sentences: The fact that the war is no longer the main issue in the election points to the dynamism of foreign affairs. 戰爭不再是選舉的主要問題這一事實表明了外交事務的 活力 。 戰爭不再是選舉的主要問題這一事實表明了外交事務的活力。 戰爭不再是選舉的主要問題這一事實表明了外交事務的活力。

The term dynamism refers to Dynamic reality; active energy; continuous change, progress, or activity. 動態一詞指的是 動態 現實；活性能量；連續 更改 、 rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/activity" title="activity">活動 。 動態一詞指的是動態現實；活性能量；持續的變化、進步或活動。 動態指的是動態現實；活性能量；連續改變 、 rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/activity" title="activity">活動 。
As a dynamist, he argued that force is the essence of matter. 作為一個動力論者，他認為力是物質的本質。
The dynamist perspective influenced modern physics. 動力論者的觀點影響了現代物理學。
The professor gave a lecture on dynamistic theories of nature. 教授做了一場關於自然動力論理論的講座。
She explored the dynamistic aspects of the universe. 她探索了宇宙的動力論方面。
The newspaper labeled the attacker a dangerous dynamitard. 報紙將襲擊者標記為危險的炸彈恐怖分子。
The dynamitard was caught before he could do any damage. 這位炸彈恐怖分子在造成損害前就被抓獲了。
dynamite the brakes 炸毀煞車
To dynamite means to apply maximum pressure to very quickly. 炸藥意味著非常快速地施加最大壓力。
The dynamiter carefully set the charges in the mine. 爆破工在礦井中仔細地設置了炸藥。
Police are searching for the notorious dynamiter. 警方正在搜尋那名臭名昭著的炸彈客。
The mixture had dynamitic properties and required careful handling. 該混合物具有炸藥性質，需要小心處理。
His speech had a dynamitic effect on the crowd. 他的演講對人群產生了具爆發性的影響。

The safety rules for dynamitical materials are very strict. 炸藥材料的安全規則非常嚴格。
The rocks were cleared dynamitically. 岩石是用炸藥清除的。
The news spread dynamitically across the internet. 這條新聞在網際網路上具爆發性地傳播開來。
The dynamiting of the bridge was captured on film. 橋樑的炸毀過程被拍攝了下來。
He was arrested for the illegal dynamiting of fish. 他因非法炸魚而被捕。
The situation was tense and had a dynamitish feel. 局勢緊張，有一種像炸藥般的感覺。

Philosophical dynamitism emphasizes the role of force and energy. 哲學動力論強調力和能量的作用。

As a dynamitist, he focused on the active powers of the mind. 作為動力論者，他專注於心靈的主動力量。

The dynamization of the project required more funding. 該項目的推動需要更多資金。
He spoke about the dynamization of the local economy. 他談到了當地經濟的活化。
The new manager tried to dynamize the sluggish department. 新經理試圖使這個死氣沉沉的部門充滿活力。
They wanted to dynamize the city center with new events. 他們想用新活動來活化市中心。
That new Vice President of Marketing is a real dynamo; sales have already gone up this quarter. 這位新任行銷副總裁是一位真正的活力四射的人。本季銷售額已經上升。

They analyzed the dynamoelectrical efficiency of the generator. 他們分析了發電機的電動效率。
Dynamogenesis refers to the generation of nerve force. 力能產生是指神經力的產生。
The research focused on the process of dynamogenesis in muscles. 該研究側重於肌肉中動力產生的過程。
The supplement is claimed to have a dynamogenic effect. 據稱該補充劑具有產生動力的效果。
They studied the dynamogenic properties of the new fuel. 他們研究了這種新燃料的動力產生性質。
Certain exercises are known to be dynamogenous. 眾所周知，某些運動能產生動力。
The dynamogenous nature of the reaction was analyzed. 分析了該反應的動力產生性質。

The muscles reacted dynamogenously to the stimulus. 肌肉對刺激產生了動力反應。
Dynamogeny is a term used in physiology and psychology. 動力產生是一個用於生理學和心理學的術語。
The study explored the factors that influence dynamogeny. 該研究探索了影響動力產生的因素。
The rocks showed clear dynamometamorphic features. 岩石顯示出明顯的動力變質特徵。

The engineer used a dynamometer to measure the engine's torque. 工程師使用功率計測量引擎的扭矩。

Dynamometric tests were conducted to evaluate the machine. 進行了測力測試以評估機器。
The dynamometric results were very consistent. 測力結果非常一致。
The laboratory is equipped with dynamometrical instruments. 實驗室配備了測力儀器。
They followed a dynamometrical approach in their research. 他們在研究中採用了測力方法。
Dynamometry is used in clinical settings to assess muscle function. 測力法在臨床環境中用於評估肌肉功能。
She specialized in the field of hand dynamometry. 她專攻手部測力法領域。
The dynamomorphic changes in the crust were analyzed. 分析了地殼中的動力變形變化。
Dynamomorphic structures were evident in the distorted rock layers. 在扭曲的岩層中動力變形結構很明顯。
A dynamoneure is a neuron that carries motor impulses. 運動神經元是傳導運動衝動的神經元。
The function of the dynamoneure was studied in early neurology. 早期神經科學研究了運動神經元的功能。

meaning: 動力電話機 (一種早期設備)
sentences: The dynamophone was an early invention for transmitting sound. 動力電話機是早期傳輸聲音的一項發明。
He read about the history of the dynamophone in an old journal. 他在一本舊期刊中讀到了關於動力電話機的歷史。
The dynamostatic balance of the structure was evaluated. 評估了該結構的動力靜力平衡。
They studied the dynamostatic forces acting on the bridge. 他們研究了作用在橋上的動力靜力。
A dynamotor combines a motor and a generator in one unit. 電動發電機將電動機和發電機組合在一個單元中。
The old radio set used a dynamotor for its power supply. 那台舊收音機使用電動發電機供電。
The powerful dynast ruled the region with an iron fist. 強大的統治者以鐵腕統治該地區。
He was the last surviving dynast of the ancient family. 他是那個古老家族最後倖存的成員。
Dynastes hercules is one of the largest beetles in the world. 赫拉克勒斯長戟大兜蟲是世界上最大的甲蟲之一。
The entomologist studied the life cycle of Dynastes. 昆蟲學家研究了大兜蟲屬的生命週期。
The book covers the dynastical history of China. 這本書涵蓋了中國的王朝歷史。
Dynastical succession was often a source of conflict. 王朝繼承通常是衝突的根源。
The families were linked dynastically through marriage. 這些家族通過聯姻在王朝層面上聯繫在一起。

They discussed the impact of dynasticism on political stability. 他們討論了朝代主義對政治穩定的影響。
The dynastid beetle has a very impressive horn. 大兜蟲有著令人印象深刻的角。
He added a rare dynastid to his collection. 他在收藏中增加了一隻罕見的大兜蟲。
Dynastidan larvae live in rotting wood. 大兜蟲的幼蟲生活在腐爛的木頭中。
They studied the dynastidan species of the rainforest. 他們研究了熱帶雨林中的大兜蟲物種。
Dynastides are a subfamily of the scarab beetle family. 大兜蟲類是金龜子科的一個亞科。
The research focused on the diversity of dynastides in the region. 研究重點在於該地區大兜蟲類的樣性。
Dynastinae is the scientific name for the rhinoceros beetle subfamily. Dynastinae 是犀角金龜亞科的科學名稱。
He is an expert on the classification of Dynastinae. 他是 Dynastinae 分類方面的專家。
The museum displayed various ancient artifacts from Ming dynasty. 博物館展示了來自明代的各種古代文物（王朝）。
The Tang Dynasty is often called the golden age of Chinese history. 唐朝（王朝）常被稱為中國歷史上的黃金時代。
A dynatron is a type of vacuum tube that exhibits negative resistance. 負阻管是一種表現出負電阻特性的電子管。
He used a dynatron oscillator in his radio circuit. 他在無線電電路中使用了負阻管振盪器。
One dyne is equal to 10^-5 Newtons. 一達因等於 10^-5 牛頓。
The unit dyne is often used in the CGS system of units. 達因這個單位常用於 CGS 單位制中。
The dyophone was a specialized device used in acoustic research. 二音電話機是用於聲學研究的專門設備。
The experiment required the use of a calibrated dyophone. 實驗需要使用經過校準的二音電話機。
A dyophysite believes that Christ has two natures, human and divine. 基督二性論者相信基督具有人性和神性兩種本性。
The Council of Chalcedon affirmed the dyophysite position. 迦克墩公會議確認了二性論者的立場。
The dyophysitic doctrine was a major topic of debate in the early church. 基督二性論教義是早期教會爭論的一個主要話題。
He wrote a book explaining the dyophysitic view of Christ. 他寫了一本書解釋二性論的基督觀。
The dyophysitical controversy lasted for many centuries. 二性論爭議持續了許多世紀。
They analyzed the dyophysitical arguments of the theologians. 他們分析了神學家們關於二性論的論據。
Dyophysitism is the theological belief in the two natures of Jesus. 基督二性論是關於耶穌具有兩種本性的神學信仰。
The history of Dyophysitism is central to Eastern Orthodox theology. 基督二性論的歷史對於東正教神學至關重要。
Dyotheism is the belief in two gods, often in conflict. 二神論是相信存在兩個神（通常是衝突的）的信仰。
Some ancient religions were based on a form of dyotheism. 一些古代宗教是基於某種形式的二神論。
A dyothelete believes that Christ had two wills, human and divine. 基督二志論者相信基督有兩種意志：人的意志和神的意志。
The dyothelete position was upheld by the Third Council of Constantinople. 基督二志論者的立場得到了第三次君士坦丁堡公會議的支持。
The dyotheletian view emphasizes the complete humanity and divinity of Christ. 二志論者的觀點強調了基督完全的人性和神性。
They studied the dyotheletian writings of the church fathers. 他們研究了教會神父們關於二志論的著作。
The dyotheletic doctrine was defined in the 7th century. 基督二志論教義於 7 世紀被定義。
He gave a lecture on the dyotheletic controversy. 他做了一場關於二志論爭議的講座。
The dyotheletical arguments were complex and philosophical. 二志論的論據複雜且具哲學性。
They analyzed the dyotheletical implications of the new decree. 他們分析了新法令中關於二志論的含義。
Dyotheletism is a theological doctrine about the two wills of Christ. 基督二志論是關於基督兩種意志的神學教義。
He studied the history of dyotheletism in the early Byzantine church. 他研究了拜占庭早期教會中基督二志論的歷史。
The term dyothelism is often used interchangeably with dyotheletism. dyothelism 這個詞通常與 dyotheletism 互換使用。
They discussed the implications of dyothelism for modern theology. 他們討論了基督二志論對現代神學的影響。
A dyphone is a unit used in speech synthesis. 雙音節是用於語音合成的單位。
The software uses a large database of dyphones to generate natural speech. 該軟體使用大型雙音節資料庫來生成自然語音。
Dysacousia can cause everyday sounds to feel painfully loud. 聽覺過敏會使日常聲音聽起來大得令人痛苦。
The patient was diagnosed with a mild form of dysacousia. 病人被診斷出患有輕微的聽覺過敏。
Dysacousis is often associated with damage to the inner ear. 聽覺過敏通常與內耳受損有關。
He sought treatment for the constant discomfort caused by his dysacousis. 他為聽覺過敏引起的持續不適尋求治療。
Dysanalyte is a rare mineral found in certain types of limestone. 鈮鐵礦是在某些類型的石灰岩中發現的罕見礦物。
The mineralogist identified the crystal as dysanalyte. 礦物學家鑑定該晶體為鈮鐵礦。
Dysaphia can result from nerve damage in the extremities. 觸覺障礙可能是由末梢神經受損引起的。
The patient experienced a loss of sensitivity due to dysaphia. 由於觸覺障礙，病人經歷了靈敏度喪失。
Dysarthria is a condition where muscle weakness affects speech. 構音障礙是一種肌肉虛弱影響說話的狀況。
Speech therapy can help people with dysarthria improve their clarity. 語言治療可以幫助構音障礙患者提高說話清晰度。
The patient's speech was dysarthric and difficult to understand. 病人的說話帶有構音障礙，很難理解。
He provided a detailed description of dysarthric symptoms. 他對構音障礙的症狀提供了詳細的描述。
Dysarthrosis involves a deformity or disease of a joint. 關節變形涉及關節的畸形或疾病。
The doctor examined the patient's knee for signs of dysarthrosis. 醫生檢查了病人的膝蓋是否有關節變形的跡象。
Dysbulia is a condition characterized by a weakened will. 意志力減退是以意志力減弱為特徵的一種狀況。
He struggled with dysbulia as a symptom of his depression. 他與作為憂鬱症症狀之一的意志力減退作鬥爭。
The patient showed dysbulic tendencies in his daily life. 病人在日常生活中顯示出意志力減退的傾向。
She described the dysbulic state as a lack of motivation. 她將意志力減退的狀態描述為缺乏動力。
Dyschiria is a disorder where the patient cannot tell which side of the body is being touched. 手感失調是一種病人無法區分身體哪一側受到觸碰的障礙。
Neuroscientists study cases of dyschiria to understand sensory perception. 神經科學家研究手感失調案例以了解感官知覺。
Dyschroa refers to an abnormal color of the skin. 膚色異常是指皮膚顏色不正常。
The dermatologist investigated the cause of the patient's dyschroa. 皮膚科醫生調查了病人膚色異常的原因。
Dyschroia can be a sign of an underlying health problem. 膚色不良可能是潛在健康問題的跡象。
Her face showed a slight dyschroia after the long illness. 長期生病後，她的臉色顯得有些不良。
Dyschromatopsia is commonly known as color blindness. 色覺障礙通常被稱為色盲。
Tests were conducted to determine the severity of his dyschromatopsia. 進行了測試以確定他色覺障礙的嚴重程度。
He has a dyschromatoptic vision that makes certain colors hard to distinguish. 他有色覺障礙視力，使得某些顏色難以區分。
The child's dyschromatoptic condition was discovered at school. 這孩子的色覺障礙狀況在學校被發現。
The two events were dyschronous and did not overlap. 這兩個事件是不同時的，沒有重疊。
They analyzed the dyschronous signals in the communication system. 他們分析了通訊系統中的異時信號。
Blood dyscrasia is a term used for abnormal conditions of the blood. 血液不調是用於血液異常狀況的術語。
The doctor monitored the patient for any signs of dyscrasia. 醫生監測病人是否有任何體液不調的跡象。
He suffered from a dyscrasial condition that required constant care. 他患有一種需要持續照護的體液不調狀況。
The researcher studied the dyscrasial effects of the toxin. 研究人員研究了毒素的體液不調效應。
The patient's dyscrasic symptoms were carefully recorded. 病人的體液不調症狀被仔細記錄。
Dyscrasic disorders can affect multiple organ systems. 體液不調障礙可能影響多個器官系統。
Dyscrasite is a silver-white mineral containing antimony and silver. 銻銀礦是一種含有銻和銀的銀白色礦物。
The geologist found a sample of dyscrasite in the silver mine. 地質學家在銀礦中發現了一個銻銀礦樣本。
The dyscratic state of the patient made treatment difficult. 病人的體液不調狀態使得治療變得很困難。
They investigated the dyscratic nature of the illness. 他們調查了這種疾病的體液不調性質。
The rock had a dyscrystalline structure that was hard to analyze. 這塊岩石具有難以分析的不完全結晶結構。
They observed the dyscrystalline formations in the volcanic sample. 他們在火山樣本中觀察到了不完全結晶的構造。
Dysenteric symptoms include severe diarrhea and abdominal pain. 痢疾症狀包括嚴重的腹瀉和腹痛。
The patient was treated for a dysenteric infection. 病人因痢疾感染接受了治療。
They analyzed the dysenterical outbreaks in the region. 他們分析了該地區痢疾的爆發情況。
Proper sanitation can prevent dysenterical diseases. 正確的衛生設施可以預防痢疾疾病。
Dysentery is caused by contaminated food or water. 痢疾是由污染的食物或水引起的。
He contracted dysentery during his trip to the tropical area. 他在熱帶地區旅行期間染上了痢疾。
The patient has a dysepulotic wound that requires special attention. 病人有個難以癒合的傷口，需要特別注意。
Special dressings were used for the dysepulotic ulcer. 為這個難以癒合的潰瘍使用了特殊的敷料。
The dysepulotical nature of the injury made recovery slow. 傷口難以癒合的性質使得恢復變慢。
They studied the causes of dysepulotical conditions in elderly patients. 他們研究了老年患者傷口難以癒合的原因。
Dyserethisia involves an abnormal sensitivity to stimuli. 刺激反應不調涉及對刺激的異常敏感性。
The patient experienced dyserethisia in his nervous system. 病人的神經系統經歷了刺激反應不調。
Dysergasia is a term used for mental disorders caused by brain dysfunction. 腦功能不全是個用於腦功能障礙引起的精神障礙的術語。
Symptoms of dysergasia include confusion and disorientation. 腦功能不全的症狀包括混亂和迷失方向。
Dysergia makes it difficult to coordinate muscular movements. 肌肉運動不協調使得難以協調肌肉運動。
The patient showed signs of dysergia during the physical exam. 病人在體檢期間顯示出肌肉運動不協調的跡象。
Dysesthesia can cause a painful or unpleasant sensation. 觸覺異常會引起疼痛或不舒服的感覺。
He described the dysesthesia in his arm as a burning feeling. 他將手臂上的觸覺異常描述為一種灼熱感。
The dysesthetic response was triggered by light touch. 輕微的觸碰觸發了觸覺異常反應。
She sought treatment for the dysesthetic pain in her legs. 她為腿部觸覺異常引起的疼痛尋求治療。

meaning: 無法正常運作；發生故障。
sentences: To dysfunction means to fail to function correctly; to malfunction. 功能障礙意味著無法正常運作；發生故障。
People may dysfunction in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同情況下出現功能障礙。
The researchers studied the dysgenesic effects of certain chemicals. 研究人員研究了某些化學物質對生殖能力障礙的影響。
Dysgenesic conditions can affect both animals and humans. 生殖能力障礙狀況可能影響動物和人類。
Ovarian dysgenesis is a congenital condition. 卵巢發育不全是種先天性疾病。
The study explored the causes of hybrid dysgenesis in fruit flies. 該研究探索了果蠅雜種敗育的原因。

meaning: 發育不良的；生殖力障礙的
sentences: The dysgenetic traits were passed down through generations. 發育不良的特徵代代相傳。
Environmental factors can cause dysgenetic changes in a population. 環境因素可能導致群體中發育不良的變化。
Dysgenic practices were criticized by many ethicists. 劣生行為受到了許多倫理學家的批評。
The report discussed the dysgenic trends in modern society. 報告討論了現代社會中的劣生趨勢。
They analyzed the dysgenical effects of the policy. 他們分析了該政策對劣生的影響。
The dysgenical impact on the population was significant. 對人口的劣生影響是顯著的。
Dysgenics is the study of factors that lead to the accumulation of harmful traits. 劣生學是研究導致有害特徵累積的因素的學問。
The concept of dysgenics is often controversial. 劣生學的概念通常具有爭議性。
The dysgeogenous rock layers supported very little vegetation. 產生貧瘠土壤的岩層幾乎不生長植被。
They mapped the dysgeogenous regions of the mountain range. 他們繪製了該山脈產生貧瘠土壤的區域。
Dysgnosia can affect a person's ability to recognize objects. 認知障礙可能影響一個人辨認物體的能力。
The therapist worked with the patient to overcome her dysgnosia. 治療師與病人一起努力克服她的認知障礙。
Dysgraphia makes it difficult to write clearly and consistently. 書寫障礙使得難以清晰且一致地書寫。
Students with dysgraphia may need extra time for written assignments. 患有書寫障礙的學生可能需要額外的時間來完成書面作業。
Dysidrosis causes small blisters to form on the hands and feet. 汗皰疹會導致手腳形成小水泡。
Stress is a common trigger for dysidrosis. 壓力是汗皰疹常見的誘因。
Dyskeratosis is an abnormal keratinization of cells. 角化不良是細胞異常角化的現象。
Dyskeratosis congenita is a rare genetic disorder. 先天性角化不良是種罕見的遺傳性疾病。
Tardive dyskinesia is a side effect of some medications. 遲發性運動障礙是某些藥物的副作用。
Dyskinesia involves involuntary and uncontrollable movements. 運動障礙涉及不自主且無法控制的動作。
The patient had a dyskinetic gait that was quite unsteady. 病人有著非常不穩的運動障礙步態。
They observed dyskinetic movements in the subject during the test. 他們在測試期間觀察到受試者的運動障礙動作。
Dyslalia can be caused by structural abnormalities in the mouth. 構音不全是可能由口腔結構異常引起的。
The child was referred to a speech therapist for his dyslalia. 這孩子因其構音不全而被轉介給語言治療師。

meaning: 以閱讀和寫作困難為特徵的學習障礙。
sentences: The term dyslexia refers to a learning disability characterized by reading and writing difficulties. 閱讀障礙一詞是指以閱讀和寫作困難為特徵的學習障礙。
The lesson introduced dyslexia as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了閱讀障礙這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Dyslogia is a symptom of certain psychiatric disorders. 言語困難是某些精神障礙的症狀。
The psychiatrist noted the patient's dyslogia during the interview. 精神科醫生在面談中注意到了病人的思維混亂。
The critic used several dyslogistic terms to describe the performance. 評論家使用了幾個貶義詞來描述這場表演。
He avoided dyslogistic language when giving feedback. 他在提供反饋時避免使用貶義語言。
She spoke dyslogistically of the new policy. 她貶義地談論了這項新政策。
The term was used dyslogistically in the debate. 該術語在辯論中被貶義地使用。
Dyslogy can make it hard for a person to express their thoughts. 言語障礙會使一個人難以表達自己的想法。
They studied the underlying causes of dyslogy in the patients. 他們研究了病人言語障礙的潛在原因。
Dysluite is a variety of gahnite containing manganese. 鋅尖晶石是含有錳的鋅鐵尖晶石的一種。
Samples of dysluite were found in the old quarry. 在舊採石場發現了鋅尖晶石樣本。
Dyslysin is a substance formed by the decomposition of bile acids. 脫膽酸是膽汁酸分解形成的物質。
The chemist analyzed the properties of dyslysin in the lab. 化學家在實驗室分析了脫膽酸的性質。
Dysmenorrhea can be treated with over-the-counter pain relievers. 經痛可以用非處方止痛藥治療。
She suffered from severe dysmenorrhea every month. 她每個月都受嚴重的經痛之苦。
Dysmenorrheal pain can interfere with daily activities. 經痛可能干擾日常活動。
She sought medical advice for her dysmenorrheal symptoms. 她就她的經痛症狀諮詢了醫生。
Dysmerism is a condition in which parts of an organism are not normally divided. Dysmerism 是指生物體部分未正常分裂的情況。
The biologist studied the instances of dysmerism in the species. 生物學家研究了該物種中不完全分裂的案例。
The dysmeristic traits were evident in the mutant plants. 在變異植物中，不完全分裂的特徵很明顯。
They analyzed the dysmeristic patterns in the embryo. 他們分析了胚胎中的不完全分裂模式。
Dysmerogenesis can lead to structural abnormalities. 不完全發育可能導致結構異常。
The study focused on the genetic causes of dysmerogenesis. 研究重點在於不完全發育的遺傳原因。
The dysmerogenetic changes occurred during the early stages of development. 不完全發育的變化發生在發育的早期階段。
Dysmerogenetic disorders are often difficult to treat. 不完全發育障礙通常難以治療。
A dysmeromorph is an organism with abnormal symmetry. 不完全形態是指對稱性異常的生物。
The researcher identified several dysmeromorphs in the population. 研究人員在群體中辨認出幾個不完全形態生物。
The dysmeromorphic structures were analyzed under the microscope. 在顯微鏡下分析了不完全形態的結構。
The study documented the dysmeromorphic features of the specimen. 該研究記錄了標本的不完全形態特徵。
Dysmetria is a lack of coordination in movement where a person overshoots or undershoots their target. 辨距不良是指動作不協調，導致一個人超過或未及目標。
The patient exhibited dysmetria during the finger-to-nose test. 病人在指鼻測試中表現出辨距不良。
Dysmnesia involves an impaired memory or difficulty in remembering. 記憶障礙涉及記憶受損或記憶困難。
He struggled with dysmnesia after the head injury. 他在頭部受傷後飽受記憶障礙之苦。
Facial dysmorphism can be a feature of certain genetic syndromes. 面部畸形可能是某些遺傳綜合徵的一個特徵。
The pediatrician checked the newborn for signs of dysmorphism. 兒科醫生檢查了新生兒是否有畸形跡象。
Dysmorphophobia is an obsessive preoccupation with a perceived flaw in one's appearance. 畸形恐懼症是對自己外貌中察覺到的缺陷的強迫性全神貫注。
She sought therapy to cope with her severe dysmorphophobia. 她尋求治療以應對嚴重的畸形恐懼症。
Dysneuria refers to an impairment of nerve function. 神經功能障礙是指神經功能的受損。
The patient complained of numbness caused by dysneuria. 病人抱怨由神經功能障礙引起的麻木。
The state of dysnomy led to widespread social unrest. 法律混亂的狀態導致了廣泛的社會動盪。
They criticized the dysnomy of the current legal system. 他們批評了當前法律制度的混亂。
Dysodile is a type of coal that burns with a very unpleasant odor. 紙煤是一種燃燒時會發出非常難聞氣味的煤。
Samples of dysodile were collected from the ancient lake beds. 從古代湖床中收集了紙煤樣本。

meaning: 牙齒發育不全；出牙困難
sentences: Dysodontiasis can cause pain and inflammation in infants. 出牙困難會引起嬰兒疼痛和發炎。
The dentist explained the causes of dysodontiasis. 牙醫解釋了牙齒發育不全的原因。
Dysorexia is a symptom often seen in cases of chronic illness. 食慾不振是慢性疾病中常見的症狀。
He lost weight due to his constant dysorexia. 由於持續的食慾不振，他的體重減輕了。
Dysorexy can lead to nutritional deficiencies if left untreated. 如果不治療，食慾異常可能導致營養缺乏。
The doctor discussed the patient's dysorexy during the consultation. 醫生在諮詢期間討論了病人的食慾異常。
Dysoxidation can result in the accumulation of harmful byproducts. 氧化不全可能導致有害副產物的累積。
They studied the effects of dysoxidation in industrial processes. 他們研究了工業過程中氧化不全的影響。
The material is dysoxidizable even at high temperatures. 即使在高溫下，該材料也難以氧化。
Gold is a well-known dysoxidizable metal. 黃金是眾所周知的難氧化金屬。
The treatment was designed to dysoxidize the surface of the metal. 該處理旨在使金屬表面難以氧化。
They developed a method to dysoxidize various chemical compounds. 他們開發了一種使各種化學化合物難以氧化的方法。
He had a dyspathetic attitude towards the new proposals. 他對新提議持反感態度。
The audience remained dyspathetic throughout the speech. 在整個演講過程中，聽眾保持冷淡。
Dyspathy is the opposite of sympathy and involve a lack of shared feeling. 反感是同情的對立面，涉及缺乏共同情感。
He felt a deep sense of dyspathy for his rivals. 他對他的對手感到深深的反感。
He suffers from chronic dyspepsia after eating spicy food. 吃完辛辣食物後，他患有慢性消化不良。
Dyspepsia can cause bloating and discomfort in the stomach. 消化不良會引起胃部脹氣和不適。
Dyspepsy is a common ailment that affects many people. 消化不良是影響許多人的常見疾病。
Avoiding large meals can help reduce the frequency of dyspepsy. 避免大餐可以幫助減少消化不良的頻率。
He had a dyspeptic expression on his face throughout the meeting. 在整個會議中，他臉上一直掛著不悅的表情。
A dyspeptic person is often irritable and hard to please. 消化不良（或脾氣壞）的人通常易怒且難以討好。
The doctor provided a dyspeptical diagnosis for the stomach pain. 醫生對胃痛給出了消化不良的診斷。
She followed a strict diet due to her dyspeptical symptoms. 由於消化不良症狀，她遵循嚴格的飲食。
He grumbled dyspeptically about the poor service. 他因消化不良（或心情不好）而對惡劣的服務嘀咕著。
She reacted dyspeptically to any suggestions for change. 她對任何變革建議都反應冷淡。
Dysphagia can make it difficult and painful to swallow food. 吞嚥困難會使吞嚥食物變得困難且痛苦。
The patient was evaluated for dysphagia after the stroke. 病人在中風後接受了吞嚥困難評估。
A dysphagic diet often consists of thickened liquids and soft foods. 吞嚥困難飲食通常由增稠的液體和軟食組成。
The nurse assisted the dysphagic patient during mealtime. 護士在用餐時間協助吞嚥困難的病人。
Dysphasia is a language disorder that results from brain damage. 言語障礙是腦損傷導致的一種語言障礙。
He struggled with expressive dysphasia after the accident. 事故發生後，他飽受表達性言語障礙之苦。
The dysphasic patient used gestures to communicate his needs. 這位言語障礙的病人用手勢來表達他的需求。
Therapy can help improve the speech of a dysphasic person. 治療可以幫助改善言語障礙者的說話能力。
Dysphemia is a clinical term for stuttering or stammering. Dysphemia 是口吃或結巴的臨床術語。
The child's dysphemia became more pronounced when he was nervous. 這孩子緊張時口吃會變得更加明顯。
Dysphonia can cause a hoarse or raspy voice. 發聲困難會導致聲音沙啞。
The singer sought medical help for her persistent dysphonia. 歌手為她持續的發聲困難尋求醫療幫助。
He had a dysphonic voice due to the cold. 由於感冒，他發聲困難。
The teacher became dysphonic after a long day of lecturing. 教師在長達一天的講課後變得發聲困難。
Gender dysphoria is the distress caused by a mismatch between gender identity and assigned sex. 性別不安是指因性別認同與出生時性別不一致而引起的困擾。
He experienced a sense of dysphoria during the winter months. 他在冬季幾個月裡感到一種心情不佳。

meaning: 躁動不安的；心情不佳的
sentences: The patient had a dysphoric mood throughout the day. 病人整天心情都不好。
She felt dysphoric and restless after hearing the news. 聽到這個消息後，她感到躁動不安。
The dysphotic zone of the ocean receives very little sunlight. 海洋的微光帶接收到的陽光非常少。
Specialized creatures live in the dysphotic depths of the sea. 專門的生物生活在海洋的微光深處。
Dysphrasia involves difficulty in correctly arranging words in a sentence. 遣詞障礙涉及難以在句子中正確安排詞語。
The doctor examined the patient for signs of dysphrasia. 醫生檢查病人是否有遣詞障礙的跡象。

meaning: 精神分裂 (舊稱)；精神障礙
sentences: Dysphrenia is an older term used for certain mental disorders. Dysphrenia 是用於某些精神障礙的一個舊術語。
He read about the history of dysphrenia in a medical textbook. 他在醫學教科書中讀到了關於 Dysphrenia 的歷史。
Dyspituitarism can affect growth and metabolism. 腦垂體功能障礙可能影響生長和代謝。
The endocrinologist treated the child for dyspituitarism. 內分泌學家為這孩子治療腦垂體功能障礙。
Hip dysplasia is a common condition in some dog breeds. 髖關節發育不良是某些犬種常見的狀況。
Cervical dysplasia involves abnormal cell growth on the cervix. 子宮頸發育不良涉及子宮頸上異常的細胞生長。
The doctor monitored the dysplastic cells for any changes. 醫生監測發育不良的細胞是否有任何變化。
Dysplastic nevi are unusual moles that may increase the risk of melanoma. 發育不良痣是可能增加黑色素瘤風險的異常痣。
Dyspnea can be caused by heart or lung problems. 呼吸困難可能由心臟或肺部問題引起。
The patient complained of sudden dyspnea after climbing the stairs. 病人抱怨爬樓梯後突然呼吸困難。
The physician observed the patient's dyspneal symptoms. 醫生觀察了病人的呼吸困難症狀。
Dyspneal attacks can be very frightening for patients. 呼吸困難的發作對病人來說可能非常可怕。
The dyspneic patient was given supplemental oxygen. 呼吸困難的病人接受了氧氣補充。
He became dyspneic during the exercise test. 他在運動測試中變得呼吸困難。
Dyspnoic breathing is a sign of respiratory distress. 呼吸困難的呼吸是呼吸窘迫的跡象。
The medical team focused on stabilizing the dyspnoic patient. 醫療團隊致力於穩定呼吸困難的病人。
Dysprosia is the oxide form of the element dysprosium. 氧化鏑是元素鏑的氧化物形式。
The properties of dysprosia were studied in the chemical laboratory. 氧化鏑的性質在化學實驗室中被研究。
Dysprosium is a rare earth metal with the symbol Dy. 鏑是一種稀土金屬，符號為 Dy。
Dysprosium is used in high-intensity lamps and nuclear reactors. 鏑用於高強度燈和核反應堆中。
Dysraphia refers to a failure of the neural tube to close. 縫合不全是指神經管未能閉合。
Spina bifida is a type of spinal dysraphia. 脊柱裂是脊柱縫合不全的一種。
Dyssnite is an older name for a variety of rhodonite. Dyssnite 是薔薇輝石變種的一個舊稱。
He added a sample of dyssnite to his mineral collection. 他將黑銠石樣本加入到他的礦物收藏中。
Dyssodia is a medical term for a foul or unpleasant odor. 惡臭是一個用於描述難聞氣味的醫學術語。
The doctor investigated the cause of the patient's dyssodia. 醫生調查了病人身上惡臭的原因。
Dysspermatism is a condition that affects male reproductive function. 射精困難是影響男性生殖功能的一種狀況。
The patient sought treatment for his dysspermatism. 病人為其射精困難尋求治療。
Dyssynergia involves a lack of coordination between muscle groups. 協調不全涉及肌肉群之間缺乏協調。
Pelvic floor dyssynergia can cause problems with elimination. 盆底協調不全會導致排泄問題。
Dyssystole refers to an incomplete or abnormal cardiac contraction. 心收縮不全是指心臟收縮不完全或異常。
The cardiologist analyzed the patient's dyssystole using an EKG. 心臟科醫生使用心電圖分析了病人的心收縮不全。
Dystaxia is a mild form of ataxia, or lack of muscle control. 動作不協調是共濟失調（或缺乏肌肉控制）的一種輕微形式。
The patient showed signs of dystaxia in his walk. 病人在走路時顯示出動作不協調的跡象。
A dystectic mixture has a higher melting point than its components. 難熔混合物的熔點高於其組成部分。
The researcher studied the dystectic properties of the alloy. 研究人員研究了該合金的難熔性質。
Dysteleological arguments suggest that the universe has no inherent purpose. 無目的論的論據表明宇宙沒有固有的目的。
The philosopher explored the dysteleological nature of existence. 哲學家探索了存在之無目的性質。
A dysteleologist believes that biological features have no final cause. 無目的論者相信生物特徵沒有最終原因。
The writings of the dysteleologist were debated by theologians. 無目的論者的著作受到了神學家的爭論。
Dysteleology is the study of organs or features that seem to have no function. 無目的論是研究似乎沒有功能的器官或特徵的學問。
The concept of dysteleology was introduced in the 19th century. 無目的論的概念是在 19 世紀引入的。
Dysthyroidism can lead to weight changes and fatigue. 甲狀腺功能障礙可能導致體重變化和疲勞。
The patient was diagnosed with dysthyroidism after a blood test. 驗血後，病人被診斷出患有甲狀腺功能障礙。
Dystocia can be caused by the position of the fetus. 難產可能由胎位引起。
The veterinarian assisted in a case of dystocia in a cow. 獸醫協助了一例母牛難產的案例。
The dystocial symptoms were monitored closely during labor. 在分娩期間密切監測難產症狀。
Dystocial complications require immediate medical intervention. 難產併發症需要立即的醫療干預。
The dystome organism has an underdeveloped mouth structure. 口部不全的生物具有發育不全的口部結構。
They observed the dystome features in the larval stage. 他們在幼蟲階段觀察到了口部不全的特徵。
The dystomic classification refers to certain types of invertebrates. 口部不全的分類是指某些類型的無脊椎動物。
The researcher studied the dystomic adaptations of the species. 研究人員研究了該物種口部不全的適應性。
Dystomous creatures often feed through absorption. 口部不全的生物通常通過吸收進食。
The textbook described the anatomy of dystomous animals. 教科書描述了口部不全動物的解剖結構。
Muscular dystrophia is a group of diseases that cause muscle weakness. 肌肉萎縮是一組引起肌肉虛弱的疾病。
The patient showed signs of retinal dystrophia. 病人顯示出視網膜萎縮的跡象。
Dystrophic lakes are high in organic matter and low in nutrients. 營養不良湖泊含有高有機質但低營養鹽。
They studied the dystrophic changes in the affected tissue. 他們研究了受損組織中的萎縮性變化。
We practiced using dystrophy in two different sentences. 我們練習把 dystrophy 放進兩個不同句子裡。
We discussed the term dystrophy in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 dystrophy 這個詞。
Dysuria is often a symptom of a urinary tract infection. 排尿困難通常是尿路感染的症狀。
The patient sought help for severe dysuria and frequent urination. 病人因嚴重的尿痛和頻尿尋求幫助。
The dysuric condition was treated with antibiotics. 排尿困難的狀況使用抗生素治療。
He experienced dysuric pain throughout the night. 他整晚都感到排尿困難的疼痛。
Dysyntribite is a massive variety of muscovite mica. 塊狀絹雲母是大塊的白雲母。
The geologist identified the green rock as dysyntribite. 地質學家將這塊綠色岩石鑑定為塊狀絹雲母。
The dytiscid is a type of diving beetle. 龍蝨是一種潛水甲蟲。
We found a dytiscid in the garden pond. 我們在花園池塘裡發現了一隻龍蝨。
Dytiscidae is a family of water beetles known as predaceous diving beetles. 龍蝨科是以捕食性潛水甲蟲聞名的水生甲蟲科。
Research on Dytiscidae helps understand aquatic ecosystems. 對龍蝨科的研究有助於了解水生生態系統。
Dytiscus marginalis is the great blocked diving beetle. 大龍蝨是著名的潛水甲蟲。
The Dytiscus beetle is an excellent swimmer. 龍蝨屬甲蟲是出色的游泳者。
The dzeren is a species of antelope native to Central Asia. 黃羊是原產於中亞的一種羚羊。
Herds of dzeren migrate across the Mongolian steppes. 成群的黃羊遷徙穿越蒙古草原。
The Dzungar people formed a powerful khanate in Central Asia. 準噶爾人在中亞建立了一個強大的汗國。
He read about the history of the Dzungar expansion. 他讀了關於準噶爾擴張的歷史。
